reference: Rahoton ya buɗe ne tare da roƙo don buɗe muhawara da kuma kafa yarjejeniya a Amurka game da manufofin Gabas ta Tsakiya.

input.mt: Rahoton ya fara da kira ga tattaunawa ta bude ido da kuma samar da yarjejeniya a Amurka game da manufofin gabas ta tsakiya.
input.src: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.

reference: Rahoton ya yi matuƙar yin suka ga kusan dukkan ɓangarorin manufar Ɓangaren zartaswa na yanzu akan ƙasar Iraƙi inda ya nemi a gaggauta canja alƙibla.

input.mt: Rahoton yana da matukar sukar kusan kowane bangare na manufofin zartarwa na yanzu ga Iraki kuma yana kira ga gaggawa canji na shugabanci.
input.src: The Report is highly critical of almost every aspect of the present policy of the Executive towards Iraq and it urges an immediate change of direction.

reference: Na farko daga cikin shawarwarin da ta ba su guda 78 shi ne cewa ya kamata a dauki wani sabon shiri na diflomasiyya kafin karshen wannan shekarar don kiyaye iyakokin Iraki kan tsoma bakin da ake yi da kuma sake kulla alakar diflomasiyya da makwabtanta.

input.mt: Na farko daga cikin shawarwari 78 da ta bayar shi ne cewa ya kamata a dauki sabon shiri na diflomasiyya kafin karshen wannan shekara don tabbatar da iyakar Iraki daga hare-haren abokan gaba da kuma sake kafa dangantakar diflomasiyya da makwabta.
input.src: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.

reference: Majalisar dattijai da matar shugaban kasar Argentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner ta sanar da fitowar takarar shugaban kasa a yammacin jiya a La Plata, gari dake kilomita 50 (Mil 31) daga Buenos Aires.

input.mt: Sanata na yanzu kuma uwargidan farko na Argentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner ta sanar da takarar ta a matsayin shugaban kasa a daren jiya a La Plata, birni mai nisan kilomita 50 daga Buenos Aires.
input.src: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.

reference: Mrs. Kirchner ta bayyana ra’niyyarta ta tsayawa takarar shugabanci a Gidan wasannin Argentina, wurin da ta yi amfani da shi domin fara kanfen ɗinta na takarar Majalisar Dattawa a shekarar 2005 a matsayinta na wakiliyar Buenos Aires.

input.mt: Mrs. Kirchner ta sanar da niyyarta ta tsaya takarar shugaban kasa a gidan wasan kwaikwayo na Argentina, wuri guda da ta fara yakin neman zaben ta 2005 don Majalisar Dattijai a matsayin memba na tawagar lardin Buenos Aires.
input.src: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.

reference: Muhawarar ta samo asali sakamakon rudani game da kashe kudi wajen bada tallafi da sake gine-gine bayan faruwar guguwar katrina, abinda masu ra’ayin mazan jiya su ke tsokana da cewa “Cuwa-cuwar Bush ta New Orleans”

input.mt: Wannan muhawara ta taso ne ta hanyar jayayya game da kashe kuɗi don taimako da sake ginawa bayan Hurricane Katrina; wanda wasu masu ra'ayin mazan jiya na kudi suka lakafta "Bush's New Orleans Deal".
input.src: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

reference: Korafe-korafe kan yunƙurin sake gine-ginen ya maida hankali ne a kan bayar da kwangilolin sake ginin ga waɗanda ake ganin ‘yan cikin gida ne a Washington.

input.mt: Ƙididdigar 'yanci game da kokarin sake ginawa ta mayar da hankali ne akan bayar da kwangila na sake ginawa ga mutanen da aka ɗauka a cikin Washington.
input.src: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.

reference: Fiye da mutane miliyan huɗu suka je Rome don halartar jana’izar.

input.mt: Mutane fiye da miliyan huɗu ne suka je Roma don su halarci jana'izar.
input.src: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.

reference: mutanen da suka halarta sun yi yawa yadda ba zai yiwu kowa ya iya samun shiga wajen jana’izar ba da ke dandalin Peter.

input.mt: Yawan mutanen da suka halarci taron ya yi yawa sosai har ba kowa ba ne zai iya halartar jana'izar a dandalin St. Peter.
input.src: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.

reference: An kafa manya garkuwan talabijin da dama wurare da dama a Rome domin mutane su samu daman kallon bikin.

input.mt: An saka manyan allon talabijin da yawa a wurare dabam-dabam a Roma don mutane su kalli bikin.
input.src: Several large television screens were installed in various places in Rome to let the people watch the ceremony.

reference: A sauran biranen kasar Italiya da kuma sauran kasashen duniya musamman a Poland, an kafa makamancin ginuwar wanda ya samu dubiyar jama’a da dama.

input.mt: A wasu birane da yawa a Italiya da kuma sauran ƙasashen duniya, musamman a Poland, an yi irin waɗannan shirye-shiryen, kuma mutane da yawa sun saurare su.
input.src: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.

reference: Masana tarihi sun soki manufofin Hukumar bincike ta Amurka saboda mai da hankali wajen laifuka wadanda ke da saukin warwarewa, musamman satar motoci, domin kawai su nuna yawan nasarar da su ke samu.

input.mt: Masana tarihi sun soki manufofin da suka gabata na FBI don mayar da hankali ga albarkatun kan shari'o'in da ke da sauƙin warwarewa, musamman shari'o'in mota da aka sata, tare da niyyar haɓaka nasarar hukumar.
input.src: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.

reference: Majalisa ta fara samar da kuɗaɗe ga tsarin batsa a kasafin kudi na 2005 kuma ta fayyace cewa dole FBI ta ware jami’ai 10 don lura da hotunan batsa na manya.

input.mt: Majalisa ta fara tallafawa shirin lalata a shekara ta 2005 kuma ta ƙayyade cewa FBI dole ne ta sadaukar da wakilai 10 ga batsa ga manya.
input.src: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.

reference: Robin Uthapa ya ci makunan wasan kriket mafi sama, guduwa 70 cikin kawai ƙwallaye 41 ta hanyar bugawa huɗu guda 11 da kuma shida guda 2.

input.mt: Robin Uthappa ya zira kwallaye mafi girma, 70 a cikin kwallaye 41 kawai ta hanyar buga 11 huɗu da shida biyu.
input.src: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.

reference: ‘Yan wasan kurket na tsakiya, Sachin Tendulkar da Rahul Dravid, sun yi kokari kuma sun yi haɗin gwiwa tare a Tseren-ɗari.

input.mt: 'Yan wasan tsakiya, Sachin Tendulkar da Rahul Dravid, sun yi aiki mai kyau kuma sun yi haɗin gwiwar gudu ɗari.
input.src: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.

reference: Amma, bayan rashin nasarar kyaftin din wicket Indiya kawai tayi asarar guda 36 tana kwance wickets 7 don kawo karshen innings.

input.mt: Amma, bayan da ta rasa wicket na kyaftin India ta yi kawai 36 runs ta rasa 7 wickets don kawo karshen innings.
input.src: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.

reference: Shugaban kasar America George W. Bush ya iso Singapore a safiya 16 ga Nuwanba, domin fara yawon bude ido na tsawon mako daya a Asiya.

input.mt: Shugaban Amurka George W. Bush ya isa Singapore da safe a ranar 16 ga watan Nuwamba, yana fara yawon shakatawa na mako guda a Asiya.
input.src: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.

reference: Mataimakin Firayi Ministan Singapore Wong Kan Sang ne ya tarbe shi, sannan su ka tattauna al’amuran kasuwanci da ta’addanci tare da Firayi Ministan Singapore Lee Hsien Loong.

input.mt: Mataimakin Firayim Ministan Singapore Wong Kan Seng ya gaishe shi kuma ya tattauna batun kasuwanci da ta'addanci tare da Firayim Ministan Singapore Lee Hsien Loong.
input.src: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.

reference: Bayan mako guda da shan kaye a zabukan tsakiyar wa’adi, Bush ya fada wa wasu magoya baya fadadar kasuwanci a Asiya.

input.mt: Bayan mako guda na rashin nasara a zaben tsakiyar lokaci, Bush ya gaya wa masu sauraro game da fadada cinikayya a Asiya.
input.src: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.

reference: Firayi Minista Stephen Harper, ya amince da aika kudurin ‘Dokar “Tsarkakakkiyar Iska’ zuwa ga kwamitin gamayyar jam’iyyu don sake dubawa, kafin ayi mata karatu na biyu, bayan taron mintuna 25 na ranar Talata tare da shugaban jam’iyyar NDP Jack Layton a PMO.

input.mt: Firayim Minista Stephen Harper ya amince ya aika da dokar tsabtace iska ta gwamnati ga kwamitin jam'iyyun don bita, kafin karatun ta na biyu, bayan ganawar minti 25 da shugaban NDP Jack Layton a PMO a ranar Talata.
input.src: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.

reference: Layton ya nemi canje-canje ga dokar ra’ayin mazan jiya yanayi lokacin haduwa da Firayim Ministan, yana tambaya don “cikakken sake rubutawar” dokan Jam'iyyar ra’ayin mazan jiya.

input.mt: Layton ya nemi canje-canje ga dokar muhalli ta masu ra'ayin mazan jiya a lokacin ganawar da ya yi da Firayim Minista, yana neman "cike da cikakken sake rubutawa" na dokar muhalli ta jam'iyyar Conservative.
input.src: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.

reference: Tun daga lokacin da Gwamnatin Tarayya ta shiga daukar nauyin asibitin Mersey da ke Devonport, Tasmania, gwamnatin jihar da wasu ‘yan majalisar tarayya sun soki wannan aikin a matsayin ci gaban shirin zaben tarayya da za a kira a watan Nuwamba.

input.mt: Tun lokacin da Gwamnatin Tarayya ta shiga ciki don karɓar kuɗin asibitin Mersey a Devonport, Tasmania, gwamnatin jihar da wasu 'yan majalisa na tarayya sun soki wannan aikin a matsayin abin takaici a gaban zaben tarayya da za a kira a watan Nuwamba.
input.src: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.

reference: Amma Firayim Minista John Howard ya ce dokar an yi ta ne domin kare ginin asibitin domin kada gwamnatin Tasmania ta rage masa kima, wajen kara kudaden da dala miliyan 45 ta Australiya.

input.mt: Amma Firayim Minista John Howard ya ce aikin ne kawai don kare wuraren asibitin daga gwamnatin Tasmania, ta ba da karin AUD $ 45 miliyan.
input.src: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.

reference: Labari na baya bayan nan ya nuna cewa, nazarin motsin teku na nuna alamun wata tsunami ta taso. Hakika an tabbatar da alamun tsunami a kusa da Pago da Niue.

input.mt: Rahotanni na baya-bayan nan sun nuna cewa akwai tsunami a kusa da Pago Pago da Niue.
input.src: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.

reference: Ba a sami wata mummunar barna ko jin ciwo a rahoton da ke fitowa daga Tonga ba, amma kuma wutar lantarki ta katse, abinda ya hana hukumomi samun sanarwar gargadin tsunami wanda hukumar PTWC ta bayar.

input.mt: Babu wani mummunan lalacewa ko raunin da aka ruwaito a Tonga, amma an rasa wutar lantarki na wucin gadi, wanda a cewar rahotanni ya hana hukumomin Tonga karɓar gargaɗin tsunami da PTWC ta bayar.
input.src: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.

reference: An rufe duk makarantu goma sha hudu a Huawaii wadanda suke kusa da bakin teku a ranar Laraba duk da cewa an janye jan kunnen.

input.mt: Makarantu 14 a Hawaii da ke kusa da tekun sun rufe a ranar Laraba duk da cewa an soke gargadi.
input.src: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.

reference: Shugaban Amurka George W. Bush ya yi maraba da sanarwar.

input.mt: Shugaban Amurka George W. Bush ya yi maraba da sanarwar.
input.src: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.

reference: Mai magana da yawun Bush Gordon Johndroe ya kira alwashin da Koriya ta Arewa ta yi “babban mataki ne ga burin cimma nasarar narkar da makaman nukiliya na zirin Koriya.”

input.mt: Mai magana da yawun Bush Gordon Johndroe ya kira alkawarin Koriya ta Arewa "babban mataki ne wajen cimma burin kawar da makaman nukiliya na yankin Koriya".
input.src: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."

reference: Guguwar teku ta goma da aka sakawa suna Jerry a kakar guguwar tekun Atalantika ta fara a yau.

input.mt: Guguwa ta goma mai suna ta Atlantic Hurricane Season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, ta samo asali a Tekun Atlantika a yau.
input.src: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.

reference: Cibiyar kula da guguwar teku ta kasa (NHC) ta ce a yanzu guguwar Jerry ba ta da wani hadari ga doron kasa.

input.mt: Cibiyar Hurricane ta kasa (NHC) ta ce a wannan lokacin Jerry ba ya kawo barazana ga saukowa.
input.src: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.

reference: {Ungiyar Injiniya ta Amurka ta kiyasta cewa inci 6 na ruwan sama zai iya keta ragowar guguwar da ta gabata.

input.mt: Ma'aikatan aikin injiniya na Amirka sun kiyasta cewa ruwan sama mai tsawon inci shida zai iya lalata wuraren da aka lalata a dā.
input.src: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.

reference: Unguwa ta tara, wacce ta ga ambaliyar ruwa har sama da ƙafa 20 a lokacin Guguwar Katrina, a halin yanzu tana cikin ruwa mai ɗumbin yawa yayin da levee na kusa ya cika.

input.mt: Ward na Tara, wanda ya ga ambaliyar sama da mita 20 a lokacin Hurricane Katrina, a halin yanzu yana cikin ruwa mai tsayi yayin da aka rufe dam da ke kusa.
input.src: The Ninth Ward, which saw flooding as high as 20 feet during Hurricane Katrina, is currently in waist-high water as the nearby levee was overtopped.

reference: Ruwa na zubewa kan levee a sashi mai fadin kafa 100.

input.mt: Ruwa yana gudana a kan dam a wani sashe mai fadin mita 100.
input.src: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.

reference: Mai Gudanarwa na Ƙaramar Majalisa Adam Cuerden ya nuna ɓacin ransa a game da sharewa a lokacin da ya ke magana da Wikinews a watan da ya gabata.

input.mt: Gwamnan Commons Adam Cuerden ya nuna takaici game da sharewa lokacin da ya yi magana da Wikinews a watan da ya gabata.
input.src: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.

reference: “Tun daga farko [Wales] ta yi mana karya. Na farko, ta hanyar yin kamar wannan saboda dalilai ne na doka. Na biyu, ta hanyar yin kamar yana sauraron mu, har zuwa goge fasaharsa.”

input.mt: "Ya yi mana ƙarya tun daga farko, na farko, ta wajen yin kamar yana yin hakan ne don dalilai na shari'a, na biyu, ta wajen yin kamar yana sauraronmu, har sai da ya share abubuwan da ya rubuta".
input.src: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."

reference: Fushin al’ummar ya kai ga ƙoƙarin da ake yi na samar da tsari dangane da al’amuran da suka jibanci jima’i a shafin da ke daukar miliyoyin kafafen yada labarai da ke da lasisi.

input.mt: Tashin hankali na al'umma ya haifar da ƙoƙarin da ake yi na yanzu don tsara manufofin da suka shafi abubuwan jima'i don shafin da ke da miliyoyin kafofin watsa labarai da aka ba da lasisi a fili.
input.src: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.

reference: Mafi yawancin aiki da aka yi a rubuce ne, amma an tsara tsarin ne domin bunkasa lura da ake wa taurarin Sagittarius.

input.mt: Ayyukan da aka yi sun fi yawa a ka'idar, amma an rubuta shirin ne don yin koyi da abubuwan da aka yi game da tauraron Sagittarius.
input.src: The work done was mostly theoretical, but the program was written to simulate observations made of the Sagittarius galaxy.

reference: Tasirin da ƙungiyar ke nema zai haifar ne ta hanyar karfi tsakanin igiyar ruwa tsakanin galaxy da Milky Way mai duhu.

input.mt: Sakamakon da ƙungiyar ke nema zai kasance sakamakon ƙarfin ruwa tsakanin duhu na galaxy da kuma duhu na Milky Way.
input.src: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.

reference: Wannan ka'idar tana cewa mafi akasarin duhun da ke kusa da galaxy ana samun shi ne a kusa da galaxy a wani nau'in halo, kuma an yi shi da kananan kananan kwayoyi.

input.mt: Wannan ka'idar ta ce mafi yawan abubuwa masu duhu da ke kewaye da galaxy suna kewaye da galaxy a cikin wani nau'i na halo, kuma an yi shi ne da yawa kananan ƙwayoyin.
input.src: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.

reference: Rahotannin talabijin sun nuna farin hayaki na fitowa daga shukar.

input.mt: Rahotanni na talabijin sun nuna fararen hayaki da ke fitowa daga wurin.
input.src: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.

reference: Mahukuntan yankin suna gargadin mazauna yankin da ke kusa da masana’antar da su kasance cikin gidajensu, a kashe na’urorin sanyaya ɗaki kuma kada a sha ruwan famfo.

input.mt: Hukumomin yankin sun gargadi mazauna yankin su zauna a gida, su kashe iska kuma kada su sha ruwan famfo.
input.src: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.

reference: A cewar hukumar nukiliya ta Japan, an gano sinadaran caesium da iodine masu hadari a ma’aikatar.

input.mt: A cewar hukumar nukiliya ta Japan, an gano cesium da iodine masu aikin rediyo a tashar.
input.src: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.

reference: Hukumomi suna hasashen cewa wannan yana nuna cewa mai yiwuwa gangunan da a ke ajiye man uranium a wurin sun fashe kuma suna zuba.

input.mt: Hukumomi sun yi hasashen cewa wannan ya nuna cewa kwantena da ke ɗauke da man fetur na uranium a wurin na iya fashewa kuma suna zubar da ruwa.
input.src: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.

reference: Dokta Tony Moll ya gano kwayar cutar tarin fuka (XDR-TB) a yankin Afirka ta Kudu KwaZulu-Natal.

input.mt: Dr. Tony Moll ya gano tarin fuka mai tsayayya da miyagun ƙwayoyi (XDR-TB) a yankin KwaZulu-Natal na Afirka ta Kudu.
input.src: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.

reference: A cikin wata hira, ya ce sabuwar cutar “na da matukar tada hankali da firgitarwa saboda yawan mace-macen da ta ke haddasawa.”

input.mt: A wata hira, ya ce sabon nau'in "yana da matukar damuwa da damuwa saboda yawan mutuwar".
input.src: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."

reference: Kila wasu marasa lafiya sun kamu da cutar a asibiti, Dokta Moll yana tsammani, kuma aƙalla biyu sun kasance ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya na asibiti.

input.mt: Dokta Moll ya ce wasu marasa lafiya za su iya kamuwa da cutar a asibiti, kuma akalla biyu daga cikinsu ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya ne.
input.src: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.

reference: Nan da shekara ɗaya, mutum daya mai ɗauke da cutar zai shafa ma mutane 10 zuwa 15 da suka kusance shi.

input.mt: A cikin shekara guda, mutum mai kamuwa da cutar zai iya kamuwa da mutane 10 zuwa 15 da suka yi kusa da shi.
input.src: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.

reference: Sai dai, kashin XDR-TB da ke jikin duk rukunin mutane da ke da tarin fuka har yanzu da alamar yana ƙasa; 6,000 daga cikin jimillar mutane 330,000 da suka kamu a kowane lokaci a Afirka ta Kudu.

input.mt: Duk da haka, kashi na XDR-TB a cikin dukan rukunin mutanen da ke fama da tarin fuka har yanzu ba shi da yawa; mutane 6,000 daga jimillar mutane 330,000 da suka kamu da cutar a kowane lokaci a Afirka ta Kudu.
input.src: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.

reference: Taurarin dan adam ɗin, waɗanda duka biyun nauyinsu ya haura da ƙarin fam 1,000, kuma suke tafiyar kimanin mil 17,500 a sa'a guda, sun yi karo da juna mil 491 sama da Duniya.

input.mt: Wadannan tauraron dan adam, duka biyu suna da nauyin fiye da fam 1,000, kuma suna tafiya da kimanin kilomita 17,500 a kowace awa, sun yi karo da mil 491 a sama da duniya.
input.src: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.

reference: Masana kimiyya sun ce fashewar da hatsarin ya haifar na da girma.

input.mt: Masana kimiyya sun ce fashewar da ta faru ta kasance babba.
input.src: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.

reference: Har yanzu suna ƙoƙarin gano yadda girman hatsarin ya kasance da kuma yadda abin zai shafi Duniya.

input.mt: Har yanzu suna ƙoƙarin sanin girman abin da ya faru da kuma yadda hakan zai shafi duniya.
input.src: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.

reference: Hukumar Dabaru ta Amurka wato United States Strategic Command ta Ofishin Tsaron Amurka tana bin diddigin ɓarɓashi.

input.mt: Rundunar Sojojin Amurka ta ofishin Ma'aikatar Tsaron Amurka na bin diddigin abubuwan da suka rushe.
input.src: The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.

reference: Sakamakon binciken makirci za'a sanya shi zuwa gidan yanar gizon jama'a.

input.mt: Za a buga sakamakon nazarin zane a shafin yanar gizo na jama'a.
input.src: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.

reference: Hukumomi a Ohio sun sanar da cewa wata likita wadda ke aiki a wani asibiti a Pittsburg, za’a caje ta da laifin kisan kai bayan an gano gawar mahaifiyarta a mace a wajen ajiye kaya na bayan motar ta ranar Laraba.

input.mt: Wani likita da ya yi aiki a asibitin yara na Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania za a tuhume shi da kisan kai bayan an gano mahaifiyarsa ta mutu a cikin akwatin motar ta a ranar Laraba, hukumomi a Ohio sun ce.
input.src: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.

reference: An gano Dokta Malar Balasubramanian, 29, a cikin Blue Ash, Ohio, wani yanki kusa da kilomita 15 arewacin Cincinnati kwance a ƙasa kusa da hanya a cikin T-shirt da tufafi a cikin halain tsananin daukan magani.

input.mt: An gano Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, mai shekara 29, a Blue Ash, Ohio, wani birni mai nisan mil 15 arewacin Cincinnati yana kwance a ƙasa a gefen hanya a cikin T-shirt da tufafi na ciki a cikin yanayin da ake ganin yana da magani sosai.
input.src: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.

reference: Ta tura jami’an zuwa bakin motar ta kerar Oldmobile wacce take diddigen kafafu 500 daga inda take.

input.mt: Ta umurci jami'ai zuwa ga tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar tsohuwar.
input.src: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.

reference: A can, suka tarar da gawar Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, an lulluɓe da barguna na jini.

input.mt: A wurin, sun sami gawar Saroja Balasubramanian, mai shekara 53, da aka rufe da ɗamara mai zubar da jini.
input.src: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.

reference: ‘Yan sanda sun ce da alama gawar ta kai tsawon kwana daya a wurin.

input.mt: 'Yan sanda sun ce gawar ta kasance a wurin kusan kwana ɗaya.
input.src: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.

reference: An ba da rahoton kamuwa da cutar na farko a wannan kakar a karshen Yuli.

input.mt: An ruwaito shari'o'in farko na cutar a wannan kakar a karshen watan Yuli.
input.src: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.

reference: Aladu ke dauke da kwayar cutar, wadda ke yin kaura zuwa jikin mutane daga sauro.

input.mt: Dabbobin ne suke kamuwa da wannan cuta, sa'an nan kuma ta kamuwa da mutane ta hanyar sauro.
input.src: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.

reference: Annobar ta sa gwamnatin Indiya daukar waɗannan matakai kamar tura masu kamun alade zuwa yankunan da abin ya fi shafa, raba dubban labulen sauro da kum fesa maganin ƙwari.

input.mt: Cutar ta sa gwamnatin Indiya ta ɗauki irin waɗannan matakan kamar tura masu kama aladu a wuraren da cutar ta shafa sosai, rarraba dubban labule na kwari da kuma yayyafa magungunan kashe tsuntsaye.
input.src: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.

reference: Gwamnati ta alkawarin miliyoyin kwalaben rigakafin encephalitis, wanda zai taimaka wajen shirya hukumomin kiwon lafiya a shekara mai zuwa.

input.mt: Har ila yau, gwamnati ta yi alkawarin yin allurar rigakafin ƙwayar ƙwayar cuta miliyan da yawa, wanda zai taimaka wajen shirya hukumomin kiwon lafiya don shekara mai zuwa.
input.src: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.

reference: An dakatar da shirye-shiryen kai alluran rigakafi zuwa yankunan da abin ya fi shafa a tarihi a wannan shekara saboda rashin kuɗaɗe da kuma ƙarancin bayar da muhimmanci dangane da sauran cututtuka.

input.mt: Shirye-shiryen isar da alluran rigakafi zuwa yankunan da aka fi shafa a tarihi a wannan shekara an jinkirta saboda rashin kudade da ƙananan fifiko dangane da sauran cututtuka.
input.src: Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.

reference: A shekarar 1956 Slania ya koma Sweden, inda bayan shekaru uku ya fara aiki da gidan waya na Sweden sannan kuma ta zama shugaban masu zane.

input.mt: A shekara ta 1956 Słania ya koma Sweden, inda ya fara aiki a ofishin gidan waya na Sweden shekaru uku daga baya kuma ya zama babban mai sassaƙa.
input.src: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.

reference: Ya samar da sama da stamp 1000 ga kasar Sweden ga kuma wasu kasashen guda 28.

input.mt: Ya samar da takardun shaida fiye da 1,000 don Sweden da kuma wasu ƙasashe 28.
input.src: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.

reference: Aikin shi yana da shaidan inganci da bayanin filla-filla har yana daya daga kadan daga sanannu cikin philatelists. Wasu sun kore a karban ayukansa kadai.

input.mt: Ayyukansa suna da kyau sosai kuma suna da ban sha'awa sosai har ya zama ɗaya daga cikin "sunan gida" da aka sani sosai a tsakanin 'yan fim.
input.src: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.

reference: Hatiminsa na 1,000 ya kasance mafi kyawun “Maɗaukakan Ayyuka na Sarakunan Sweden” da David Klocker Ehrenstrahi ya yi a shekarar 2000, wanda aka sanya a cikin Littafin Bayanan Al’ajabi na Guinness.

input.mt: Alamarsa ta 1,000 ita ce "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" ta David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl a shekara ta 2000, wanda aka jera a cikin Guinness Book of World Records.
input.src: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.

reference: Ya kuma tsunduma a zanen kudi ga kasashe da dama, misalai na kwanan nan na aikinsa da ya hada da hotunan Firaminista a gaban sababbin takardun kuɗin ƙasar Canada na dala $5 da $100.

input.mt: Har ila yau, ya shiga cikin zane-zane na banknotes don ƙasashe da yawa, misalai na kwanan nan na aikinsa ciki har da hotuna na Firayim Minista a gaban sabon kuɗin Kanada na $ 5 da $ 100.
input.src: He was also engaged in engraving banknotes for many countries, recent examples of his work including the Prime Ministerial portraits on the front of the new Canadian $5 and $100 bills.

reference: Bayan hadarin ya faru, an dauki Gibson zuwa asibiti amma ya mutu jim kadan bayan haka.

input.mt: Bayan hatsarin ya faru, an kai Gibson asibiti amma ya mutu jim kadan bayan haka.
input.src: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.

reference: Direban babbar motar, mai shekaru 64, bai ji rauni ba a hatsarin.

input.mt: Direban motar, mai shekara 64, bai ji rauni ba a hatsarin.
input.src: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.

reference: An dauke Motar da kanta ta daga wurin da hatsarin ya faru da misalin 1200 GMT a wannan ranar.

input.mt: An kwashe motar daga wurin hatsarin da misalin 1200 GMT a wannan rana.
input.src: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.

reference: Wani mutum da ya ke aiki a wani gareji kusa da inda hatsarin ya faru ya ce: “Akwai yara da ke jiran su tsallaka titi wadanda su ke ta ihu da kuka.”

input.mt: Wani da yake aiki a wani wurin ajiye motoci da ke kusa da wurin da hatsarin ya faru ya ce: "Yara suna jiran su ƙetare hanya kuma suna ihu da kuka".
input.src: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."

reference: Dukansu sun gudu daga inda hatsarin ya faru.

input.mt: Dukansu sun gudu daga wurin da hatsarin ya faru.
input.src: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.

reference: Cikin abubuwan da za’a tattauna a Bali sun hada da yadda za’a ceci ragowar dazukan duniya, musanyar fasaha da yadda za’a taimakawa kasashe masu tasowa su rage gurbata muhalli.

input.mt: Sauran batutuwan da ke kan ajanda a Bali sun haɗa da ceton gandun daji da suka rage a duniya, da kuma raba fasahohi don taimakawa ƙasashe masu tasowa su girma a hanyoyi masu ƙarancin gurbatawa.
input.src: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.

reference: Majalisar dinkin duniya na kokarin hada kudade domin tallafawa kasashe wadanda ke fama da sauyin yanayi.

input.mt: Majalisar Dinkin Duniya ta kuma yi fatan kammala wani asusu don taimaka wa ƙasashen da zafin duniya ya shafa su jimre da tasirinsa.
input.src: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.

reference: Kudin na iya tafiya ga gidaje masu kariyar ambaliyar ruwa, ingantaccen tsarin ruwa, da kuma canjin amfanin gona.

input.mt: Za a iya amfani da kuɗin don gina gidaje da ba su da ambaliyar ruwa, da kuma yin amfani da ruwa sosai.
input.src: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.

reference: Fluke ya rubuta cewa ƙoƙarin wasu na hana mata yin magana game da harkokin kiwon lafiyar mata bai yi nasara ba.

input.mt: Fluke ya rubuta cewa ƙoƙarin da wasu suka yi na hana mata yin magana game da lafiyar mata bai yi nasara ba.
input.src: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.

reference: Ta kai ga wannan matsayin ne saboda yawan tofa albarkatun bakin mutane tare da kwarin gwiwa wanda maza da mata ke rokar cewa amfani da magungunan hana haihuwa sun zama dole.

input.mt: Ta zo ga wannan ƙarshe saboda yawan maganganu masu kyau da kuma ƙarfafawa da mata da maza suka aiko mata suna roƙon cewa a yi la'akari da maganin rigakafin haihuwa a matsayin bukata ta likita.
input.src: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.

reference: Lokacin da fada ya barke bayan an kai wadanda suka ji rauni zuwa asibiti, kusan sauran fursunoni 40 da suka rage sun zauna a farfajiyar kuma sun ki komawa dakinsu.

input.mt: Sa'ad da aka daina yaƙe-yaƙe bayan da aka kai wadanda suka ji rauni asibiti, wasu fursunoni 40 da suka rage sun zauna a farfajiya kuma sun ƙi komawa dakinsu.
input.src: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.

reference: Masu tattaunawar sun yi kokarin gyara lamarin, amma bukatun fursunonin ba su bayyana ba.

input.mt: Masu tattaunawar sun yi ƙoƙari su gyara halin da ake ciki, amma bukatun fursunonin ba su bayyana ba.
input.src: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.

reference: Tsakanin 10: 00-11: 00 pm MDT, fursunoni sun fara wuta a farfajiyar gidan.

input.mt: Daga karfe 10:00 zuwa 11:00 na yamma MDT, fursunoni sun kaddamar da wuta a farfajiyar.
input.src: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.

reference: Ba da dadewa ba, jami'an da ke sanye da kayan aikin kwantar tarzoma suka shiga yankin sun kore yan fursunan da barkonon tsohuwa.

input.mt: Ba da daɗewa ba, jami'an da suka sanye da kayan yaƙi suka shiga farfajiyar kuma suka ɗora wa fursunoni iskar hawaye a kusurwoyi.
input.src: Soon, officers equipped with riot gear entered the yard and cornered the inmates with tear gas.

reference: Rundunar kashe gobara sunyi nasara kashe wutan a dai-dai karfe 11:35pm.

input.mt: Ma'aikatan ceton gobara sun kashe gobarar da misalin karfe 11:35 na dare.
input.src: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.

reference: Bayan gina madatsan ruwan a 1963, ambaliyar ruwa da ke zuwa akai-akai kuma yada kasa zuwa kogi ya tsaya.

input.mt: Bayan an gina dam a shekara ta 1963, an dakatar da ambaliyar yanayi da za ta yada sediment a ko'ina cikin kogin.
input.src: After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.

reference: Wannan danshi ya zama dole don ƙirƙirar linta da rairayin bakin teku, waɗanda suka yi aiki a matsayin mazaunin namun daji.

input.mt: Wannan kwari ya zama dole don ƙirƙirar sandbars da rairayin bakin teku, wanda ya yi aiki a matsayin wuraren zama na namun daji.
input.src: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.

reference: Sakamakon haka, nau'in kifaye biyu sun ɓace, wasu biyu kuma suna cikin haɗari, da suka haɗa da chub mai ƙusumbi.

input.mt: A sakamakon haka, kifaye guda biyu sun mutu, kuma wasu biyu suna cikin haɗari, har da kifi mai suna humpback chub.
input.src: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.

reference: Duk da cewa Yawan ruwan zai daga kadan bayan ambaliyar, maaikatan na fatan cewa zai isa daidai kimar dawo saman kasar bakin rafin.

input.mt: Ko da yake matakin ruwa zai ƙaru ne kawai bayan ambaliyar, jami'ai suna fatan zai isa su maido da sandbars da suka lalace a gefen kogin.
input.src: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.

reference: Duk da cewa ba alalmun gargadin guguwa, kuma a cewar hukumar ta Jakarta geophysics, ba za a yi gargadin guguwa ba saboda girgizar ba ta cika adadin da ake bukata na lamba 6.5 ba.

input.mt: Ba a ba da gargadin tsunami ba, kuma a cewar hukumar kimiyyar ƙasa ta Jakarta, ba za a ba da gargadin tsunami ba domin girgizar ƙasa ba ta cika ƙa'idar ƙarfin 6.5 ba.
input.src: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.

reference: Duk da cewa babu barazanar guguwar tsunami, mazauna sun fara firgita kuma sun fara barin kasuwancinsu da gidajensu.

input.mt: Ko da yake babu barazanar tsunami, mazauna sun soma firgita kuma suka soma barin kasuwancinsu da gidajensu.
input.src: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.

reference: Kodayake Winfrey ta kasance cikin hawaye a yayin ban kwana, amma ta bayyana wa magoya bayanta cewa za ta dawo.

input.mt: Ko da yake Winfrey ta yi kuka a lokacin da ta yi ban kwana, ta bayyana wa magoya bayanta cewa za ta dawo.
input.src: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.

reference: Wannan ba zai zama ban kwana ba ne. Wannan shine rufewar babin sura da bude wani sabo.”

input.mt: "Wannan ba zai zama gaisuwa ba. Wannan shi ne rufe wani babi da kuma bude wani sabon".
input.src: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."

reference: Sakamako na karshe daga zabukan shugaban kasa da na ‘yan majalisa na ƙasar Namibia ya nuna cewa an sake zaɓar shugaban kasa mai ci, Hifikepunye Pohamba, da rata mai yawa.

input.mt: Sakamakon karshe na zaben shugaban kasa da na majalisa a Namibia ya nuna cewa an sake zaben shugaban kasa mai ci, Hifikepunye Pohamba, da babbar dama.
input.src: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.

reference: Jam'iyya mai mulki, Ƙungiyar Jama’ar Kudu maso Yammacin Afirka (SWAPO ) ta Kudu maso Yamma ta sake samun rinjaye a zabukan 'yan majalisar.

input.mt: Jam'iyyar da ke mulki, Kungiyar Jama'ar Afirka ta Kudu maso Yamma (SWAPO), ta riƙe rinjaye a zaɓen majalisa.
input.src: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.

reference: Hadarin ya faru ne a saman tsaunuka, kuma ana jin cewa sakamakon wuta ne.

input.mt: Wannan hatsarin ya faru ne a tsaunukan tsaunuka, kuma an yi imanin cewa sakamakon wuta ne.
input.src: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.

reference: ƙoƙarin da ake don gano wurin da jirgin ya fadi yana samun cikas daga rashin kyan yanayi da kuma yanki mai wahalar shiga.

input.mt: Ƙoƙarin da ake yi na neman wurin da abin ya faru yana fuskantar mummunan yanayi da kuma yanayin da ba shi da kyau.
input.src: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.

reference: Mangola, kungiyar tallafin kiwon lafiya, Sans Medecines Frontieres da Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya sun ce ita ce barkewar cuta mafi muni da aka yi a kasar.

input.mt: Kungiyar kiwon lafiya ta Mangola, Médecins Sans Frontières da kuma Hukumar Lafiya ta Duniya sun ce wannan shi ne mafi munin barkewar cutar da aka samu a kasar.
input.src: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.

reference: Kakakin kungiyar ta Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman ya ce “Angola na fuskantar barkewar cutar mafi muni da aka taba gani kuma lamarin ya ci gaba da munana a Angola,” in ji shi.

input.mt: Mai magana da yawun kungiyar Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman ya ce: "Angola na fuskantar mafi munin annobar da ta taba barkewa kuma halin da ake ciki a Angola ya ci gaba da zama mara kyau", in ji shi.
input.src: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.

reference: An fara wasannin ne da karfe 10:00 na safe tare da yanayi mai kyau kuma banda yayyafin safiya wanda da sauri ya warware, ya kasance cikakkiyar rana don wasan rugby na 7.

input.mt: Wasan ya fara ne da karfe 10:00 na safe tare da yanayi mai kyau kuma ban da ruwan sama na tsakar safiya wanda ya sauƙaƙe da sauri, rana ce mai kyau don wasan rugby na 7.
input.src: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.

reference: Afirka ta kudu masu darajar farko a gasar sun fara da kafar dama yayin da suka sami cikakkiyar nasara 26 - 00 akan ‘yan wasan Zambia masu daraja ta 5.

input.mt: Kasar Afirka ta Kudu da ke da matsayi na farko a gasar ta fara ne a kan hanya mai kyau lokacin da ta samu nasara mai kyau ta 26 - 00 a kan Zambiya da ke da matsayi na 5.
input.src: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.

reference: Tsarin su na kariya, da kwarewa wajen amfani da hannu da kuma hadin kan su ya sanya suka bambanta kuma alama ya nuna cewa abokan wasan su zasu sha kaya.

input.mt: Ƙwarewarsu ta kāre kansu, da yadda suke kula da ƙwallon ƙafa da kuma aiki mai kyau da suke yi a matsayin ƙungiya sun sa su fita dabam kuma ya bayyana sarai cewa wannan ita ce ƙungiyar da za a doke.
input.src: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.

reference: Jami'ai a birnin Amsterdam da na cibiyar ajiye kayan tarihi ta Anne Frank, sun bayyana cewa bishiyar ta kamu da gansa kuka, abinda ke da hadari ga lafiyar jama’a sakamakon bishiyar na daf da karyewa.

input.mt: Jami'an birnin Amsterdam da gidan kayan gargajiya na Anne Frank sun bayyana cewa itacen yana dauke da kumburi kuma yana da haɗari ga lafiyar jama'a yayin da suke jayayya cewa yana cikin hatsarin fadawa.
input.src: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.

reference: An yanke cewa za’a sare ta ranar Talata, amma sai wani hukunci gaggawa na kotu ya ceci lamarin.

input.mt: An shirya a kashe shi a ranar Talata, amma an cece shi bayan hukuncin kotun gaggawa.
input.src: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.

reference: Dukkan ginshikan kogon, da aka yi wa suna “ ‘Yan uwa mata guda bakwai”, akalla sun kai mita 100 zuwa 250 (kafa 328 zuwa 820) a fadinsu.

input.mt: Dukan ƙofofin kogon, da aka kira " 'Yan'uwa Bakwai", suna da diamita aƙalla mita 100 zuwa 250 (328 zuwa 820 feet).
input.src: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.

reference: Hotunan infrared suna nuna cewa bambancin zafin jiki daga dare da rana yana nuna cewa mai yiwuwa koguna ne.

input.mt: Hotunan infrared sun nuna cewa yawan zafin jiki a dare da rana ya nuna cewa wataƙila koguna ne.
input.src: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.

reference: “Suna da sanyi fiye da kewayan farfajiyar ckin rana kuma suna yin dumi da dare.

input.mt: "Suna da sanyi fiye da ƙasa da ke kewaye da su a rana kuma suna da zafi a dare.
input.src: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.

reference: Halayyar ɗumi ba tsayayye ba ce kamar manyan koguna a cikin ƙasa waɗanda galibi su ke riƙe zafin jiki na yau da kullun, amma ya yi daidai da waɗannan kasancewarsu ramuka masu zurfi a cikin ƙasa,” in ji Glen Cushing na kungiyar Nazarin Albarkatun Ƙasa ta Amurka (USGS) Ƙungiyar Nazarin Taurari da kuma na Jami’ar Arewacin Arizona da ke a Flagstaff, Arizona.

input.mt: Halin su ba shi da daidaito kamar na manyan koguna a duniya da sau da yawa suna da yawan zafin jiki, amma ya jitu da cewa waɗannan ramuka ne masu zurfi a ƙasa", in ji Glen Cushing na Ƙungiyar Astrogeology ta Hukumar Kula da Yanayin Duniya ta Amirka (USGS) da kuma Jami'ar Arewacin Arizona da ke Flagstaff, Arizona.
input.src: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.

reference: A Faransa, zaɓe ya kasanace wani abu mai ƙarancin fasahar zamani: masu zaɓe na keɓe kansu a cikin wani akwati, suna saka wata bugaggiyar takarda da ke nuna ɗan takararsu a cikin wata ambulan.

input.mt: A Faransa, jefa kuri'a ta kasance al'ada mai ƙarancin fasaha: masu jefa kuri'a suna ware kansu a cikin rumfa, suna sanya takarda da aka buga a gaba wanda ke nuna ɗan takarar da suka zaɓa a cikin ambulaf.
input.src: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.

reference: Bayan jami'ai sun tantance asalin masu jefa kuri'a, mai jefa kuri'ar ya jefa ambulaf a akwatin murfin kuma ya sanya hannu a takardar kada kuri'a.

input.mt: Bayan da jami'ai suka tabbatar da asalin mai jefa kuri'a, mai jefa kuri'a ya jefa kwandon a cikin akwatin zabe kuma ya sa hannu a takardar jefa kuri'a.
input.src: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.

reference: Dokar zaɓen Faransa ta tsara yadda ake gudanar da zaɓe bisa matuƙar bin ƙa’ida.

input.mt: Dokar zabe ta Faransa ta tsara tsarin aiki sosai.
input.src: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.

reference: Tun daga 1988, dole ne akwatunan zabe su kasance ana ganin abin da ke cikinsu domin masu jefa ƙuri'a da masu sa ido su iya shaidar cewa babu wasu ambulan a ciki a farkon kada kuri'un da kuma cewa ba a kara wasu ambulan ba sai dai wadanda aka kidaya kuma daga masu zaɓe da aka tantance.

input.mt: Tun daga shekarar 1988, akwatunan jefa kuri'a dole ne su kasance masu bayyane don masu jefa kuri'a da masu lura su iya shaida cewa babu takardun shaida a farkon jefa kuri'a kuma ba a ƙara takardun shaida ba sai dai na masu jefa kuri'a da aka ƙidaya kuma aka ba da izini.
input.src: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.

reference: 'Yan takarar na iya aika wakilai don su shaida kowane bangare na aikin. Da yamma, masu aikin sa kai suna kidaya kuri'u a karkashin kula mai karfi, suna bin takamaiman hanyoyin.

input.mt: 'Yan takara za su iya aika da wakilai don su shaida kowane ɓangare na aikin. A maraice, masu sa kai suna ƙidaya kuri'u a ƙarƙashin kulawa mai tsanani, bisa ga takamaiman hanyoyin.
input.src: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.

reference: ASUS Eee PC, wanda aka ƙaddamar da farko a fadin-duniya don ceton-farashi ƙasa da dalilai na aiki, ya zama babban magana a cikin shekarar 2007 Watan Taipei IT.

input.mt: ASUS Eee PC, da aka ƙaddamar a duniya don adana farashi da dalilai na aiki, ya zama batun zafi a watan IT na Taipei na 2007.
input.src: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.

reference: Amma kasuwar sayen ɗaiɗai ta kwamfutar hannu za ta banbanta ƙwarai kuma ta canja bayan Mai Zartarwa Yuan na Tarayar Ƙasar Sin ya bai wa ASUS lambar girman Taiwan Sustainable Award a 2007.

input.mt: Amma kasuwar masu amfani da kwamfutar tafi-da-gidanka za ta bambanta sosai kuma ta canza bayan ASUS ta sami lambar yabo ta 2007 ta Taiwan Sustainable Award ta Shugaba Yuan na Jamhuriyar Sin.
input.src: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.

reference: Wurin gizo na tashar yana bayyana wasan kwaikwayon a matsayin “tsohon gidan wasan kwaikwayo na rediyo tare da sabon wasa mai ban tsoro!”

input.mt: Shafin yanar gizon tashar ya bayyana wasan kwaikwayon a matsayin "tsohon gidan wasan kwaikwayo na rediyo na makaranta tare da sabon juyawa mai ban tsoro!"
input.src: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"

reference: A farkon zamanin, an nuna wasan ne kawai a gidan rediyo na yanar gizo mai dogon lokaci TogiNet Radio, shafin da ke mayar da hankali kan maganan rediyo.

input.mt: A farkon kwanakinsa, an nuna wasan kwaikwayon ne kawai a shafin rediyo na Intanet na TogiNet Radio, wani shafin da ya mai da hankali kan rediyo na magana.
input.src: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.

reference: A karshen 2015, TogiNet ya kafa Rediyon AstroNet a matsayin ƙaramar tasha.

input.mt: A ƙarshen 2015, TogiNet ya kafa AstroNet Radio a matsayin tashar mataimaki.
input.src: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.

reference: Asalin dandalin ya nuna sabbin yan wasa na murya, yan asalin East Texas.

input.mt: A farkon wasan kwaikwayon ya ƙunshi 'yan wasan kwaikwayo na murya, na gida zuwa Gabashin Texas.
input.src: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.

reference: Rahotanni sun nuna an kwashe tsawon daren ana wasoson kayan jama’a, sakamakon rashin jami’an tsaro a titunan Bishkek.

input.mt: Rahotanni sun ce fashi da yawa ya ci gaba da dare, saboda jami'an tsaro ba su kasance a kan titunan Bishkek ba.
input.src: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.

reference: Wani mai lura ya bayyana Bishkek a matsayin wanda ke nutsewa cikin halin “fitina” yayin da gungun mutane suka yi ta yawo a titunan tare da fasa shagunan kayayyakin masarufi.

input.mt: Wani mai lura ya bayyana cewa garin Bishkek ya shiga cikin "mummunan yanayi", yayin da ƙungiyoyin mutane ke yawo a tituna kuma suna fashi da shagunan kayayyakin cinikayya.
input.src: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.

reference: Da dama cikin mazauna Bishkek sun zargi masu zanga-zangar da suka fito daga kudanci da halayyar rashin mutunta doka.

input.mt: Yawancin mazauna Bishkek sun zargi masu zanga-zangar daga kudu da rashin bin doka.
input.src: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.

reference: Afirka ta Kudu ta ci nasara akan All Blacks (New Zealand) a wasan rugby union na Tri Nations a filin wasan Royal Bafokeng dake Rustenburg, na kasar Afirka ta Kudu.

input.mt: Afirka ta Kudu ta doke All Blacks (New Zealand) a wasan rugby na Tri Nations a filin wasa na Royal Bafokeng a Rustenburg, Afirka ta Kudu.
input.src: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.

reference: An tashi wasan da banbancin maki daya, wato 20-21, abinda ya kawo karshen samun nasarar All Black karo na 15 a jere.

input.mt: Sakamakon karshe shi ne nasara ta maki daya, 21 zuwa 20, wanda ya kawo karshen nasarar da All Blacks ta samu a wasanni 15.
input.src: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.

reference: Don 'yan Springboks, ya ƙare rashin nasara a wasanni biyar.

input.mt: Domin Springboks, ya kawo karshen wasan shan kashi biyar a jere.
input.src: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.

reference: Wasan karshe ne na All Blacks, wanda tuni ya lashe kofin makonni biyu da suka gabata.

input.mt: Wannan shi ne wasan karshe na All Blacks, wanda ya riga ya lashe kofin makonni biyu da suka wuce.
input.src: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.

reference: Wasan karshe na rukunin zai gudana ne a Ellis Park a Johannesburg mako mai zuwa, lokacin da Springboks za ta buga da Australia.

input.mt: Wasan karshe na jerin zai faru a Ellis Park a Johannesburg a mako mai zuwa, lokacin da Springboks suka yi wasa da Ostiraliya.
input.src: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.

reference: An yi wata matsakaiciyar girgizar kasa a yammacin Montana da karfe 10:08 na dare. ran Litinin.

input.mt: Wata girgizar kasa mai matsakaici ta girgiza yammacin Montana a karfe 10:08 na yamma a ranar Litinin.
input.src: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.

reference: Babu wani rahoto game da lalacewa nan take da Nazarin Yanayin Kasa na Amurka (USGS) da kuma Cibiyar Bayar da Bayani game da Girgizar Kasa suka samu.

input.mt: Ba a samu rahotanni na gaggawa game da lalacewar ba daga Hukumar Kula da Yanayin Duniya ta Amurka (USGS) da Cibiyar Bayanan Girgizar Kasa.
input.src: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.

reference: Girgizar kasar ta fi kamari ne a tsakanin kilomita 20 (wato mil 15) a arewacin arewa maso gabas da kuma kimanin kilomita 65 (wato mil 40) kudu da Buttle.

input.mt: Girgizar ƙasa ta kasance a tsakiyar kimanin kilomita 20 (15 mil) arewa maso arewa maso gabashin Dillon, da kuma kimanin kilomita 65 (40 mil) kudu da Butte.
input.src: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.

reference: Nau’in cutar murar tsuntsaye mai hadari ta H5N1, an tabbatar ita ce ta kama agwagwar daji wadda aka samu ranar lahadi a wani surkuki kusa da garin Lyon da ke gabashin Faransa.

input.mt: An tabbatar da cewa nau'in cutar mura ta tsuntsaye mai kisa ga mutane, H5N1, ta kamu da wata dabbar daji da ta mutu, da aka gano a ranar Litinin, a cikin marshland kusa da Lyon a gabashin Faransa.
input.src: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.

reference: Faransa ce kasa ta bakwai a cikin Tarayyar Turai da ke fama da wannan cutar; sun bi Austria, Jamus, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Girka da Italiya.

input.mt: Faransa ita ce kasa ta bakwai a cikin Tarayyar Turai da ta kamu da cutar; bayan Austria, Jamus, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Girka da Italiya.
input.src: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.

reference: Har yanzu ba’a tabbatar da yawan mutane da ake zargi da kamuwa da H5N1 a Croatia da Denmark.

input.mt: Har yanzu ba a tabbatar da yiwuwar kamuwa da cutar H5N1 a Croatia da Denmark ba.
input.src: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.

reference: Chambers ta yi karan Ubangiji saboda “yaɗuwar mutuwa ko’ina, halakawa da ta’addanci akan miliyoyin mutanen duniya.”

input.mt: Chambers ya kai karar Allah a kan "mutuwa mai yawa, halakarwa da kuma ta'addanci ga miliyoyin miliyoyin mazaunan duniya".
input.src: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."

reference: Majalisa, wani bafulatani, ya bayar da hujjar cewa karar shi “ba ta da kyau” kuma “kowa na iya tuhumar wani.”

input.mt: Chambers, wanda ba shi da imani da Allah, ya yi jayayya cewa shari'arsa "ba ta da kyau" kuma "kowa zai iya gurfanar da kowa".
input.src: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."

reference: A sakamakon haka, masu wasan kan sha tabar wiwi akan dandamalin wasan, kuma shi kansa gidan wasan yana baiwa masu kallo ƙarfin guiwar yin haka.

input.mt: A sakamakon haka, masu yin wasan kwaikwayon suna shan tabar wiwi a kan mataki, kuma gidan wasan kwaikwayon da kansa yana ƙarfafa masu sauraro su shiga.
input.src: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.

reference: Tsohon kakakin majalisar Newt Gingrich, gwamnan Texas Rick Perry, da uwargidan majalisar wakilai, Michele Bachmann sun gama a mataki na hudu, na biyar, da na shida, bi da bi.

input.mt: Tsohon shugaban majalisar wakilai Newt Gingrich, gwamnan Texas Rick Perry, da 'yar majalisa Michele Bachmann sun kammala a matsayi na hudu, na biyar, da na shida, bi da bi.
input.src: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.

reference: Bayan sakamakon ya shigo, Gingrich ya yaba wa Santorum, amma yana da kalmomi masu wuya ga Romney, wanda a madadinsa aka gabatar da tallan kamfe mara kyau a Iowa da Gingrich.

input.mt: Bayan sakamakon ya zo, Gingrich ya yaba wa Santorum, amma yana da kalmomi masu wuya ga Romney, wanda a madadinsa aka watsa tallace-tallace na yakin neman zabe a Iowa game da Gingrich.
input.src: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.

reference: Perry ya fadi cewa zai “dawo Texas domin tantance sakamakon caucus na daren nan, in tantance ko akwai ko akwai alaman ci gaba man a wannan tsere”, amma daga baya ya ce zai ci gaba da tseren sannan ya yi gasan fid da gwani ran 21 ga Janairu a South Carolina.

input.mt: Perry ya bayyana cewa zai "koma Texas don kimanta sakamakon taron na yau da dare, ya ƙayyade ko akwai hanyar ci gaba a gare ni a wannan tseren", amma daga baya ya ce zai ci gaba da tseren kuma ya shiga gasar farko ta Carolina ta Kudu a ranar 21 ga Janairu.
input.src: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.

reference: Bachmann, wanda ya lashe zaben Ames Straw Poll a watan Agusta, ya yanke shawarar kawo karshen kamfen din ta.

input.mt: Bachmann, wanda ya lashe zaben Ames Straw Poll a watan Agusta, ya yanke shawarar kawo karshen yakin neman zabensa.
input.src: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.

reference: An ɗauki mai ɗaukar hoto zuwa Cibiyar Kiwon Lafiya ta UCLA ta Ronald Reagan, idan daga baya ya mutu.

input.mt: An kai mai daukar hoto zuwa Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, inda ya mutu daga baya.
input.src: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.

reference: An ruwaito cewa yana cikin shekaran sa na 20 ne. A cikin wata sanarwa, Bieber ya ce “duk da ya ke ba na wurin kuma ba ni da hannu kai tsaye cikin wannan mummunan hadarin, tunani da addu'o’ina suna tare da dangin waɗanda abin ya rutsa da su.”

input.mt: A cikin wata sanarwa, Bieber ya ce "duk da cewa ban kasance a wurin ba kuma ban shiga kai tsaye cikin wannan mummunar hatsarin ba, tunanina da addu'ata suna tare da dangin wanda aka azabtar".
input.src: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."

reference: Shagin yanar-gizo na labarun nishaɗi na TMZ ya fahimta cewa mai ɗaukar hoto ɗin ya tsayar da motsarsa a tsallaken titin Sepulveda Boulevard kuma ya yi ƙoƙarin ɗaukar hotuna na tsayawar 'yan sanda kafin ya tsallaka titin kuma ya ci gaba, wanda ya sa ɗan sanda na Sintirin Babbar Hanya ta California wanda yake ba da hannu ya umarce shi ya koma a ƙetare, sau biyu.

input.mt: Shafin labarai na nishaɗi na TMZ ya fahimci cewa mai daukar hoto ya dakatar da motarsa a wancan gefen Sepulveda Boulevard kuma ya yi kokarin daukar hotuna na tashar 'yan sanda kafin ya tsallake hanya kuma ya ci gaba, wanda ya sa jami'in' yan sanda na California Highway Patrol da ke gudanar da tashar mota ya umarce shi ya sake tsallakewa, sau biyu.
input.src: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.

reference: Bisa ga fadin yan sanda, direban motan da ya buge mai hoton na iya fuskantan zargin aikata laifi.

input.mt: A cewar 'yan sanda, direba na motar da ta buga mai daukar hoto ba zai fuskanci tuhuma ba.
input.src: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.

reference: Da lambobin yabo goma sha takwas kacal da ake da su a rana, kasashe da dama sun gaza kaiwa ga dandamalin bada lambar yabo.

input.mt: Tare da lambobin yabo guda goma sha takwas a rana, ƙasashe da yawa sun kasa samun lambar yabo.
input.src: With only eighteen medals available a day, a number of countries have failed to make the medal podium.

reference: Sun hada da Netherlands, yayin da Anna Jochemsen ta kammala a ta tara a jerin ajin mata a Super-G jiya, da Finland yayin da Katja ke kammalawa a na goma duk a bikin.

input.mt: Sun hada da Netherlands, tare da Anna Jochemsen ta kammala ta tara a cikin rukuni na mata a Super-G jiya, da Finland tare da Katja Saarinen ta kammala ta goma a wannan taron.
input.src: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.

reference: Mitchell Gourley na Ostiraliya ya gama na goma sha ɗaya a cikin tsayuwar Super-G na maza. Ɗan gasar Czech Oldrich Jelinek ya gama na goma sha shida a cikin Super-G na zaunen maza.

input.mt: Mitchell Gourley na Ostiraliya ya gama matsayi na goma sha ɗaya a cikin Super-G na maza. Mai fafatawa na Czech Oldrich Jelinek ya gama matsayi na goma sha shida a cikin Super-G na maza.
input.src: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.

reference: Arly Velasquez na kasar Mexico ya ƙare a matsayin na goma sha biyar a jerin Super-G na maza na zaune. Adam Hall na New Zealand ya ƙare a matsayin na tara a Suƙer-G na maza na tsaye.

input.mt: Arly Velasquez na Mexico ya gama matsayi na goma sha biyar a cikin maza na zaune Super-G. Adam Hall na New Zealand ya gama matsayi na tara a cikin maza na tsaye Super-G.
input.src: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.

reference: Mazaje na Poland masu fama da rashin gani a wasan ƙwallon ƙafa Maciej Krezel da jagorar Anna Ogarzynska sun gama na goma sha uku a gasar Super-G. Jong Seork Park na Koriya ta Kudu ya kammala na ashirin da huɗu a gasar maza ta Super-G.

input.mt: Dan wasan Poland Maciej Krezel da jagora Anna Ogarzynska sun gama matsayi na goma sha uku a Super-G. Jong Seork Park na Koriya ta Kudu ya gama matsayi na ashirin da huɗu a Super-G na maza.
input.src: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.

reference: A cewar karar, ba a tsaftace bata daga zangon UN kamar yadda ya kamata ba, ya haddasa kwayoyin cuta shigan ruwa wadda yake kwarara cikin Rafin Artibonite, daya daga ciki babba a Haiti.

input.mt: A cewar karar, ba a tsabtace shara daga sansanin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya yadda ya kamata ba, saboda haka kwayoyin sun shiga kogin Artibonite, ɗaya daga cikin manyan kogin Haiti.
input.src: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.

reference: Cibiyar Tabbatar da Adalci da Demokradiyya ta ƙasar Haiti ta nakalto waɗansu ayyukan nazari masu zaman kansu waɗanda ke tsammanin bataliyar kiyaye zaman lafiya ta Majalisar Ɗinkin Duniya da ke Nepal ce ta kawo cutar Haiti bisa rashin sani.

input.mt: Cibiyar Adalci da Dimokradiyya ta Haiti ta yi nuni ga bincike mai zaman kanta da ya nuna cewa rundunar da ke kula da zaman lafiya ta Majalisar Dinkin Duniya ta Nepal ta kawo cutar a Haiti ba tare da saninta ba.
input.src: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.

reference: Danielle Lantagne, ƙwararriyar masaniyar Majalisar Dinkin Duniya kan cutar, ta bayyana cewa mai yiyuwa ne sojojin kiyaye zaman lafiya suka haifar da cutar.

input.mt: Danielle Lantagne, gwani a Majalisar Dinkin Duniya a kan wannan cuta, ta ce jami'an tsaron zaman lafiya ne suka haddasa barkewar cutar.
input.src: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.

reference: Marar lafiyar ya je Najeriya, inda aka samu wasu sun kamu da cutar ta Ebola.

input.mt: Mai haƙurin ya je Najeriya, inda aka samu wasu mutane da suka kamu da cutar Ebola.
input.src: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.

reference: Asibitin ta bi ka’idoji na kula da kamuwa da cuta, tare da raba masu jiyya daga sauran jama’a domin hana yaduwan cutan.

input.mt: Asibitin ya bi ƙa'idodin da ake bi don hana kamuwa da cuta, ciki har da ware mai haƙuri daga wasu don hana yiwuwar kamuwa da wasu.
input.src: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.

reference: Duk da barin wasan shirin a 1993 an cigaba da kiransa shugaban shiri, kuma ya cigaba da karbar miliyoyin daloli a kowace kaka na kamasho.

input.mt: Duk da barin wasan kwaikwayon a shekara ta 1993 ya ci gaba da rike taken mai zartarwa, kuma ya ci gaba da karɓar dubban miliyoyin daloli a kowane kakar a cikin haƙƙin mallaka.
input.src: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.

reference: Tun farko kamfanin dillacin labarai na China Xinhua ya ba da rahoton wani jirgin da aka sace.

input.mt: A baya, kamfanin dillancin labaran kasar Sin na Xinhua ya ruwaito cewa an sace wani jirgin sama.
input.src: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.

reference: Rahotanni daga baya sun nuna cewa an yi wa jirgin barazanar harin bam, sannan aka karkatar da shi zuwa Afghanistan, inda ya sauka a Kandahar.

input.mt: Rahotanni daga baya sun bayyana cewa jirgin ya karbi barazanar bam kuma an mayar da shi zuwa Afghanistan, ya sauka a Kandahar.
input.src: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.

reference: Rahotannin farko sun ce an juya akalar jirgin zuwa Afghanistan bayan an hana shi saukar gaggawa a Ürümqi.

input.mt: Rahotanni na farko sun ce an mayar da jirgin zuwa Afghanistan bayan an hana shi saukowa cikin gaggawa a Ürümqi.
input.src: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.

reference: Hadarin jirgin sama ya zama ruwan dare a Iran, sakamakon tsoffin jirage wadanda ba a kula da su na ayyukan farar hula da sojoji.

input.mt: Hadarin jirgin sama na kowa ne a Iran, wadda ke da jirage masu tsufa da ba a kula da su sosai ba don ayyukan farar hula da na soja.
input.src: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.

reference: A farkon makon nan ne, wani jirgi mai saukar ungulu na yan sanda ya yi hadari inda mutane uku suka rasa rayukansu yayinda wasu ukun su ka jikkata.

input.mt: A farkon wannan makon, wani hatsarin jirgin sama mai saukar ungulu na 'yan sanda ya kashe mutane uku kuma ya raunana wasu uku.
input.src: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.

reference: Watan da ta gabata Iran ta fuskanci bala’i mafi tsanani a shekaru da wata jirgin sama da ke hanyar zuwa Armenia ta fadi, ta kashe duka mutane 168 da ke ciki.

input.mt: A watan da ya gabata Iran ta fuskanci mummunar bala'in jirgin sama a cikin shekaru lokacin da wani jirgin sama da ke zuwa Armenia ya fadi, ya kashe mutane 168 da ke cikin jirgin.
input.src: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.

reference: A dai wannan watan ne wani jirgin saman ya kauce daga kan titin da jirgi yake tafiya a kai kafin tsahinsa a Mashad inda ya bugi wata katanga, tare da kashe mutum sha bakwai.

input.mt: A wannan watan ne wani jirgin sama ya mamaye hanyar tashi a Mashhad kuma ya buga bango, ya kashe mutane goma sha bakwai.
input.src: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.

reference: Aerosmith sun soke sauran kade-kade a yawon shakatawansu.

input.mt: Aerosmith sun soke sauran bukukuwan da suka yi a yawon shakatawa.
input.src: Aerosmith have cancelled their remaining concerts on their tour.

reference: Ƙungiyar makaɗan rock za ta fara yawon kaɗe-kaɗe a Amurka da Canada har zuwa 16 ga Satumba.

input.mt: Za a yi wa ƙungiyar rock yawon shakatawa a Amurka da Kanada har zuwa 16 ga Satumba.
input.src: The rock band was due to tour the United States and Canada until September 16.

reference: Lakkha Singh ya kuma gabatar da Chhappan Bhog Bhajan. Singer da Raju Khandelwal yana rakiyarsa.

input.mt: Lakkha Singh ya gabatar da chhappan bhog bhajan kuma mawaƙa, Raju Khandelwal yana tare da shi.
input.src: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.

reference: A lokacin gabatar da babban bayani na ranar Alhamis a Nunin Wasan Tokyo, shugaban Nintendo Satoru Iwata ya kaddamar da tsarin sarrafawa na sabuwar na’urar Nintendo Re volution.

input.mt: A gabatarwar ranar Alhamis ta Tokyo Game Show, shugaban Nintendo Satoru Iwata ya gabatar da tsarin sarrafawa don sabon kwamfutar Nintendo Revolution na kamfanin.
input.src: At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.

reference: Kamar da abun kuna talabijin daga nesa wato remote, mai sarrafawa yana amfani da na’urorin sunsuna guda biyu da aka sanya kusa da talabijin ɗin mai amfani don daidaita matsayinta a cikin sarari mai fuska uku.

input.mt: Wannan na'urar tana kama da na'urar talabijin, kuma tana amfani da na'urori masu auna sigina biyu da aka saka kusa da na'urar talabijin don ta nuna matsayinta a sararin samaniya.
input.src: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.

reference: Motar Giancarlo Fisichella ta kwace masa inda hakan ya jawo fitarsa daga tseren jim kaɗan bayan farawa.

input.mt: Giancarlo Fisichella ya rasa ikon motarsa kuma ya ƙare tseren nan da nan bayan farawa.
input.src: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.

reference: Abokin wasansa Fernando Alonso shi ne kan gaba a mafi wasane, amma ya tsaya bayan dakatawar zango, watakila saboda lanƙwashewar wilin tayar gaba na ɓangaren dama ne.

input.mt: Sa'ad da ya gama tseren, abokin aikinsa Fernando Alonso ne ya ci gaba da tseren, amma ya gama bayan da ya gama tseren, wataƙila domin ƙafafunsa na gaba na dama sun yi rauni sosai.
input.src: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.

reference: “Tana da kyau sannan tana waka da kyau, kuma,” ya bayana bisa ga kwafi na taron masu yada labaru.

input.mt: "Ta kasance kyakkyawa sosai kuma tana raira waƙa sosai, ma", in ji shi bisa ga rubutun taron manema labarai.
input.src: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.

reference: “An motsa ni kowane lokacin da muke yin maimaitawa kan wannan, daga cikin zuciya ta.”

input.mt: "Na yi farin ciki sosai a duk lokacin da muka yi wa'azi game da wannan, daga zuciyata".
input.src: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."

reference: Kimanin mintuna 3 da harba jirgin, na’urara daukan hoton da ke ciki ta nuna yadda wani soson kariya ya balle daga jikin tankin mai.

input.mt: Kimanin minti uku bayan kaddamar da jirgin, kyamarar da ke cikin jirgin ta nuna abubuwa da yawa na kumfa mai rufi sun karye daga tankin man fetur.
input.src: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.

reference: Duk da haka, ba'a tunanin cewa sun haifar da wata ɓarna ga abin sufurin.

input.mt: Duk da haka, ba a yi zaton sun yi wani lahani ga jirgin.
input.src: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.

reference: Mintuna biyar da fara nunin wata iska ya fara shigowa ciki, kusan minti daya daga baya, iskar ta doshi 70km/h... daga baya ruwan sama yazo, amma da yawa da karfinsa ya sauko yadda zai bugi fatarka kamar allura, saannan wani kankara ya fado daga sama, mutane suna firgita suna kururuwa suna tattake juna.

input.mt: A cikin minti biyar a cikin nuni iska ta fara juyawa, game da minti daya daga baya, iska tana kaiwa 70km / h... sa'an nan ruwan sama ya zo, amma da karfi da kuma haka mai girma cewa ta buga fata kamar allura, sa'an nan hazo ya fadi daga sama, mutane firgita da kuma ihu da kuma gudu a kan juna.
input.src: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.

reference: NHK ta kuma ruwaito cewa masana’antar samar da makamashin nukiliya ta Kashiwazaki Kariwa a gundumar Niigata tana aiki yadda yakamata.

input.mt: NHK ta kuma ruwaito cewa tashar makamashin nukiliya ta Kashiwazaki Kariwa a lardin Niigata tana aiki yadda ya kamata.
input.src: NHK also reported that the Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant in Niigata prefecture was operating normally.

reference: An ba da rohoto cewa gidaje 9400 a yankin ba su da ruwa sannan kusan 100 ba su da lantarki.

input.mt: An ruwaito cewa kusan gidaje 9,400 a yankin ba su da ruwa kuma kusan gidaje 100 ba su da wutar lantarki.
input.src: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.

reference: Wasu hanyoyi sun lalace, al'amuran jirgin kasa ya katse a wuraren da abin ya shafa, kuma Filin jirgin saman Noto da ke yankin Ishikawa ya kasance a rufe.

input.mt: An lalata wasu hanyoyi, an katse tashar jirgin kasa a yankunan da abin ya shafa, kuma filin jirgin saman Noto da ke lardin Ishikawa ya ci gaba da rufewa.
input.src: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.

reference: Wasu rahotanni sun kai adadin mutuwan zuwa takwas, kuma tabbatacciyar rahoto na tabbatar da cewa mutum 30 suka ji rauni; amma ba a san adadin ƙarshe ba.

input.mt: Wasu rahotanni sun ce mutane takwas ne suka mutu, kuma rahotanni sun tabbatar da cewa har mutane 30 ne suka ji rauni; amma har yanzu ba a san lambobin ƙarshe ba.
input.src: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.

reference: Magungunan biyu suna aiki tare da juna don samar da lu'ulu'u wanda zai iya toshe aikin koda, masu bincike a jami'ar sun ce.

input.mt: Masu bincike a jami'ar sun ce waɗannan abubuwa biyu suna yin aiki tare don su samar da lu'ulu'u da za su iya hana makogwaro yin aiki.
input.src: The two compounds react with one another to form crystals that may block kidney function, researchers at the university said.

reference: Masu binciken sun lura cewa kiristal sun taru a fisarin kyanwa ta hanyar karin sinadarin melanin da cyanuric.

input.mt: Masu binciken sun lura da lu'ulu'u da aka samu a cikin fitsarin cats ta wajen ƙara melamine da cyanuric acid.
input.src: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.

reference: Duk da haka kashi tamanin cikin kayan mu sun samu haraji a kasashen Amurka ta tsakiya. Zamu kula da kai.
