input.mt: Duk da haka kashi 80 cikin dari na kayayyakinmu an yi musu haraji ta hanyar haraji a kasashen Amurka ta tsakiya. Muna kula da ku.
input.src: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.

reference: Na kasa fahimtar abin, hakika babu adalci a ciki.

input.mt: A ganina, hakan bai da ma'ana, kuma ba gaskiya ba ne.
input.src: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.

reference: Hudu daga cikin masu tsere a kungiyar mata sun gaza kamala gudu, kuma 45 a cikin 117 masu tsere a Giant Slalom sun kasa samun nasara a tseren.

input.mt: 'Yan wasan kankara huɗu a rukuni na mata sun kasa gama gudu, kuma 45 daga cikin 'yan wasan kankara 117 a cikin Giant Slalom sun kasa samun matsayi a tseren.
input.src: Four skiers in the women's sitting group failed to finish their runs, and 45 of the 117 total skiers in the Giant Slalom failed to rank in the race.

reference: Ofishin gabatar da Ƙararraki, wanda ke da alhakin gabatar da tuhuma, ya bayyana wa ‘yan jarida cewa ba shi da wani bayani da zai kara har sai bayan an karbi shigar da karar.

input.mt: Ofishin Crown, wanda ke da alhakin gurfanar da mutane, ya sanar da 'yan jarida cewa ba za a sake yin karin bayani ba a kalla har sai an shigar da kara.
input.src: Crown Office, which is in overall charge of prosecutions, has indicated to journalists that no further comment will be made at least until indictment.

reference: Takardar, gwargwadon fallasar, za ta yi magana ne kan rikicin iyakoki, wanda Falasɗinawa ke son ya ɗora shi kan iyakokin kafin Yaƙin Gabas ta Tsakiya na 1967.

input.mt: A cewar rahoton, takardar za ta yi magana ne game da rikicin kan iyakoki, wanda Falasdinu ke so dangane da iyakoki kafin yakin Gabas ta Tsakiya na 1967.
input.src: The document, according to the leak, will refer to the borders dispute, which Palestine wants based on the borders before the 1967 Mideast War.

reference: Sauran batu da aka tattauna bisa ga fadi sun hada da Jerusalem a nan gaba wadda ke da tsarki ga al’umma biyun tare da batun Jordan Valley.

input.mt: Wasu batutuwa da aka tattauna sun haɗa da yanayin Urushalima a nan gaba wanda yake da tsarki ga al'ummai biyu da kuma batun kwarin Urdun.
input.src: Other topics covered reportedly include the future state of Jerusalem which is sacred to both nations and the Jordan Valley issue.

reference: A watan da ya gabata ne wani kwamiti na shugaban kasa ya ba da shawarar murabus din CEP tun gabani a matsayin bangare na kunshin daukar matakan ciyar da kasar gaba zuwa sabon zabe.

input.mt: A watan da ya gabata kwamiti na shugaban kasa ya bada shawarar murabus na tsohon CEP a matsayin wani bangare na matakan da za su motsa kasar zuwa sabon zabe.
input.src: Last month a presidential commission recommended the prior CEP's resignation as part of a package of measures to move the country towards new elections.

reference: Zanga-zangar da wani lokaci suke da tashin hankali sun faru ne saboda gaza yin zaɓuɓɓuka, waɗansu lokacinsu ya wuce tun 2011.

input.mt: Wasu lokutan zanga-zangar da ake yi da tashin hankali sun faru ne saboda rashin gudanar da zabe, wasu daga cikinsu sun kasance tun shekarar 2011.
input.src: The sometimes-violent protests were triggered by failure to hold elections, some due since 2011.

reference: Ofishin gudanarwar da aikin gaggawa na Northern Marianas ya ce babu rohoton barna da aka samu a ƙasar.

input.mt: Ofishin kula da gaggawa na Arewacin Marianas ya ce babu wani lalacewar da aka ruwaito a kasar.
input.src: The Northern Marianas emergency management office said that there were no damages reported in the nation.

reference: An ceto da dama cikin wadanda aka yi garkuwa da su din, yayin da aka tabbatar da mutuwar akalla guda shida daga cikinsu ya zuwa yanzu.

input.mt: An ceto mutane da dama da aka yi garkuwa da su kuma an tabbatar da mutuwar akalla shida har zuwa yanzu.
input.src: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.

reference: Xinhua ya bayar da rahoton cewa masu binciken gwamnati sun gano na’urorin naɗar sauti biyu na 'bakin akwatin’ ranar Laraba.

input.mt: Xinhua ta ruwaito cewa masu binciken gwamnati sun dawo da na'urorin rikodin jirgin sama guda biyu a ranar Laraba.
input.src: Xinhua reported that government investigators recovered two 'black box' flight recorders on Wednesday.

reference: Wanda ya lashe lambar zinare a gasar Olympics ya kamata ne ya yi iyo a tseren mita 100 da 200 kuma a cikin wasanni uku a wasannin Commonwealth, amma saboda korafin da ya yi ya nuna shakku kan lafiyar sa.

input.mt: Mai karɓar lambar zinare ta Olympics ya kamata ya yi iyo a cikin 100m da 200m freestyle da kuma a cikin reluwe uku a Wasannin Commonwealth, amma saboda korafe-korafensa ya kasance cikin shakku.
input.src: The Olympic gold medalist was due to swim in the 100m and 200m freestyle and in three relays at the Commonwealth Games, but due to his complaints his fitness has been in doubt.

reference: Mai yiwuwa taurari masu wutsiya sun kasance ta cikinsu ruwan sama ke zuwa duniya tare da takin dabbobi wanda ke iya samar da kayan gina jiki domin tallafar rayuwa.

input.mt: Wataƙila tauraron sama ne suka kawo ruwa zuwa duniya tare da abubuwa masu rai da za su iya samar da sunadarai da kuma ci gaba da rayuwa.
input.src: Comets may possibly have been a source of water delivery to the earth along with organic matter that can form proteins and support life.

reference: Ugbu a, anyị nwere ụmụ oke ọnwa anọ na-arịabu ọrịa shuga mana ha anaghị arịazi ya.

input.mt: Ọ gbakwụnyere, sị: "Anyị nwere òké ndị dị ọnwa anọ ugbu a na-enweghị ọrịa shuga, bụ́ ndị na-arịa ọrịa shuga n'oge gara aga".
input.src: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.

reference: Dr. Ehud Ur, ọkammụta nke ọgwụ na Mahadum Dalhousie nọ na Halifax, Nova Scotia na onye isi oche nke ngalaba ụlọ ọgwụ na sayensi ahụ nke Òtù Ọrịa Shuga ndị Kanada dọrọ aka na ntị na nnyocha ahụ ka nọ n’oge ndị mbụ ya.

input.mt: Dr. Ehud Ur, bụ́ prọfesọ nke nkà mmụta ọgwụ na Mahadum Dalhousie dị na Halifax, Nova Scotia na onyeisi oche nke ngalaba ahụike na nke sayensị nke Canadian Diabetes Association dọrọ aka ná ntị na nnyocha ahụ ka dị ná mmalite ya.
input.src: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.

reference: Ka ndị ọkachamara ndị ọzọ, o kwenyeghị na a ga agwọtanwu ọrịa shuga, o depụtara na ihe nchọpụta ndị a enweghị mmetụta nye ndị nwere ọrịa shuga Taịp 1.

input.mt: Dị ka ụfọdụ ndị ọkachamara ndị ọzọ, ọ na-enwe obi abụọ ma a pụrụ ịgwọ ọrịa shuga, na-ekwu na nchọpụta ndị a enweghị ihe jikọrọ ha na ndị nwere ụdị ọrịa shuga 1.
input.src: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.

reference: Danius si, "Ugbu a anyị anaghị eme ihe ọbụla. Akpọọlam oku ma zijere onye ya na ya kacha arụkọ ozi ịntaneetị ma nwetekwa ụsa nnabata. Ugbua nke ahụ zuru oke."

input.mt: Danius kwuru, sị, "N'oge a, anyị anaghị eme ihe ọ bụla. M akpọwo ma zigara onye ya na ya na-arụkọ ọrụ ozi ịntanetị ma nweta nzaghachi dị nnọọ mma. Maka ugbu a, nke ahụ ezuola".
input.src: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."

reference: Na mbu,onye isi Ring, Jamie Siminoff, kwuru na ulo oru ya bidoro mgbe onughi mgbirigba ya n’ulo ahia ya di na ime ebe o na adoba ugboala ya.

input.mt: N'oge gara aga, onyeisi oche nke Ring, Jamie Siminoff, kwuru na ụlọ ọrụ ahụ malitere mgbe a na-anụghị mgbịrịgba ọnụ ụzọ ya site n'ụlọ ahịa ya dị n'ogige ụgbọala ya.
input.src: Previously, Ring's CEO, Jamie Siminoff, remarked the company started when his doorbell wasn't audible from his shop in his garage.

reference: Ring dozikwara otu ikpe ha na ụlọ ọrụ ọzọ na-ahụ maka nchekwa, ADT Corporation nwere.

input.mt: Ring mekwara mkpesa megide ụlọ ọrụ nche na-asọmpi, ADT Corporation.
input.src: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.

reference: Ọ bụ eziokwu na otu ọgwụ mgbochi aka na-ele anya egosila na o nwere ike ịbelata oke ndị mmadụ ji anwụ n'ihi ọrịa Ebola, mana ruo ugbu a, enwebeghi ọgwụ ọbụla gosiri hooha na o nwere ike ịgwọ onye bu ọrịa a.

input.mt: Ọ bụ ezie na otu ọgwụ mgbochi yiri ka ọ pụrụ ibelata ọnụ ọgụgụ ndị na-anwụ anwụ site n'ọrịa Ebola, ruo ugbu a, ọ dịghị ọgwụ e gosipụtara n'ụzọ doro anya na o kwesịrị ekwesị maka ịgwọ ọrịa dị ugbu a.
input.src: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.

reference: Na nnwale PALM, eji ZMapp mere ihe nruba ama, nke a putara na ndi sayentist jiri ya mee baseline tunyere ogwugwo ato ozo.

input.mt: N'ule PALM, ZMapp jere ozi dị ka njikwa, nke pụtara na ndị ọkà mmụta sayensị jiri ya mee ihe dị ka ntọala ma jiri ya tụnyere ọgwụgwọ atọ ndị ọzọ.
input.src: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.

reference: Mpaghara jimnasktik nke obodo USA kwadoro nlebara anya nke onwe nke nwere ike igosi ka mmegbu nke ndị lanarịrị ihe mberede Larị Nassar kọwapụtara nwere ike ịbụ ihe metere aka a na-amaghị maka ya na anabatakwa mgbanwe ndị kwesịrị ekwesị.

input.mt: USA Gymnastics na-akwado nyocha nke onwe ya nke nwere ike inye ìhè n'otú mmegbu nke akụkụ ahụ akọwapụtara nke ọma site n'aka ndị lanarịrị Larry Nassar nwere ike isi ghara ịchọpụta ruo ogologo oge ma na-agụnye mgbanwe ọ bụla dị mkpa na nke kwesịrị ekwesị.
input.src: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.

reference: Egwuregwu Jimnastik nke mba USA na ndi USOC nwere otu ebumnobi - ime egwuregwu jimnastik, na ndi ozo, enweghi iyi-egwu dika ike kwere nye ogwu egwu isoro nro ha n’uzo n’enweghi iyi-egwu, ziri-ezi na gburu-gburu akwadoro akwado.

input.mt: USA Gymnastics na USOC nwere otu ihe mgbaru ọsọ  ime ka egwuregwu nke gymnastics, na ndị ọzọ, dị ka nchekwa dị ka o kwere mee maka ndị na-eme egwuregwu ịgbaso nrọ ha na gburugburu ebe obibi dị mma, nke dị mma ma nwee ike.
input.src: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.

reference: Na 1960 ga, Brzezinski rụụrụ John F. Kennedy ọrụ dị ka onye ndụmọdụ ya ma mechaa rụọkwa otu ihe ahụ n'oge ọchịchị Lyndon B. Johnson.

input.mt: N'afọ ndị 1960, Brzezinski rụrụ ọrụ maka John F. Kennedy dị ka onye ndụmọdụ ya wee bụrụ onye nchịkwa Lyndon B. Johnson.
input.src: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.

reference: N’ime nghọpụta nke 1976, ọ dụrụ Carter ndụmọdụ gbasara iwu ndị mba ofesi, wee rụzie ọrụ dịka Onye ndụmọdụ Nchekwa Mba (NSA) site na 1977 ruo 1981, na nnọchi Henry Kissinger.

input.mt: N'oge nhọrọ nke 1976, ọ na-adụ Carter ọdụ na ndọrọ ndọrọ ọchịchị mba ọzọ, wee jee ozi dị ka National Security Advisor (NSA) site na 1977 ruo 1981, na-anọchi Henry Kissinger.
input.src: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.

reference: E deturu aha Gosling na Stone n'otu ndị nwere ịnweta akara nturu ugo Best Aktọ na Best Aktres, n'otu n'otu.

input.mt: Gosling na Stone natara aha maka Best Actor na Actress n'otu n'otu.
input.src: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.

reference: Ka ụbọchị Sọnde nọ na ngwụcha, Onye isi ọchịchị obodo Yunaịted Steeti bụ Donald Trọmp, kwuru n'ozi e nyere site n'aka onye ode akwụkwọ ndị nta akụkọ, nke sịrị na ndị agha obodo US ga ahapụ Sirịa.

input.mt: N'isi ụtụtụ Sọnde, Onye isi ala United States bụ Donald Trump, na nkwupụta o nyere site n'aka odeakụkọ, kwupụtara na ndị agha US ga-ahapụ Syria.
input.src: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.

reference: E kwuputara nke a mgbe Trump na Onyeisiala mba Tọkị bụ Rejep Tayyip Erdoghan nwechara mkparịtaụka n'ekwentị.

input.mt: A mara ọkwa a mgbe Trump nwere mkparịta ụka ekwentị na Onye isi ala Turkey Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
input.src: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

reference: Nke a na-egosi na, opekata mpe, ụfọdụ daịnosọọ nwere abụba; ọtụtụ ndị mmadụ nwere echiche a taa, mana ihe ọzọ bụ na ọ na-egosi anyị ihe fosịl enweghị ike igosi, dịka agba na nhazi akụkụ-atọ.

input.mt: Ọ bụghị nanị na nke a na-egosi na ọ dịkarịa ala ụfọdụ dinosaur nwere nku, nke bụ echiche a na-ahụkarị, ma na-enye nkọwa ndị fossil na-enweghị ike, dị ka agba na nhazi atọ.
input.src: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.

reference: Ihe nchọpụta ahụ nyekwara ntụziaka gbasara mmalite ipu nku n'ụmụ nnụnụ.

input.mt: Ihe a chọpụtara na-enyekwa anyị ihe ọmụma banyere evolushọn nke nku n'ime nnụnụ.
input.src: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.

reference: Nhazi nku ha gosiri na ha ejighi ya efe efe kama ha ji ya edokwa okpomọkụ maọbụ eme ihe ngosi. Ndị nchọpụta ihe tụrụ aro sị na, n'agbanyeghị na nke a bụ ọdụ daịnosọ na-eto eto, ihe ngosi ahụ gosiri nku anụ tochara etocha na-abụghị nku nwa anụ.

input.mt: Ndị nchọpụta ahụ kwuru na ọ bụ ezie na ọ bụ ọdụ nke nwa dinosaur, ihe e mere n'ihe atụ ahụ na-egosi plumage nke ndị toro eto, ọ bụghị nke nwa nnụnụ.
input.src: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

reference: Ndị nchọpụta ihe tụrụ aro sị na, n'agbanyeghị na nke a bụ ọdụ daịnosọ na-eto eto, ihe ngosi ahụ gosiri nku anụ tochara etocha na-abụghị nku nwa anụ.

input.mt: Ndị nchọpụta ahụ tụrụ aro na ọ bụ ezie na nke a bụ ọdụ nke nwa okorobịa dinosaur, ihe nlele ahụ na-egosi plumage okenye na ọ bụghị a chick si ala.
input.src: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

reference: Otu bọmbụ gbawara n'isi ụlọ ọrụ ndị uwe ojii n’ime Gaziantep, Tọkii ụtụtụ ụnyaahụ na-egbu ndị uwe ojii abụọ ma merụọ ahụ ihe karịrị ndị mmadụ ọzọ iri abụọ.

input.mt: Ụgbọala bọmbụ gbawara n'isi ụlọ ọrụ ndị uweojii dị na Gaziantep, Turkey ụtụtụ ụnyaahụ gburu ndị uweojii abụọ ma merụọ ihe karịrị mmadụ iri abụọ ahụ.
input.src: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.

reference: Ụlọ ọrụ gọvanọ kwuru iri na itoolu na ndị merụrụ ahụ bụ ndị uwe ojii.

input.mt: Ọfịs gọvanọ kwuru na mmadụ iri na itoolu n'ime ndị merụrụ ahụ bụ ndị uweojii.
input.src: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.

reference: Ndị uwe ojii sị na ha na-enyo otu onye a na-ebo ebubo na ọ bụ onye agha nnupuisi Daesh (ISIL) dịka onye mere mwakpo ahụ.

input.mt: Ndị uweojii kwuru na ha na-enyo enyo na ọ bụ onye agha Daesh (ISIL) kpatara mwakpo ahụ.
input.src: Police said they suspect an alleged Daesh (ISIL) militant of responsibility for the attack.

reference: Ha chọpụtara na Anyanwụ na-arụ ọrụ n’otu ụdị isi iwu dịka kpakpandu ndị ọzọ: A chọpụtara na omume kpakpandu niile nọ na sistemụ bụ onwunwu ọkụ na ntụgharị ha na-anya ha, ma ọ nweghị ihe ọzọ..

input.mt: Ha chọpụtara na anyanwụ na-arụ ọrụ n'otu ụkpụrụ ndị ahụ dị ka kpakpando ndị ọzọ: A chọpụtara na ihe na-eme kpakpando niile nọ n'usoro ahụ bụ ìhè ha, otú ha si atụgharị, na ihe ọ bụla ọzọ.
input.src: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.

reference: A na-ejikọta ọnụ ọnwụnwụ ọkụ na ntụgharị ya amata akara Rossby nke otu kpakpando, nke metụtara na ọwụwụ plasma.

input.mt: A na-eji ìhè na ntụgharị mee ihe ọnụ iji chọpụta ọnụ ọgụgụ Rossby nke kpakpando, nke metụtara plasma.
input.src: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.

reference: Na 802.11n, ọsịsọ ya ji nnukwu ihe kara nke ndị bu ya ụzọ; ya mere, ọrụ ọ na-arụpụta ga-eru 600Mbit/s.

input.mt: The ọsọ nke 802.11n bụ n'ụzọ dị ịrịba ama ngwa ngwa karịa ndị bu ya ụzọ na a kacha nkà mmụta sayensị throughput nke 600Mbit/s.
input.src: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.

reference: Hu gbara obodo ndị na emepe emepe ume "ka ha ghara itinye aka n'usoro omume mgbe ochie bụ ibu ụzọ metọọ were kpochawa ma emechaa."

input.mt: Hu gbara mba ndị ka na-emepe emepe ume "izere ụzọ ochie nke ibu ụzọ na-emetọ ihe ma mechaa kpochapụ ya".
input.src: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."

reference: O tinyekwara na "ha ekwela ka adị ha buru ibu karịrị ogugo uto na ike ha."

input.mt: O kwukwara na "a gaghị agwa ha ka ha buru ibu ọrụ gafere ọkwa mmepe ha, ibu ọrụ ha na ikike ha".
input.src: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."

reference: Òtù Mmụta Irak ahụ gosipụtara nchọpụta ya na 12.00 GMT taa.

input.mt: Òtù Nnyocha Iraq gosipụtara akụkọ ya n'elekere 12 GMT taa.
input.src: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.

reference: Ọ dọrọ aka na ntị sị na onweghị onye ga-ekwe nkwa na usoro ọbụla e jiri mee ihe na mba Aịrak ugbu a ga-akwụsị agha otu, ntolite ihe ike, maọbụ ndabanye n'ọgbaghara.

input.mt: Ọ na-adọ aka ná ntị na Ọ dịghị onye pụrụ ikwe nkwa na ihe ọ bụla a ga-eme n'Irak n'oge a ga-akwụsị agha nke òtù dị iche iche, ime ihe ike na-arịwanye elu, ma ọ bụ ọgba aghara.
input.src: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.

reference: Ọ bụ n'Ajentaịn Tiyeta ka Lọọlọ Kirchner kwuputara ebumnuche ya ịzọ maka ọkwa onye isi ala, otu ebe ahụ ọ ji bido kampen ya maka ọkwa Sịnetọ na 2005 dịka onye otu nke ndị mpaghara Buenos Aires zigara.

input.mt: Nwanyị Kirchner kwupụtara ebumnuche ya ịzọ ọkwa onye isi ala na Argentine Theatre, otu ebe ahụ ọ malitere mkpọsa ya na 2005 maka Senate dị ka onye so na ndị nnọchianya nke Buenos Aires.
input.src: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.

reference: Ọ bụ esemokwu maka mmefu ego na nkwado na nrụgharị e mere mgbe Oke ikuku Katrina gasịrị kpatara arụmụka a; ụfọdụ ndị kweere na iji nwayọ emefụ ego steeti akọwaala mmefụ a n'ụzọ ntọrọmọchị dịka "Nkwekọrịta Niu Ọlịns nke Bush mere".

input.mt: Mkparịta ụka ahụ malitere site na esemokwu banyere mmefu maka enyemaka na iwughachi mgbe ajọ ifufe Katrina gasịrị; nke ụfọdụ ndị na-ahụ maka ego na-emefu ego kpọrọ "Nkwekọrịta New Orleans nke Bush" n'ụzọ na-atọ ọchị.
input.src: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

reference: Ihe karịrị nde mmadụ anọ gara Rom maka olili ahụ.

input.mt: Ihe karịrị nde mmadụ anọ gara Rom ịga olili ozu ya.
input.src: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.

reference: Ọnụ ọgụgụ ndị mmadụ nọ ebe n'ahụ dị ukwuu nke na o kweghị mmadụ niile omume inwèta òhèrè n'olili ozu na St. Peter Square.

input.mt: Ọnụ ọgụgụ ndị bịara ya dị nnọọ ukwuu nke na ọ dịghị onye ọ bụla nwere ike ịga ebe a na-eli ozu na St. Peter's Square.
input.src: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.

reference: Etinyere ọtụtụ nnukwu igwe onyonyo n'ọtụtụ ebe na Rom, ka ndị mmadụ nwee ike kirie mmemme ahụ.

input.mt: E wuru ọtụtụ nnukwu telivishọn n'ebe dị iche iche na Rom ka ndị mmadụ nwee ike ile ihe omume ahụ.
input.src: Several large television screens were installed in various places in Rome to let the people watch the ceremony.

reference: N'ọtụtụ obodo Itali ndị ọzọ ma na uwa nile, ọkachasị na Poland, emere nkwazi dị ka ibe ya, nke ọtụtụ mmadụ hụrụ.

input.mt: N'ọtụtụ obodo ndị ọzọ dị n'Ịtali nakwa n'ebe ndị ọzọ n'ụwa, karịsịa na Poland, e mere ihe ndị yiri ha, bụ́ ndị ọtụtụ mmadụ lere anya.
input.src: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.

reference: Ndị akụkọala akọtọla ụmụ iwuikikere FBI ndị gara aga maka ịgbado anya akụrụngwa n’ụmụ okwu ndị dị mfe ikpezi, tụmadị ụmụ okwu ụgbọ ala ezuru ezuru, n’iji ebumnobi nke ịkwalite nsìàga ọganihu ha.

input.mt: Ndị ọkọ akụkọ ihe mere eme akatọọla iwu ndị gara aga nke FBI maka ilekwasị anya n'okwu ndị dị mfe idozi, ọkachasị ikpe ụgbọ ala ezuru, na ebumnuche nke ịkwalite ọnụego ihe ịga nke ọma nke ụlọ ọrụ ahụ.
input.src: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.

reference: Ndị na-eji batị akụ n'usoro etiti, Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid rụrụ ọrụ nke ọma ma mee otu nrụkọọrụ nke ọsọ-otu narị.

input.mt: Ndị na-agba bọọlụ etiti, Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid, mere nke ọma ma mee mkpakọrịta otu narị.
input.src: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.

reference: Mana, mgbe ha dara wicket India naanị mere 36 gbara ọ tọpụ wicket 7 iji kwụsị innings.

input.mt: Ma, mgbe ọ tụfuru wicket nke onyeisi ndị agha, India mere naanị 36 runs na-efunahụ 7 wickets iji mechie innings.
input.src: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.

reference: U.S. Onye isi oche Jiọj W. Bush batata Singapọ n'ụtụtụ ụbọchị nke iri na isii nke ọnwa Nọvemba, iji malite njem njegharị mba Eshia nke ga-anọzu otu izuụka.

input.mt: Onye isi ala United States bụ́ George W. Bush rutere Singapore n'ụtụtụ nke November 16, na-amalite njem otu izu ga-ewe n'Eshia.
input.src: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.

reference: Mana Prime Minista John Howard ekwuola na ihe a mere bụ naanị ka ichebe ụmụ akụrụngwa nke ụlọ ọgwụ ahụ site n'aka mwedàta siri n'aka gọọmentị Tasmania, n'inye mmezi nke nde AUD$45.

input.mt: Ma Prime Minister John Howard ekwuola na iwu ahụ bụ nanị iji chebe ụlọ ọgwụ ahụ ka gọọmentị Tasmania ghara imebi ya, site n'inye AUD $ 45 nde ọzọ.
input.src: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.

reference: Onyeisiala mba Amerịka bụ George W. Bush nabatara ọkwa ahụ.

input.mt: Onyeisi ala United States bụ́ George W. Bush nabatara ọkwa ahụ.
input.src: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.

reference: Oke ifufe nke iri abụrụ aha nke oge oke ifufe Atlantik, Oke ifufe akpọrọ Jeri, gbakọrọ n'oke osimiri atlantik taa.

input.mt: Oké ifufe nke iri a kpọrọ aha n'oge oké ifufe Atlantic, bụ́ Subtropical Storm Jerry, guzobere n'Oké Osimiri Atlantic taa.
input.src: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.

reference: Ụlọ Ọrụ nke Ndị injinia nke U.S. mere atụmatụ na mmiri mmiri dị inchi isii nwere ike ịgabiga ihe mgbochi ide mmiri e mebibiri na mbụ.

input.mt: Òtù Ndị Injinịa United States kwuru na mmiri ozuzo ruru sentimita asatọ nwere ike imebi ebe ndị ahụ e mebiri emebi n'oge gara aga.
input.src: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.

reference: Mmetụta otu ahụ nọ na-achọ ga-esite n'aka ikikere taịdị ndị dị n'etiti mata ojii nke galaxy na mata ojii nke Milky Way.

input.mt: Mmetụta ahụ ìgwè ahụ na-achọ ga-abụ nke a na-akpata site na ike tidal n'etiti galaxy si ọchịchịrị ihe onwunwe na Milky Way si ọchịchịrị ihe onwunwe.
input.src: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.

reference: Dị ka ọnwa na etinye ndọta n’ụwa, na-akpata elili mmiri, etu ahụ ka Milky Way ahụ si etinye ike na galazi Sagittarius ahụ.

input.mt: Dị nnọọ ka ọnwa na-adọta ụwa, na-akpata idei mmiri, otú ahụ ka Milky Way na-adọta ụyọkọ kpakpando Sagittarius.
input.src: Just like the moon exerts a pull on the earth, causing tides, so does the Milky Way exert a force on the Sagittarius galaxy.

reference: Ụmụ akụkọ si telivishọn na-egosi anwụrụ ọcha si n'igwe nrụpụta ahụ apụta.

input.mt: Akụkọ telivishọn na-egosi na anwụrụ ọkụ ọcha na-esi n'ụlọ ọrụ ahụ apụta.
input.src: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.

reference: Ndị isi obodo na-adọ ndị bi n'obodo gburugburu igwe ọrụ ahụ aka na ntị ka ha nọrọ n'ime ụlọ, gbanyụọ ntụ oyi ma ghara iṅu mmiri na-agba n'ụlọ.

input.mt: Ndị ọchịchị obodo ahụ na-adọ ndị bi n'akụkụ ụlọ ọrụ ahụ aka ná ntị ka ha nọrọ n'ime ụlọ, gbanyụọ ikuku na-ekpo ọkụ ma ghara ịṅụ mmiri pọmpụ.
input.src: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.

reference: Ndị isi chere na nke a na-egosi na o nwere ike gbọmgbọm ndị ji mmanụ ụgbọ yurenium agbawaala ma na-ehi ehi.

input.mt: Ndị ọchịchị na-ekwu na nke a na-egosi na akpa ndị nwere mmanụ uranium n'ebe ahụ nwere ike ịgbawa ma na-agbapụta.
input.src: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.

reference: Dr. Toni Moll chọpụtara nje Tubakụlọsis (XDR-TB) nke na-emegide ọgwụ na ngalaba Sawụt Afrịka nke KwaZulu-Natal.

input.mt: Dr. Tony Moll chọpụtara ọrịa ụkwara nta nke na-eguzogide ọgwụ ọjọọ nke ukwuu (XDR-TB) n'ógbè South Africa bụ́ KwaZulu-Natal.
input.src: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.

reference: Ha ka na anwale ịchọpụta etu ibu mkpọka ahụ dị ma etu ọ ga-esi emetụta Uwa.

input.mt: Ha ka na-agbalị ịchọpụta otú ihe mberede ahụ dịruru ná njọ na otú ọ ga-esi metụta ụwa.
input.src: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.

reference: Otu dibia-bekee onye rubuuru oru ulo-ogwu umuaka nke pittsburgh, Pennysylvania ka aga ekpe ikpe banyere igbu-mmadu nke akpasuru-iwe ka ahuchara nne ya na azu ugbo-ala na-onwu n’ubochi Wednesde, ka ndi isi no na Ohio kwuru.

input.mt: A ga-ebo otu dọkịta na-arụ ọrụ n'Ụlọ Ọgwụ Ụmụaka dị na Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania ebubo maka igbu ọchụ siri ike mgbe a hụrụ nne ya nwụrụ anwụ n'ime akpa ụgbọala ya na Wednesday, ndị ọchịchị Ohio na-ekwu.
input.src: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.

reference: Ọ dụrụ ndị ọrụ nche gaa na Oldsmobile Intrigue ojii ya nke nọ n’ụzọukwu narị ise n’itoanya.

input.mt: Ọ gwara ndị uwe ojii ka ha gaa n'ebe ọ na-akwọ ụgbọala gbara ọchịchịrị, nke dị mita 500 n'ebe dị anya.
input.src: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.

reference: Ndị uwe ojii kwuru na ahụ ahụ dị ka ọ nọọla ebe ahụ ruo ihe dị ka otu ụbọchị.

input.mt: Ndị uweojii kwuru na o yiri ka ozu ahụ anọwo ebe ahụ ruo ihe dị ka otu ụbọchị.
input.src: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.

reference: Ezi na ebu ọrịa ahụ, nke anwụnta na ebunyezi ndị mmadụ.

input.mt: A na-ebute ọrịa a site n'aka ụmụ anụmanụ, bụ́ ndị na-esi n'aka anwụnta agafe ụmụ mmadụ.
input.src: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.

reference: Ọgwụ mgbochi ensefalitis dị nde kwuru nde ka gọọmenti kwere na nkwa, nke ga-akwado ndị ọrụ ahụike maka afọ na-abịa abịa.

input.mt: Ọtụtụ nde karama ọgwụ mgbochi ọrịa ụbụrụ ka gọọmentị kwere nkwa, nke ga-enyere ụlọ ọrụ ahụike aka ịkwadebe maka afọ ọzọ.
input.src: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.

reference: O mepụtaara stampụ karịrị 1,000 maka Swidin na mba 28 ndị ọzọ.

input.mt: O mepụtara ihe karịrị otu puku stampụ maka Sweden na mba 28 ndị ọzọ.
input.src: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.

reference: Oru ya bunke amaara nke oma na iti igba ma doo kwa anya nke oma na obu otu nime ndi amaara n’ezinulo nile na ndi philatelist. Ufodu lekwasiri anya nnoo na ichikota oru ya nani.

input.mt: Ọrụ ya dị nnọọ mma nke na ọ bụ otu n'ime "aha ezinụlọ" ole na ole n'etiti ndị philatelists.
input.src: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.

reference: Mgbe ihe mberde ahụ mechara, e buru Gibson gawa n’ụlọ ọgwụ mana ọ nwụrụ mgbe obere oge gachara.

input.mt: Mgbe ihe mberede ahụ gasịrị, a kpọgara Gibson n'ụlọ ọgwụ ma nwụọ obere oge ka e mesịrị.
input.src: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.

reference: Ọkwọ ụgbọ gwongworo ahụ, nke gbara afọ 64, emerụghị ahụ na mkpọka ahụ.

input.mt: Onye na-akwọ ụgbọala ahụ, bụ́ onye dị afọ 64, emerụghị ahụ n'ihe mberede ahụ.
input.src: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.

reference: N'otu ụbọchị ahụ, ebe elekere nke iri na abụọwepụrụ ụgbọ ahụ n'ebe ihe mbere mere.

input.mt: A chụpụrụ ụgbọala ahụ n'ebe ihe mberede ahụ mere n'ihe dị ka 1200 GMT n'otu ụbọchị ahụ.
input.src: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.

reference: Otu onye na-arụ ọrụ ebe a na-adọba ụgbọala nọ n’akụkụ ebe ihe mberede ahụ mere kwuru si: "E nwere ụmụaka nọ na-eche ịgafe okporo ụzọ ahụ nakwa ha nille nọ na-eti mkpu ma na-ebe akwa."

input.mt: Otu onye na-arụ ọrụ n'ebe a na-adọba ụgbọala dị nso n'ebe ihe mberede ahụ mere kwuru, sị: "Ụmụaka nọ na-eche ka ha gafee okporo ụzọ, ha niile nọkwa na-eti mkpu ma na-ebe ákwá".
input.src: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."

reference: Ihe ndi ozo akpara na Bali bu izoputa ohia ndi ozo di n’uwa na ikee nka n’uzu nwere ike inyere ndi mba n’ebilite aka itoo n’uzo ga-akwusi mmeto ikuku.

input.mt: Isiokwu ndị ọzọ dị n'usoro ihe omume na Bali gụnyere ịzọpụta oké ọhịa ndị fọdụrụ n'ụwa, na ịkekọrịta nkà na ụzụ iji nyere mba ndị ka na-emepe emepe aka itolite n'ụzọ ndị na-emetọghị ihe.
input.src: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.

reference: Fluke dere na mbo ufodu gbara ihu na emechiri onu umunwanyi iji kwusi ha ikwuputa okwu maka ihe gbasara ahuike umu nwanyi agaghi nkeoma.

input.mt: Fluke dere na mgbalị ụfọdụ mere iji mee ka ụmụ nwanyị ghara ikwu okwu banyere ahụ́ ike ụmụ nwanyị enwebeghị ihe ịga nke ọma.
input.src: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.

reference: O ruru na mkpebi a n'ihi ọtụtụ okwu nkwado o nwetara n'aka ụmụnwoke ma ụmụnwaanyị ndị sị ya na ọgwụ mgbochi afọ ime bụ ihe kwesịrị ekwesị.

input.mt: Ọ bịara ná nkwubi okwu a n'ihi ọtụtụ okwu ọma na agbamume ndị ụmụ nwanyị na ụmụ nwoke zitere ya na-agba ume ka e were ọgwụ mgbochi afọ ime dị ka ihe dị mkpa n'ịgwọ ọrịa.
input.src: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.

reference: Oge ya bụ ọgụ gwụchara mgbe e wegara ndị merụrụ ahụ n'ụlọ ọgwụ, ihe dị ka ndị mkpọrọ 40 fọrọ afọ nọọrọ na mpụga, jụ ịlaghachi n'ime ụlọ mkpọrọ ha.

input.mt: Mgbe agha ahụ kwụsịrị mgbe a kpọgara ndị ahụ e merụrụ ahụ n'ụlọ ọgwụ, ihe dị ka ndị mkpọrọ 40 fọdụrụnụ nọgidere n'ogige ma jụ ịlaghachi n'ọnụ ụlọ mkpọrọ ha.
input.src: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.

reference: Ndị mkparịta ụka nwara ịweta udo, mana ihe ndị mkpọrọ chọrọ edoghi anya.

input.mt: Ndị nkwurịta okwu gbalịrị idozi ọnọdụ ahụ, ma ihe ndị mkpọrọ ahụ chọrọ edoghị anya.
input.src: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.

reference: N'etiti 10:00 na 11:00 MDT n'abalị, ndị mkpọrọ nọ na mpụta mụnyere ọkụ.

input.mt: N'agbata elekere iri na elekere iri nke ehihie na ehihie, ndị mkpọrọ gbara ọkụ n'ogige ụlọ mkpọrọ ahụ.
input.src: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.

reference: N'oge na-adịghị anya, ndị ọrụ uwe ojii ejikere na gịa ogbaaghara batara n'ime yad ahụ ma jiri gaasị anya mmiri wee gbakọta ndị mkpọrọ n’otu ebe.

input.mt: N'oge na-adịghị anya, ndị uwe ojii ji ngwá agha ndị na-egbochi ọgba aghara bata n'ogige ụlọ mkpọrọ ma jiri gas anya mmiri tụba ndị mkpọrọ ahụ n'akụkụ.
input.src: Soon, officers equipped with riot gear entered the yard and cornered the inmates with tear gas.

reference: N’ihi nke ahụ, ụdị azụ abụọ ekpochapụla, ma abụọ ndị ọzọ abụrụla ndị nọ n’ihe ize ndụ, gụnyere humpback chub.

input.mt: N'ihi ya, ụdị azụ abụọ anwụọla, abụọ ndị ọzọ nọkwa n'ihe ize ndụ.
input.src: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.

reference: Agbanyeghị na enweghị ihe n'egosi na a ga-enwe sunami, ndi bi ebe ahụ bidoro tụwa egwu, jiri ọsọ na-ahapụsị ụlọ na ahịa ha.

input.mt: Ọ bụ ezie na e nweghị iyi egwu tsunami, ndị bi na ya malitere ịtụ ụjọ ma malite ịhapụ ụlọ ọrụ ha na ụlọ ha.
input.src: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.

reference: N'agbanyeghi na Winfrey bu anya mmiri n'okwu ije ọma ya, o mere ka ndị ihe ya na-amasị mata nke ọma na ọ ga-alọghachi.

input.mt: Ọ bụ ezie na anya mmiri gbara Winfrey n'oge ọ na-agbahapụ ya, o mere ka o doo ndị na-akwado ya anya na ya ga-alaghachi.
input.src: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.

reference: “Nke a abụghị ịsị ka e mesịa. Nke a bụ imechi otu isi na imeghe nke ọhụrụ.”

input.mt: "Nke a agaghị abụ ịgbaghara. Nke a bụ mmechi nke otu isi na mmeghe nke ọzọ".
input.src: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."

reference: Mkpọkasị ahụ mere n'elu ugwu, e kwenyekwara na ọ bụ ya kpatara ajọ ọkụ.

input.mt: Ihe mberede ahụ mere n'ebe dị elu n'ugwu, a na-ekwetakwa na ọ bụ ọkụ ndị iro kpatara ya.
input.src: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.

reference: Mgbalị ị na-achọ saịtị okuku ahụ na-emebi ihu igwe site na ihu igwe dị njọ na ala siri ike.

input.mt: Ọnọdụ ihu igwe na-adịghị mma na ala siri ike na-egbochi mgbalị ndị a na-eme ịchọta ebe ihe mberede ahụ mere.
input.src: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.

reference: Ụlọ ọrụ enyemaka ahụike Mangola, 'Medecines Sans Frontieres', na Wọld Helt Ọganaịzeshọn na-ekwụ na ọ bụ ntiwapụ ọrịa kachasị njọ ahụrụla na mba ahụ.

input.mt: Òtù na-ahụ maka ahụike bụ́ Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres na Òtù Ahụ Ike Ụwa na-ekwu na ọ bụ ọrịa kasị njọ e dekọrọ na mba ahụ.
input.src: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.

reference: Ụzọ mkpachapụ anya ha n’ime mgbochi, ka ha si ejide bọọlụ ma ụzọ nhàzi pụrụ iche mere ha ka ha pụọ iche ma o doro ha anya n’òtù a bụ òtù ha ga-emeri.

input.mt: Otú ha si agbachitere onwe ha, otú ha si eji bọl arụ ọrụ, na otú ha si arụ ọrụ nke ọma mere ka ha pụta ìhè, o dokwara anya na ọ bụ ndị a ka ha ga-emeri.
input.src: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.

reference: Ụzọ niile dị n'ọgba ahụ a kpọrọ “Ụmụnne nwanyị asaa” dị ihe dịka opekatampe 100 mita ruo mita 250 (fiiti 328 ruo 820) na dayamita.

input.mt: Ọnụ ụzọ niile e si abanye n'ọgba ahụ, bụ́ ndị a kpọrọ "Ụmụnne Ndị Inyom Asaa", dịkarịa ala 100 ruo 250 mita (328 ruo 820 ụkwụ) n'obosara.
input.src: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.

reference: Ha na-adị oyi karịa gburugburu ha n'ehihie ma dị ọkụ karịa n'abalị.

input.mt: "Ha dị jụụ karịa ala gbara ha gburugburu n'ehihie ma na-ekpo ọkụ n'abalị.
input.src: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.

reference: Omume okpomọkụ ha anaghị adịgide ka nnukwu ọgba dị n'ụwa nke na-enwe okpomọkụ na-anaghị agbanwe, mana ọ dị ka ndị a maka na ha bụkwa olulu miri emi n'ime ala," Glen Cushing kwuru, onye United States Geology Survey (USGS) Otu Astrojiọlọji na nke Mahadum Northern Arizona dị na Flagstaff, Arizona.

input.mt: Ọdịdị okpomọkụ ha adịghị ka nke nnukwu ọgba ndị dị n'ụwa, bụ́ ndị na-anọgide na-enwe okpomọkụ na-adịgide adịgide, ma ọ na-egosi na ha bụ oghere ndị miri emi n'ala", ka Glen Cushing nke United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team na nke Northern Arizona University dị na Flagstaff, Arizona kwuru.
input.src: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.

reference: Kemgbe 1988, ụmụ igbe ntuli aka ga-abụrịrị ngafe-ahụ-ụzọ ka ndị ntụli aka na ndị nnyota ga-agba akaebe na o nweghị envelopu nọ na ya mgbe a na-ebido ntuli aka nakwa o nweghị envelopu etinyere ewezụga nke ndị agụgwere ọnụ ma nye ikikere nke ọma.

input.mt: Kemgbe 1988, igbe ntuli aka aghaghị ịbụ ndị a na-ahụ anya ka ndị na-ahọpụta na ndị na-ekiri ya wee nwee ike ịgba akaebe na ọ dịghị envelopu ọ bụla dị na mmalite nke ntuli aka ahụ nakwa na ọ dịghị envelopu ọ bụla a na-agbakwunye ma e wezụga nke ndị ntuli aka a gụrụ nke ọma ma nye ha ikike.
input.src: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.

reference: Ndị a na atụrụ ụtụ nwere ike iziga ndị nnọchiteanya ka ha gbaa ama ihe nile mere. Na mgbede, ndị ọrụ efu ga agụkọ ụtụ nile na oke nlegideanya , ma site n'usoro atọrọ atọ.

input.mt: N'abalị, ndị ọrụ afọ ofufo na-agụta votu n'okpuru nlekọta siri ike, na-agbaso usoro ndị a kapịrị ọnụ.
input.src: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.

reference: ASUS Eee PC, ewepụtara ụwa niile na mbụ maka ụmụ ihe nchekwa-ego na arụmọrụ ya, wụrụ isiokwu na-ewu ewu n’Ọnwa IT Taipei 2007.

input.mt: ASUS Eee PC, nke a tọhapụrụ n'ụwa niile maka ịzọpụta ọnụahịa na ihe ndị na-arụ ọrụ, ghọrọ isiokwu na-ekpo ọkụ na 2007 Taipei IT Month.
input.src: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.

reference: Mana ogugo ahịa kọmpụta laptop ga-agbanwe ma dị iche ri nne ka ASUS nwetachara Nturu ugo Taịwan Sọstenebụl Awọdụ n'afọ 2007 site n'aka Ezekutiv Yuan si na Repọblik Chaịna.

input.mt: Ma ahịa ndị na-azụ ahịa na kọmputa laptọọpụ ga-agbanwe ma gbanwee n'ụzọ dị ukwuu mgbe ASUS nwetara onyinye Taiwan Sustainable Award 2007 site na Executive Yuan nke Republic of China.
input.src: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.

reference: N'ọgwụgwụ afọ 2015, TogiNet bidoro AstroNet Redio dị ka mpaghara nọ n'okpuru ya.

input.mt: Na njedebe nke 2015, TogiNet guzobere AstroNet Radio dị ka ụlọ ọrụ enyemaka.
input.src: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.

reference: Otu onye nkere anya kọwapụtara Bishkek dịka ihe na-emikpu n'ọnọdụ "ọgba aghara", ka ndị mmadụ na akpagharị na eburughara ngwa ahịa n'ike.

input.mt: Otu onye na-ekiri ihe na-eme na-akọwa Bishkek dị ka ọ na-adaba n'ọnọdụ "ọgba aghara", ebe ìgwè ndị mmadụ na-awagharị n'okporo ámá ma na-apụnara ụlọ ahịa ihe oriri.
input.src: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.

reference: Otutu ndi bi na Bishkek tara ndi na-eme ngaghari iwe si na odida anyanwu uta gbasara imebi iwu

input.mt: Ọtụtụ ndị bi na Bishkek boro ndị na-eme ngagharị iwe si n'ebe ndịda ebubo maka mmebi iwu ahụ.
input.src: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.

reference: Mba Sawụtụ Afrịka emeriela Ọl Bụlaksị (Nuu Ziilandị) n'egwuregwu rọgụbi nke Mbanaatọ n'ama egwuregwu Royal Bafokeng nke dị na Rọstenbọgụ, Sawụtụ Afrịka.

input.mt: Saụt Afrịka meriri ndị All Blacks (New Zealand) na egwuregwu rugby union Tri Nations na Royal Bafokeng Stadium na Rustenburg, South Africa.
input.src: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.

reference: Ọ bụ ịsọmpi ikpeazụ nke Ọl Blaks ndị merigoro ihe nnweta izu ụka abụọ gara aga.

input.mt: Ọ bụ egwuregwu ikpeazụ maka All Blacks, bụ́ ndị meriri iko ahụ izu abụọ gara aga.
input.src: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.

reference: Ala ọma jijiji dị larịị mara ọdịda anyanwụ Montana jijiji mgba ojiri nkeji asatọ gafee elekere nke iri n'abalị Monde.

input.mt: Ala ọma jijiji dị ala mere n'ebe ọdịda anyanwụ Montana n'elekere 10:08 nke mgbede na Mọnde.
input.src: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.

reference: Mpaghara mba Yunaịted Steeti na-ahụ maka mmegharị ala (USGS) na mpaghara nke na-ezite ozi gbasara ala ọma jijiji enwetabeghị mkpesa ihe mmebi.

input.mt: Enwetabeghị akụkọ ozugbo banyere mmebi site na United States Geological Survey (USGS) na National Earthquake Information Center ya.
input.src: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.

reference: Ala ọma jijiji ahụ nwere etiti ya na ihe dị ka km 20 (maịlị 15) ugwu-ebe ugwu ọwụwa anyanwụnke Dillon, na ihe dị ka km 65 (maịlị 40) ndịda nke Butte.

input.mt: Ala ọma jijiji ahụ mere ihe dị ka kilomita iri abụọ n'ebe ugwu ọwụwa anyanwụ Dillon, nakwa ihe dị ka kilomita iri isii na ise n'ebe ndịda Butte.
input.src: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.

reference: N'ụbọchị Mọnde, n'ala mpịtọ dị Lyon nso nke dị n'ọwụwa anyanwụ mba Frans, ka achọpụtara na ọrịa gburu otu ọbọgwụ bụ ụdịrị ọrịa nnụnụ nke nwere ike igbu mmadụ, bụ H5N1.

input.mt: A kwenyesiri ike na ụdị nje nnụnụ na-egbu ụmụ mmadụ, H5N1, ebutewo ọnyà ọhịa nwụrụ anwụ, nke a hụrụ na Mọnde, n'ala ahịhịa dị nso na Lyon n'ebe ọwụwa anyanwụ France.
input.src: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.

reference: Enwere orịa a ka na-enyo enyo ka ọ bụ H5N1na mba Kroeshia na Denmak.

input.mt: A ka na-ekwenyeghị ikpe ndị a na-enyo enyo nke H5N1 na Croatia na Denmark.
input.src: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.

reference: Chambers gbara Chukwu akwụkwọ maka "ọnwụ zuru ebe niile, mmebi na iyi egwu eyiri nde ka nde mmadụ bi n’ụwa."

input.mt: Chambers gbara Chineke akwụkwọ maka "mgbukpọ nke ọnwụ, mbibi, na iyi egwu nke ọtụtụ nde ndị bi n'ụwa".
input.src: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."

reference: Chambers, onye na-ajụkarị oge niile, na-agbagha na ikpe ya "abaghị uru" ma "onye ọ bụla nwere ike ịkụ onye ọbụla ikpe."

input.mt: Chambers, bụ́ onye na-ekweghị na Chineke, na-ekwu na ikpe ya bụ "ihe efu" nakwa na "onye ọ bụla nwere ike ịgba onye ọ bụla akwụkwọ".
input.src: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."

reference: Onye na-ekwubu okwu n'ụlọ omeiwu bụ Newt Gingrich, onye isi obodo Tekzas bụ Rik Perị, na onye otu nzukọ omeiwu Mishel Bakmann mechara gba ndị anọ, ise na isii, n'usoro.

input.mt: Onye bụbu onyeisi oche ụlọomeiwu bụ́ Newt Gingrich, gọvanọ Texas bụ́ Rick Perry, na onye omebe iwu bụ́ Michele Bachmann nọ n'ọnọdụ nke anọ, nke ise, na nke isii, n'otu n'otu.
input.src: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.

reference: Bakman, onye meriri Ntuliaka Ames Strọ n'Ọgọọst, kpebiri ịkwụsị kampen ya.

input.mt: Bachmann, bụ́ onye meriri na Ames Straw Poll n'ọnwa Ọgọst, kpebiri ịkwụsị mkpọsa ya.
input.src: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.

reference: E bugara onye ahụ na-ese fòto na Ụlọ Ọgwụ Reagan UCLA, ebe o mechara nwụọ.

input.mt: A kpọgara onye na-ese foto ahụ na Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, ebe o mechara nwụọ.
input.src: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.

reference: A kọbụrụ na ọ nọ n’ime ụmụ afọiri abụọ ya. N’otu nkwupụta, Bieber siri "Agbanyeghị na ọ nọghị ma ọ sonyeghị ozugbo ọdachi ihe mberede okporo ụzọ a, echiche na ekpere m nonyere ezinụlọ ndị onye a tara ahụhụ."

input.mt: N'otu nkwupụta, Bieber kwuru, sị: "Ọ bụ ezie na anọghị m ebe ahụ ma ọ bụ nwee ihe jikọrọ m na ihe mberede a dị mwute, echiche m na ekpere m dị n'ebe ezinụlọ onye ahụ nwụrụ anwụ nọ".
input.src: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."

reference: Dị ka ndị uwe ojii kwuru, ọkwụ ụgbọ ala ahụ suru onye na-ese fòto eleghị anya ọ gaghị enwe ebubo mpụ ọ bụla.

input.mt: Dị ka ndị uwe ojii si kwuo, ọ gaghị ekwe omume na a ga-ebo onye na-akwọ ụgbọala ahụ kụrụ onye na-ese foto ebubo.
input.src: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.

reference: Ha gụnyere mba Nedalands, ebe Anna Jochemsen gbara onye nke itoolu n'egwuregwu nkwụmọtọ ụmụ nwanyị nke asọmpi Super-G ụnyaahụ, na Fịnland ebe Katja Saarinen gbara onye nke iri n'otu egwuregwu ahụ.

input.mt: Ha gụnyere Netherlands, ebe Anna Jochemsen mechara nke itoolu na klas ụmụ nwanyị na-eguzo na Super-G ụnyaahụ, na Finland na Katja Saarinen mechara nke iri n'otu asọmpi ahụ.
input.src: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.

reference: Na-ndabere n’ikpe ahụ, ehichaghị ọfụma mkpofu si na kampụ UN, nke na-akpata nje ịbanye nna nwaghara ụzọ nke osimiri Artibonite, otu n’ime nke Haịti kachasị ibu.

input.mt: Dị ka akwụkwọ ikpe ahụ si kwuo, e meghị ka ihe ndị e kpofuru n'ogige UN dị ọcha nke ọma, nke mere ka nje bacteria banye n'akụkụ Osimiri Artibonite, bụ́ otu n'ime osimiri ndị kasị ibu na Haiti.
input.src: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.

reference: Ụlọọrụ ikpe na ọchịchị onye kwuo uche ya na Haiti atụjela aka n'ọmụmụ sị na ndị agha udo UN nke Nepal bubatara ọrịa na Nepal n'amaghị ama.

input.mt: Ụlọ Ọrụ Na-ahụ Maka Ikpe Ziri Ezi na Ọchịchị Democracy nke Haiti ekwuola na e nwere nnyocha ndị e mere n'onwe ha nke na-egosi na ndị agha mba ndị Nepal nke na-ahụ maka udo nke Mba Ndị Dị n'Otu wetara ọrịa ahụ na Haiti n'amaghị ama.
input.src: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.

reference: Danielle Lantagne, otu onye ọkachamara UN n’ọrịa ahụ, kwuru na ntiwapụ ahụ bụ ndị na-eme ụdọ nwere ike ịkpata ya.

input.mt: Danielle Lantagne, bụ́ ọkachamara nke Òtù Mba Ụwa n'ihe banyere ọrịa ahụ, kwuru na ọ ga-abụ ndị agha udo kpatara ọrịa ahụ.
input.src: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.

reference: Onye ọrịa ahụ agabuola na Naịjirịa, ebe a na-enwela ụfọdụ ndị bu nje Ebola ahụ.

input.mt: Onye ọrịa ahụ gara Naịjirịa, bụ́ ebe e nweela ụfọdụ ndị butere nje Ebola.
input.src: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.

reference: Mkpesa mbụ kwuru na achụghachiri ụgbọelu ahụ azụ gawa Afghanistan mgbe anapụrụ ya ikikere ịfedà na mberede n’Ürümqi.

input.mt: Akụkọ ndị mbụ na-ekwu na e zighachiri ụgbọelu ahụ n'Afghanistan mgbe a jụrụ ya ọdịda mberede na Ürümqi.
input.src: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.

reference: Ihe mberede ụgbọ elu, na-eme ọtụtụ mgbe na mba Aịran, nke nwere ụgbọ elu ndị agha na ndị nkịtị kara nka nke anaghị eleọkọta anya nke ọma.

input.mt: Ihe mberede ụgbọelu bụ ihe a na-ahụkarị na Iran, nke nwere ụgbọ mmiri na-aka nká nke a na-ejighị n'aka maka ọrụ ndị nkịtị na ndị agha.
input.src: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.

reference: Na mbido izu a, helịkọpta ndị uwe ojii kpọkasịrị gbuo mmadụ atọ ma merụọ mmadụ atọ ọzọ ahụ.

input.mt: Ná mmalite nke izu a, ihe mberede nke helikopta ndị uwe ojii gburu mmadụ atọ ma merụọ mmadụ atọ ọzọ ahụ́.
input.src: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.

reference: N’ọnwa gara aga Iran hụrụ ihe ọdachi ikuku ya kachasị njọ n’ọtụtụ afọ mgbe otu ụgbọ elu na-aga Amenịa kpọkara, na-egbu ndị 168 nọ n’ime ya.

input.mt: N'ọnwa gara aga, Iran hụrụ ọdachi ụgbọelu ya kasị njọ kemgbe ọtụtụ afọ mgbe ụgbọelu na-aga Armenia dara, na-egbu mmadụ 168 nọ n'ụgbọelu ahụ.
input.src: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.

reference: N'otu ọnwa ahụ ka ụgbọ elu ọzọ na Mashhad si n'ụzọ ya gbapụ sụnye isi na mgbidi, were gbuo mmadụ iri na asaa.

input.mt: N'otu ọnwa ahụ, ụgbọelu ọzọ gbara n'okporo ụzọ ụgbọelu dị na Mashhad ma kụọ mgbidi, gbuo mmadụ iri na asaa.
input.src: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.

reference: Emeriri Murray na seti nke mbu na ndorondoro njirimara onye mmeri mgbe umu nwoke abuo jidere bolu ọ bụla n’ime setị.

input.mt: Murray tụfuru set mbụ ahụ n'otu n'otu mgbe ndị ikom abụọ ahụ jidere onye ọ bụla na-eje ozi na set ahụ.
input.src: Murray lost the first set in a tie break after both men held each and every serve in the set.

reference: Lakkha Singh gosirikwara chhappan bhog bhajan. Oguegwu, Raju Khandelwal nọ na-esonye ya.

input.mt: Lakkha Singh gosipụtakwara chhappan bhog bhajan. Onye na-agụ egwú, Raju Khandelwal so ya.
input.src: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.

reference: Onye otu ya Fenando Alonso nọ n'isi ọsọ ọtụtụ mgbe, mana nke ahụ kwụsịrị mgbe ọ kwụsịrị ụgbọala ya, o nwere ike ịbụ n'ihi ụkwụ ihu ụgbọala a na-etinyeghi nke ọma.

input.mt: Onye otu ya, bụ́ Fernando Alonso, nọ n'isi n'ihe ka ukwuu n'ọsọ ahụ, ma ọ kwụsịrị ya ozugbo ọ kwụsịrị, ikekwe n'ihi na ọ kụrụ ụkwụ n'ihu n'akụkụ aka nri.
input.src: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.

reference: K’oforo nkeji 3 ka ha fenyie, igwefoto no n’ime ugbo ahu gosirika otutu foam n’ekpuchi ihe kewapuru na tanki mmanu.

input.mt: N'ihe dị ka nkeji atọ mgbe e bidoro ụgbọelu ahụ, otu igwefoto dị n'ụgbọelu gosiri na ọtụtụ iberibe ụfụfụ ihe mkpuchi na-agbapụ na tankị mmanụ ụgbọala ahụ.
input.src: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.

reference: A kọrọ na ụfọdụ ebeobibi dị 9400 na mpaghara ahụ nọ na-enweghị mmiri ma ihe dị ka 100 na-enweghị ọkụ eletriki.

input.mt: A na-akọ na ihe dị ka ụlọ 9400 n'ógbè ahụ enweghị mmiri na ihe dị ka 100 enweghị ọkụ eletrik.
input.src: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.

reference: O mebiri ụfọdụ ụzọ, kwụsịtụ njem ụgbọ oloko n'ebe ndị o metụtara, ma ọdụ ụgbọelu Ishikawa ka mechiri emechi.

input.mt: E mebiri ụzọ ụfọdụ, a kwụsịrị ọrụ ụgbọ okporo ígwè n'ebe ndị ahụ, a ka mechikwara ọdụ ụgbọelu Noto dị n'ógbè Ishikawa.
input.src: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.

reference: Akụkọ ụfọdụ sịrị na mmadụ asatọ nwụrụ, ma akụkọ gọọmenti sị na ihe ruru mmadụ iri atọ merụrụ ahụ; ma na amatabeghị ọnụ ọgụgụ ikpeazụ.

input.mt: Ụfọdụ akụkọ na-ekwu na ọnụ ọgụgụ ndị nwụrụ anwụ ruru mmadụ asatọ, akụkọ ndị gọọmenti na-egosikwa na ihe ruru mmadụ 30 merụrụ ahụ; ma a maghị ọnụ ọgụgụ ikpeazụ.
input.src: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.

reference: Ma a nara ụtụ isi pasentị iri asatọ na ngwaahịa anyị site na ụmụ tarifu na mba Keetiti Amerịka. anyị na-eleta gị anya.

input.mt: N'agbanyeghị nke ahụ, a na-atụ ụtụ isi pasent 80 nke ngwongwo anyị site n'ụtụ isi na mba ndị dị na Central America. Anyị na-emeso gị ihe.
input.src: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.

reference: Isiokwu ndị ọzọ ekpuchiri gụnyere site n'ihe akọrọ ọdịnihu Jerusalem nke dị nsọ nye mba abụọ ahụ na okwu Ndagwurugwu Jọdan.

input.mt: A kọrọ na isiokwu ndị ọzọ a na-ekwu banyere ha gụnyere ihe ga-eme n'ọdịnihu na Jeruselem, bụ́ nke mba abụọ ahụ weere dị ka ihe dị nsọ, nakwa okwu banyere ndagwurugwu Jọdan.
input.src: Other topics covered reportedly include the future state of Jerusalem which is sacred to both nations and the Jordan Valley issue.

reference: Azọpụtara ọtụtụ ndị eji èji ma mmadụ isii ka ekwuru na ha anwụọla.

input.mt: A napụtawo ọtụtụ ndị ahụ e ji gbuo ndị mmadụ, a chọpụtawokwa na ọ dịkarịa ala mmadụ isii anwụọla ruo ugbu a.
input.src: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.

reference: "Rĩu twĩna mbĩa cia mĩeri ĩna irarĩ na mũrimũ wa cukari na rĩu itirĩ naguo" Nake akĩongerera.

input.mt: Agĩcoka akĩongerera ũũ: "Rĩu tũrĩ na mbeũ cia mĩaka ĩna iria itarĩ na cukari, iria ciarĩ na cukari wa cukari".
input.src: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.

reference: Dagĩtarĩ Ehud Ur, profesa wa dawa cukuru mũnene wa Dalhousie Halifax, Nova Scotia na mũikarĩri gĩtĩ wa rũhonge rwa ũrigitani na ũthuthuria wa gĩkundi kĩa arũaru a mũrimu wa cukari Canada akĩheana mũkana atĩ ũthuthuria no hĩndĩ ũrambĩrĩirie

input.mt: Dr. Ehud Ur, profesa wa ũrigitani thĩinĩ wa Yunivasiti ya Dalhousie thĩinĩ wa Halifax, Nova Scotia, na mũtongoria wa gĩkundi kĩa ũrigitani na gĩthomo kĩa Canadian Diabetes Association, nĩ eerire atĩ ũthuthuria ũcio ũrĩ o matukũ-inĩ ma mbere.
input.src: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.

reference: Mwaka wa 2017 ugĩ thira, Siminoff nionekanire televisheni ya ũgũri QVC.

input.mt: Mũthia-inĩ wa mwaka wa 2017, Siminoff nĩ onanirie TV ya QVC.
input.src: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.

reference: Ring nĩacokire akĩnina ciira wa watho na acindani ake a kambũni ya ũgitĩri, ADT.

input.mt: O na ningĩ Ring nĩ aahotire kũiguithania na kambuni ĩmwe ya ũgitĩri, ADT Corporation.
input.src: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.

reference: Onakoro njajo ĩmwe ya kũgeria kũgitĩra mũrimũ nĩyonekanĩte ta ĩranyihia ikuũ ciĩtanĩtio na mũrimũ wa Ebola, nginyagia ihinda rĩrĩ gũtirĩ ndaawa njega biũ cia gũthondeka mĩrimũ ĩrĩa ĩkuo.

input.mt: O na gũtuĩka ndawa ĩmwe ya gwĩthondeka nĩ yonekaga ĩrĩ na ũhoti wa kũniina gĩkuũ kĩa andũ arĩa makoragwo na mũrimũ wa Ebola, nginya rĩu gũtirĩ ndawa ĩngĩonanĩtie wega atĩ nĩ yagĩrĩire kũhiũrania na mũrimũ ũcio.
input.src: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.

reference: Antibody cocktail ĩmwe, Zmapp, kĩambĩrĩria nĩyaheanĩte mwĩhoko mwena-inĩ, no mathomo mahetũkie makĩonania yarĩ na ũmithio mũnini kũringana na ũrĩa wendekanaga kurigĩrĩria ikuũ.

input.mt: Kĩndũ kĩmwe gĩetagwo ZMapp, kĩarĩ na irathimo nyingĩ mũno, no ũthuthuria nĩ wonanagia atĩ nĩ kĩahotete kũgirĩrĩria andũ gũkua.
input.src: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.

reference: Mageria-inĩ ma PALM, Zmapp yatũmĩriro nĩ atalamu a sayansi ta gĩthimi gĩa kũgerekania na ndaawa icio ingĩ ithatũ.

input.mt: Thĩinĩ wa mũgeranio wa PALM, ZMapp nĩ yatungataga ta mũtaratara wa gwĩthondeka, ũguo nĩ kuuga atĩ athomi a sayansi nĩ maamũhũthĩrire ta mũtaratara wa kwambĩrĩria na makĩringithania mĩthemba ĩngĩ ĩtatũ ya ũrigitani na mũtaratara ũcio.
input.src: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.

reference: USA Gymnastics nĩmetĩkanĩtie na marũa ma committee ya America ya Olympics atĩ kwĩna bata mũnene wa andũ othe mahutainie na mathako ma olympics gũteithĩrĩria mathingira na matũra gũkoro na ũgitĩri ũrĩa wagĩrĩire harĩ athaki.

input.mt: USA Gymnastics nĩ ĩnyitaga mbaru marũa ma United States Olympic Committee na nĩ ĩnyitaga mbaru mabataro ma famĩlĩ ya Olympic ya kũrehe ũgitĩri harĩ athuthuria aitũ othe.
input.src: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.

reference: Nĩtwĩtĩkĩranĩtie na mandĩkithia ma USOC at wendi wa athaki na irabu na mathako mao no ũkinyanĩire na njira ya gũthiĩ na mbere na mogarũrũku makinyanĩru ciũngano-inĩ ciao gũtarĩ kwehutĩrio certificate

input.mt: Nĩ twĩtĩkĩranagia na ciugo cia USOC atĩ maũndũ ma athũngũ na ikundi ciitũ, o hamwe na mathako mao, no matungatwo na njĩra njega na njĩra ya gũthiĩ na mbere na mogarũrũku ma bata thĩinĩ wa ithondeka ritũ, handũ ha kũniinwo.
input.src: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.

reference: Gymnastics a America nĩ maranyita mbaru ũthuthuria urĩa ũngĩhotithia kũonania ũtũmĩri mũru wa mahinya ũrĩa wandĩkithĩtio nĩ arĩa mahonokire Larry Nassar ũrĩa ũngĩathiire ũtamenyekete kahinda karaihu na gwĩtĩkĩra mogarũrũku marĩa magĩrĩire.

input.mt: U.S. Gymnastics nĩ ĩnyitaga mbaru ũthuthuria wĩyathi ũrĩa ũngĩhotire gũtaarĩria ũrĩa kũhũthagĩra ũũru mũigana ũrĩa warĩrĩirio na ũcamba nĩ andũ arĩa maahonokire Larry Nassar kũngĩahotire kwaga kũmenyeka ihinda iraihu ũguo na nĩ ũgwatanĩtie na mogarũrũku marĩa mangĩabataranirie na magĩrĩire.
input.src: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.

reference: Mĩaka-inĩ ĩyo ya ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩtandatũ, Brzezinski arutagĩra John F. Kennedy to mũmũtari agĩchoka akĩrutĩra Lyndon B. Johnson ũtongoria-inĩ.

input.mt: Mĩaka-inĩ ya 1960, Brzezinski nĩ aarutire wĩra wa John F. Kennedy arĩ mũtabarĩri wake na agĩcoka akĩruta wĩra wa ũtongoria wa Lyndon B. Johnson.
input.src: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.

reference: Ũthurani-inĩ wa mwaka wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithathatũ, nĩ ataarire Carter maũndũ-inĩ makoniĩ mĩtaratara ya kĩmabũrũri ma kĩgeni, agĩcooka handu-ini ha Henry Kissinger.

input.mt: Hĩndĩ ya ithurano cia mwaka wa 1976, nĩ aateithirie Carter maũndũ-inĩ ma ũteti wa nja, na thutha ũcio agĩtuĩka Mũrũgamĩrĩri wa Ũgitĩri wa Gwatanĩro ya Mabũrũri (NSA) kuuma mwaka wa 1977 nginya mwaka wa 1981, akĩrũmĩrĩra Henry Kissinger.
input.src: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.

reference: Eta NSA, nĩateithirie Carter mĩtaratara-inĩ ma kũiguana thĩ yothe, mũno makĩria ta ũiguithanio wa kĩmabũrũri ta ma Camp David ma mwaka wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na inyanya, ũrutithania wa wĩra gatagatĩ ka USA na China mwaka-inĩ wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na mĩgomo ya bũrũri wa Iran ĩrĩa ya tũmire kũgĩe na thĩna wa ũnyitani wa mĩgwate mwaka-inĩ wa ngiri ĩmwe na magana kenda ma mĩrongo mũgwanja na kenda na matharĩkĩra ma bũrũri wa Afghanistan nĩ Soviet mwaka o ũcio.

input.mt: Arĩ NSA, nĩ aateithĩrĩirie Carter kũhingia maũndũ ma thĩ kũringana na ũteti, ta kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Camp David, 1978; kũgarũra ũrata wa Amerika na China mũthia-inĩ wa mĩaka ya 1970; ũgarũrũku wa Iran, ũrĩa watũmire kũgĩe na thĩna wa Iran, 1979; na gũtharĩkĩra kwa Soviet bũrũri-inĩ wa Afghanistan, 1979.
input.src: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.

reference: Movie inĩ ĩyo yarĩ na Ryan Gosling na Emma Stone nĩyacagũriro mĩena-inĩ yothe mĩnene.

input.mt: Firimu ĩyo, ĩrĩa ĩkoragwo na Ryan Gosling na Emma Stone, nĩ yambĩrĩirio maũndũ-inĩ mothe manene.
input.src: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.

reference: Nyiĩmbo igĩrĩ movie-inĩ iyo nĩcio The fools who dream na City of stars, nĩcio ciathuriro irĩ ta nyiĩmbo iria njega mũno original. Nayo studio ya Lionsgate ĩgĩcagũrwo maita mĩrongo ĩrĩ na matandatũ ũngĩringithania na studio icio-ingĩ.

input.mt: Nyĩmbo igĩrĩ kuuma mbica-inĩ ĩyo, The Audition (The Fools Who Dream) na City of Stars, nĩ cianyiitwo kandarathi ya Nyĩmbo njega mũno. Studio ya Lionsgate nĩ yaanyitwo kandarathi 26 gũkĩra studio ĩngĩ o yothe.
input.src: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.

reference: Mũthenya wa Kiumia ũgĩthira, mũtongoria wa bũrũri wa Amerika nĩwe Donald Trump akĩruta ndũmĩrĩri kũhĩtũkĩra mũtabarĩri wa mohoro, na akiuga bũtũ ya Amerika nĩ ĩkũrutwo bũrũri wa Syria.

input.mt: Mũthenya wa kiumia, mũtongoria wa Amerika, Donald Trump, akĩmenyithia atĩ mbũtũ cia Amerika nĩ ikaatiga bũrũri wa Syria.
input.src: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.

reference: Manĩrĩra macio maheaniro thutha wa Trump kwaranĩria na mũtongoria wa bũrũri wa Turkey Recep Tayyip Erdogan.

input.mt: Ũhoro ũyũ waheanirwo thutha wa Trump kwaranĩria thimũ na President wa Turkey Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
input.src: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

reference: Bururi wa Turkey niwoyereire ugitĩri wa arũi a mbara cia ISIS iria cianyitĩtwo, na ndũmĩrĩri ĩyo ĩkiuga mabũrũri mothe ma Europe nĩmaregete  gucoka.

input.mt: O na ningĩ Turkey nĩ ĩgũthiĩ kũgitĩra arũngi a ISIS arĩa makoretwo makĩnyiitwo, o ta ũrĩa riboti ĩyo yugaga, mabũrũri ma Rũraya nĩ maregete kũmacokia bũrũri wao.
input.src: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.

reference: ũndũ ũyũ to ngaja ũranina atĩ nyamũ icio cietago dinosaurs nĩ ciarĩ na mathagu, theory ĩmenyekanĩte mũno, no nĩwongagĩrĩra ũmenyo ũtangĩonekana matigari-inĩ ma nyamũ na mĩtĩ ta rangi na mũbango wa dĩmensions ithatũ.

input.mt: Ũndũ ũcio ti atĩ wonanagia atĩ andũ amwe nĩ maarĩ na mathagu, no nĩ wonanagia atĩ mathagu matingĩahotire kũgĩa na mathagu, ta rangi na mĩthemba ĩtatũ.
input.src: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.

reference: Asayansi maugaga mathagu marĩa mothe mahumbĩraga mwĩrĩ wa nyamũ ĩno marĩ ma rangi mwerũ mwena wa igũrũ na mũtune kana rangi wa carotenoid mwena wa thĩ.

input.mt: Athomi a sayansi moigaga atĩ mũtwe wa nyamũ ĩyo warĩ wa rangi wa chestnut-brown igũrũ na mũhuro wayo warĩ wa rangi wa karotenoid.
input.src: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.

reference: Maumĩrĩra macio nĩ maraheana mawoni ma ũrĩa mathagu ma nyoni macenjagia na mahinda.

input.mt: Ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũtũteithagia kũmenya ũrĩa nyoni ciũmbũyagia.
input.src: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.

reference: Tondũ mathagu ma dinosaur matikorago na shaft ikũrĩte wega ĩrĩ  ĩtagwo rachis, no mathagu macio nĩ marĩ na mũmbĩre ũngĩ ta barbs and barbules, athuthuria nĩmahetũkirie atĩ rachis icio noanga ciakũrire ta maũmbĩre maria magĩire o ũrĩa mumbĩre wacio wacenjagia mũico-inĩ.

input.mt: Tondũ mathagu ma ndinozauro matiarĩ na gĩthima kĩarĩ na ũgarũrũku mwega, kĩrĩa gĩetagwo rachis, no makoragwo na itemi ingĩ cia mathagu  mathagu na mathagu  athuthuria nĩ maatuire atĩ rachis nĩ ũndũ wa ũgarũrũku wa ũgarũrũku wa indo iria ingĩ.
input.src: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.

reference: Athuthuria nĩmatuire atĩ, ona akorwo mũting'oe ũcio warĩ wa dĩnosaur nini, mũhiano ũrĩa watũmĩkaga wonanagia mathagu ma nyamũ ng'ima no ti nini na thĩ.

input.mt: Athuthuria acio moonanirie atĩ o na gũtuĩka rũũri rũu nĩ rwa dinosaurus, rũthiomi rũu rwerekanaga atĩ mũndũ mũgima nĩ arĩ na mathagu, no ti mũriũ.
input.src: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

reference: Bomu ya ngari ĩrĩa yaripũkire gĩikaro kĩnene kĩa thigari Gaziantep, Turkey mũthenya wa ira kĩroko ĩroraga thigari igĩrĩ na angĩ makĩria ya mĩrongo ĩrĩ maragĩa na nguraro.

input.mt: Mĩthenya ya rũcinĩ ĩgĩthũkũkĩra mũciĩ mũnene wa thirikari wa Gaziantep, bũrũri-inĩ wa Turkey, ngari ya mbomu ĩgĩthũkũkĩra ĩkĩũraga athuri eerĩ a borithi na ĩkĩhũũra andũ angĩ makĩria ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.
input.src: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.

reference: Ofici ya gavana ĩkiuga atĩ harĩ acio magurarire  ikũmi na keenda marĩ thigari.

input.mt: Wabici ya ngavana nĩ yoigĩte atĩ andũ ikũmi na kenda arĩa maakuĩte nĩ maabithaa a borithi.
input.src: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.

reference: Na magĩtaũkĩrwo na makĩmenya atĩ riũa nĩ rĩhanaine na rĩrutaga wĩra ta njata icio ingĩ: Mawĩko ma njata ciothe mahotekĩkaga nĩ ũrĩa irutaga ũtheri na marangi, gũthiũrũrũka na gũtiri ũndũ ũngĩ.

input.mt: Nĩ moonire atĩ riũa rĩathiaga na mbere kũringana na ithimi iria ingĩ cia njata: Njata ciothe iria irĩ thĩinĩ wa mũtabarĩre wa njata ciathiaga na mbere kũgerera ũtheri wacio, kũgarũrũka kwacio, na gũtirĩ ũndũ ũngĩ.
input.src: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.

reference: ũruti ũcio wa ũtheri na marangi na gũthiũrũrũka inyitithanagio kũonania namba ĩtagwo star's Rossby, ĩrĩa ĩkonainie na plasma flow.

input.mt: Ũtheri na kũgarũrũka kũhũthĩrĩtwo hamwe nĩguo gũtuĩke namba ya Rossby ya njata, ĩrĩa ĩhutanĩtie na gũthuthĩka kwa plasma.
input.src: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.

reference: O urĩa namba ĩyo ya Rossby ĩ nini noguo njata ikorago ĩ ĩ less active kũringana na magnetic reversals.

input.mt: O ũrĩa mũigana wa Rossby ũringithanagia, noguo njata ĩgakorũo ĩtarĩ na hinya wa kũgarũrũka.
input.src: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.

reference: Hĩndĩ ya iceera rĩake, Iwasaki nĩacemanirie na mathĩĩna maita maingĩ.

input.mt: Hĩndĩ ya rũgendo rwake, Iwasaki nĩ aacemanirie na mathĩna maita maingĩ.
input.src: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.

reference: Nĩatunyirwo nĩ Pirates, akĩhithũkĩrwo Tibet nĩ ngui ndwaru, akĩũrĩra kĩhiko Nepal na akĩohwo njera India.

input.mt: Nĩ aanyiitirũo nĩ atunyani, akĩũragwo Tibet nĩ ngui njũru, akĩũra kĩhiko-inĩ bũrũri-inĩ wa Nepal, na akĩnyiitwo njera bũrũri-inĩ wa India.
input.src: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.

reference: Nayo 802.11n standard ĩrutaga wĩra harĩ mitambo ini ya 2.4Ghz na 5.0gHZ cierĩ.

input.mt: Standard ya 802.11n ĩrutaga wĩra na mahenya ma 2.4Ghz na 5.0Ghz.
input.src: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.

reference: ũguo nĩ uteithagia kũnyitithanĩkia na thutha na 802.11a, 802.11b, na 802.11g angĩkorwo base station ĩna dual radios.

input.mt: Ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũgũtũma ũhote gũkinyanĩra na 802.11a, 802.11b na 802.11g, angĩkorũo gĩcigo kĩa mũthingi nĩ kĩrĩ na iradiĩ igĩrĩ.
input.src: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.

reference: Duvall, urĩa wa hikĩte ena ciana igĩrĩ ng'ima, ndatigire na thutha ũndũ mũnene wa gũkenia Miller, ũrĩa rũgano rũraria ũhoro wake.

input.mt: Duvall, ũrĩa ũhikanĩtie na arĩ na ciana igĩrĩ cia andũ agima, ndaahotire kũgucĩrĩria mũno Miller, ũrĩa rũgano rũu rwarĩrĩirio.
input.src: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.

reference: rĩrĩa erirwo arĩrĩrie ũhoro ũcio, Miller akiuga, "Mike nĩaragia mũno hĩndĩ ya ciira…Nĩkwĩharĩria deharagĩria koguo diaiguire ũrĩa augaga."

input.mt: Rĩrĩa maamũririe ndũmĩrĩri, Miller oigire ũũ: "Mike nĩ aaragia mũno hĩndĩ ya mĩcemanio ĩyo. Nĩ ndehaarĩirie nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndiathikagĩrĩria ũrĩa oigaga".
input.src: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."

reference: "Nĩtũkwĩrutanĩria na tũtigĩrĩre nitwanyihia ũrekereria wa carbon dioxide rĩera-inĩ o harĩ gĩchunjĩ kĩmwe kĩa GDP ya bũrũri na gacunjĩ karoneka gũgĩkinyĩria mwaka wa ngiri igĩrĩ na mĩrongo ĩrĩ kuma harĩa hakinyĩtio mwaka wa ngiri igĩrĩ na ithano." Hu kuuga.

input.mt: Hu oigire, "Nĩ tũgũthiĩ na mbere kũgeria kũniina ũthii wa na mbere wa carbon dioxide harĩ gĩcigo kĩmwe kĩa GDP na njĩra ya kũgirĩrĩria mũno nginya mwaka wa 2020 kũringana na mũigana wa mwaka wa 2005".
input.src: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.

reference: Ndagwetire harĩa mekũrenga na number cigana, nĩaugire mekũnyihia kũringana na maumĩrĩra ma uchumi wa China.

input.mt: Ndaarĩirie mũigana wa mbeca icio, akiuga nĩ ikaahũthĩrũo kũgerera ũthii wa na mbere wa ũthii wa na mbere wa bũrũri wa China.
input.src: He did not set a figure for the cuts, saying they will be made based on China's economic output.

reference: Hu nĩ ahinyĩrĩirie mabũrũri marĩa marekũria atĩ "meyeheranie na maũndũ matene marĩa mathũkagia kĩambĩrĩria, na gũtheria thutha-inĩ."

input.mt: Hu eerire mabũrũri marĩa marathiĩ na mbere gũkũria ũgarũrũku "maige njĩra ya tene ya gũthũkia indo mbere na gũtheria indo ciao thutha-inĩ".
input.src: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."

reference: Nake akĩongerera akiuga atĩ "matiagĩrĩirwo, ona kũrĩ o ũguo, nĩ kũigĩrĩrwo mũrigo ũkĩrĩtie ũthii wao wa nambere, ũiigĩrĩrĩki na ũhoti."

input.mt: Oigire atĩ "o na kũrĩ ũguo, matiagĩrĩirũo kũbatithio kwĩhokera mawĩra marĩa mangĩaga kũhingia, mawĩra mao, na ũhoti wao".
input.src: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."

reference: Gĩkundi kĩa ũthomi Iraq kĩarehire rofoti 12.00 GMT ũmũthĩ.

input.mt: Kĩama gĩa Iraqi Study Group nĩ kĩarutire riboti ya kĩo thaa 12 cia hwaĩ-inĩ (GMT) ũmũthĩ.
input.src: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.

reference: ĩraheana mũkana atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ ona ũmwe ũngĩheana ũma atĩ kũrĩ ikinya ona rĩmwe Iraq kahinda-inĩ gaka rĩngĩrũgamia haro, kwongerereka kwa ngahĩha, kana kwerekeria  wongerereku wa maũndũ ma mbĩtĩka.

input.mt: Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩhota gwĩkĩra atĩ ũndũ o wothe ũgeekwo bũrũri-inĩ wa Iraki nĩ ũgaatiga mbaara cia ndini, ũhinya ũrĩa ũrathiĩ ũkĩongerereka, kana ũgarũrũku ũgĩkinye ngucanio-inĩ.
input.src: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.

reference: Report ĩyo yambĩrĩirie na ihoya rĩa waranĩria na ũthondeki wa ũiguano bũrũri-inĩ wa America ũigiĩ mĩtaratara ya Middle East.

input.mt: Riboti ĩyo yambagĩrĩria na kwaranĩria na andũ na njĩra ya kũgĩa na ũiguano gatagatĩ-inĩ ka mabũrũri ma Amerika megiĩ ũtongoria wa mabũrũri ma mwena wa gatagatĩ wa Irathĩro.
input.src: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.

reference: Maũndũ marĩa ma mbere harĩ mendĩkithia macio mĩrongo mũgwanja na inyanya nĩ kwambĩrĩria mũbango mwerũ wa ũtongoria wa waragania ũrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩ kwambĩrĩrio bere ya mũico wa mwaka nĩndũ wa ũgitĩri wa mũhaka wa Iraq kũmana na tharĩkĩra na waki mwerũ wa ũrata na mabũrũri marĩa mamarigicĩirie.

input.mt: Ũndũ wa mbere gatagatĩ-inĩ ka mĩbango yake 78 nĩ atĩ, mbere ya mũthia wa mwaka ũyũ, nĩ kũgĩrĩire gwĩkwo kĩyo kĩerũ gĩa ũteti gĩa kũgitĩra mĩhaka ya Iraq kũringana na ũhinya wa thũ na gũcokia ũkuruhanu wa ũteti na mabũrũri marĩa marĩ hakuhĩ nayo.
input.src: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.

reference: Mũikarĩri gĩtĩ gĩa Senator kahinda gaka na mũtũmia wa mbere wa president wa Argentina nĩwe Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner akĩanĩrĩra ũhũranĩri wa gĩturwa kĩa ũtongoria wa bũrũri mũthenya wa ira hwaĩ-ini kũrĩa La Plata, city ĩ kilometer mĩrongo ĩtano kana mairo mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩmwe kũraihĩrĩria Buenos Aires.

input.mt: Seneta wa mahinda maya na mũtumia wa mbere wa Argentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner nĩ onanirie mweke wake wa gwathana ta mũtongoria wa bũrũri ũmũthĩ hwaĩ-inĩ kũu La Plata, taũni ĩrĩa ĩrĩ kilomita 50 kuuma Buenos Aires.
input.src: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.

reference: Mũtumia wa Kirchner anĩrĩire itua rĩake kũhũranĩra gĩtĩ kĩa mũnene wa bũrũri kũrĩa Argentine Theatre, o harĩa ambagĩrĩria campaign ciake cia member wa Senate Buenos Aires Province delegation mwaka wa ngiri igĩrĩ na ithano.

input.mt: Mwarĩ wa Ithe witũ Kirchner nĩ onanirie muoroto wake wa gwĩthurĩra gĩtĩ kĩa mũtongoria wa Argentina Theatre, handũ harĩa aambĩrĩirie gĩthurano gĩake kĩa Senate mwaka wa 2005 arĩ mũrũmĩrĩri wa gĩcigo kĩa Buenos Aires.
input.src: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.

reference: Debate ĩyo yambĩrĩirio nĩ ngarari cigiĩ ũtũmĩri wa ũteithio na waki nĩũndũ wa kĩhuhũkanio gĩa Katrina, kĩrĩa amwe a fiscal conservatives metire na kĩnyũrũri "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

input.mt: Ũkararania ũcio waambĩrĩirie nĩ ũndũ wa ngarari ya kũhũthĩra mbeca cia ũteithio na gwaka rĩngĩ thutha wa kĩhuhũkanio kĩa Katrina.
input.src: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

reference: Gĩkundi kĩrĩa kiheaga gĩto na gĩgetĩkĩra mawoni ma andũ kĩa liberal gĩgĩkararania na makinya ma waki rĩngĩ gĩtũmi contract ciothe cia waki ciaheago akinyanĩria ũhoro thĩinĩ wa washington.

input.mt: Andũ arĩa matongoragia wĩra wa gwaka thĩ rĩngĩ nĩ makoretwo makĩaria mũno ũhoro wa kũheana mĩhothi ya gwaka thĩ rĩngĩ kũrĩ andũ arĩa moigaga atĩ nĩ marĩ thĩinĩ wa Washington.
input.src: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.

reference: Makĩrĩa ma andũ million inya nĩmekinyĩtie Rome gũthiĩ mathiko.

input.mt: Andũ makĩria ma milioni inya nĩ maathiĩte Roma gũthikĩrĩria mathiko macio.
input.src: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.

reference: Andu arĩa mekinyĩtie marĩ aingĩ, nĩũguo gũkagĩa na ũritũ mũnene harĩ andũ othe arĩa mendaga gũkinya mathiko-inĩ St. Peter's Square.

input.mt: Mũigana wa andũ arĩa maarĩ ho warĩ mũnene mũno ũũ atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩahotire gũthiĩ mathiko-inĩ ma St. Peter's Square.
