input.src: Looking decidedly rusty in the game against their southern sisters, South Africa however steadily improved as the tournament progressed.

reference: Saraakiisha magaalada Amsterdam iyo Matxafka Anne Frank ayaa sheegay in geedka uu qabo xanuun ka imaaday fungus uu na halis caafimaad gelinaayo dadwaynaha iyagoo sheegaayo inuu halis ugu jiray inuu dumo.

input.mt: Saraakiisha magaalada Amsterdam iyo Matxafka Anne Frank ayaa sheegaya in geedka uu ku dhacay fangas isla markaana uu khatar ku yahay caafimaadka dadweynaha maadaama ay ku doodayaan in uu halis ku jiro in uu dhaco.
input.src: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.

reference: Waxaa loo asteeyay in la jaro Salaasada, balse waa badbaaday kadib markii uu soo baxay sharci maxkamadeed degdeg ahi.

input.mt: Waxaa la qorsheeyay in la gooyo Talaadada, laakiin waxaa la badbaadiyay ka dib go'aan deg deg ah oo maxkamad ah.
input.src: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.

reference: Dhamaan meelaha laga galaayo godadka, oo ay ku qornaayeen “Todobada Walaalo”, ayaa ugu yaraan ah 100 ila 250 mitar (328 ilaa 820 talaabo) wareega.

input.mt: Dhammaan albaabada godka, oo loogu magac daray "The Seven Sisters", waxay leeyihiin ugu yaraan 100 ilaa 250 mitir (328 ilaa 820 fuud) dhexroor.
input.src: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.

reference: Muuqaalada iftiinka leh waxay ku tusayaan kala duwanaanshaha heerkulka laga bilaabo habeen iyo maalin waxayna ku tusinayaan inay yelankaran godad.

input.mt: Sawirada infrared waxay muujinayaan in heerkulka kala duwanaanshaha habeenkii iyo maalinta ay muujinayaan in ay u badan tahay inay yihiin godad.
input.src: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.

reference: "Jawigu wuxuu said u qabowyahay maalinkii ruumadne habeenkii.

input.mt: "Waxay maalin ka qabow yihiin dhulka hareeraheeda, habeenkana way diiran yihiin.
input.src: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.

reference: Habdhaqankoda heerkul ahaned uma toosna umana weyna sida godadka waweyn ee dhulka kuwaasi oo badiyaa leh heerkul aan is dhimin, balse waxay ka koobantahay godad dhaadheer oo dhulka ah," sida waxa yidhi Glen cushing ka maraykanka ee ka shaqeya arimaha dhagxanta (USGS) iyo kooxda xidigiska ee waqooyiga jamacadda Arizona ee ku taala Flagstaff,Arizona.

input.mt: Habdhaqankooda kuleylka ah ma aha mid deggan sida godadka waaweyn ee dhulka oo inta badan haysta heerkul aad u joogto ah, laakiin waxay la mid tahay inay yihiin godad qoto dheer oo dhulka ku yaal, "ayuu yiri Glen Cushing oo ka tirsan Kooxda Astrogeology ee United States Geological Survey (USGS) iyo Jaamacadda Waqooyiga Arizona ee ku taal Flagstaff, Arizona.
input.src: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.

reference: Faransiiska, codayntu waxay dhaqan ahaan ahaan jirtay mid tiknoolajiyadu ku yar tahay: codeeyuhu qolyar buu galaa, waraaq hore loo sii daabacay ayuu ku muujiyaa musharaxa uu rabo kuna ridaa gal

input.mt: Faransiiska, codbixinta waxay caadi ahaan ahayd khibrad tiknoolajiyad hooseeya leh: codbixiyeyaashu waxay isu go'doomiyaan boorso, waxay ku ridayaan warqad horay loo daabacay oo muujineysa musharaxa ay doorteen baqshad.
input.src: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.

reference: Ka dib marka saraakiishu xaqiijiso aqoonsiga codsadaha, codsaduhu waxa baqshadda waraaqda codku ku jirto ku ridayaa sanduuqa waanu saxeexayaa.

input.mt: Kadib markii mas'uuliyiintu xaqiijiyaan aqoonsiga codbixiyaha, codbixiyuhu wuxuu ku tuuraa baqshadda sanduuqa codbixinta wuxuuna saxiixayaa liiska codbixinta.
input.src: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.

reference: Sharciga doorashada Faransiiska ayaa si adag u u sharciyeeyay hab raacyada hawl qabasho.

input.mt: Sharciga doorashooyinka Faransiiska ayaa si adag u qeexaya nidaamka.
input.src: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.

reference: Ilaa sanad 1988, sanadiiqda codeynta waa in ay noqdan kuwa aan laheyn madmadow musuq maasuq halka codeyaasha iyo indha indheyasha marqaatiga ka noqon karo iney jirin wax bashqad aan lagu soo gudbin meesha si loo tiro si cadalad ah codadka ay dadku ku codeyeen.

input.mt: Laga soo bilaabo 1988, sanduuqyada codbixinta waa in ay noqdaan kuwo hufan si ay codbixiyayaasha iyo daawadayaashu u xaqiijiyaan in aanay jirin boorsooyin bilowga codbixinta iyo in aanay jirin boorsooyin lagu daro marka laga reebo kuwa codbixiyayaasha si fiican loo tiriyey oo loo oggolaaday.
input.src: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.

reference: Musharaxiintu wakiilo ayay dirsan karaan si ay markhaati ugu ahaadaan qayb kasta oo ka mid ah hawlgalka. Fiidnimadii, codadka waxa tiranaya mutadawiciin iyagoo aad korka loogala socdo, iyagoo raacaya habraac gaar ah.

input.mt: Musharaxiintu waxay wakiilo u diri karaan si ay u arkaan qayb kasta oo ka mid ah geedi socodka.
input.src: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.

reference: ASUS Eee PC, waxaa marka hore lo soo saraay aduun koo dhan qimaha dhimista iyo xaqiiqda shaqada, wuxuu noqday mowduuc xasaasi sanadkii 2007 Taipei IT Bisha.

input.mt: ASUS Eee PC, oo horay loogu bilaabay adduunka oo dhan kharash-keydinta iyo waxqabadka, waxay noqotay mawduuc kulul bishii 2007 ee Taipei IT.
input.src: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.

reference: Balse suuqa iibka ee kombiyuutarda laabtoobku waxa uu noqon doonaa mid si wayn isu beddela oo u kala duwanaada ka dib marka ASUS lagu abaaliyo Billadada Sii Jirista Taywaan ee ay ku abaaliyaan Maamulka Yuan ee Jamhuuriyadda Shiine.

input.mt: Laakiin suuqa macaamiisha ee kumbuyuutarada laptop-ka ayaa si weyn u kala duwanaan doona oo isbeddeli doona ka dib markii ASUS ay ku guuleysatay abaalmarinta joogtada ah ee Taiwan 2007 oo ay soo saartay Yuan Fulinta ee Jamhuuriyadda Shiinaha.
input.src: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.

reference: Goobta laga maamulo websayt ka waxaa kagu qeexa barnaamijka “raadiyaha iskuulka hore ee tiyaatarka cusba hormarsanana ee la hormariyey!”

input.mt: Bogga internetka ee saldhiga ayaa ku tilmaamaya bandhigga sida "shaashadda raadiyaha ee dugsiga hore oo leh muuqaal cusub oo cajiib ah oo cajiib ah!"
input.src: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"

reference: Maalmihiisa ugu horeeyay, barnaajimka wuxuu gabi ahaanba ka baxay mareegta intarneetka mudada dheer jirtay ee TogiNet Radio, mareeg diiradda saarto raadiyo hadaleed.

input.mt: Maalmihii ugu horreeyay, bandhigga waxaa lagu soo bandhigay oo keliya goobta raadiyaha internetka ee TogiNet Radio, oo ah goob diiradda saartay raadiyaha wada hadalka.
input.src: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.

reference: Gabagabada 2015, TogiNet ayaa u aasaasay AstroNet Radio inay ahaato shirkad ka hoos shaqeyso.

input.mt: Dhamaadka 2015, TogiNet waxay aasaastay AstroNet Radio inay noqoto saldhig ka tirsan.
input.src: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.

reference: Bandhiga waxa bilaawgi soo saaray cod duuba yaal cusub, oo deggan Bariga Texas.

input.mt: Bandhiggu wuxuu asal ahaan ka soo muuqday jilayaasha codka xiisaha leh, oo ku nool Bariga Texas.
input.src: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.

reference: Boob baahsan ayaa sida la sheegay sii socday habeenimadii oo dhan, maadaama saraakiisha nidaam fulintu ka maqnaayeen wadooyinka Bishkek.

input.mt: Burburka ballaaran ayaa la sheegay inuu sii socday habeenkii, maadaama aysan jirin saraakiil ka tirsan ciidamada sharciga oo ku sugnaa jidadka magaalada Bishkek.
input.src: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.

reference: Korjooge ayaa ku tilmaamay Bishkek inay gelayso “khalkhal”, isla markaas oo burcad ay waddooyinka qaadayeen kan dhacayeen dukaamada alaabooyinka iyo badeecooyinka.

input.mt: Bishkek waxaa lagu tilmaamay mid ka mid ah indha-indheeyayaasha inay hoos ugu dhacday xaalad "xumo" ah, maadaama kooxo dad ah ay ku dhex wareegeen jidadka oo ay afduubteen dukaamada alaabada macaamiisha.
input.src: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.

reference: In kamida deeganka Bishkek ayaa eedeynaya mudaaharadlayaasah ka yimid koonfurta shari la'aanta ka jirto.

input.mt: Qaar ka mid ah dadka deggan Bishkek ayaa ku eedeeyay mudaaharaadayaasha koonfurta sharci darada.
input.src: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.

reference: Koonfur Afrika aya kaga adkaatay Dhamaan Madowga(New Zealand) ciyaar ka tirsaneyd Rugby Union Tri Nations ciyaartaasoo ka dhacday garoonka Royal Bafokeng , Koonfur Afrika .

input.mt: Koonfur Afrika ayaa ka adkaatay All Blacks (New Zealand) kulan rugby union Tri Nations ah oo ka dhacay garoonka Royal Bafokeng ee Rustenburg, Koonfur Afrika.
input.src: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.

reference: Iskoorkii u dambeeyay waxa uu ahaa guul hal-dhibicley ah, 21 ilaa 20, kaas oo gebo gebaynaya guusha ciyaarta All Blacks.

input.mt: Go'aanka ugu dambeeya wuxuu ahaa guul hal dhibcood ah, 21 ilaa 20, kaas oo soo afjaray All Blacks 15 kulan oo guul ah.
input.src: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.

reference: Sprinbook miyaa, waxay ku dhamaatay fashilan shan ciyaarood ah.

input.mt: Springboks waxay ku dhamaatay shan kulan oo khasaare ah.
input.src: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.

reference: Wuxu ahaa kulankii u dambeeyay ee loogu talo galay Dhammaan Madawga, kuwaas oo abaal marin ku guulaystay laba todobaad ka hor.

input.mt: Waxay ahayd kulankii ugu dambeeyay ee All Blacks, kuwaas oo labadii toddobaad ka hor ku guuleystay koobka.
input.src: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.

reference: Cayaarta fiinalka waxa ay ka dhici doonta Ellis Park ee Johannesburg isbuuca xiga marka Springboks ay Australia ku cayaaran.

input.mt: Ciyaarta ugu dambeysa ee taxanaha ayaa ka dhici doonta Ellis Park ee Johannesburg usbuuca soo socda, marka Springboks ay la ciyaaraan Australia.
input.src: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.

reference: Dhulgariir dhexdhexaad ah ayaa ka qarxay galbeedka montana 10:08 galin danbe isniintii.

input.mt: Dhulgariir dhexdhexaad ah ayaa ku dhuftay galbeedka Montana saacadii 10:08 galabnimadii Isniinta.
input.src: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.

reference: Wax xog bixin degdeg ah ee dhibaata ma aysan helin Sahanka Cilmiga dhulka ee Mareykanka (USGS) iyo Xarunta Xogta Dhul Gariir ee Qaranka.

input.mt: Ma jiro warbixin degdeg ah oo ku saabsan khasaaraha ka soo gaaray Hay'adda Geological Survey ee Mareykanka (USGS) iyo Xarunta Macluumaadka Dhulgariirka Qaranka.
input.src: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.

reference: Dhulka gariirka waxa u xudun ahayd meel waqooyi-bari Dillon u jirta ilaa 20 km ( 15 mayl) ilaa 65 km (40 mayl) na Koonfur ka xigta Butte.

input.mt: Dhulgariirku wuxuu ka dhacay qiyaastii 20 km waqooyi-bari Dillon, iyo qiyaastii 65 km koonfurta Butte.
input.src: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.

reference: Saamaynta hargabka shirbirahu ku leeyahay bini adamka, H5N1, Ayaa la xaqiijiyay inuu ku dhacay duurjoog dhimatay, tasoo laga helay isniintii,maarshlaan oo u dhaw lyon oo ku taal bariga Faransiiska.

input.mt: Xanuunka shimbiraha ee H5N1 ayaa lagu xaqiijiyay inuu ku dhacay duq duurjoog ah oo dhintay, oo la helay Isniintii, oo ku taal dooxada ku dhow Lyon ee bariga Faransiiska.
input.src: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.

reference: Faransiiska waa waddanki toddobaad ee ka mid ah Midowga Yurub ee uu silciyo fayraskan; Waxaa ka horeeyay Ostiriya,  Jarmalka, Islofeniya, Bulgariya, Giriirga iyo Talyaaniga.

input.mt: Faransiiska ayaa ah waddanka toddobaad ee Midowga Yurub ee ku dhaca fayraska, kadib Austria, Jarmalka, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Giriigga iyo Talyaaniga.
input.src: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.

reference: Kiisas H5N1 looga shakisan yahay Kuraweeshiya iyo Dheemaak ayaan wali xaqiijin.

input.mt: Kiisaska laga shakisan yahay ee H5N1 ee Croatia iyo Denmark weli lama xaqiijin.
input.src: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.

reference: Xafiiska gaarka ah ee qaadiga ayaa talaabo kaga qaaday "dhimashada korodhay,burburinta iyo argagixisonimada malaayiin iyo malaayiin kunool dhulka guudkiisa."

input.mt: Chambers wuxuu dacwad u taagay Ilaahay "dhimashada baahsan, burburinta iyo argagaxinta malaayiin iyo malaayiin qof oo dhulka deggan".
input.src: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."

reference: Jambars, agnostig, waxay ku doodeen in ku haboonaanta sharci “farayfoloos" iyo "in qof kastaa beedi karo qof kastaa."

input.mt: Chambers, oo ah qof aan aqoonta lahayn, wuxuu ku doodayaa in dacwaddiisa ay tahay mid "xishood la'aan ah" iyo "qof kastaa uu dacwad u taagi karo qof kasta".
input.src: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."

reference: Sheegakada ay kusoo bandhigeen operaha faransiiska, camille saind-Saens, ayaa ah farshaxanimo "kuwaasi oo ay noloshoda xukunto jacaylka ay u qabaan daroogada iyo jabaan."

input.mt: Sheekada lagu soo bandhigay opera Faransiiska, oo uu qoray Camille Saint-Saens, waxay ku saabsan tahay farshaxan "oo noloshiisu ay ku xiran tahay jacaylka daroogada iyo Japan".
input.src: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."

reference: Sidaas daraaded, kuwa tiyaatarka saaran waxa ay wada cabayaan darogada cannabis, tiyaatarka laftirkiisana waxa uu ku dhiiri galinaya kasoo qeyb galayaasha in ay kuso biiran cabida.

input.mt: Natiijo ahaan, bandhigayaashu waxay saxaafadda ku sigaarariyaan marijuana, tiyaatarka laftiisa ayaa ku dhiirigelinaya dhagaystayaasha inay ku biiraan.
input.src: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.

reference: Af hayeenka hore barlamaanka Newt Gingrich, gafanaha Texas Rick Perry, iyoxubinta barlamaanka Michele Bachmann ayaa ku dhamaystiray kaalinta afaraad, shanaad, iyo lixaad.

input.mt: Guddoomiyaha hore ee Golaha Shacabka Newt Gingrich, Guddoomiyaha Texas Rick Perry, iyo Xildhibaanada Congress-ka Michele Bachmann waxay ku dhamaadeen kaalinta afraad, shanaad, iyo lixaad, siday u kala horreeyaan.
input.src: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.

reference: Ka dib markay natiijooyinka soo galeen, Gingrich ayaa u hambalyaayay Santorum lakin hadal adag ku dhahay Romney, oo isaga magaciisa xayaysiino olole xun logu samayay Iowa oo lola jeeday Gingrich.

input.mt: Ka dib markii natiijooyinka ay soo baxeen, Gingrich wuxuu ammaanay Santorum, laakiin wuxuu si adag ula hadlay Romney, oo magaciisa lagu soo bandhigay xayeysiisyo ololeed oo xun oo lagu soo bandhigay Iowa ka dhanka ah Gingrich.
input.src: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.

reference: Perry waxa uu sheegay inuu “ ku noqon lahaa Texas si uu u eego natiijada isreebreeka ee caawa, una go’aansado bal inay dariiq u sii furan yahay”, balse dib uu ka sheegay inuu tartanka ku sii jirayo oo uu tartami doono tartanka koobaad ee South Carolina ka dhici doona Janaayo 21.

input.mt: Perry wuxuu sheegay in uu "dib ugu laaban doono Texas si uu u qiimeeyo natiijooyinka caucus-ka caawa, si loo go'aamiyo haddii ay jirto waddo horumarineed oo aniga igu jirta tartankan", laakiin markii dambe wuxuu sheegay in uu sii joogi doono tartanka isla markaana uu ku tartami doono doorashada koowaad ee South Carolina Janaayo 21.
input.src: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.

reference: Bachmann, taasoo ku guuleysatay Doorashadii Ames Straw ee Ogos, waxay  go’aansatay inay dhameyso ololaha.

input.mt: Bachmann, oo ku guuleysatay codbixinta Ames Straw Poll bishii Agoosto, ayaa go'aansatay inay soo afjarto ololaheeda.
input.src: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.

reference: Sawir Qaadaha Waxaa loo Qaaday Xarunta Caaafimaadka Ronald Reagan ee UCLA, halkaas oo uu Markii dambe ku dhintay.

input.mt: Sawirka ayaa loo geeyay Xarunta Caafimaadka ee Ronald Reagan UCLA, halkaas oo uu ugu dambeyntii ku dhintay.
input.src: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.

reference: Sida la sheegay wuxu ku jiray 20yadiisii. Warbixin ayuu Bieber ku sheegay "in kastoo aan joogin oo aanan si toos ahna faraba ugula jirin shilkan daran, waxaan tacsi iyo duco u dirayaa qoyska dulmanaha."

input.mt: Waxaa la sheegay in uu da'diisu ahayd 20 sano. Qoraal uu soo saaray Bieber wuxuu yidhi "inkastoo aanan goob joog ahayn ama aan si toos ah ugu lug laheyn shilkan naxdinta leh, fekerkeyga iyo salaaddaydu waxay la socdaan qoyska dhibbanaha".
input.src: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."

reference: Boggaga internetka wararka madadaalada TMZ ayaa fahansan in sawiraaga uu baaburkiisa ku joojiyay dhanka kale ee Sepulveda Boulevard ka dib na isu dayay inuu sawiro isbaarada booliska intuu wadada goynin oo na sii socdo, taasi oo ku keentay in booliska California Highway Patrol oo isbaaraha joogay inuu ku amro inuu ku soo laabto isbaaraha, laba jeer.

input.mt: Websaydhka wararka madadaalada ee TMZ wuxuu fahmay in sawir qaadaha uu baabuurkiisa joojiyay dhinaca kale ee Sepulveda Boulevard wuxuuna isku dayay inuu sawirro ka qaado joogsiga booliska ka hor inta uusan u gudbin wadada oo uu sii wado, taas oo sababtay in sarkaalka booliiska ee California Highway Patrol uu wado joogsiga taraafikada si uu ugu amro inuu mar kale u gudbo, laba jeer.
input.src: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.

reference: Marka loo eego bilayska, dirawalka baabuurka jiidhay sawir qaadahu waxaa suurta gal ah inaanu wajahin xukun danbiyeed.

input.mt: Sida laga soo xigtay booliiska, darawalka gaariga ku dhuftay sawir qaadaha ayaa laga yaabaa inuusan eedeyn dambi ah la kulmi doonin.
input.src: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.

reference: Iyadoo keliya sideed iyo toban billadood yaalliin maalintii, waddamo badan ayaa ku fashilmay inay sameeyaan billada fagaare ka hadalka.

input.mt: Iyada oo maalin kasta la heli karo kaliya siddeed iyo toban medal, dalal badan ayaa ku guuldareystay inay ku guuleystaan kaalinta abaalmarinta.
input.src: With only eighteen medals available a day, a number of countries have failed to make the medal podium.

reference: Waxaa ka mida, Netherlands, Anna Jochemsen oo ku dhameysatay numberka sagaalad ee tartanka kaluumeysiga Super-G shalay, iyo Finland, Katja Saarinen kuna dhameysatay numberka tobanaad isla tartankaa.

input.mt: Waxaa ka mid ah Nederland, iyada oo Anna Jochemsen ay ku dhamaatay kaalinta sagaalaad fasalka dumarka ee Super-G shalay, iyo Finland iyada oo Katja Saarinen ay ku dhamaatay kaalinta 10-aad isla tartanka.
input.src: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.

reference: Ciyaar yahanka reer Australia ee Mitchell Gourley wuxuu ku gabababeyey kow iyo tobban taagnana ee ciyaarta raga Super-G. Tartamayasha Czech Oldrich Jelinek wuxu ku dhameyey kow iyo tobban fadhi ciyaarta raga ee Super-G,

input.mt: Mitchell Gourley oo ka soo jeeda Australia ayaa kaalinta kow iyo tobnaad ka soo baxay tartanka Super-G ee ragga. Tartanka Czech Oldrich Jelinek ayaa kaalinta lix iyo tobnaad ka soo baxay tartanka Super-G ee ragga.
input.src: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.

reference: Arly Velasquez oo ka soo jeeda Mexico wuxuu ku gabababeeyey shan iyo toban taagnana ee ciyaarta ragga Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall wuxu ku dhameeyey sagaal iyo toban fadhi ciyaarta raga ee Super-G.

input.mt: Arly Velasquez oo ka socday Mexico ayaa kaalinta shan iyo tobnaad ku guuleystay ciyaarta Super-G ee ragga. Adam Hall oo ka socday New Zealand ayaa kaalinta sagaalaad ku guuleystay ciyaarta Super-G ee ragga.
input.src: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.

reference: Ragga aragga naafada ka ah ee Poland ee skier Maciej Krezel iyo hagaha Anna Ogarzynska waxay ku dhamaysteen booska saddex iyo tobnaad ee tartarka Baraf ku sibqidda (Super-G).  Jong Seork Park ee Kuuriyana wuxuu ku dhamaystay booska labaatan iyo afaraad ee fadhi baraf ku subqidda (sitting Super-G) ee ragga.

input.mt: Ragga dadka indhaha la'aanta ah ee reer Poland Maciej Krezel iyo hage Anna Ogarzynska waxay ku dhamaadeen kaalinta 13-aad Super-G. Jong Seork Park ee Kuuriyada Koonfureed waxay ku dhamaadeen kaalinta 24-aad Super-G ragga fadhiya.
input.src: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.

reference: Sida dacwadu sheegtay, qashinka laga keenay xerada QM si sax ah looma basrin, taasbaana keentay in bakteeriyo gasho gacamada webiga Artibonite, mid ka mid ah webiyada ugu wayn Haiti.

input.mt: Dacwada ayaa sheegtay in qashinka xerada Qaramada Midoobay aan si sax ah loo nadiifin, taasoo keentay in bakteeriyada ay galaan wabiga Artibonite, oo ah mid ka mid ah kuwa ugu weyn dalka Haiti.
input.src: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.

reference: Machadka Caddaaladda iyo Dimuquraadiyada ee Haiti waxa u tixraacay cilmi baadhisyo madax bannaan oo soo jeedinaya in Ciidamada Nabad Ammaanka ee QM ay iyagoom ka war hayn keeneen cudurka.

input.mt: Machadka Caddaaladda iyo Dimuqraadiyadda ee Haiti ayaa tixraacay daraasado madax banaan oo muujinaya in kooxda nabadsugida ee UN ee Nepalese ay si aan ogayn u keeneen cudurka Haiti.
input.src: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.

reference: Danielle Lagtagne, oo khabiir ku ah cudurka una shaqeya UN ka, ayaa sheegay in dilaacista cudurka ay suurto galtahay inay keeneen nabad sugeyaashu.

input.mt: Danielle Lantagne oo ah khabiir ka tirsan Qaramada Midoobay oo ku takhasusay cudurka ayaa sheegtay in cudurka uu u badan yahay inuu sababay ciidamada nabad ilaalinta.
input.src: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.

reference: Bukaanka wuxuu joogey Nigeria, taas xiliga laga heley xanuunka fayriska Ebola oo ku dhacay.

input.mt: Bukaanka ayaa ku sugnaa dalka Nigeria, halkaas oo ay ka dhaceen qaar ka mid ah kiisaska fayraska Ebola.
input.src: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.

reference: Isbitaalku wuxuu raacay sharciga lagu maamulo infakshanka, iyadoo ay ku jirto kala saarida bukaanada kuwa kale lagaga hor tagayo suurta galnimada infakshanka kale.

input.mt: Isbitaalka ayaa raacay nidaamka xakamaynta cudurka, oo ay ku jiraan kala saarista bukaanka dadka kale si looga hortago cudurka dadka kale.
input.src: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.

reference: In kastoo uu ka tegay bandhiga 1993 haddana wuu sii haystay magaciisa ah soo saaraha guud, wuxuna sii waday inuu tobaan milyan oo doolar ku helo magaciisii.

input.mt: Inkastoo uu ka tagay bandhigga 1993 wuxuu haystay cinwaanka soo saaraha fulinta, wuxuuna sii waday inuu helayo tobanaan milyan oo doolar xilli ciyaareed kasta.
input.src: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.

reference: Wakhti hore wakaaladda wararka ee Jayna Xinhua ayaa soo warisay in dayuuradda la afduubay.

input.mt: Warbaahinta Shiinaha ee Xinhua ayaa sheegtay in diyaarad la afduubtay.
input.src: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.

reference: Warar danbe ayaa sheegay in diyaarada loogu hanjabay qarax, dibna loogu weeciye Afghanistan, aydoo ku dagtay Kandahar.

input.mt: Wararkii dambe ayaa sheegay in diyaaraddu heshay hanjabaad qarax ah waxaana dib loo wareejiyay Afghanistan, waxayna ku soo degtay Kandahar.
input.src: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.

reference: Warbixinada hore ayaa sheegaaya in diyaaradii dib logu celiyay Afghanistan ka dib markii loo diiday inay si degdeg ah ugu degto Ürümqi.

input.mt: Wararka hore ayaa sheegaya in diyaaradda dib loo wareejiyay Afghanistan kadib markii loo diiday in ay deg deg deg deg deg deg deg deg deg ku degto Ürümqi.
input.src: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.

reference: Shilalka hawada ayaa ku badan Iiraan, taasi oo leh diyaarado gaboobay kuwaasi oo weliba si xun loo dayactiray hadday tahay kuwa ciidanka iyo kuwan dadweynaha labadaba.

input.mt: Shilalka hawada ayaa caadi ah Iran, oo leh maraakiib da 'weyn oo si xun loo ilaaliyo hawlaha rayidka ah iyo kuwa militariga.
input.src: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.

reference: Isbuucan bilowgiisa, diyaarad ay leyahin boliska ayaa burburtay sadex qof way ku dhimatay sadexna way ku dhawacantay.

input.mt: Horraantii toddobaadkan, shil ka dhacay diyaaradda booliiska ayaa dilay saddex qof, saddex kalena way ku dhaawacmeen.
input.src: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.

reference: Bisha lasoo dhaafay ayay Iran wajahday musiibada hawada ee ugu xumayd dhawr sana gudaheeda ka dib mar diyaarad u socotay Armenia dhacday, oo na dishay 168 qof oo saarneed.

input.mt: Bishii la soo dhaafay Iran waxay aragtay musiibadii ugu xumaa ee duulimaadyadeeda sanadihii la soo dhaafay markii diyaarad duulimaad ah oo ku sii jeeday Armenia ay ku dhacday, taas oo ay ku dhinteen 168 qof oo saarnaa.
input.src: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.

reference: Isla bishaas ayee aheed markii diyaarad kale ay ka gudubtay wadadi ay ku socotay ee Mashhad kuna dhacde darbi, taaso dishay toban iyo todobo.

input.mt: Isla bishaas ayaa waxaa la arkay diyaarad kale oo duulimaad ah oo ku dhacday waddo duulimaad ah oo ku taal Mashhad waxayna ku dhacday derbi, iyadoo ay ku dhinteen toddoba iyo toban qof.
input.src: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.

reference: Aerosmith ayaa baajisay waxyaalihii uga hadhsanaa socdaalkooda.

input.mt: Aerosmith waxay joojiyeen bandhigyadooda soo hartay ee safarkooda.
input.src: Aerosmith have cancelled their remaining concerts on their tour.

reference: Kooxda heesaha loo yaqaana rock waxay ahayd inay u booqasho ku maran Mareykanka iyo Kanada ilaa Sebteembar 16.

input.mt: Kooxda rock-ka ayaa lagu wadaa inay booqato Mareykanka iyo Kanada illaa 16-ka Sebtember.
input.src: The rock band was due to tour the United States and Canada until September 16.

reference: Murray ayaa ku guul dareystay qaybta hore ka dib markay labada ninba qabteen kubad walbo oo la soo tuuro.

input.mt: Murray wuxuu ku guuldareystay setkii ugu horreeyay xilli ciyaareed la isku xidhay kadib markii labaduba ay qabteen adeeg kasta oo setka ah.
input.src: Murray lost the first set in a tie break after both men held each and every serve in the set.

reference: Waxaa fiidki bilaabay heesaa Sanju Sharma, waxaa ku xigsaday Jai Shankar Choudhary. Chhappan bhog bhajan ayaa sidoo kale ku biiray. Waxana isagu wehlinayay heesaa Raju Khandelwal.

input.mt: Gabayga Sanju Sharma wuxuu bilaabay fiidkii, waxaana raacay Jai Shankar Choudhary. wuxuu sidoo kale soo bandhigay chhappan bhog bhajan. Gabayga, Raju Khandelwal wuxuu la socday isaga.
input.src: Singer Sanju Sharma started the evening, followed by Jai Shankar Choudhary. esented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.

reference: Lakkha Singh waxay soo bandhigtay sidoo chhappan bhog bhajan. Heesaa,raju Khandelwal ayaa u muuqday isaga.

input.mt: Lakkha Singh ayaa sidoo kale soo bandhigay chhappan bhog bhajan.
input.src: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.

reference: Soo jeedinta muhiimka ahaa ee Khamiista ee Bandhiga Ciyaaraha Tokyo, ayuu madaxwaynaha Nintendo Satoru Iwata ku soo bandhigay naqshada xakameeyaha ciyaarta cusub ee shirkadda Nintendo loo yaqaano Revolution.

input.mt: Khamiista soo bandhigida muhiimka ah ee Bandhigga Ciyaaraha Tokyo, madaxweynaha Nintendo Satoru Iwata wuxuu soo bandhigay naqshadeynta kontoroolka cusub ee Nintendo Revolution ee shirkadda.
input.src: At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.

reference: Dib u soo celinta ramuudka tifiga, maamulaha waxaa loo isticmala laba dareen wade oo u dhaw isticmalaha tifiga saddex gesoodka booska sadex cabirka banana.

input.mt: Waxay u egtahay telefishanka telefishanka, xakamaynta waxay isticmaashaa laba dareemayaal oo ku yaal telefishanka isticmaalaha si ay u go'aamiyaan booskiisa meel saddex dhinac ah.
input.src: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.

reference: Giancarlo Fisichella waxaa ka lumay maamulida gadhiga tartan kana wuu ka dhamaaday xili hore marka uu bilaabmayba.

input.mt: Giancarlo Fisichella wuxuu lumiyay xakamaynta gaarigiisa wuxuuna dhamaaday tartanka wax yar ka dib bilowgii.
input.src: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.

reference: cayaaryahanka ay isku kooxda yihiin ee Farnando Alonso ayaa hogaaminaye tartamada intooda badan, laakin waxa uu ku dhameeye wax yar un kadib, malaha lug horaa si xun ugu xirneed.

input.mt: Xulafkiisa Fernando Alonso ayaa hormuud ka ahaa inta badan tartanka, laakiin wuxuu joojiyay isla markiiba ka dib markii uu joojiyay, malaha sababtoo ah giraangirihii hore ee midig ayaa si xun u xidhay.
input.src: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.

reference: "Way quruxsantahay si wacanway u heesaysaa, sidoo kale, ayuu yidhi sida ku xusan qoraalka shir jaraaidka."

input.mt: "Waxay aad u qurux badan tahay waxayna sidoo kale si fiican u gabyi kartaa", ayuu yiri sida laga soo xigtay qoraalka shirkii jaraa'id.
input.src: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.

reference: "Mar walbo oo aan muraajaceyno midaan, qalbiga ayaanka dareemaye."

input.mt: Mar kasta oo aan tijaabada ku sameynay waxaan dareemay dareen qalbigayga ka hooseeya.
input.src: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."

reference: Kuwaad 3 daqiqo oo qado ah, boodhka kamaradu waxay muujiyeen dhawr qaybood oo kamida foormka aan gudbiyaha ahayn oo ka go'ay taangiga shidaalka.

input.mt: Qiyaastii 3 daqiiqo ka dib markii la bilaabay, kamarad ku jirta diyaaradda ayaa muujisay in qaybo badan oo foornada ka saarista ah ay ka baxaan taangiga shidaalka.
input.src: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.

reference: Hasa yeeshee, looma maleynaayo inay wax dhib u geysteen diyaarada hawada sare.

input.mt: Si kastaba ha ahaatee, looma maleynayo in ay waxyeelo u geysteen maraakiibta.
input.src: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.

reference: Shan daqiiqo oo lagu soo muujiyey murayad waxaa bilaabtay dhaqdhaqaqa dabeesha, ilaa daqiiqad ka bacdi, dabeesha waxay bilaabtay iney jarto xawaare 70km saacadiii ah... ka dib waxa yimi roob, aad u weyn kaas oo ugu dhacayo jirkaga sida cirbad, waxaa cirka ka soo daatay baraf yar yar, dadkuna way naxeen wayna qeylinayeen sidoo kale way kala ordayeen.

input.mt: Shan daqiiqo ka dib, dabayl ayaa bilaabmaya inuu soo galo, daqiiqad kadib, dabaylku wuxuu gaaraa 70km/h... ka dibna roobku wuxuu yimaadaa, laakiin aad buu u xoog badan yahay oo aad u weyn in uu maqaarkaaga u garaaco sida irbad, ka dibna roobka ayaa cirka ka soo dhacay, dadku waxay dareemaan baqdin iyo qaylo, oo midba midka kale ayuu ku boodayaa.
input.src: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.

reference: NHK ayaa sidoo kale sheegtay in warshadda quwadda nukliyeerka Kashiwazaki Kariwa ee ku taalo Niigata ay si caadi ah u shaqaynaysay.

input.mt: NHK ayaa sidoo kale sheegtay in xarunta korontada nukliyeerka ee Kashiwazaki Kariwa ee gobolka Niigata ay si caadi ah u shaqeyneyso.
input.src: NHK also reported that the Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant in Niigata prefecture was operating normally.

reference: Waxaa la sheegay in 9400 guriyo oo deegaanka ay biyo la’aan yihiim iyo ku dhawaad 100 ay koronto la’aan yihiin.

input.mt: Waxaa lagu soo waramayaa in ku dhawaad 9400 oo guri oo ku nool gobolkaasi aysan haysan biyo iyo qiyaastii 100 oo guri oo aan lahayn koronto.
input.src: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.

reference: Waddooyinka qaar baa dhaawacmay, adeega tareenada ayaa meelaha wax ka dhaceen kala go'ay, Madaarka Noto ee Ishikawa isna wali waa xiran yahay.

input.mt: Qaar ka mid ah wadooyinka ayaa burburay, adeegga tareenka ayaa la joojiyay meelaha ay saameysay, garoonka diyaaradaha Noto ee gobolka Ishikawa ayaa weli xiran.
input.src: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.

reference: Wararka qaar ayaa sheegaya in la xaqiijiye tiro dhimasho sideeda, warar lahubana waxa ay sheegayan in 30 ay dhaawacantay; laakin tirada ugu danbeyse ilaa hadda lama oga

input.mt: Wararka qaarkood waxay sheegayaan in tirada rasmiga ah ee dhimashada ay tahay siddeed, wararka rasmiga ahna waxay xaqiijinayaan in ilaa 30 qof ay ku dhaawacmeen; laakiin tirada ugu dambeysa weli lama oga.
input.src: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.

reference: Labada maado ayaa isu falceliyo iyagoo samaynaayo nooc cusbo ah oo joojin karo shaqaynta kilida, ayee cilmi baareyaasha jaamacada sheegeen.

input.mt: Labada xeryood waxay ku falgalaan midba midka kale si ay u sameeyaan kristalooyin xakameyn kara shaqada kelyaha, sida ay sheegeen cilmi baarayaasha jaamacadda.
input.src: The two compounds react with one another to form crystals that may block kidney function, researchers at the university said.

reference: Baarayaasha waxay arkeen wiriqyo kasameysan kaadida bisada iyadoo ay weheliso iskudarka melamine iyo cyanuric acid.

input.mt: Cilmi-baadhayaashu waxay ogaadeen dhaladaha lagu sameeyay urinada bisadaha marka lagu daro melamine iyo cyanuric acid.
input.src: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.

reference: Haddana boqolkiiba sideetan alaabtayada waxa lagu cashuurada tacriifada waddamada Ameerikada Dhexe. Waanu ku daawaynaynaa.

input.mt: Hase yeeshee 80 boqolkiiba badeecadeena waxaa lagu canshuuraa canshuuraha dalalka Bartamaha Ameerika.
input.src: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.

reference: Taa ilama ekeyn wax micno agteyda ka sameynaya; hubaal ma aheyn wax xaqa.

input.mt: Taasi waxay u muuqatay mid aan macquul aheyn, run ahaantii ma ahayn mid cadaalad ah.
input.src: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.

reference: Xafiiska korown, kaasi oo ah meesha ka dhacdo go'aanka maxkadaynta,ayaa u muujiyay saxafiyiinta joornaalada in aanay jirin doonin waxdanbe oo ka go'naansho ah ugu yaraan tan iyo inta laga gaadhayo eedaynta.

input.mt: Xafiiska Qaranka, oo guud ahaan mas'uul ka ah dacwadaha, ayaa u sheegay suxufiyiinta in aysan jirin wax faallo ah oo dheeraad ah oo la sameyn doono ugu yaraan ilaa eedeynta.
input.src: Crown Office, which is in overall charge of prosecutions, has indicated to journalists that no further comment will be made at least until indictment.

reference: Dukumiintiga, sida sirta ku xusan, waxa uu ka hadlaya muranka xaduuda, taas oo Falastiin ku dooneyso xaduudahi kahore dagaalki Bariga iyo Bartamaha ee 1967.

input.mt: Dukumiintiga, sida laga soo xigtay daadka, wuxuu tixraacayaa khilaafka xuduudaha, kaas oo Falastiin dooneyso iyada oo ku saleysan xuduudaha ka hor dagaalkii 1967 ee Bariga Dhexe.
input.src: The document, according to the leak, will refer to the borders dispute, which Palestine wants based on the borders before the 1967 Mideast War.

reference: Ciwaanada kale ee la dhameeyay ayaa waxa ku jira sida lasoo wariyay maamulka qudus kazoo muqadas ka ah labada qaran arinta dooxada Jordan ba.

input.mt: Mowduucyada kale ee la hadlay ayaa lagu soo waramayaa in ay ka mid yihiin xaaladda mustaqbalka ee Yeruusaalem oo ah mid quduus u ah labada quruumood iyo arrinta Dooxada Urdun.
input.src: Other topics covered reportedly include the future state of Jerusalem which is sacred to both nations and the Jordan Valley issue.

reference: Bishii u danbaysay guddida madaxweynenimo ayaa soo jeedisay sugidda diwaangalin si ay qayb uga noqoto bakageka lagu cabirayo in wadanku lagu jiheeyo qbsoomidda doorashooyin cusub.

input.mt: Bishii la soo dhaafay guddiga madaxweynaha ayaa soo jeediyay iscasilaadda CEP-ga hore iyada oo qayb ka ah qorshe tallaabooyin ah oo lagu wareejinayo dalka doorashooyin cusub.
input.src: Last month a presidential commission recommended the prior CEP's resignation as part of a package of measures to move the country towards new elections.

reference: Xafiiska maareynta arimaha gargaarka ah ee Nothern Marianas wuxu sheegay inaanay jirin wax dhaawac ah oo dalka laga soo sheegay.

input.mt: Xafiiska maaraynta xaaladaha degdegga ah ee Waqooyiga Marianas ayaa sheegay in aysan jirin wax khasaare ah oo laga soo sheegay dalka.
input.src: The Northern Marianas emergency management office said that there were no damages reported in the nation.

reference: Dhawr la afduubeyaala ayaa la badbaadiyay ugu yaraana lix ayaa la xaqiijiyay inay dhinteen ilaa hadda.

input.mt: Qaar ka mid ah maxaabiista ayaa la badbaadiyay, ugu yaraan lix ayaa la xaqiijiyay inay dhinteen ilaa hadda.
input.src: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.

reference: Xinhua wuxu soo wariyay in baadhayasha dawladu ay soo saareen laba 'bogoska madow ah' duulimaadka waxa dib loo dalbay khamiiska.

input.mt: Warbaahinta Xinhua ayaa sheegtay in baarayaasha dowladda ay Arbacadii soo heleen laba qalab lagu duubo duulimaadyada'sanduuq madow'.
input.src: Xinhua reported that government investigators recovered two 'black box' flight recorders on Wednesday.

reference: Dak. Ehud Ur, profesa wa udaktari katika chuo kikuu cha Dalhousie kule Halifix, Nova Scotia na mwenyekiti wa kitengo cha kliniki na kisayansi kwenye ushirika wa ugonjwa wa kisukari nchini Canada alionya kuwa utafiti bado uko kwenye siku za mapema.

input.mt: Dr Ehud Ur, Profesa wa Daktari katika Chuo Kikuu cha Dalhousie huko Halifax, Nova Scotia na Rais wa Sekta ya Kliniki na Sayansi ya Shirika la Diabetes la Canada, alisema kuwa utafiti bado ni katika siku za mwanzo.
input.src: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.

reference: Danius alisema, "Sasa hivi hatufanyi chochote. Nimepiga simu na kutuma barua pepe kwa mshirika wake wa karibu na kupata majibu ya kirafiki sana. Kwa sasa, hakika hiyo imetosha."

input.mt: Danius alisema, "Hakika sasa hatufanya chochote. nilikuwa nimesikia na kutuma barua pepe kwa mshiriki wake wa karibu na nilikuwa na majibu mazuri sana.
input.src: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."

reference: Aliunda kengele ya mlango ya Wi-Fi, alisema.

input.mt: Alikuwa anafanya simu ya barua pepe, alisema.
input.src: He built a WiFi door bell, he said.

reference: Baadaye 2017, Siminoff alionekana katika chaneli ya ununuzi ya televisheni QVC.

input.mt: Mwishoni mwa 2017, Siminoff alikuja kwenye kituo cha televisheni cha biashara QVC.
input.src: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.

reference: Ring pia alitatua mashtaka ya kampuni pinzani ya usalama, Shirika la ADT.

input.mt: Ring pia ilishughulikia kesi na kampuni ya usalama yenye ushindani, ADT Corporation.
input.src: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.

reference: Huku chanjo moja ya majaribio ikionekana kupunguza vifo kutokana na Ebola, hadi kufikia sasa, hakuna dawa zimeonyeshwa dhahiri kufaa kutibu maambukizo yaliyoko.

input.mt: Ingawa vaccine moja ya majaribio inaonekana kuwa inawezekana kupunguza ugonjwa wa Ebola, hadi sasa, hakuna madawa ya kulevya yamekuwa wazi kuonyesha sahihi kwa matibabu ya ugonjwa wa sasa.
input.src: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.

reference: Kinywaji kimoja cha kingamwili, ZMapp, hapo awali kilionyesha ahadi uwanjani, lakini tafiti rasmi zilionyesha kilikuwa na faida kidogo kuliko ilivyotafutwa katika kuzuia kifo.

input.mt: Mkusanyiko mmoja wa antibody, ZMapp, awali ilionyesha ahadi katika eneo hilo, lakini utafiti rasmi ilionyesha kuwa alikuwa na faida kidogo kuliko ilivyotarajiwa katika kuzuia kifo.
input.src: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.

reference: Katika jaribio la PALM, Zmapp ilitumika kama kidhibiti, kumaanisha wanasayansi waliitumia kama msingi na kulinganisha matibabu mengine matatu nayo.

input.mt: Katika utafiti wa PALM, ZMapp ilitumika kama uendeshaji, ambayo inamaanisha wanasayansi walitumia kama msingi na kulinganisha matibabu matatu mengine.
input.src: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.

reference: USA Gymnastics hukubali barua ya Kamati ya Olimpiki ya Marekani na hukubali hitaji kuu la familia ya Olimpiki la kukuza mazingira salama kwa wanariadha wetu wote.

input.mt: USA Gymnastics inaunga mkono barua ya Tume ya Olimpiki ya Marekani na kukubali mahitaji kamili ya familia ya Olimpiki ya kukuza mazingira salama kwa wachezaji wetu wote.
input.src: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.

reference: Tunakubaliana na taarifa ya USOC kwamba masilahi ya wanariadha na vilabu vyetu, na spoti yao, huenda yakashughulikiwa vyema kwa kusonga mbele na mabadiliko ya maana ndani ya shirika letu, badala ya kughairi vyeti.

input.mt: Sisi kukubaliana na taarifa ya USOC kwamba maslahi ya wanariadha wetu na klabu, na michezo yao, inaweza kutumika vizuri kwa kuendesha mbele na mabadiliko ya maana ndani ya shirika letu, badala ya uhakika.
input.src: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.

reference: USA Gymnastics inaunga mkono uchunguzi huru ambao labda utafafanua jinsi unyanyasaji wa kiwango kama vile ulivyoelezewa kwa ujasiri sana na manusura wa Larry Nassar ungekosa kugunduliwa kwa muda mrefu hivyo na inakumbatia mabadiliko muhimu na ya kufaa.

input.mt: US Gymnastics inasaidia utafiti wa kujitegemea ambayo inaweza kuonyesha jinsi uharibifu wa kipengele iliyoandikwa kwa urahisi na waathirika wa Larry Nassar inaweza kuwa haikujulikana kwa muda mrefu na inachukua mabadiliko yoyote muhimu na sahihi.
input.src: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.

reference: USA Gymnastics na USOC zina lengo moja — kuifanya spoti ya sarakasi, na nyingine, salama iwezekanavyo ili wanariadha wafuate ndoto zao katika mazingira salama, chanya na ya kuwezesha.

input.mt: US Gymnastics na USOC ni lengo la moja - kufanya michezo ya gimnastics, na wengine, salama kwa ajili ya wanariadha kufuata ndoto zao katika mazingira salama, nzuri na yenye nguvu.
input.src: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.

reference: Katika miaka yote ya 1960, Brzezinski alimfanyia kazi John F. Kennedy kama mshauri wake na pia utawala wa Lyndon B. Johnson.

input.mt: Zaidi ya miaka ya 1960, Brzezinski alifanya kazi kwa John F. Kennedy kama mtaalam wake na baadaye kwa serikali ya Lyndon B. Johnson.
input.src: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.

reference: Wakati wa uteuzi wa 1976, alimshauri Carter kuhusu sera ya nje, kisha akafanya kazi kama Mshauri wa Usalama wa Kitaifa (NSA) kutoka 1977 hadi 1981, na alichukua hatamu kutoka kwa Henry Kissinger.

input.mt: Katika uchaguzi wa 1976 aliwashauri Carter juu ya sera ya nje, kisha alifanya kazi kama Mtaalam wa Usalama wa Taifa (NSA) kutoka 1977 hadi 1981, baada ya Henry Kissinger.
input.src: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.

reference: Kama NSA, alimsaidia Carter katika kushughulikia masuala ya dunia kidiplomasia, kama vile Mikataba ya Kambi David, 1978; kurekebisha uhusiano wa Marekani na China mwishoni mwa miaka ya 1970; Mapinduzi ya Irani, ambayo yalipelekea janga la mateka la Irani, 1979; na shambulio la Kisovyeti katika Afganistani, 1979.

input.mt: Kama NSA, aliwasaidia Carter katika usimamizi wa kidiplomasia wa masuala ya ulimwengu, kama vile Mkataba wa Camp David, 1978; kuimarisha uhusiano wa Marekani-China alikumbusha mwisho wa miaka ya 1970; Revolution ya Iran, ambayo ilisababisha mgogoro wa wahamiaji wa Iran, 1979; na uvumbuzi wa Soviet katika Afghanistan, 1979.
input.src: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.

reference: Sinema, iliyoshirikisha Ryan Gosling na Emma Stone ilipata uteuzi katika kategoria zote kuu.

input.mt: Filamu hiyo, ambayo ina Ryan Gosling na Emma Stone, ilipokea tuzo katika makundi yote makubwa.
input.src: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.

reference: Gosling na Stone walipokea uteuzi wa Muigizaji na Mwigizaji wa kike Bora mtawalia.

input.mt: Gosling na Stone walipokea tuzo kwa mchezaji bora na mchezaji bora.
input.src: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.

reference: Tangazo lilifanywa baada ya Trump kuwa na mazungumzo ya simu na Rais wa Uturuki Recep Tayyip Erdogan.

input.mt: Taarifa hiyo ilitolewa baada ya Trump kuwa na mazungumzo ya simu na Rais wa Uturuki Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
input.src: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

reference: Uturuki ilikua yachukua ulinzi wa wapiganaji wa ISIS waliotekwa ambao, tangazo lilisema kuwa, nchi za Ulaya zilikataa kurudi.

input.mt: Uturuki pia itachukua uhifadhi wa wapiganaji wa ISIS ambao, kwa mujibu wa taarifa hiyo, mataifa ya Ulaya wamekataa kurejea.
input.src: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.

reference: Hii haithibitishi tu kuwa baadhi ya dinosaria walikuwa na manyoya, nadharia ambayo tayari imezagaa, bali pia inatoa maelezo ambayo kijumla visukuku haviwezi, kama vile rangi na mpangilio wa pande-tatu.

input.mt: Hii si tu kuthibitisha kwamba angalau baadhi ya dinosaurs walikuwa na mti, nadharia tayari imeenea, lakini hutoa maelezo ya nyuklia kwa ujumla siwezi, kama vile rangi na usimamizi wa tatu.
input.src: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.

reference: . Wanasayansi wanasema manyoya ya mnyama huyu yalikuwa ya rangi ya kahawia-nyekundu upande wa juu na hafifu au rangi ya karotini upande wa chini.

input.mt: Wanasayansi wanasema mti wa wanyama huu ulikuwa mti wa chestnut juu na chini ya mti wa pale au karotenoid.
input.src: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.

reference: Utambuzi huo pia unatoa ufahamu wa mageuko ya manyoya katika ndege.

input.mt: Utafiti huo pia hutoa ufahamu juu ya maendeleo ya wanyama katika mbegu.
input.src: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.

reference: Kwa sababu manyoya ya dinosau hayana chimbuko uliyostawishwa vizuri, inayoitwa rachi, lakini huwa na sifa zingine za manyoya — barbu na barbule — watafiti waligundua rachi labda ni maendeleo ya baadaye ya uvumbuzi kuliko sifa hizi nyingine.

input.mt: Kwa sababu rangi ya dinosauri hawana rangi iliyopatikana vizuri, inayojulikana kama rangi, lakini ina vipengele vingine vya rangi - barbs na barbules - watafiti walisema rangi ilikuwa uwezekano wa maendeleo ya baadaye ambayo ni vipengele vingine.
input.src: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.

reference: Watafiti walipendekeza kwamba, hata kama huu ni mkia wa dinosau mdogo, sampuli hiyo inaonyesha manyoya ya ukubwa na si manyoya ya kifaranga mdogo.

input.mt: Watafiti walisema kwamba, ingawa hii ni nyama ya dinosaur muda, sampuli inaonyesha mti wa watu wazima na sio nyama ya chini.
input.src: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

reference: Bomu la gari lililolipuliwa katika hedikota ya polisi katika Gaziantep, Uturuki jana asubuhi liliwaua maafisa wawili wa polisi na kuwajeruhi watu wengine zaidi ya ishirini.

input.mt: Bomb ya gari iliyotangulia katika kituo cha polisi huko Gaziantep, Uturuki jana asubuhi waliua polisi wawili na kujeruhi watu zaidi ya watu 20.
input.src: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.

reference: Walipata kuwa Jua lilifanya kazi kwa kanuni msingi sawa na za nyota nyingine: Shuguli za nyota zote kwenye mfumo zilipatikana kuendeshwa na mng'ao wao, mzunguko wao na hakuna jingine.

input.mt: Wao walijua kwamba jua lilifanya kazi kwa kanuni za msingi kama vile nyota nyingine: shughuli ya nyota zote katika mfumo ilipatikana kuwa iliyoandaliwa na mwanga wao, rotation yao, na hakuna kitu kingine.
input.src: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.

reference: Mng'ao na mzunguko hutumika pamoja ili kuamua namba ya Rossby ya nyota, ambayo inahusiana na mtiririko wa utegili.

input.mt: Ukumbusho na rotation hutumiwa pamoja ili kuamua idadi ya Rossby ya nyota, ambayo inahusiana na mzunguko wa plasma.
input.src: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.

reference: Wakati wa safari yake, Iwasaki alikumbwa na matata mara nyingi.

input.mt: Katika safari yake, Iwasaki alikuja katika matatizo mengi.
input.src: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.

reference: Kiwango cha 802.11n hufanya kazi katika masafa ya gigahezi 2.4 na gigahezi 5.0.

input.mt: Kiwango cha 802.11n hufanya kazi kwa mara ya 2.4Ghz na 5.0Ghz.
input.src: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.

reference: Hii itaiwezesha kutangamana kwa nyuma na 802.11a, 802.11b na 802.11g, mradi tu kituo cha ardhini kina redio mbili.

input.mt: Hii itawezesha kuwa nyuma ya kuunganishwa na 802.11a, 802.11b na 802.11g, kwa masharti kwamba kituo cha msingi ina radios mbili.
input.src: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.

reference: Kasi za 802.11n ni haraka sana kuliko zile za watangulizi wake zikiwa upeo wa kinadharia wa kiwango cha juu cha 600Mbit/s.

input.mt: kasi ya 802.11n ni haraka zaidi kuliko ile ya wafuasi wake na kasi ya kimsingi ya 600Mbit/s.
input.src: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.

reference: Duvall, ambaye ameolewa na ana watoto waliokomaa, hakuacha hisia kubwa kwa Miller, ambayehadithi ilimhusu.

input.mt: Duvall, ambaye ni ndoa na watoto wawili, hakuacha hisia kubwa juu ya Miller, ambaye hadithi hiyo ilikuwa inayohusiana.
input.src: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.

reference: Alipoambiwa atoe maoni, Miller alisema, "Mike huongea sana wakati wa kesi…nilikuwa najitayarisha kwa hivyo sikuwa ninasikia kwa kweli alichokuwa akisema."

input.mt: Baada ya kuomba maoni, Miller alisema, "Mike anazungumzia mengi wakati wa kusikiliza... mimi nilikuwa tayari kwa hivyo mimi si kweli kusikia kile anasema."
input.src: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."

reference: "Tutajaribu kupunguza utoaji wa dayoksidi ya kaboni kwa kila kipimo cha GDP kwa kiwango muhimu kufikia 2020 kutoka kiwango cha 2005", Hu alisema.

input.mt: "Tunahitaji kupunguza uzalishaji wa CO2 kwa moja ya GDP kwa kiasi kikubwa hadi 2020 kutoka ngazi ya 2005," Hu alisema.
input.src: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.

reference: Kikundi cha Wasomi wa Iraq kiliwasilisha ripoti yao saa 12 GMT leo.

input.mt: Shirika la Utafiti wa Iraq liliwasilisha ripoti yake leo saa 12.00 GMT.
input.src: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.

reference: Inatoa ilani kwamba hakuna yeyote anayeweza kutoa hakikisho kwamba mpango wowote wa hatua katika Iraki wakati huu utakomesha vita vya kimadhehebu, vurugu inayozidi, au mwelekeo kwenye machafuko.

input.mt: Hakuna mtu anayeweza kuhakikisha kwamba hatua yoyote katika Iraq wakati huu itakuwa kuacha vita vya kikatari, upungufu wa dhambi, au kuelekea chaos.
input.src: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.

reference: Seneta wa sasa na Mke wa Rais wa Ajentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner alitangaza uwaniaji wake wa urais jana jioni katika La Plata, mji ulio kilomita 50 (maili 31) kutoka Buenos Aires.

input.mt: Senator ya sasa na First Lady ya Argentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner ilitangaza kandida yake ya rais jana usiku huko La Plata, mji wa kilomita 50 (31 mil) mbali na Buenos Aires.
input.src: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.

reference: Bi. Kirchner alitangaza nia yake ya kuwania urais katika Ukumbi wa Ajentina, mahali pale pale alipotumia kuanzisha kampeni yake ya Seneti mnamo 2005 kama memba wa ujumbe wa wilaya ya Buenos Aires.

input.mt: Ms. Kirchner alitangaza mipango yake ya kuendesha rais katika Theatre ya Argentina, mahali ambapo alitumia kuanza kampeni yake ya 2005 kwa Senate kama mwanachama wa delegation ya mkoa wa Buenos Aires.
input.src: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.

reference: Mjadala ulianzishwa na mzozo juu ya kutumia zaidi kwa msaada na ujenzi upya katika Kimbunga Katrina; ambacho wahafidhina wa fedha wabebandika kwa ucheshi “Mpango wa Bushwa New Orleans.”

input.mt: Mabadiliko ilitokana na majadiliano juu ya gharama za upatikanaji na ujenzi katika Hurricane Katrina; ambayo baadhi ya wakimbizi wa kifedha wameitwa "Bush's New Orleans Deal."
input.src: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

reference: Watu zaidi ya milioni nne walienda Roma kuhudhuria mazishi.

input.mt: Zaidi ya watu milioni nne walikuja Roma kuwakaribisha maumbile.
input.src: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.

reference: Katika miji mingine mingi ya Italia na ulimwengu kwa ujumla, haswa katika Polandi, mipangilio sawa ilifanywa, ambayo ilionekana na idadi kubwa ya watu.

input.mt: Katika miji mingine ya Italia na katika ulimwengu mwingine, hasa katika Poland, mipangilio sawa ilitengenezwa, ambayo ilitazama na idadi kubwa ya watu.
input.src: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.

reference: Wanahistoria wameshutumu sera za zamani za FBI kwa kuangazia rasilimali kwenye kesi ambazo ni rahisi kutatua, hasa kesi za magari yaliyoibwa, kwa madhumuni ya kuongeza kiwango cha mafanikio cha wakala.

input.mt: Wanasayansi wamechunguza sera za zamani za FBI kwa kuzingatia rasilimali juu ya kesi ambazo ni rahisi kutatua, hasa matukio ya magari yaliyochaguliwa, kwa lengo la kuongeza kiwango cha mafanikio ya shirika hilo.
input.src: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.

reference: Bunge lilianza kufadhili kikundi chenye nia chafu katika mwaka wa kifedha wa 2005 na kuaini kuwa FBI lazima itoe makachero kumi kwa ponografia ya watu wazima.

input.mt: Kongamano lilianza kutoa fedha kwa mapendekezo ya ujasiri mwaka 2005 na ilisema FBI inapaswa kuwapa watumiaji kumi kwa ajili ya pornography ya watu wazima.
input.src: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.

reference: Robin Uthappa alifanya alama za juu za fursa, pointi 70 katika mipira 41 kwa kufikia nne 11 na sita 2.

input.mt: Robin Uthappa alifanya maonyesho ya juu ya maonyesho, 70 waliondoka kwa maonyesho ya 41 tu kwa kuathiri maonyesho ya 11 na maonyesho ya 2.
input.src: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.

reference: Wachezaji wa kati wa kriketi, Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid, walicheza vizuri na kushirikiana katika masafa mia moja.

input.mt: Waendeshaji wa kati, Sachin Tendulkar na Rahul Dravid, walifanya vizuri na wamefanya ushirikiano wa maelfu.
input.src: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.

reference: Rais wa Marekani George W. Bush alifika Singapori asubuhi ya Novemba 16, hivyo kuanza ziara ya Asia ya wiki moja.

input.mt: Rais wa Marekani George W. Bush alikuja Singapore asubuhi 16 Novemba, kuanza safari ya wiki ya Asia.
input.src: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.

reference: Alisalimiwa na Naibu Waziri Mkuu wa Singapori Wong Kan Seng na wakajadili masuala ya biashara na ughaidi na Waziri Mkuu wa Singapori Lee Hsien Loong.

input.mt: Alikutana na Makamu wa Waziri Mkuu wa Singapore, Wong Kan Seng, na kujadili masuala ya biashara na ugaidi na Waziri Mkuu wa Singapore, Lee Hsien Loong.
input.src: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.

reference: Waziri Mkuu Stephen Harper amekubali kutuma ‘Mkataba wa Hewa Safi’ wa serikali kwa kamati ya vyama vyote kwa ukaguzi, kabla ya kusomwa kwake kwa mara ya pili, baada ya mkutano wa Jumanne wa dakika 25 na kiongozi wa NDP Jack Layton kwenye PMO.

input.mt: Waziri Mkuu Stephen Harper amekubali kutuma 'Clean Air Act' ya serikali kwa Kamati ya kila chama kwa ajili ya uchunguzi, kabla ya kusoma mara ya pili, baada ya mkutano wa dakika 25 wa Jumatatu na rais wa NDP Jack Layton katika PMO.
input.src: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.

reference: Layton alikuwa ameomba mabadiliko ya mswada wa kimazingira wa wahafidhina wakati wa mkutano na PM, akiomba “uandishi upya wa undani na mkamilifu” wa mswada wa kimazingira wa chama cha Wahafidhina.

input.mt: Layton aliomba mabadiliko ya bajeti ya mazingira ya wakimbizi wakati wa mkutano na Waziri Mkuu, kuomba "kuandika tena na kamili" ya bajeti ya mazingira ya chama cha wakimbizi.
input.src: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.

reference: Rais wa marekani George W. Bush alikaribisha tangazo hilo.

input.mt: Rais wa Marekani, George W. Bush, amepokea taarifa hiyo.
input.src: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.

reference: Msemaji wa Bush Gordon Johndroe alitaja ahadi ya Korea Kaskazini kama “hatua kuu kuelekea lengo la kufikia uondoaji wa kuaminika wa silaha za kinyuklia katika rasi ya Kikorea.”

input.mt: Msemaji wa Bush Gordon Johndroe alielezea ahadi ya Korea Kaskazini "kwa hatua kubwa kwa lengo la kufikia ukosefu wa nyuklia wa peninsula ya Korea."
input.src: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."

reference: Maji yanamwagika juu ya tuta katika sehemu ya futi 100 upana.

input.mt: Nishati huchukuliwa juu ya levee katika sehemu ya juu ya mita 100.
input.src: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.

reference: "Yeye [Wales] kimsingi alindanganya tangu mwanzo. Kwanza kwa kufanya kama hii ni kwa sababu za kisheria. Pili, kwa kujifanya alikuwa anatusikiliza, hadi saana yake ifutwe."

input.mt: "Hii [Wales] ana uongo kwa sisi tangu mwanzo. kwanza, kwa kufanya kama hii ilikuwa kwa sababu ya kisheria. pili, kwa kutafakari yeye alikuwa kusikiliza sisi, hadi uharibifu wake."
input.src: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."

reference: Athari ambayo timu ilikuwa ikitafuta ingesababishwa na nguvu za mawimbi baina ya dutu nyeusi za galaksia na dutu nyeusi za Kilimia.

input.mt: Matokeo ya timu ambayo alikuwa anataka itakuwa kutokana na nguvu za kuongezeka kati ya mafuta ya dhahabu ya galaksi na mafuta ya dhahabu ya njia ya milki.
input.src: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.

reference: Nadharia hii inasema kuwa dutu nyingi yenye giza inayozingira galaksi iko karibu na galaksi kwa aina ya mwangaza, na inatengenezwa kwa chembechembe nyingi ndogo.

input.mt: Sheria hii inasema kwamba mafuta ya dhahabu karibu na galaksi ni karibu na galaksi katika aina ya halo, na ni iliyoundwa na viungo vingi vya kidogo.
input.src: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.

reference: Ripoti kwenye televisheni zinaonyesha moshi mweupe unaotoka kwenye mmea huo.

input.mt: Ripoti za televisheni zinaonyesha sigara ya kijani kilichotokea kutoka kwa kilimo.
input.src: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.

reference: Katika mahojiano, alisema aina mpya ilikuwa "ya kusumbua sana na ya kutisha kwa sababu ya kiwango cha juu cha kufariki."

input.mt: Katika mahojiano, alisema tofauti mpya ilikuwa "kila wasiwasi na wasiwasi kwa sababu ya kiwango cha juu cha mauti."
input.src: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."

reference: Huenda baadhi ya wagonjwa waliambukizwa mdudu huyo hospitalini, kama anavyofikiria Dkt. Moll, na angalau wawili walikuwa wafanyakazi hospitalini.

input.mt: Baadhi ya wagonjwa wanaweza kuwa wamekamatwa na hatari katika hospitali, Dr. Moll anajua, na angalau wawili walikuwa wafanyakazi wa afya hospitalini.
input.src: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.

reference: Katika mwaka mmoja, mtu aliyeambukizwa huenda akaambukiza wato 10-15 wa karibu.

input.mt: Katika kipindi cha mwaka mmoja, mtu infected anaweza kuvutia 10 hadi 15 mawasiliano ya karibu.
input.src: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.

reference: Hata hivyo, asilimia ya XDR-TB katika kikundi kizima cha watu wenye kifua kikuu bado inaonekana kuwa chini, watu 6,000 kati ya 330,000 walioambukizwa kwa wakati wowote maalumu katika Afrika Kusini.

input.mt: Hata hivyo, asilimia ya XDR-TB katika kundi lolote la watu wenye tuberculosis bado inaonekana kuwa chini; 6,000 kutoka kwa jumla ya watu 330,000 wamejitokeza wakati wowote katika Afrika Kusini.
input.src: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.

reference: Setilaiti, ambazo zote mbili zilikuwa na uzani wa zaidi ya pauni 1,000, na kusafiri kwa takribani maili 17,500 kwa saa, ziligongana maili 491 juu ya Dunia.

input.mt: Satellite hizo, ambavyo wawili walikuwa na uzito wa zaidi ya kilo 1,000, na kusafiri kwa umbali wa kilomita 17,500 kwa saa, ziliathiri kilomita 491 juu ya ardhi.
input.src: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.

reference: Wanasayansi wanasema mlipuko uliosababishwa na mgongano huo ulikuwa mkubwa.

input.mt: Wanasayansi wanasema maambukizi yaliyoathiriwa na mashambulizi hayo yalikuwa makubwa.
input.src: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.

reference: Matokeo ya uchambuzi wa uchoraji yatatumwa kwenye tovuti ya umma.

input.mt: Matokeo ya uchambuzi utakuwa kuwasilishwa kwenye tovuti ya umma.
input.src: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.

reference: Dk. Malar Balasubramanian, mwenye umri wa miaka 29, alipatikana katika Blue Ash, Ohio, kitongoji kilichoko takriban maili 15 kaskazini mwa Cincinnati akiwa amelala chini kando ya barabara akiwa amevalia tishati na nguo za ndani katika hali iliyoonekana kuwa ya matumizi ya dawa nyingi.

input.mt: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, alichukuliwa katika Blue Ash, Ohio, mji mkuu wa karibu wa kilomita 15 kaskazini ya Cincinnati, yaliyopatikana juu ya ardhi pamoja na barabara, katika T-shirt na mavazi ya chini katika hali ya kuonekana sana ya matibabu.
input.src: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.

reference: Hapo, walipata mwili wa Saroja Balasubramanian, aliyekuwa na umri wa miaka 53, umefunikwa kwa blanketi zilizokuwa na madoa ya damu.

input.mt: Hapa, walipata mwili wa Saroja Balasubramanian, wa miaka 53, iliyopatikana na mti wa damu.
input.src: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.

reference: Polisi walisema kwamba ilionekana kama mwili huo ulikuwa hapo kwa takriban siku moja.

input.mt: Polisi wamesema kuwa mwili ulikuwa ndani ya siku moja.
input.src: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.

reference: Kesi za kwanza za ugonjwa huo msimu huu ziliripotiwa mwishoni mwa Julai.

input.mt: Mchakato wa kwanza wa ugonjwa huu ulifichuliwa mwishoni mwa Julai.
input.src: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.

reference: Mkurupuko huo umechochea serikali ya India kuchukua hatua kama kuwatuma wawinda nguruwe katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa sana, na kusambaza maelfu ya mapazia ya mbu na kunyunyiza dawa za kuua wadudu.

input.mt: Uharibifu huo umesababisha serikali ya India kutimiza hatua kama vile kupanua wanyama katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa sana, kupanua maelfu ya rangi ya nyama na kupanua pesticides.
input.src: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.

reference: Vichupa milioni kadhaa vya chanjo ya uvimbe wa ubongo vimeahidiwa na serikali, ambavyo vitasaidia kuandaa mawakala wa afya kwa mwaka ujao.

input.mt: Maelfu ya viala vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho vya virutubisho.
input.src: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.

reference: Mipango ya kufikisha chanjo mwaka huu katika maeneo yanayojulikana kihistoria kuathirika sana ilicheleweshwa kwa sababu ya ukosefu wa fedha na kipaumbele cha chini ikilinganishwa na magonjwa mengine.

input.mt: Utaratibu wa vaksini kuwasilishwa katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa zaidi mwaka huu ulipangwa kwa sababu ya ukosefu wa fedha na priority kidogo dhidi ya magonjwa mengine.
input.src: Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.

reference: Mnamo 1956 Slania alihamia Uswidi, ambako miaka mitatu baadaye alianza kazi katika Ofisi ya Posta ya Uswidi na akawa mchoraji wao mkuu.

input.mt: Mwaka 1956, Słania alikwenda Sweden, ambapo miaka mitatu baadaye alianza kufanya kazi kwa Ofisi ya Post ya Sweden na kuwa mwakilishi wao mkuu.
input.src: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.

reference: Kazi yake ni ya ubora na undani wa kutambulika sana hadi yeye ni mmoja wa wachache katika “majina ya kinyumbani” kati ya wanastempu. Watu wengine hushughulika na kuikusanya kazi yake pekee.

input.mt: Kazi yake ni ya ubora na maelezo ya kutambuliwa kwamba yeye ni moja ya baadhi ya "jina la nyumbani" kati ya filatelists.
input.src: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.

reference: Stempu yake ya 1,000 ilikuwa “Great Deeds by Swedish Kings” nzuri sana na David Klocker Ehrenstrahl mwaka wa 2000, ambayo imetajwa katika Guinness Book of World Records..

input.mt: Msimbo wake wa 1,000 ulikuwa "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" ya David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl mwaka 2000, ambayo inajulikana katika Kitabu cha Guinness cha Rekodi za Dunia.
input.src: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.

reference: Baada ya ajali kutokea, Gibson alisafirishwa hospitalini lakini alifariki muda mfupi baadaye.

input.mt: Baada ya ajali ilitokea, Gibson alichaguliwa hospitalini lakini alikufa baada ya muda mfupi.
input.src: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.

reference: Dereva wa lori, aliye na umri wa miaka 64, hakujeruhiwa katika ajali.

input.mt: Mwandishi wa gari, mwenye umri wa miaka 64, hakuwa na majeruhi katika ajali hiyo.
input.src: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.

reference: Mtu aliyekuwa akifanya kazi karibu na gereji iliyo karibu na eneo la ajali hiyo alisema: "Kulikuwa na watoto waliokuwa wakisubiri kuvuka barabara na wote walikuwa wakipiga mayowe na kulia."

input.mt: Mtu anafanya kazi katika gari karibu na mahali ambapo ajali ilitokea alisema: "Kwa watoto walikuwa wanatarajia kupita barabara na wote walikuwa wito na kuogelea."
input.src: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."

reference: Masomo mengine kwenye agenda kule Bali yanahusu kunusuru misitu ya dunia iliyobaki, na kuzisambaza teknolojia za kusaidia nchi zinazoendelea kukua kwa njia zisizo na uchafuzi mkubwa.

input.mt: Sehemu nyingine kwenye agenda ya Bali ni kuokoa misitu ya ulimwengu, na kushiriki teknolojia ili kusaidia mataifa ya maendeleo kuongezeka kwa njia mbaya.
input.src: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.

reference: Umoja wa Mataifa pia una matumaini ya kumaliza ufadhili wa kusaidia mataifa yaliyoathirika kutokana na ongezeko la joto duniani ili kuweza kupambana na athari.

input.mt: Umoja wa Mataifa pia unatarajia kuendeleza fedha ili kusaidia nchi zilizoathirika na hali ya hewa ya dunia kupambana na madhara.
input.src: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.

reference: Pesa zingeenda kwa nyumba ambazo ni sugu-kwa-mafurikowa, usimamizi bora wa maji, na mseto wa mazao.

input.mt: Fedha inaweza kuelekea majengo yanayotokana na mafuriko, usimamizi bora wa maji, na usambazaji wa mimea.
input.src: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.

reference: Wakati mapigano yalipokoma na majeruhi kupelekwa hospitalini, takriban 40 wa wafungwa waliobaki walikaa kwenye yadi na kukataa kurudi kwenye seli zao.

input.mt: Wakati mapigano yalikuja baada ya majeruhi kuhamishwa hospitalini, karibu 40 wafungwa wengine waliokuwa katika mahali na walikataa kurudi kwenye seli zao.
input.src: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.

reference: Wapatanishi walijaribu kurekebisha hali, lakini mahitaji ya wafungwa si dhahiri.

input.mt: Wafanyabiashara walijaribu kurekebisha hali, lakini mahitaji ya wafungwa si wazi.
input.src: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.

reference: Kati ya saa 4 na 5 usiku MDT, moto uliwashwa kwenye yadi na wafungwa.
