input.mt: Baada ya sala kwa Mwenyezi Mungu kazi inaanza mara moja yapata saa 4:30 hivi, ushirikiano ni wa kiwango cha juu ndani ya chumba hiki, Lilian amechomwa sindano ya kuzuia maumivu eneo ambalo madaktari wanalitumia kufanya upasuaji huo.
input.src: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.

reference: Baada ya bwawa kujengwa mwaka wa 1963, mafuriko ya msimu ambayo yangeenea kote yalisimamishwa.

input.mt: Baada ya barabara hiyo ilitengenezwa mwaka 1963, mafuriko ya msimu ambayo itakuwa kuenea sediment katika mto yamekamatwa.
input.src: After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.

reference: Mashapo yalikuwa muhimu kwa kuunda mafungu ya mchanga na pwani, ambazo zilitumika kama makao ya wanyamapori.

input.mt: Hii sediment ilikuwa muhimu kwa ajili ya kuunda sandbars na masoko, ambayo ilitumika kama mahali pa ya hewa.
input.src: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.

reference: Kama matokeo, spishi mbili za samaki zimetoweka, na nyingine mbili zimekuwa katika hatari, zikiwemo humpback chub.

input.mt: Kwa matokeo, aina mbili za samaki zilifungwa, na mawili nyingine zilifungwa hatari, ikiwa ni pamoja na humpback chub.
input.src: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.

reference: Ingawa kiwango cha maji kitaongezeka kwa futi chache tu baada ya mafuriko, maafisa wanatumai kwamba kitatosha kurejesha mafungu ya mchanga yaliyomomonyolewa katika sehemu ya chini ya mto.

input.mt: Ingawa kiwango cha maji itaongezeka tu baada ya miguu kadhaa baada ya mafuriko, maafisa wanatarajia itakuwa na kutosha kurejesha sandbar zilizoondolewa.
input.src: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.

reference: Hakuna ilani ya tsunami iliyotolewa, na kulingana na uwakala wa jeofizikia wa Jakarta, hakuna ilani ya tsunami itakayotolewa kwani mtetemeko haukufikia ukubwa unaohitajika wa 6.5.

input.mt: Hakuna alama ya tsunami ilitolewa, na kulingana na shirika la geophysics la Jakarta, hakuna alama ya tsunami ilitolewa kwa sababu moto huo haikufanya mahitaji ya magharibi ya 6.5.
input.src: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.

reference: Licha ya kutokuwa na tishio la tsunami, wakazi walianza kuwa na hofu na wakaanza kuacha biashara na nyumba zao.

input.mt: Ingawa hakuna hatari ya tsunami, wakazi walianza kuanguka na kuanza kuondoka kwa biashara na nyumba zao.
input.src: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.

reference: Ingawa Winfrey alitokwa na machozi wakati wa kuagana kwake, aliwaambia mashabiki wake dhahiri kwamba angerudi tena.

input.mt: Ingawa Winfrey alikuwa na macho katika kukubaliana, alifanya wazi kwa wateja wake kwamba itakuwa na kurudi.
input.src: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.

reference: Matokeo ya mwisho ya uchaguzi wa rais na wabunge wa Namibia yameonyesha kwamba rais aliye mamlakani, Hifikepunye Pohamba, amechaguliwa tena kwa kiasi kikubwa.

input.mt: Matokeo ya mwisho ya uchaguzi wa rais na bunge wa Namibia imeonyesha kuwa rais wa mwisho, Hifikepunye Pohamba, imechaguliwa tena kwa kiasi kikubwa.
input.src: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.

reference: Chama Tawala, Jumuiya ya Watu wa Kusini Magharibi mwa Afrika (SWAPO), pia kilihifadhi viti vingi katika chaguzi za bunge.

input.mt: Kiongozi wa chama hicho, shirika la watu la Afrika Kusini la Magharibi (SWAPO), pia alishinda wengi katika uchaguzi wa Bunge.
input.src: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.

reference: Msaada wa matibabu Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres na Shirika la Afya Duniani wanasema ni mlipuko mbaya zaidi uliorekodiwa nchini.

input.mt: Shirika la afya la Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres na Shirika la Afya Duniani linasema hili ni uharibifu mkubwa uliofanywa nchini humo.
input.src: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.

reference: Msemaji wa Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman alisema: “Angola inaelekea kwenye mkurupuko mbaya zaidi daima na hali inabaki kuwa mbaya sana katika Angola,” alisema.

input.mt: Msemaji wa Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman alisema: "Angola inaongoza kwa uharibifu wake wa ajabu na hali bado ni mbaya sana katika Angola," alisema.
input.src: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.

reference: Michezo hiyo ilianza saa 10 asubuhi na hali nzuri ya hewa na ingawaje kulikuwa na manyunyu ya katikati ya asubuhi ambayo yaliisha haraka, ilikuwa siku nzuri kwa raga ya watu 7.

input.mt: Mchezo ulianza saa 10 asubuhi na hali ya hewa nzuri na kulingana na drizzle ya kesho ya asubuhi ambayo imekamilika haraka, ilikuwa siku nzuri kwa rugby ya 7.
input.src: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.

reference: Ulikuwa umeratibiwa kukatwa mnamo Jumanne, lakini uliokolewa na uamuzi wa dharura wa korti.

input.mt: Utaratibu huo ulifanyika siku ya Jumamosi, lakini ulikamatwa baada ya hukumu ya mahakama ya dharura.
input.src: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.

reference: Milango yote ya pango, iliyopewa jina "Dada Saba", ina kipenyo cha angalau mita 100 hadi 250 (futi 328 hadi 820).

input.mt: Kila mstari wa kilimo, ambayo ilitajulikana kama "Mwanzo saba", ni angalau 100 hadi 250 m (328 hadi 820 ft) kwa diameter.
input.src: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.

reference: Picha za miale isiyoonekana zinaonyesha kwamba utofauti wa joto kati ya usiku na mchana unaonyesha kwamba huenda ni mapango.

input.mt: Maonyesho ya infrared yanaonyesha kwamba mabadiliko ya joto kutoka usiku na siku yanaonyesha kwamba ni uwezekano wa makaburi.
input.src: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.

reference: "Ni baridi kuliko maeneo ya karibu katika mchana na ni ya joto zaidi katika usiku.

input.mt: "Hii ni baridi kuliko eneo la kusini kwa siku na baridi kwa usiku.
input.src: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.

reference: Tabia yazo ya kijoto si thabiti kama mapango makubwa katika Dunia ambayo mara nyingi hudumisha halijoto sawa kwa kadiri fulani, lakini inapatana nazo kuwa mashimo marefu ardhini," alisema Glen Cushing wa Timu ya Falakiolojia ya Utafiti wa Jiolojia wa Marekani (USGS) na wa Chuo Kikuu cha Arizona Kaskazini kilichoko Flagstaff, Arizona.

input.mt: Maandiko yao ya joto si ya kawaida kama makazi makubwa ya ardhi ambayo mara nyingi huhifadhi joto ya kawaida, lakini ni ya kawaida na hizi ni makazi ya dhahabu katika ardhi," alisema Glen Cushing wa timu ya astrogeology ya Marekani Geological Survey (USGS) na ya Chuo Kikuu cha Northern Arizona katika Flagstaff, Arizona.
input.src: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.

reference: Baada ya maafisa kuthibitisha utambulisho wa mpigaji kura, mpigaji kura hutumbukiza bahasha kwenye sanduku la kura na kusaini orodha ya kupiga kura.

input.mt: Baada ya maafisa kuangalia utambulisho wa wapiganaji, wapiganaji huondoa kifungo kwenye kifungo cha kura na kuandika kikao cha kura.
input.src: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.

reference: Sheria ya uchaguzi ya Ufaransa badala yake hupanga kesi hiyo kwenye msimbo. Madhubuti.

input.mt: Sheria ya Uchaguzi ya Ufaransa inajumuisha mashtaka.
input.src: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.

reference: Tangu 1988, ni lazima masanduku ya kura yawe maangavu ili wapigaji kura na wachunguzi waweze kushuhudia kwamba hakuna bahasha zinazoongezwa isipokuwa zile za wapigaji kura waliohesabiwa na kuidhinishwa.

input.mt: Tangu 1988, mikopo ya kura inapaswa kuwa wazi ili wapiga kura na wafuasi wanaweza kuona kwamba hakuna mikopo yaliyotokea mwanzoni mwa kura na kwamba hakuna mikopo yaliyotolewa isipokuwa wale ya wapiga kura wenye idhini na wenye mamlaka.
input.src: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.

reference: Wagombeaji wanaweza kutuma wawakilishi kushuhudia kila sehemu ya mchakato. Jioni, kura huhesabiwa na watu waliojitolea chini ya usimamizi mkubwa, kwa kufuata utaratibu maalum.

input.mt: Wagombea wanaweza kutuma wawakilishi kuwasilisha kila sehemu ya mchakato. Siku ya usiku, kura hutolewa na wapiganaji chini ya ufuatiliaji mkubwa, kulingana na mchakato maalum.
input.src: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.

reference: Tarakilishi ya ASUS Eee, iliyozinduliwa mapema dunia nzima kwa sababu za uokoaji fedha na utendaji, ikawa mada moto mnamo 2007 Mwezi wa Teknolojia na Mawasiliano wa Taipei.

input.mt: ASUS Eee PC, hapo awali ilitolewa duniani kote kwa gharama-kuokoa na faida, imekuwa mada ya moto katika mwezi wa 2007 Taipei IT.
input.src: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.

reference: Lakini soko la watumiaji wa kompyuta ndogo litatofautiana na kubadilika sana baada ya ASUS kuzawadiwa tuzo la 2007 la Tuzo Endelevu la Taiwan na Mtendaji Yuan wa Jamhuri ya China.

input.mt: Lakini soko la watumiaji kwenye kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta za kompyuta.
input.src: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.

reference: Wavuti wa kituo hicho unaelezea onyesho hilo kama "Thieta ya zamani ya redio yenye mzunguko mpya wa kukera na wa kichizi!"

input.mt: Tovuti ya kituo kinaelezea show kama "Radio ya zamani ya shule na spin mpya na ya kuvutia ya geeky!"
input.src: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"

reference: Inasemekana uporaji ulioenea uliendelea usiku kucha, kwani maafisa wa utekelezaji wa sheria hawakuwako katika mitaa ya Bishkek.

input.mt: Utaratibu wa kuongezeka kwa ujumla unaendelea kwa usiku, kwa sababu maafisa wa kisheria hawakuja kwenye mita za Bishkek.
input.src: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.

reference: Bishkek ilielezewa kama iliyozama katika hali ya "mchafuko" na mtazamaji mmoja, huku magenge ya watu wakirandaranda mitaani na kupora maduka ya bidhaa za watumiaji.

input.mt: Bishkek ilijulikana kama kuanguka katika hali ya "anarchy" kwa mtazamo mmoja, wakati kundi la watu waliondoka mita na kupigana maduka ya bidhaa za mtumiaji.
input.src: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.

reference: Afrika Kusini wamewashinda All Blacks (Nyuzilandi) katika mechi ya muungano wa raga ya Mataifa Matatu katika Uwanja wa Royal Bafokeng katika Rustenburg, Afrika Kusini.

input.mt: Afrika Kusini imeshindwa na All Blacks (New Zealand) katika mechi ya tri-nations ya rugby katika Stadiumi ya Royal Bafokeng huko Rustenburg, Afrika Kusini.
input.src: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.

reference: Alama ya mwisho ilikuwa ushindi wa nukta moja, 21 hadi 20, na kumaliza mfuo wa ushindi wa michezo wa Weusi Wote.

input.mt: Mchezo wa mwisho ulikuwa ushindi wa moja, 21 hadi 20, kuakhiri mashindano ya 15 ya All Blacks.
input.src: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.

reference: Ilikuwa mechi ya mwisho kwa All Blacks, ambao tayari walikuwa wameshinda kombe wiki mbili zilizopita.

input.mt: Ilikuwa mechi ya mwisho kwa All Blacks, ambaye tayari alishinda trophy wiki mbili iliyopita.
input.src: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.

reference: Mechi ya mwisho ya msururu itafanyika katika Ellis Park mjini Johannesburg wiki ijayo, wakati Springboks watakapocheza dhidi ya Australia.

input.mt: Mchezo wa mwisho wa mfululizo utafanyika katika Ellis Park huko Johannesburg wiki ijayo, wakati Springboks kucheza Australia.
input.src: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.

reference: Mtetemeko wastani wa ardhi ulitikisa Montana magharibi saa 4 na dakika 8 usiku wa Jumatatu.

input.mt: Mwisho wa joto lililotokea katika eneo la Montana magharibi saa 10:8 usiku wa Jumatatu.
input.src: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.

reference: Kitovu cha mtetemeko huo kilikuwa takriban kilomita 20 (maili 15) kaskazini mwa kaskazini mashariki mwa Dillon, na takriban kilomita 65 (maili 40) kusini mwa Butte.

input.mt: Mkataba huo ulifanyika karibu kilomita 20 (15 mil) kaskazini-north-east ya Dillon, na kilomita 65 (40 mil) kaskazini ya Butte.
input.src: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.

reference: Aina ya homa ya ndege iliyo hatari kwa binadamu, H5N1, imethibitishwa kuambukiza bata mwitu aliyekufa, aliyepatikana Jumatatu, katika kinamasi karibu na Lyon mashariki mwa Ufaransa.

input.mt: Ugonjwa wa ugonjwa wa ugonjwa wa ugonjwa wa ndege, H5N1, ulifikishwa kuwa amefungwa na mti wa kufa, iliyopatikana Jumatatu, katika marshmalland karibu na Lyon katika mashariki ya Ufaransa.
input.src: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.

reference: Ufaransa ni nchi ya saba katika Jumuiya ya Ulaya kukabiliwa na virusi hivi; kufuatia Austria, Ujerumani, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Ugiriki na Italia.

input.mt: Ufaransa ni nchi ya saba katika Umoja wa Ulaya ambayo ina ugonjwa huu; baada ya Austria, Ujerumani, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece na Italia.
input.src: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.

reference: Matukio yanayoshukiwa ya H5N1 katika Kroatia na Denmaki hayajathibitishwa.

input.mt: Mashahidi wa H5N1 nchini Croatia na Denmark bado haikubaliki.
input.src: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.

reference: Ghambers alikuwa amemshtaki Mungu kwa "vifo, uharibifu na ugaidi uilioenea, wa mamilioni ya mamilioni ya wakaazi wa Dunia."

input.mt: Chambers walikuwa wakitaka Mungu kwa "kufa, uharibifu na uharibifu wa mamilioni ya wahamiaji wa dunia."
input.src: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."

reference: Hadithi iliyotolewa kwenye mchezo wa kifaransa wa kuigiza wa opera na Camille Saint-Saens ni wa msanii “ambaye maisha yake yanaamuriwa na upendo wa madawa na Japani.

input.mt: Hadithi iliyotolewa katika opera ya Ufaransa, na Camille Saint-Saens, ni ya mtaalamu "kiwa maisha yake ni kutafsiriwa na upendo kwa madawa na Japan."
input.src: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."

reference: Spika wa awali Newt Gingrich, gavana wa Texas Rick Perry na Mbunge Michelle Bachmann walimaliza katika nafasi za nne, tano, na sita mtawalia.

input.mt: Rais wa zamani wa House Newt Gingrich, gubernator wa Texas Rick Perry, na kongreswoman Michele Bachmann wamekamilika katika nafasi ya nne, ya tano, na ya sita, kulingana.
input.src: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.

reference: Baada ya matokeo kuingia, Gingrich alimpongeza Santorum, lakini alikuwa na maneno makali kwa Romney, ambaye matangazo hasi ya kampeni yalipeperushwa kwa niaba yake dhidi ya Gingrich.

input.mt: Baada ya matokeo yaliyotokea, Gingrich alijibu Santorum, lakini alikuwa na maneno ngumu kwa Romney, kwa niaba yake matangazo ya kampeni yanayotolewa katika Iowa dhidi ya Gingrich.
input.src: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.

reference: Perry alisema, "Nitarudi Texas ili kutathmini matokeo ya mkutano wa usiku wa leo, kuamua kama kuna njia yangu ya kusonga mbele katika mbio hizi", lakini baadaye akasema kwamba angebaki kwenye mbio na kushindana katika uchaguzi wa msingi wa Carolina Kusini mnamo Januari 21.

input.mt: Perry alisema kwamba atakuwa "kurejea Texas kwa kuchunguza matokeo ya cacus leo usiku, kuamua kama kuna njia ya mbele kwa mimi katika mashindano haya", lakini baadaye alisema kwamba atakuwa katika mashindano na kucheza katika Januari 21 South Carolina primary.
input.src: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.

reference: Bachmann, aliyeshinda Kura ya maoni ya Ames Straw mnamo Agosti, aliamua kukomesha kampeni yake.

input.mt: Bachmann, ambaye alishinda Ames Straw Poll mnamo Agosti, aliamua kumaliza kampeni yake.
input.src: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.

reference: Mpigaji picha alichukuliwa hadi Kituo cha Matibabu cha Ronald Reagan, ambako baadaye alifariki.

input.mt: Msichana huyo alikamatwa kwenye kituo cha matibabu cha Ronald Reagan UCLA, ambapo baadaye alikufa.
input.src: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.

reference: Aliripotiwa kuwa katika miaka yake ya 20. Katika taarifa, Bierber alisema “Ingawa sikuwako au kuhusika na ajali hii mbaya moja kwa moja, mawazo na maombi yangu yako kwa familia ya muathiriwa.”

input.mt: Katika taarifa yake, Bieber alisema, "Kwa sababu mimi si hapa wala moja kwa moja kuhusiana na ajali hii ya ajali, mawazo yangu na maombi ni pamoja na familia ya victim."
input.src: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."

reference: Tovuti ya habari za burudani TMZ inaelewa mpiga picha alisimamisha gari katika upande mwingine wa Sepulveda Boulevard na akajaribu kupiga picha za kizuizi cha polisi kabla ya kuvuka barabara na kuendelea, akamfanya afisa wa polisi wa California Highway Patrol aliyekuwa akiendesha kizuizi kumwamrisha kurudi katika upande mwingine, mara mbili.

input.mt: Tovuti ya habari ya kuvutia TMZ inaelewa kwamba msichana alishindwa na gari yake upande mwingine wa Sepulveda Boulevard na alijaribu kuchukua picha ya kituo cha polisi kabla ya kupita barabara na kuendelea, kujaribu polisi wa California Highway Patrol kuendesha kituo cha trafiki ili kurejea, mara mbili.
input.src: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.

reference: Kwa mujibu wa polisi, dereva wa gari lililomgonga mpigaji picha huenda akakabiliwa na mashtaka ya jinai.

input.mt: Kwa mujibu wa polisi, mwendeshaji wa gari ambaye amepiga picha ni hatari ya kukabiliana na mashtaka ya kikatili.
input.src: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.

reference: Ni pamoja na Uholanzi, huku Anna Jochemsen akimaliza wa tisa katika kitengo cha kusimama cha wanawake kwenye Super-G jana, na Ufini huku Katja Saarinen akimaliza wa kumi katika tukio hilo hilo.

input.mt: Wao ni pamoja na Uholanzi, na Anna Jochemsen inachukua nafasi ya tano katika mstari wa wanawake katika Super-G jana, na Finland na Katja Saarinen inachukua nafasi ya tano katika tukio hilo.
input.src: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.

reference: Mitchell Gourley wa Australia alimaliza wa kumi na mmoja katika kitengo cha kusimama cha wanaume cha Super-G. Mshindani wa Cheki Oldrich Jelinek alimaliza wa kumi na sita katika kitengo cha kuketi cha wanaume cha Super-G.

input.mt: Mitchell Gourley wa Australia alishinda nafasi ya kumi na tano katika Super-G ya wanaume. mshindi wa Czech Oldrich Jelinek alishinda nafasi ya tano katika Super-G ya wanaume.
input.src: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.

reference: Arly Velasquez wa Meksiko alimaliza kwa nafasi ya kumi na tano katika seti ya Super-G ya wanaume. Ukumbi wa Adam wa Zilandi Mpya lilimaliza wa tisa katika msimamo wa Super-G wa wanaume.

input.mt: Arly Velasquez wa Mexico alishinda nafasi ya tano katika Super-G ya wanaume, na Adam Hall ya New Zealand alishinda nafasi ya tano katika Super-G ya wanaume.
input.src: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.

reference: Kulingana na shtaka hilo, uchafu kutoka kwenye kambi ya Umoja wa Mataifa haukutakaswa vizuri, hivyo kusababisha bakteria kuingia kwenye tawi la Mto Artibonite, mojawapo ya mito mikubwa sana ya Haiti.

input.mt: Kwa mujibu wa mashtaka, mbegu kutoka kampi ya Umoja wa Mataifa hazijulikani vizuri, kwa sababu ya bakteria kuingia katika kisiwa cha Artibonite, moja ya kubwa ya Haiti.
input.src: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.

reference: Taasisi ya Haki na Demokrasia ya Haiti imerejelea utafiti huru ambao unapendekeza kwamba kikosi cha kulinda amani cha Kinepali cha Umoja wa Mataifa kilileta ugonjwa huo Haiti bila kujua.

input.mt: Taasisi ya Haki na Demokrasia ya Haiti imeshuhudia utafiti wa kujitegemea ambayo inaonyesha kuwa kikosi cha amani cha Umoja wa Mataifa cha Nepal kilikuwa kilichofanya ugonjwa huo Haiti bila kujua.
input.src: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.

reference: Kisha ripoti za baadaye zilisema ndege ilipokea tishio la bomu na ikaelekezwa tena Afganistani, na kutua Kandahar.

input.mt: Ripoti za baadaye zinasema ndege hiyo ilipokea hatari ya bomu na ilipelekwa kurudi Afghanistan, kuondoka katika Kandahar.
input.src: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.

reference: Ripoti za mapema zinasema ndege ilielekezwa tena Afganistani baada ya kunyimwa ruhusa ya kutua katika Urumki.

input.mt: Ripoti za awali zinaonesha kuwa ndege hiyo ilirudishwa tena nchini Afghanistan baada ya kukataa kuondoka kwa haraka katika Ürümqi.
input.src: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.

reference: Ajali za hewani ni kawaida nchini Iran, ambayo ina ndege ambazo huhifadhiwa kihafifu kwa shughuli za kiraia na zile za kijeshi.

input.mt: Uharibifu wa hewa ni kawaida katika Iran, ambayo ina mstari unaoongezeka ambayo ni mbaya kwa ajili ya shughuli za kijeshi na za kijeshi.
input.src: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.

reference: Mapema wiki hii, helikopta ya polisi ilianguka na kuua watu watatu na kujeruhi wengine watatu.

input.mt: Zaidi ya wiki hii, mashambulizi ya helikopta ya polisi ilihamisha watu watatu na kujeruhi wengine watatu.
input.src: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.

reference: Aerosmith wameghairi maonyesho yaliyobaki katika ziara yao.

input.mt: Aerosmith imekataa kuondoka kwenye mfululizo wao.
input.src: Aerosmith have cancelled their remaining concerts on their tour.

reference: Murray alipoteza seti ya kwanza kwa kuvunjwa kwa usawa baada ya wanaume wote kushikilia kila lishe kwenye seti.

input.mt: Murray alishindwa kwenye mfululizo wa kwanza katika mfululizo wa mfululizo baada ya wanaume wawili wawili wawili wawili wawili wawili wawili wawili wawili.
input.src: Murray lost the first set in a tie break after both men held each and every serve in the set.

reference: Lakkha Singh aliwasilisha chhappan bhog bhajan vile vile. Mwimbaji, Raju Khandelwal aliandamana naye.

input.mt: Lakkha Singh aliwasilisha chhappan bhog bhajan pia. Msemaji, Raju Khandelwal alikuwa akihudhuria.
input.src: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.

reference: Ifananayo na rimoti ya runinga, kidhibiti hutumia sensa mbili zilizowekwa karibu na runinga ya mtumiaji ili kupata nafasi yake katika sehemu ya pande tatu.

input.mt: Kama televisheni ya mbali, mtendaji hutumia sensors mbili zilizoendeshwa karibu na televisheni ya mtumiaji ili kuongezeka kwa nafasi yake katika nafasi ya tatu.
input.src: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.

reference: Mwanatimu mwenzake Fernando Alonso alikuwa akiongoza kwa wingi wa mbio hizo, lakini aliumaliza mara tu baada ya kusimama kwa matengenezo, labda kwa sababu ya gurudumu la kulia la mbele kushonwa vibaya.

input.mt: Ndugu yake Fernando Alonso alikuwa katika uongozi kwa ajili ya mfululizo wengi, lakini alishindwa mara moja baada ya upungufu wake, labda kwa sababu ya kioo kioo kioo.
input.src: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.

reference: "Ni mrembo sana na huimba vizuri sana, pia", alisema kulingana na manukuu ya kongamano la habari.

input.mt: "Alikuwa mzuri sana na anazungumzia vizuri sana pia," alisema kwa mujibu wa ripoti ya mkutano wa habari.
input.src: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.

reference: "Niliguzwa kila wakati tulipofanya mazoezi ya hii, kutoka ndani ya moyo wangu."

input.mt: “Nilikuwa nikiruhusiwa kila wakati tulichokula juu ya hili, kutoka chini ya moyo wangu.”
input.src: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."

reference: Karibu dakika 3 katika uzinduzi, kamera ya ndani ya chombo ilionyesha vipande vingi vya sponji ya kizio vikiachana na tanki ya mafuta.

input.mt: Zaidi ya dakika 3 kabla ya kuondoka, kamera juu ya barabara ilionyesha vipande vingi vya fomu ya kuongezeka kutoka kwa tanki ya mafuta.
input.src: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.

reference: Dakika tano ndani ya onyesho upepo unaanza kuingia, takriban dakika moja baadaye, upepo unafikia kilomita 70 kwa saa…kisha mvua inakuja, lakini kwa nguvu na kubwa sana kiasi kwamba inapiga ngozi yako kama sindano, kisha mvua ya mawe ikaanguka toka angani, watu wakapata wasiwasi na kupiga mayowe na kukanyangana.

input.mt: Zaidi ya dakika tano ndani ya maonyesho, jua huanza kuanguka, dakika moja baadaye, jua hufikia kilomita 70 / h... kisha mvua inakuja, lakini kubwa sana na kubwa sana kwamba huanguka ngozi yako kama nyekundu, kisha nyekundu huanguka kutoka mbinguni, watu huanguka na kuanguka na kuendesha juu ya kila mmoja.
input.src: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.

reference: Baadhi ya barabara zimeharibiwa, huduma za reli kukatishwa katika maeneo yaliyoathirika, na uwanja wa ndege wa wilaya ya Ishikawa unabaki kufungwa.

input.mt: Baadhi ya barabara ziliathiriwa, huduma za barabara ziliathiriwa katika maeneo yaliyoathiriwa, na Uwanja wa Ndege wa Noto katika prefecture ya Ishikawa bado umekamilika.
input.src: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.

reference: Baadhi ya ripoti zilionyesha idadi rasmi ya vifo kuwa vinane, na ripoti rasmi zinathibitisha kulikuwa na majeruhi hadi 30; lakini idadi kamili bado hazijajulikana.

input.mt: Baadhi ya ripoti zinaonyesha idadi ya mauti rasmi kwa nusu, na ripoti rasmi zinaonyesha kuwa hadi 30 wamejeruhiwa; lakini idadi ya mwisho bado haijulikani.
input.src: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.

reference: Kampaundi hizo mbili humenyuka pamojakutengeneza fuwele ambazo zinaweza kuzuia kazi za figo, watafiti chuoni walisema.

input.mt: Mashambulizi hayo mawili yanakabiliana na kujenga nyekundu ambazo zinaweza kuzuia utendaji wa kidneys, wanasayansi wa chuo kikuu wanasema.
input.src: The two compounds react with one another to form crystals that may block kidney function, researchers at the university said.

reference: Watafiti waliona uwele zilizoundwa katika mkojo wa paka kwa kuongezewa melamine na asidi ya sianiuriki.

input.mt: Watafiti walimwona nyekundu iliyoundwa katika urine ya msichana kwa kuongeza melamin na asidi ya cyanuri.
input.src: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.

reference: Na bado asilimia themanini ya bidhaa zetu zilitozwa ushuru kupitia orodha za ushuru katika nchi za Marekani ya Kati.

input.mt: Hata hivyo, asilimia 80 ya bidhaa zetu zilitazimishwa kwa njia ya takwimu katika nchi za Amerika ya Kati.
input.src: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.

reference: Hilo halikuonekana kuwa na maana kwangu; hakika halikuwa la haki.

input.mt: Hii haikuonekana kuwa na maana kwangu; hakika haikuwa haki.
input.src: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.

reference: Wazungu wanne kwenye kundi la wanawake walishindwa kumaliza mbio zao, na 45 ya 117 walifeli na kushindwa kupata nafasi kwenye mbio hizo.

input.mt: Wataalam wanne katika kikundi cha kike cha wanawake hawakuwa na mafanikio ya kuishia mazoezi yao, na 45 kutoka kwa mazoezi ya jumla ya 117 katika Giant Slalom hawakuwa na nafasi katika mashindano.
input.src: Four skiers in the women's sitting group failed to finish their runs, and 45 of the 117 total skiers in the Giant Slalom failed to rank in the race.

reference: Mada nyingine zilizoshughulikiwa inaripotiwa zinatia ndani hali ya baadaye ya Yerusalemu ambayo ni takatifu kwa mataifa yote mawili na suala la Bonde la Yordani.

input.mt: Maswali mengine yanayohusiana ni pamoja na hali ya baadaye ya Yerusalemu ambayo ni sakramenti kwa nchi zote mbili na suala la Jordan Valley.
input.src: Other topics covered reportedly include the future state of Jerusalem which is sacred to both nations and the Jordan Valley issue.

reference: Maandamano hayo ambayo wakati mwingine huwa jeuri yalianzishwa na ukosefu wa kuwa na uchaguzi, ambapo mwingine ulichelewa tangu 2011.

input.mt: Maandamano hayo yalikuwa yanayotokana na mafanikio ya uchaguzi, baadhi ya hayo yalitokea tangu mwaka 2011.
input.src: The sometimes-violent protests were triggered by failure to hold elections, some due since 2011.

reference: Mateka kadhaa wamenusuriwa na angalau sita wamethibitishwa kufa kufikia sasa.

input.mt: Baadhi ya wafungwa wamekamatwa na angalau watatu wamekamatwa hadi sasa.
input.src: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.

reference: Xinhua aliripoti kwamba wachunguzi wa serikali walipata vifaa vya 'sanduku nyeusi' vya kurekodi matukio kwenye ndege siku ya Jumatano.

input.mt: Xinhua iliongeza kuwa watafiti wa serikali wamepata rekodi mbili za ndege za 'kashi la nyekundu' Jumatatu.
input.src: Xinhua reported that government investigators recovered two 'black box' flight recorders on Wednesday.

reference: Kuna uwezekano kwamba nyotamkia zilikuwa chanzo cha kusafirisha maji katika dunia, pamoja na vitu vilivyo na kaboni vinavyoweza kuunda protini na kusaidia uhai.

input.mt: Comets inaweza kuwa chanzo cha usafirishaji wa maji kwa ardhi pamoja na mafuta ya organic ambayo inaweza kujenga proteins na kusaidia maisha.
input.src: Comets may possibly have been a source of water delivery to the earth along with organic matter that can form proteins and support life.

reference: “Seesei yɛwɔ nkura bi a wɔadi asram 4 a na wɔnni asikyire yare nanso kane no na wɔwɔ asikyire yare,” ɔde kaa ho.

input.mt: Ɔde kaa ho sɛ: "Seesei yɛwɔ mmoadabi a wɔadi asram anan a wonni asikreyare a kan no na wɔwɔ asikreyare".
input.src: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.

reference: Dr. Ehud Ur, a ɔyɛ ɔbenfo wɔ aduyɛ mu wɔ Dalhousie Suapɔn mu wɔ Halifax, Nova Scotia na ɔyɛ guamtranani ɛma asoe a ɛhwɛ klenikaa ne nyansahu ɛwɔ Canada Asikyireyare Kuo no bɔ kɔkɔ sɛ nhwenhwɛmu no wɔ no da so ara wɔ ne nna edi nkan no mu.

input.mt: Dr. Ehud Ur, a ɔyɛ ayaresa ho ɔbenfo wɔ Dalhousie Sukuupɔn a ɛwɔ Halifax, Nova Scotia, ne Canada Asɔnnadi Kuw no ayaresa ne nyansahu ho ɔfã no kannifo no bɔɔ kɔkɔ sɛ nhwehwɛmu no da so ara wɔ ne nna a edi kan mu.
input.src: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.

reference: Te sɛ animdefo nkae no, ɔnhunu sɛ sɛ asikyireyare yɛ biribi a wɔtumi sa, hyɛ no nso sɛ saa adida yi mfa nnipa a wɔnya asikyire yare Kuo 1 no ho.

input.mt: Sɛnea abenfo binom yɛ no, onnye nni sɛ wobetumi ayi asikreyare afi mu anaa, na ɔkae sɛ nnipa a wɔadi asikreyare a wɔfrɛ wɔn Type 1 dedaw no, saa nhwehwɛmu yi mfa wɔn ho.
input.src: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.

reference: Dwoada, Sara Danius, a ɔyɛ daadaa ɔkyerɛwfo ɛwɔ Noble kuo ɛma Literekya ɛwɔ Swedish Akadɛmi, kaa no baguam wɔ Sveriges Radio dwumadi wɔ Sweden kuo mu so sɛ, ne nsa anka Bob Dylan tee de Noble abasobɔde a ne nsa kae wɔ afe 2016 wɔ Literekya no mu, na mmɔden a ɔrebɔ sɛ ne nsa bɛka no ɔde ato baabi.

input.mt: Wɔ Memeneda no, Sara Danius a ɔyɛ Nobel Adwumayɛbea Boayikuw no daa kyerɛwfo wɔ Swedish Academy no kae wɔ radio dwumadi bi ase wɔ Sveriges Radio wɔ Sweden sɛ, bere a wɔantumi ne Bob Dylan ne no anwɛn sɛ obenya 2016 Nobel Agyede Boayikuw no no, wɔagyae mmɔden a wɔrebɔ sɛ wɔbɛkɔ ne nkyɛn no.
input.src: On Monday, Sara Danius, permanent secretary of the Nobel Committee for Literature at the Swedish Academy, publicly announced during a radio program on Sveriges Radio in Sweden the committee, unable to reach Bob Dylan directly about winning the 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, had abandoned its efforts to reach him.

reference: Danius kaa sɛ, “ Seesei yɛnyɛɛ biribiara. Mafrɛ na mamane emeeli de ama obi a ɔne di dwuma bom na me nsa aka mmue a ɛkyerɛ ayɔnkofa na ɛyɛ anika. Seesei, ɛno ara ye.”

input.mt: Danius kae sɛ: "Ɛnnɛ de, yɛrenyɛ hwee. Mefrɛɛ ne yɔnko berɛbo a ɔbɛn no paa, na me nsa kaa mmuaeɛ a ɛyɛ fɛ paa. Seesei deɛ, ɛno ara dɔɔso".
input.src: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."

reference: Nkane no, Ring’s baanodani, Jamie Siminoff, kaa sɛ adwumakuo no fi ase no na pono no dɔn no ano nyɛ den ɛfi ne n’adwumayɛbea hɔ wɔ ne hyɛnkorabea no mu.

input.mt: Ansa na eyi reba no, Ring CEO, Jamie Siminoff, kae sɛ bere a ofii ase yɛɛ adwuma no, bere a na n'abantenten a ɛwɔ n'adwumayɛbea a ɛwɔ n'adwumayɛbea no mu no nte.
input.src: Previously, Ring's CEO, Jamie Siminoff, remarked the company started when his doorbell wasn't audible from his shop in his garage.

reference: Ɔkae sɛ, ɔyɛɛ WiFi pono dɔn,

input.mt: Ɔkae sɛ osii wifi abobow bi.
input.src: He built a WiFi door bell, he said.

reference: Siminoff kaa sɛ adetɔn no kɔɔ soro bere a ɔbaa Shark Tank dwumadie so 2013 no akyi bere a wɔn na wɔwɔ dwumadie no mu ampene so amfa sika anhyɛ mu amma wɔamfa amfiri ase no.

input.mt: Siminoff kae sɛ bere a odii dwuma wɔ Shark Tank ho dwumadi bi mu wɔ afe 2013 mu no, ɛboaa no paa.
input.src: Siminoff said sales boosted after his 2013 appearance in a Shark Tank episode where the show panel declined funding the startup.

reference: 2017 afe no awiee no, Siminoff kɔpuee adwadie kasamfonin QVC so.

input.mt: Wɔ afe 2017 awiei no, Siminoff yii ne ho adi wɔ QVC television so.
input.src: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.

reference: Ring siesiee mansotwe a na ɛda ɔne banbɔ adwumaku, ADT Corporation ntam no.

input.mt: Ring nso ne agyinatufo bi a wɔfrɛ no ADT Corporation dii asɛm.
input.src: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.

reference: Bere a aduru biako a wɔsɔ hwɛe daa no adi sɛ etumi de te Ebolo wuo so no, besi sesɛɛ no, aduru biara nni hɔ atumi ada no adi paa sɛ ɛma ɛfiri hɔ korakora.

input.mt: Ɛwom sɛ ɛte sɛ nea nnuru bi a wɔde ayɛ nhwehwɛmu betumi ama nnipa a wɔawuwu afi Ebola yare no ho atew de, nanso wohui sɛ nnuru biara nni hɔ a ɛfata sɛ wɔde sa yare a ɛwɔ hɔ no yare.
input.src: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.

reference: Aduru biako a ɛkotia kɔktee,ZMapp, mfiase no ɛmaa wɔnyaa anidaso, nanso nhwehwɛmu ada no adi sɛ ɛntumi nsi owuo ano.

input.mt: Mfiase no, antibody cocktail biako a wɔfrɛ no ZMapp no daa adi sɛ ebetumi aboa nnipa pii, nanso nhwehwɛmu a wɔyɛe no kyerɛe sɛ ɛso nni mfaso pii wɔ owu ho.
input.src: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.

reference: Wɔ PALM sɔhwɛ mu no, ZMapp tumi bɔ ban, kyerɛ sɛ abɔdemu nyansapɛfo de dii dwuma sɛ nnyinasode na wɔde ayaresa abiɛsa nkae no totoo ho.

input.mt: Wɔ PALM sɔhwɛ no mu no, ZMapp yɛɛ adwuma sɛ adansedi, a ɛkyerɛ sɛ nyansahufo de dii dwuma sɛ nnyinaso na wɔtoto nneɛma abiɛsa a aka no ho.
input.src: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.

reference: USA Gymnastics foa United States Olympic badwakuo no lɛtɛ no so na wɔgye tom sɛ ɛho hia sɛ Olympic abusua no hwɛ sɛ wɔn agodifo no nyinaa bɛnya beae papa banbɔ wɔ.

input.mt: USA Gymnastics gye United States Olympic Committee krataa no toom na wogye di sɛ Olympic abusua no hia koraa sɛ wɔhyɛ yɛn atletifo nyinaa ho ban wɔ ahobammɔ mu.
input.src: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.

reference: Yɛne USOC's asɛm a wɔkae no yɛ adwene sɛ ɛsɛ deɛ agodifo no ne akuo, wɔn sopɔɔto, no pɛ no wɔdi ho dwuma yiye denam kɔ a wɔbɛkɔ anim na nsesae ntease wom akɔ so wɔ yɛn kuo no mu, sene adodin krataa a wɔtwe sensɛn.

input.mt: Yegye asɛm a USOC ka no atom sɛ, sɛ yɛde nsakrae a ɛho hia ba yɛn ahyehyɛde no mu sen sɛ yɛde yɛn agokansie begyae agokansie no a, ebetumi aboa yɛn akwakoraa ne mmerewa ne yɛn akuw ne wɔn agokansie no yiye.
input.src: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.

reference: USA Gymnastics foa so sɛ nhwehwɛmuyɛfo a ɔgyina brane a ɔbɛma yɛahunu sɛnea ɔtitia ɔfa biara ɔnya so sɛnea wɔakyerem wɔ akokoɔduru so wɔ wɔn a wɔagyina Larry Nassa ano a na anka ɔbɛtumi afa ne ho adi a anka ɛnna adi bere tenten na wɔagye nsesae biara ɛho behia atom.

input.mt: USA Gymnastics gye nhwehwɛmu a ɛnyɛ adwuma a ebetumi ama yɛahu sɛnea Larry Nassar ho nnipa a wɔagyina hɔ no de akokoduru kyerɛkyerɛɛ mu no mu a, anka wɔrenhu no bere tenteenten yi, na ɛma nsakrae a ɛho hia ne nea ɛfata biara ba mu.
input.src: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.

reference: USA Gymnastics ne USOC no wɔ botae ko — na ama banbɔ aba agodi te sɛ gymnastics ne nkae no mu sɛnea ɛsɛ na ama agodifo atumi adi wɔn adaeso no akyi wɔ banbɔ kwan so,kwan ɛyɛ pa ne beae a biribiara kɔ kama.

input.mt: USA Gymnastics ne USOC wɔ botae koro no ara  sɛ wɔbɛma gymnastics ne nneɛma foforo a ɛtete saa ho nyɛ den sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a atleta betumi adi wɔn dae akyi wɔ ahobammɔ, anigye ne ahobammɔ mu.
input.src: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.

reference: Afe 1960 mu no nyinaa, Brzezinski yɛɛ adwuma maa John F. Kennnedy sɛ ne futufo ɛne afei Lyndon B. Johnson amanmmuo.

input.mt: Wɔ 1960 mfe no nyinaa mu no, Brzezinski yɛɛ adwuma maa John F. Kennedy sɛ n'afotufo ne afei Lyndon B. Johnson aban no.
input.src: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.

reference: Bere a wɔreyiyi nkorɔfo wɔ 1976 mu no ɔtuu Carter fo wɔ amannɔne nsɛm ho, na afei ɔbɛyɛɛ Ɔman mu no nyinaa Banbɔ Futufo (NSA) ɛfiri 1977 kɔsi 1981, na ɔbɛdii Henry Kissinger ade.

input.mt: Bere a wɔpaw no wɔ afe 1976 mu no, otuu Carter fo wɔ amannɔne ho, na akyiri yi ɔyɛɛ National Security Advisor (NSA) wɔ afe 1977 kosi 1981 mu, dii Henry Kissinger ananmu.
input.src: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.

reference: Sɛ NSA, ɔboaa Carter wɔ diplomatike nsɛm ho a ɛfa wiase mu nsɛm ho, te sɛ Camp David Accords, 1978; maa US–China nkitahodi kɔsii 1970’s mfe no awieei; Iranian Ɔman anibutu, a ɛkɔfaa Iran hɔteegyi bae, 1979; ɛne Soviet a wɔbɛpuee mu wɔ Afghanistan wɔ, 1979.

input.mt: Bere a ɔyɛ NSA no, ɔboaa Carter ma ɔhwɛɛ wiase nsɛm so, te sɛ Camp David Apam no, 1978; US China abusuabɔ a ɛkɔɔ so wɔ afe 1970 mfe no awiei; Iran Agyenkwa no, a ɛde Iran asraafodɔm ho nsɛmnsɛm bae, 1979; ne Soviet ko a ɛkɔɔ so wɔ Afghanistan, 1979.
input.src: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.

reference: Sini no a, a Ryan Gosling ne Emma Stone wom na wɔyɛɛ sɛ wɔbɛbɔ wɔn aba so afa atitire mu.

input.mt: Ná Ryan Gosling ne Emma Stone wɔ sini no mu, na wonyaa nkontaabu wɔ nneɛma atitiriw nyinaa mu.
input.src: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.

reference: Wɔbɔɔ Gosling ne Stone din sɛ agofomma a wɔbɔ wɔn ho mmɔden yiye.

input.mt: Gosling ne Stone nyaa nkontaabu wɔ agodibea pa ne agodibea pa mu.
input.src: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.

reference: Nkae a wɔbɔɔ wɔn din no bi yɛ Mfonin a ɛyɛ pa ara, Kwankyerɛfo, Sinimatografi, Afade yɛ, Sini-asiesie, Ɔregyenaa Sokɔɔ, Proahyen Design, Nnyegyeeɛ Asiesie, Sɛnea ɔde Nnyegyeeɛ no Frafra ne ɔregyinaa Sikireeplee.

input.mt: Nhoma foforo a wɔpaw wɔn no bi ne: Nea Ɛsen Biara, Ɔkyerɛkyerɛfo, Sinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing ne Original Screenplay.
input.src: The other nominations include Best Picture, Director, Cinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing and Original Screenplay.

reference: Nnwom abien a ɛwɔ sini no mu, Ɔdihyen ( Agyimifoɔ no a wɔso Daeɛ) ne Kuropɔn a Nsromma, na wɔbɔɔ wɔn din sɛ nnwom a ɛyɛ ɔregyinaa a ɛyɛ paa. Wɔbɔɔ Lionsgate studio no mprɛ 26— a ɛkyɛn studio nkae biara.

input.mt: Nnwom mmienu a ɛwɔ sini no mu, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) ne City of Stars, nyaa nnwom a wɔtoo din sɛ nnwom a edi kan. Lionsgate studio nyaa nnwom 26 a ɛboro studio foforo biara so.
input.src: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.

reference: Bere a na bere kɔ wɔ Kwasiada , United States manpanin Donal Trump, denam ɔtwerɛfo a ɔde nsɛm to dwa so no de too gua sɛ US asraafo rebɛfiri Syria.

input.mt: Kwasida anwummere no, United States Ɔmanpanyin Donald Trump, wɔ amanneɛbɔ bi a ɔde maa ne atesɛm nkrataa kyerɛwfo mu no, kaa sɛ US asraafo bɛfi Syria.
input.src: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.

reference: Saa nkaebɔ yi kɔɔ so bere a Trump ne Turkey manpanin Recep Tayyip Erdoğan ka saa wɔ foon so.

input.mt: Wɔbɔɔ amanneɛ bere a Trump ne Turkey Ɔmanpanyin Recep Tayyip Erdoğan bɔɔ nkɔmmɔ wɔ telefon so no.
input.src: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

reference: Turkey nso bɛhwɛ ISIS akofo a wɔakyere wɔn no so, nkaebɔ no de too gua, Europe aman ampene so sɛ wɔmmera wɔn nkyi.

input.mt: Turkey nso bɛhwɛ ISIS atuatewfo a wɔkyeree wɔn no so a, sɛnea amanneɛbɔ no kyerɛ no, Europa aman no apo sɛ wɔbɛsan akɔ wɔn kurom.
input.src: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.

reference: Wei nsi no pi nko ara sɛ anyɛ hwee koraa dinosaurs wɔ ntakra, biribi a atene, nanso ne nankɛse a ɛwɔ hɔ mma, te sɛ ahosuo ne afaafa-abiɛsa nhyehyɛe.

input.mt: Ɛnyɛ eyi nko na ɛma yehu sɛ na dinosauro bi wɔ ntaban, nkyerɛkyerɛ bi a agye ntini dedaw, na mmom ɛma yehu nneɛma pii a nsoromma mu nneɛma a ɛwɔ hɔ no rentumi nyɛ, te sɛ kɔla ne nsoromma abiɛsa a ɛwɔ hɔ no.
input.src: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.

reference: Abɔdemunyansapɛfo ka sɛ na saa mmoa yi ntakra ɛyɛ chestnut-brown wɔ soro a ɛyɛ hoyaa anaasɛ carotenoid-colored a ɛwɔ ase.

input.mt: Nyansahufo ka sɛ na aboa yi nhwiren no kɔkɔɔ kɔkɔɔ wɔ atifi fam, na na ne fã a ɛwɔ fam no nhwiren anaa karotenoid.
input.src: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.

reference: Adida wei nso ma yɛhunu kwan a nnomaa ntakra bae.

input.mt: Nhwehwɛmu a wɔyɛe no ma yehu sɛnea nnomaa nam nnomaa so bae.
input.src: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.

reference: Esiane sɛ dinosaur ntakra nni shaft a anyini awie, a yɛfrɛ no rachis, nanso enni ntakra nnoɔma nkae — barbɔ ne barbules — nhwehwɛmufo kaa sɛ rachis no baa akyire yi wɔ nnoɔma nkae no ho.

input.mt: Esiane sɛ dinosauro ntaban no nni ɔfasu a wɔasiesie no yiye a wɔfrɛ no rachis nti, nhwehwɛmufo no kae sɛ ebia rachis no yɛ ade foforo a ɛkɔɔ so wɔ adannandi mu.
input.src: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.

reference: Sɛnea ntakra no si teɛ no kyerɛ sɛ wɔamfa anni dwuma wɔ hyɛn mu na mmom ne hyɛe anaa nwunu nhyehyɛe mu anaa ne kyerɛ mu. Nhwehwɛmufoɔ yi susuu sɛ, ɛwom sɛ wei yɛ dinasour a ɔsua no tua de, ɛkyerɛ n’atabu na ɛnyɛ chick's down.

input.mt: Nhwehwɛmufo no kae sɛ, ɛwom sɛ eyi yɛ akekantwɛre bi atutenae de, nanso nea wɔyɛe no ma yehu sɛ akekantwɛre no yɛ ɔpanyin atutenae, na ɛnyɛ aberewa atutenae.
input.src: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

reference: Nhwehwɛmufoɔ yi susuu sɛ, ɛwom sɛ wei yɛ dinasour a ɔsua no tua de, ɛkyerɛ n’atabu na ɛnyɛ sɛ ɔbɛtumi de abɔ ne ho ban.

input.mt: Nhwehwɛmufo no kyerɛe sɛ, ɛmfa ho sɛ eyi yɛ aboa bi a ne nan ase ayɛ fɛw no, nea wɔayi no kyerɛ sɛ ne nan ase ayɛ fɛw, na ɛnyɛ sɛ ne nan ase ayɛ fɛw.
input.src: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

reference: Kaa mu topae too wɔ polisi asoe a ɛwɔ Gaziantep, Turkey nnora anɔpa na ekumm apolisifo nnipa baanu na wɔn a wɔpirae no boro aduonu.

input.mt: Kurow a ɛwɔ Gaziantep, Turkey no, kar a wɔde bɔpae toopae anɔpa bi kum polisifo baanu, na nnipa bɛboro aduonu pirapiraa.
input.src: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.

reference: Wɔhunuu sɛ Awia yɛ adwuma wɔ tebea ko ara mu te sɛ nsroma nkae no: Nsroma dwumadi nyinaa wɔhunuu sɛ deɛ ɛhyɛ ne kutupa yɛ n wɔn luminosity, wɔn ntwaho na ɛnyɛ biribiara.

input.mt: Wohui sɛ nsoromma a ɛwɔ saa nsoromma no mu nyinaa, sɛnea owia ne nsoromma no yɛ adwuma no, saa ara na owia no nso yɛ adwuma: Nea ɛma nsoromma a ɛwɔ saa nsoromma no mu nyinaa yɛ adwuma ne sɛnea wɔn ho hyerɛn, sɛnea wɔn ho hyerɛn, ne nea ɛkeka ho.
input.src: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.

reference: Wɔde luminosity no ne ntwaho no di dwuma de kyere nsroma Rossby nɔma, a ɛfa sɛnea plasma no ɛtene no ho.

input.mt: Wɔde hann ne nsrahwɛ no bom yɛ adwuma de hu nsoromma bi Rossby dodow, a ɛne plasma a ɛretwam no wɔ abusuabɔ.
input.src: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.

reference: Sɛna Rossby no sua no, saa na nsroma no magnɛtek no a ɛsane kɔ ne nkyi no dwumadi wɔ fam.

input.mt: Sɛ Rossby akontaabu no yɛ ketewa a, saa ara na nsoromma no nyɛ den wɔ magnetic reversals ho.
input.src: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.

reference: Akwantu no bi mu no, Iwasaki nyaa asɛm mpɛn pii.

input.mt: Wɔ akwantu no mu no, Iwasaki hyiaa nsɛnnennen mpɛn pii.
input.src: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.

reference: Piratefo wiaa no, rabid nkraman to hyɛɛ ne so wɔ Tibet, guan firii aware mu wɔ Nepal na wɔsan kyeree no wɔ India.

input.mt: Ná aguamammɔfo awia no, na ɔkraman bi tow hyɛɛ no so wɔ Tibet, na oguan fii aware mu wɔ Nepal, na wɔkyeree no wɔ India.
input.src: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.

reference: 802.11n nostandaad yɛ adwuma wɔfirkwɛnsi a ɛyɛ 2.4Ghz ne 5.0Ghz so.

input.mt: 802.11n gyinapɛn no yɛ adwuma wɔ 2.4Ghz ne 5.0Ghz taa ahorow nyinaa so.
input.src: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.

reference: Wei bɛma kwan ama asane akɔ akyi a ɛne 802.11a, hyia802.11b ne 802.11g,sɛ ɛkɔ ba sɛ base siteehyin no wɔ radio abien.

input.mt: Eyi bɛma atumi ne 802.11a, 802.11b ne 802.11g ayɛ baako wɔ akyi, gye sɛ ɔfã no wɔ radio mmienu.
input.src: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.

reference: Ne mmirika a ɛyɛ 802.11n yɛ deɛ ɛho yɛ hare sene deɛ edii anim no a ne maximum theoretical throughput ɛyɛ 600Mbit/s.

input.mt: 802.11n ntɛmntɛm yɛ ntɛm sen nea edi kan a wɔde bɛyɛ 600Mbit/s.
input.src: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.

reference: Duvall, a wɔaware a wɔwɔ mma abien a wɔanyinini, annya biribi a ɛwɔ nkɛntɛn so kɛse wɔ Miller so, a na asɛm no fa ne ho.

input.mt: Duvall, a ɔware na ɔwɔ mma baanu a wɔn mfe akɔ anim no, anhu Miller yiye.
input.src: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.

reference: Bere a ɔbisaa anom asɛm no, Miller kaa sɛ, “ Mike kasa pii bere a asenni no gu so rekɔ so no.... Na mereyɛ ahoboaboa nti na mente deɛ ɔreka no ankasa.”

input.mt: Bere a wobisaa Miller sɛ ɔnkyerɛw asɛm no mu no, ɔkae sɛ: "Mike kasa pii wɔ asɛnni no ase... na mereyɛ me ho sɛ merente nea ɔreka no ase".
input.src: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."

reference: Hu kaa sɛ“ Yɛbɛbɔ mmɔden sɛ yɛbɛte mframa a nnipa home fi ne mu a ɛfiri mu ba no a ɛyɛ GDP nkyɛmu baako a ɛyɛ nea ɛnnnuru 2020 fiti 2005 deɛ no.”

input.mt: Hu kae sɛ: "Yɛbɛbɔ mmɔden sɛ yebeyi carbon dioxide a ɛrefi wiase nyinaa nneɛma a ɛwɔ asase so nyinaa mu no bi afi afe 2005 mu akodu afe 2020", na Hu kae sɛ: "Yɛbɛbɔ mmɔden sɛ yebeyi carbon dioxide a ɛrefi wiase nyinaa nneɛma a ɛwɔ asase so nyinaa mu no bi afi afe 2005 mu akosi afe 2020.
input.src: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.

reference: Wankyerɛ mu pɔtee ahe a ɔbɛyi afiri mu, ɔka sɛ wɔbɛyɛ wei na ɛbɛgyina China sikasɛm so.

input.mt: Wankyerɛw akontaabu biara, na ɔkae sɛ wɔde bɛyɛ adwuma wɔ China sikasɛm mu.
input.src: He did not set a figure for the cuts, saying they will be made based on China's economic output.

reference: Hu tu aman a afei na wɔretu mpɔn fo sɛ ” ɛsɛ sɛ ɔkwati wɔbɛsɛe adeɛ deɛ edi kan ansa na wɔahwɛ asiesie no akyire yi”.

input.mt: Hu hyɛɛ aman a wɔrenya nkɔso nkuran sɛ "wɔnkwati ɔkwan dedaw a ɛne sɛ wobedi ho awu na akyiri yi wɔasiesie wɔn ho".
input.src: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."

reference: Ɔde kaa ho sɛ “ɛnsɛ sɛ ɔyɛ, na ɔfa asodi a ɛkɔ akyi sene nkɔanim siteegyi, asodi ne deɛ ɔtumi yɛ. ”

input.mt: Ɔde kaa ho sɛ, "Ɛnsɛ sɛ wɔka kyerɛ wɔn sɛ wɔmfa asɛyɛde a ɛboro wɔn nkɔso, asɛyɛde, ne wɔn tumi so nyɛ adwuma".
input.src: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."

reference: Iraq adesua kuw de wɔn amannebɔ too gua 12.00 GMT nnɛ.

input.mt: Iraq Study Group no yii wɔn amanneɛbɔ no adi wɔ GMT awia nnɔn 12.00 nnɛ.
input.src: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.

reference: Ɛbɔɔ kɔkɔ sɛ obiara ntumi nsi sectarian ako a ɛrekɔ so wɔ Iraq saa bere wei mu no, basabasayɛ a ɛrenya nkɔanim anaasɛ ɛkɔ basabasayɛ so.

input.mt: Ɛbɔ kɔkɔ sɛ obiara ntumi nka sɛ adwuma biara a wɔbɛyɛ wɔ Iraq wɔ saa bere yi mu no bɛma ɔsom mu akodi, awudisɛm a ɛrenya nkɔanim, anaa ɔbrasɛe a ɛrekɔ so no agyae.
input.src: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.

reference: Amannebɔ no de adesrɛ na efi ase sɛ ɔma dibeeti ho kwan na wɔnya nteaseɛ wɔ Uinited States a ɛfa Middle East nhyehyɛe ho.

input.mt: Amanneɛbɔ no fi ase kyerɛ sɛ ɛsɛ sɛ wɔyɛ nhyiamu a emu da hɔ na wonya adwene wɔ United States amanne a ɛfa Middle East ho no ho.
input.src: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.

reference: Amannebɔ no hia paa ɛma mprenpren nhyehyɛe a ɛfa Iraq ho na ɛkamfo kyerɛ sɛ wɔnyɛ nsesae wɔ kwan a wɔnam so no.

input.mt: Amanneɛbɔ no ka nsɛm a ɛho hia paa wɔ Atumfoɔ no amammerɛ a ɛwɔ hɔ nnɛ wɔ Iraq ho no mu biara ho, na ɛhyɛ yɛn nkuran sɛ yɛntwe yɛn ho mfi ho ntɛm ara.
input.src: The Report is highly critical of almost every aspect of the present policy of the Executive towards Iraq and it urges an immediate change of direction.

reference: Deɛ edi nkamfo 78 mu no ne ɛsɛ sɛ wɔtu diplomatic initiative ho anamɔn ansa na afe yi akɔ awiei na wɔde abɔ Iraq ahyeɛ ho ban de atia amanmmɔefo na wɔsan ne wɔn a wɔbɛn no no hyɛ diplomatic nkitahodi mu kena.

input.mt: N'afotu 78 no mu nea edi kan ne sɛ, afe yi awiei no, ɛsɛ sɛ wɔyɛ amanyɔsɛm foforo de bɔ nsase a ɛwɔ Iraq no ho ban fi atamfo nsam na wɔne n'afipamfo nya abusuabɔ foforo.
input.src: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.

reference: Mprempren mmarahyɛbaguani ne Argentine Ɔbaa a ɔdi kan Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner de gyina a ɔregyina sɛ ɔman panin too gua nnora anwummere wɔ La Plata, kuro a ɛyɛ kilomita 50 (maale 31) ɛde firi Buenos Aires.

input.mt: Ɔsenani a seesei ɔyɛ Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner kaa ne ho asɛm sɛ ɔrebɛdi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan adi kan.
input.src: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.

reference: Owurayere Kirchner de n’adwene a wayɛ sɛ ɔbɛgyina sɛ ɔmanpanin no too gua wɔ Argentine Theatre, baabi korɔ no ara ɔfirii ne mmarahyɛ bagua ntoabɔ no ase afe 2005 sɛ obi ɔka Buenos Aires mansin delegation no ho.

input.mt: Mmea Kirchner kaa ne botae sɛ ɔbɛsɔre akɔpɔn ɔmanpanyin wɔ Argentine Theatre, beae koro no ara a ɔde fii ne ɔsatu a ɔyɛe wɔ Senate mu wɔ afe 2005 mu no ase sɛ Buenos Aires mantam no muni.
input.src: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.

reference: Deɛ akɔ fa nkyinwahyew a ɛfa ka wɔbɔe de siesiee nneɛma wɔ mframa gyampadurudu Katrina ho; a fiscal conservatives binom aka sɛ ɛyɛ "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

input.mt: Akyinnyegye no bae esiane sɛ Hurricane Katrina akyi no, wɔde nneɛma a wɔde boa nkurɔfo ne wɔn a wɔsan kyekye wɔn ho no bɔɔ ho kyim; na ebinom a wɔyɛ sika ho ahwɛyiye de fɛw ahyɛ "Bush New Orleans Deal" din.
input.src: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

reference: Nnipa fawohidi a ɛfa siesie mmɔdemmɔ ho no de ani akyerɛ sɛnea wɔde kɔtraagye ma wɔn a wɔwɔ Washington .

input.mt: Amanamanmufo de wɔn ani ato wɔn ho so sɛ wɔbɛsan asiesie adan a wɔasan asiesie no ho, na wɔde wɔn adwene asi so sɛ wobesiesie adan a wɔasan asiesie no ama Washingtonfo.
input.src: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.

reference: Nnipa bɛboro ɔpepem nnan na wɔkɔɔ ayi no bi wɔ Rome.

input.mt: Nnipa bɛboro ɔpepem anan kɔɔ Roma kɔhwɛɛ ɔboda no.
input.src: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.

reference: Nnipa wɔkɔɔ no na wɔdɔɔso ara ma na ɛnyɛ obiara na wɔtumi nya kwan kɔ ayi no ase wɔ St.Peter's Square hɔ.

input.mt: Nnipa a na wɔwɔ hɔ no dɔɔso araa ma enti na ɛnyɛ obiara na obetumi akɔ asie no wɔ St. Peter Square.
input.src: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.

reference: Wɔde akasamfonin akɛseɛakɛseɛ sisii mmeae mmeae wɔ Rome na ama nnipa tumi ahwɛ dwumadi no.

input.mt: Wosii television so nneɛma akɛse pii wɔ mmeae ahorow wɔ Roma sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a nkurɔfo no bɛhwɛ afahyɛ no.
input.src: Several large television screens were installed in various places in Rome to let the people watch the ceremony.

reference: Nkuro ahorow mu wɔ Italy ne wiase afanan ahorow no, ne titire ne Poland no, wɔhyehyɛɛ biribi a ɛtete saa, na nnipa pii na wɔhwɛɛ bi.

input.mt: Wɔyɛɛ nneɛma a ɛte saa wɔ nkurow pii mu wɔ Italy ne wiase no mu, titiriw wɔ Poland, na nnipa pii hwɛɛ nea wɔyɛe no.
input.src: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.

reference: Abakɔsɛm ho animdefo akasa atia FBI no nhyehyɛeɛ wɔ sɛnea wɔsɛe sika wɔ nsɛm a ano sie nyɛ den ho no, ne titire ne kaa wɔawia ho nsɛm, a wɔn adwene sɛ wɔbɛma asoe no nkunimdi no akɔ soro.

input.mt: Abakɔsɛm akyerɛwfo aka sɛ bere bi a atwam no, na FBI de nnwinnade di dwuma wɔ nsɛm a ɛyɛ mmerɛw sɛ wobeyi afi mu, titiriw kar a wɔayi afi mu ho nsɛm mu, sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a dwumadibea no bɛkɔ so anya nkɔso.
input.src: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.

reference: Mmarahyɛbagua no fii ase sɛ wɔrefa obscenity initiative no ka wɔ afe 2005 abd wɔkaa sɛ FBI no nhyɛda nyi nnipa 10 nsi hɔ mma mpaninfoɔ nnwamansɛm.

input.mt: Wɔ afe 2005 mu no, Ɔman Nhyiam no fii ase de sika maa ɔbrasɛe ho nhyehyɛe no, na ɛkyerɛɛ mu sɛ ɛsɛ sɛ FBI de adwumayɛfo 10 yɛ aguamansɛm a wɔde ma mpanyimfo.
input.src: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.

reference: Robin Uthappa bɔɔ ne ho mmɔden paa hyɛɛe, run 70 wɔ bɔɔlo 41 pɛ muna ɔbɔɔ 11 ahorow nnan ne nsia ahorow 2.

input.mt: Robin Uthappa nyaa nnipakan no mu akoten sen biara, na ɔde nnɔnhwerew 11 ne nnɔnhwerew 2 bɔɔ nnɔnhwerew 41 pɛ mu.
input.src: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.

reference: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar ne Rahul Dravid, dii agoru yiye na wɔdii nkonim bɔɔ mu.

input.mt: Mid-order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar ne Rahul Dravid yɛɛ wɔn ade yiye na wonyaa mmirika ɔha.
input.src: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.

reference: Nanso bere a wɔhweree kapitin wicket no India tumi yɛɛ runs 36, hweree wickets no 7 de mmɔden bɔ no baa awiee.

input.mt: Nanso, bere a India dii nkonim no, India bɔɔ mmirika 36 pɛ, na ɔhweree mmirika 7 de wiee mmirika no.
input.src: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.

reference: U.S. manpanin George W. Bush bɛpuee mu wɔ Singapore wɔ Obudu 16, na ɛyɛ nnawɔtwe a na ɔrebɛdi wɔ Asia no ahyɛase.

input.mt: U.S. Ɔmanpanyin George W. Bush duu Singapore anɔpa November 16 no, na ofii Asia nsrahwɛ a ɛkɔɔ so nnawɔtwe biako no ase.
input.src: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.

reference: Deɛ ɔbɛhyiaa no yɛ Singapore Mansoafo Panin Abadiakyi Wong Kan Seng na wɔbɔɔ aguadi ne awurukasɛm ho nsɛm ho nkɔmmɔ na wɔne Singapore Mansoafo Panin Lee Hsien Loong na ɛtwetwee nkɔmmɔ no.

input.mt: Singapore Ɔsafohene Wong Kan Seng hyiaa no, na ɔne Singapore Ɔsafohene Lee Hsien Loong susuw aguadi ne amumɔyɛ ho nsɛm ho.
input.src: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.

reference: Bere a wɔdii nkogu wɔ midtɛɛm abato mu, Bush kaa sɛnea wɔrebɛtrɛ aguadi mu wɔ Asia no mu ho asɛm.

input.mt: Bere a Bush dii nnawɔtwe wɔ mmirikatu no mu no, ɔkaa aguadi a ɛrekɔ so wɔ Asia no ho asɛm kyerɛɛ nnipakuw bi.
input.src: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.

reference: Mansoafo panin Stephen Harper ate ase sɛ ɔde aban no 'Clean Air Act' ɛma amannyɔ akuo kɔmitii ama wɔasusu ho, ansa na wɔakan no mprɛ a ɛtɔ so abien, wɔ Benada bere a wɔhyiam sima 25 a wɔne NDP kanifoJack Layton hyiaam wɔ PMO no.

input.mt: Ɔmampanyin Stephen Harper penee so sɛ ɔde aban no 'Clean Air Act' bɛkɔ amanyɔ kuw bi anim akɔhwehwɛ mu, ansa na wɔrekenkan no a ɛto so abien, wɔ NDP kannifo Jack Layton a ɔne no hyiae bɛyɛ simma 25 wɔ PMO hɔ no akyi.
input.src: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.

reference: Layton asrɛ sɛ wɔnyɛ nsakrae wɔ conservatives no bill a ɛfa atenae ho wɔ nhyiam a wɔne PM no yɛeɛ no ase no, na ɔsrɛ sɛ Conservative amannyɔku no bill a ɛfa atenae ho no“ wɔntwerɛ no yiye na wɔnwie” .

input.mt: Bere a Layton ne Ɔmampanyin no hyiae no, obisaa sɛ wɔnyɛ nsakrae wɔ atetesɛm no mu.
input.src: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.

reference: Ɛfiti bere a Aban no baa mu sɛ ɔrefa Mersey ayaresabea a ɛwɔ Devonport, Tasmania,siteeti aban no ne ɔman no mu MPfoɔ binom akasa atia saa ade yi ɛrekɔ ɔman no abato bere no mu a wɔbɛto no Obubuo mu no.

input.mt: Efi bere a Federal Aban no de sika kɔfaa Mersey ayaresabea a ɛwɔ Devonport, Tasmania, no, amantam aban ne mmarahyɛ badwafo bi aka sɛ saa mmara yi yɛ biribi a wɔde yɛ ɔsatu a ɛbɛkɔ so wɔ November mu.
input.src: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.

reference: Nanso Masnsofo panin John Howard aka sɛ na boatae no ne sɛ wɔreyɛ saa na Tasmanian aban no amma no ante amma fam, ɛno nti wɔmaa no ɔpepem AUD$45.

input.mt: Nanso Ɔmampanyin John Howard kae sɛ mmara a wɔde mae no yɛ sɛ wɔbɛbɔ ayaresabea no ho ban na Tasmanian aban no amfa AUD ɔpepem 45 ammɔ ho ban.
input.src: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.

reference: Sɛnea nsɛm aba foforo kyerɛ no, sɛnea po no akɔ soro no kyerɛ sɛ wɔyɛɛ tsunami no. Tsunami dwumadi bi kɔɔ so wɔ beae a ɛbɛn Pago Pago ne Niue.

input.mt: Sɛnea atesɛm krataa a edi kan no kyerɛ no, ɛpo no bo a ɛwɔ po so kyerɛ sɛ ɛbɔɔ tsunami bi, na wɔkae sɛ ɛbɔɔ tsunami bi wɔ Pago Pago ne Niue mpɔtam.
input.src: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.

reference: Wɔmmɔɔ adesɛe kɛseɛ anaa pira biara ho amanne wɔ Tonga, nanso anyinam kanea nni hɔ, na wei amma Tonga mpaninfoɔ nsa antumi anka kɔkɔbɔ a PTWC no de maae na ɛfa tsunami no ho no.

input.mt: Wɔankyerɛw sɛ nnipa pii hweree tumi no wɔ Tonga, nanso wɔhweree tumi no bere tiaa bi, na wɔkae sɛ ɛno amma Tonga atumfoɔ no antumi annye tsunami ho kɔkɔbɔ a PTWC de mae no antom.
input.src: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.

reference: Sukuu ahorow du nnan a ɛwɔ Hawii a ɛwowɔ anaa ɛbɛn mpoano na wɔtoo mu Wukuada no nyinaa ɛwom sɛ wɔayi kɔkɔbɔ a wɔde maae no afiri hɔ de.

input.mt: Ɛwom sɛ wɔayi kɔkɔbɔ no de, nanso wɔtoo sukuu 14 wɔ Hawaii a ɛwɔ mpoano anaa baabi a ɛbɛn hɔ wiei Wukuda no nyinaa.
input.src: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.

reference: U.S. Mampanin George W. Bush gyee amannebɔ yi too mu.

input.mt: U.S. Ɔmanpanyin George W. Bush gyee saa amanneɛbɔ no toom.
input.src: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.

reference: Bush kasamafo Gordon Johndroe North Korea pledge “ kwan paa a ɔnam so duru botae na ama wɔn nsa aka verifiable denuclearization ɛwɔ Korean peninsula."

input.mt: Bush kasafo Gordon Johndroe kaa bɔ a North Korea hyɛe no ho asɛm sɛ "ɛyɛ anammɔn kɛse wɔ botae a ɛne sɛ wobesiesie Korea nsupɔw no yiye".
input.src: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."

reference: Mframa a ɛtɔ so du a ɛyɛ Atlantic Hurricane season, sɔbtrɔpikaa mframa Jerry, wɔyɛɛ wɔ Atlantic Ocean mu nnɛ.

input.mt: Atlantic Hurricane bere no mu ahum a ɛto so du a wɔfrɛ no Subtropical Storm Jerry, na ɛbɔɔ wɔ Atlantic Po no mu nnɛ.
input.src: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.

reference: Ɔman mu Mframagyampaturudu Asoe (NHC) ka sɛ Jerry ho nyɛ hu mma ɔman no.

input.mt: National Hurricane Center (NHC) ka sɛ saa bere yi Jerry nsɛe asase no.
input.src: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.

reference: Ngyiniɛs a wɔwɔ U.S. Corps bu akonta sɛ osu a ɛtɔ sɛɛe ade no kan no ɛbɛboro so nkyisi no 6.

input.mt: U.S. Army Corps of Engineers bu akontaa sɛ osu a emu yɛ den bɛyɛ sentimita 6 no betumi asɛe nsu a na asɛe no dedaw no.
input.src: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.

reference: Ward no a ɛtɔ so nkron , a ɛmaa nsuo no yi kɔɔ soro kɔduu fiiti no 20 wɔ mframagyampaturudu Katrina mu no, mprenpren ɛda sisi sɛnea leeve a ɛbɛn hɔ no wɔ soro no.

input.mt: Ɔmantam a ɛto so akron no, bere a Hurricane Katrina sisii no, asorɔkye a ɛkɔɔ so ara boroo mita 20 no, saa bere no, asorɔkye a ɛbɛn hɔ no abobɔ ano.
input.src: The Ninth Ward, which saw flooding as high as 20 feet during Hurricane Katrina, is currently in waist-high water as the nearby levee was overtopped.

reference: Nsuo rebu fa levee no so wɔ ɔfa a ne fiiti no yɛ100

input.mt: Asubɔnten no so nsu retwam wɔ baabi a ɛtrɛw bɛyɛ mita 100.
input.src: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.

reference: Commons Administreta Adam Cuerden daa n’ayawdi adi de fa nnyifirim no ho no bere a ɔne Wikinews kasae bosome a etwaam mu no.

input.mt: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden daa n'abam adi wɔ sɛe no ho bere a ɔne Wikinews kasae bosome a etwaam no.
input.src: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.

reference: “Ɔno [Wales] dii atorɔ kyerɛɛ yɛn firi ahyɛase. Deɛ edi kan bere ɔyɛɛ ne ho sɛ ɛnam mmara kwan so. Deɛ ɛtɔ so abien ɔyɛɛ ne ho sɛ ɔretie yɛn, kɔsii ne art no popa no so.

input.mt: "Efi mfiase pɛɛ na [Wales] dii atoro kyerɛɛ yɛn. Nea edi kan, ɔyɛe te sɛ nea esiane mmara kwan so nti na ɔreyɛ saa. Nea ɛto so abien, ɔyɛe te sɛ nea ɔretie yɛn, kosii sɛ oyii n'abrabɔ fii hɔ".
input.src: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."

reference: Kuro no abufuw na ɛkɔfaa mmɔden a wɔrebɔ sɛ wɔbɛtwerɛ nhyehyɛe foforo a ɛfa nna ho nsɛm ɛma site ɛkuro miidia ɔpepem a wɔama ho tumi krataa obiara nsa tumi sɔ so no.

input.mt: Ɔman no animtiaabu no nti, seesei wɔrebɔ mmɔden sɛ wɔbɛkyerɛw mmara bi a ɛfa ɔbea ne ɔbarima nna ho nsɛm ho ama saa wɛbsaet no a ɛwɔ nkrataa ɔpepem pii a wɔama ho kwan no.
input.src: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.

reference: Adwuma no mprɛ pii na ɛyɛ theoretical, nanso wɔkyerɛw dwumadi sɛnea ɛbɛsimulate observation a wɔde Sagittarius galaxy na ayɛ.

input.mt: Adwuma a wɔyɛe no fã kɛse no ara yɛ nea wɔaka ho asɛm, nanso wɔyɛɛ nhyehyɛe no sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a wɔde nneɛma a wɔyɛe wɔ Sagittarius nsoromma mu no bɛyɛ ho mfonini.
input.src: The work done was mostly theoretical, but the program was written to simulate observations made of the Sagittarius galaxy.

reference: Nsunsuanso a na kuo rehwɛ kwan na tidal forces no na na ɛbɛkɔ akɔfa aba na ɛbɛda galaxy's dark mata no ne Milky Way's dark mata no ntam.

input.mt: Nea na kuw no rehwehwɛ no, ɛbɛyɛ sɛ asorɔkye a ɛrekɔ so wɔ nsoromma mu ne Milky Way nsoromma mu no na ɛde aba.
input.src: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.

reference: Te sɛ nea bosome de ahoɔden ba asase so, na ɛkɔ tides ba, saa ara na Milky way de ahoɔden ba Sagittarius galaxy no so.

input.mt: Sɛnea ɔsram tumi twe asase, na ɛde asorɔkye ba no, saa ara na Milky Way tumi twe Sagittarius.
input.src: Just like the moon exerts a pull on the earth, causing tides, so does the Milky Way exert a force on the Sagittarius galaxy.

reference: Nyansahunufo no tumi de too gua sɛ dark mata no ɛka dark mata afoforo wɔ kwan koro no ara so te sɛ nea rɛgula mata no yɛ no.

input.mt: Nyansahufo no tumi kae sɛ sum mu nneɛma tumi ka sum mu nneɛma foforo a ɛte saa ara.
input.src: The scientists were able to conclude that the dark matter affect other dark matter in the same way regular matter does.

reference: Saa theory yi ka sɛ dark mata dodoɛ no ara ɛwɔ galaxy no ho no wɔ galaxy a ɛte sɛ halo no, na ɛyɛ ɛwowɔ particles nketewa.

input.mt: Nyansapɛ yi kyerɛ sɛ sum mu nneɛma dodow no ara a ɛbɔ nsoromma kuw bi ho ahyia wɔ nsoromma kuw bi mu, na ɛyɛ nketewa nketewa pii.
input.src: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.

reference: Tɛlɛvihyin bɔ amanne sɛ show white smoke a ɛfiri afifide mu.

input.mt: TV amanneɛbɔ kyerɛ sɛ wusiw fitaa fi afifide no mu reba.
input.src: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.

reference: Mpatam hɔ mpaninfo rebɔ temanmufo wɔte bɛn plant no kɔkɔ sɛ wɔntena fie, nnunnum air-conditioners na ɛnsɛ ɔnom paapo nsuo.

input.mt: Amanaman mpanyimfo reka akyerɛ wɔn a wɔte afifide no ho no sɛ wɔntena wɔn afie mu, mfa mframa nsi hɔ, na wɔnnnom nsu mfi fononoo no mu.
input.src: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.

reference: Sɛnea Japan ahoɔdennneɛ asoe kyerɛ no, mfidie no ɛne radioactive caesium ne iodine.

input.mt: Sɛnea Japan nuklea dwumadibea no kyerɛ no, wɔahu radioaktiw cesium ne iodine wɔ saa afifide no so.
input.src: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.

reference: Mpaninfo no ka sɛ kɔnteena a na uranium fango wom wɔ beae hɔ no apae na retu gu.

input.mt: Aban no susuw sɛ eyi kyerɛ sɛ ebetumi aba sɛ adaka a wɔde uranium a wɔde rehyew nneɛma wɔ hɔ no apue na ɛrehyew.
input.src: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.

reference: Dr. Tony Mol hunuu Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) ɛwɔ South African mantam wɔ KwaZulu-Natal.

input.mt: Ɔbenfo Tony Moll huu yare a wɔfrɛ no Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) wɔ South Africa mpɔtam wɔ KwaZulu-Natal.
input.src: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.

reference: Nkɔmmɔ twetwe, ɔkaa sɛ variant foforo no “ wɔ soro paa” ɛha adwene na ɛyɛ hu esiane owuo ɛwɔ soro no nti.

input.mt: Wɔ ɔkasa bi mu no, ɔkae sɛ yare foforo no "yɛ nea ɛhaw adwene paa na ɛhaw adwene esiane owuo dodow a ɛrekɔ so no nti".
input.src: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."

reference: Afe biako ntam no, nnipa yare no aka no de bɛsae nnipa 10 kɔsi 15 a wɔbɛn no pa ara.

input.mt: Wɔ afe biako mu no, obi a wanya yare no betumi anya nnipa 10 anaa 15 a ɔne wɔn bɔe no yare.
input.src: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.

reference: XDR-TB ɔha nkyekyɛmu a ɛwɔ kuo no nyinaa mu no a wɔwɔ nsamanwa da so ara wɔ fam; nnipa 330,000 mu 6,000 na yare no aka wɔn bere bi mu wɔ South Africa.

input.mt: Nanso, ɛte sɛ nea XDR-TB ho nnipa dodow a wɔwɔ mmoawammoawa mu no da so ara yɛ kakraa bi; nnipa 6,000 wɔ South Africa a wɔn dodow yɛ 330,000 a wɔyare wɔ bere pɔtee biara mu no mu.
input.src: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.

reference: Ahunmu mfiri abien a emu duru bɛboro "pound" apem biako (1,000 pounds) na ɛtwa ne ho bɛyɛ akwansin mpem du-ason ne ahanum (17,500) dɔnhwere biara pem wɔn ho hyia pem akwansin ahannan aduokron-biako wɔ asase so wɔ wim.

input.mt: Asatellites no nyinaa so duru boro kilogram 1,000, na na wɔretwa kwantenten bɛyɛ kilomita 17,500 wɔ dɔnhwerew biako mu, na wɔhwehwɛɛ asase atifi bɛyɛ kilomita 491.
input.src: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.
