reference: Nyansahufo kae se, atopae a ɛhyia to bɔm no ano yɛ peme.

input.mt: Nyansahufo ka sɛ atoyerɛnkyɛm no nti, atoyerɛnkyɛm no yɛɛ kɛse.
input.src: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.

reference: Wɔda so rehwɛhwɛ sɛnea asehwɛ kɛse no teɛ ne sɛnea aka asase no afa.

input.mt: Wɔda so ara rebɔ mmɔden sɛ wɔbɛhu sɛnea atoyerɛnkyɛm no kɛse te ne sɛnea ɛbɛhaw asase no.
input.src: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.

reference: United States asrafopanyin dwumadie bea a ɛwɔ U.S na na hwehwɛ fi ahorow a ɛbae asasewoso no akyi mu.

input.mt: United States Strategic Command a ɛwɔ U.S. Department of Defense adwumayɛbea no reyɛ nneɛma a asɛe no ho nhwehwɛmu.
input.src: The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.

reference: Sɛ wɔto hama hu sɛnea tupae no sɛe nneɛma wiei a, wɔde bɛgu abɛɛfo ahoma ntentan so.

input.mt: Wɔbɛkyerɛw nhwehwɛmu a wɔyɛe no ho asɛm wɔ Intanɛt dwumadibea bi so.
input.src: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.

reference: Mpaninfo a wɔwɔ Ohia ka sɛ wɔbɛbɔ dɔkota bi a ɔyɛ adwuma wɔ Mmɔfra ayaresabea wɔ Pittsburgh,Pennsylvania no kwaadu bere wɔhunu sɛ wɔadi ne maame awu de no ahyɛ ne kaa akyi Wukuada.

input.mt: Ohio mpanyimfo ka sɛ wɔde owudi a emu yɛ den bɛto ɔyaresafo bi a na ɔyɛ adwuma wɔ Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania Mmofra Yareɛbea no so bere a wohui sɛ ne maame awu wɔ ne kar kotoku mu no.
input.src: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.

reference: Wɔhunuu Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, wɔ Blue Ash, Ohio, a ɛyɛ mpatam bi a ɛyɛ maale 15 wɔ Cincinnati atifi sɛ ɔda fam wɔ kwan ho a ɔhye T-shirt na ɔhyɛ ade wɔ n’ase a na ayɛ sɛ obi a wafa aduru kɛse paa bi.

input.mt: Wɔhuu Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, a wadi mfe 29, wɔ Blue Ash, Ohio, kurow bi a ɛwɔ Cincinnati atifi fam bɛyɛ kilomita 15 mu sɛ ɔda fam wɔ ɔkwan no nkyɛn baabi a ɔhyɛ T-shirt ne ne ntade mu wɔ tebea bi a ɛte sɛ nea wɔde nnuru pii ahyɛ mu.
input.src: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.

reference: Ɔkyerɛɛ mpaninfo kwan kɔɔ Oldsmobile Intrigue a ɛyɛ tuntum no mu a na ɛwɔ fiiti no 500.

input.mt: Ɔka kyerɛɛ asraafo no sɛ wɔnkɔ ne Oldsmobile Intrigue a na ɛwɔ akyirikyiri bɛyɛ mita 500 no so.
input.src: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.

reference: Ɛhɔ na wɔhunuu Saroja Balasubramanian, 53 sɛ wɔde kuntu bi a na mogya ayɛ no twɔnn akyekyere no.

input.mt: Ɛhɔ na wohuu Saroja Balasubramanian a wadi mfe 53 no amu a wɔde ntama a mogya ahyɛ mu no.
input.src: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.

reference: Polisifo ka sa ayɛ sɛ deɛ amu no ada hɔ bɛyɛ da koro.

input.mt: Polisifo kae sɛ ɛda adi sɛ afunu no atena hɔ bɛyɛ da koro.
input.src: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.

reference: Wɔbɔɔ yare no amannebɔ sa bere yi mu wɔ Kitawonsa awiee.

input.mt: Wɔbɔɔ amanneɛ sɛ yare no ho nsɛm a edi kan bae wɔ afe yi mu wɔ July awiei mu.
input.src: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.

reference: Yare no wɔ mprako mu, na ɛnam so tumi sae nnipa denam ntontom so.

input.mt: Apuru na wɔde yare no ba, na ɛno akyi no, ntontom na ɛfa mu ba nnipa so.
input.src: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.

reference: Yare a etuu atese no maa India aban no tu anammɔn pɛɛ wɔn a wɔbɛkyere mprako no wɔ mmeae a yare no atu ate se no, wɔakyeyɛ ntontom nnan mpempem ne nnuro a wɔde supree wɔn.

input.mt: Ɔyaredɔm no ama India aban no afa akwan horow te sɛ, wɔde wɔn a wɔkyekyere mprako wɔ mmeae a ɔhaw no ano yɛ den mu, wɔkyekyɛ ntokuru nketewa mpempem pii, ne nnua a wɔde sɛe mmoawammoawa.
input.src: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.

reference: Aban no ahyɛ encephalitis a ɛwowɔ ntoa nkumaa bi mu ho bɔ , a ɛbɛboa ama wɔaboaboa apomuden asoe no ano ama afeda.

input.mt: Afei nso, aban no ahyɛ ɔyaredɔm mmoawa ɔpepem pii ho bɔ, na ɛbɛboa ama wɔatumi asiesie apɔwmuden dwumadibea ahorow ama afe a ɛreba no.
input.src: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.

reference: Nhyehyɛe a wɔyɛɛ sɛ wɔde nnuro bɛkɔ mmeae atu atese no twetwɛnn kakra esiane sikasɛm nti ne yare no a wɔamma ɛho anhia wɔn paa kɛse te sɛ yare nkae no nti.

input.mt: Nhyehyɛe a wɔayɛ sɛ wɔde nnuru bɛkɔ mmeae a ɛhaw no kɛse wɔ abakɔsɛm mu afe yi mu no twentwɛn so esiane sika a enni hɔ nti ne ɛho botae a enni hɔ wɔ yare afoforo ho nti.
input.src: Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.

reference: 1956 mu Słania ti kɔɔ Sweden, na akyi yi ɔfii ase yɛɛ adwuma Swedish Poos Ɔfese na ɔbɛyɛɛ wɔn engraver panin.

input.mt: Wɔ 1956 mu no, Słania tu kɔɔ Sweden, na mfe abiɛsa akyi no, ofii ase yɛɛ adwuma wɔ Swedish Post Office, na ɔbɛyɛɛ wɔn animdefo panyin.
input.src: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.

reference: Ɔyeyɛɛ setampo no bɛboro 1,000 maa Sweden ne aman ahorow.

input.mt: Ɔyɛɛ nkrataa bɛboro 1,000 maa Sweden ne aman foforo 28.
input.src: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.

reference: Na n’adwuma no sɔ ani ara ɔka “nnipa kakra a wɔbɔ wɔn din no ho” wɔ wɔn a na wɔyeyɛ setaampo no mu. Ebinom ahyɛ da de wɔn ani asi sɛnea wɔbɛboaboa ne dwumadi nko ara no so.

input.mt: Nea ɔyɛe no yɛ adwuma a wonim no yiye na emu nsɛm ho hia araa ma ɔyɛ nnipa kakraa bi a wɔfrɛ wɔn "abusuafo din" wɔ wɔn a wɔyɛ philatelists mu no mu biako.
input.src: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.

reference: David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl wɔ 2000 ka sɛ ne setampo a ɛtɔ so 1,000 no yɛ fɛ “Adwuma sronn a ɛfiri Sweden Hene” na ɛwɔ Guinness Book of rɛkɔd a wɔyɛ Wiase nyinaa twerɛtohɔ wom no.

input.mt: Ne nsɔwano a ɛto so 1,000 ne "Sweden Ahemfo Nnwuma Kɛse" a David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl yɛe wɔ afe 2000 mu a ɛwɔ Guinness World Records Nhoma mu no.
input.src: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.

reference: Wɔyeyɛɛ adwinni totoo amanaman sika so, ɛho nhwɛso a ɔyɛɛ no nansa yi deɛ Mansoafo Panin no mfoni a ɛda Canadian $5 sika foforo no so ne bills a ɛyɛ $100 no so no.

input.mt: Afei nso, na ɔyɛ nnwinnade wɔ aman pii mu, na nnansa yi na ɔyɛe a, na ɔyɛ adwuma no bi te sɛ Ɔmampanyin no mfonini a ɛwɔ Canada $5 ne $100 nnwinnade foforo no anim.
input.src: He was also engaged in engraving banknotes for many countries, recent examples of his work including the Prime Ministerial portraits on the front of the new Canadian $5 and $100 bills.

reference: Akwanhyia no akyi no,wɔde Gibson kɔɔ ayaresabea nanso ɛno akyi ankyɛ koraa na ɔwui.

input.mt: Bere a atoyerɛnkyɛm no sii no, wɔde Gibson kɔɔ ayaresabea nanso ankyɛ na owui.
input.src: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.

reference: Truck drɔba a na wadi mfe 64, ne ho anka wɔ akwanhyia no mu.

input.mt: Ɔdefo a wadi mfe 64 no anyɛ hwee wɔ akwanhyia no mu.
input.src: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.

reference: Ɛbɔɔ bɛyɛ 1200 GMT da no ara akwanhyia no siiɛ no wɔfaa hyɛn firiii faako akwnahyia no siiɛ no.

input.mt: Wɔfaa kar no ankasa fii baabi a atoyerɛnkyɛm no sii no wɔ saa da no ara bɛyɛ 1200 GMT.
input.src: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.

reference: Nipa bi na ɔreyɛ adwuma wɔgaraagye bi a ɛbɛn baabi akwanhyia no siiɛ no kaa sɛ; “ Na mmɔfra bi retwɛn sɛ wɔbɛtwa kwan no mu na wɔreteatea mu na na wɔresu.”

input.mt: Obi a na ɔreyɛ adwuma wɔ garaje bi a ɛbɛn baabi a atoyerɛnkyɛm no sii no kae sɛ: "Na mmofra retwɛn sɛ wobetwa kwan no, na na wɔn nyinaa teɛteɛm na wɔresu".
input.src: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."

reference: Wɔn nyinaa guan firii baabi na akwanhyia no asi no.

input.mt: Wɔn nyinaa fii baabi a atoyerɛnkyɛm no sii no san tuu mmirika.
input.src: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.

reference: Nnɛma ahorow a ɛda pono so wɔbɛssusu ho wɔ Bali ne sɛnea wɔbɛbɔ kwae a aka wiase no ho ban, wɔne wɔn ho wɔn bɛkyekyɛ tɛknogyi na ama aman atutu mpɔn wɔ akwan ɛnsɛe nneɛma pii so.

input.mt: Nneɛma foforo a wɔaka ho asɛm wɔ Bali dwumadibea no mu no bi ne wiase kwae a aka no ho banbɔ, ne mfiri a wɔde bɛboa aman a wɔrenya nkɔso no ama wɔatumi anya nkɔso wɔ akwan a ɛho ntew so.
input.src: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.

reference: U.N. no hwɛ kwan wɔn nsa bɛka sika de asɔ aman a wiase nsesae akɔfa ɔhaw abrɛ na ama wɔadi ɔhaw ɛde abrɛ wɔn yi so.

input.mt: Amanaman Nkabom no ani da so nso sɛ wɔbɛhyehyɛ ntoboa bi a wɔde bɛboa aman a wiase ahohuru ama ato wɔn no ma wɔatumi agyina ɔhaw no ano.
input.src: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.

reference: Wɔde sika no bɛhyɛ afa a ɛyɛ adan a nsuo no ntumi nyiri mfa no, nsuo ho ntotoe papa na wɔaduadua nnɔbae ahorow pii.

input.mt: Wobetumi de sika no akɔ afie a nsu nni mu, nsu a wɔde di dwuma yiye, ne nnɔbae ahorow a wɔde di dwuma yiye mu.
input.src: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.

reference: Fluke kyerɛɛw sɛ mmɔden a ebinom bɔe sɛ wɔbɛma mmea akasa a ɛfa mmea apomudenno anyɛ yiye.

input.mt: Fluke kyerɛwee sɛ mmɔden a ebinom bɔe sɛ wɔbɛka mmea ho asɛm wɔ mmea apɔwmuden ho no anyɛ yiye.
input.src: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.

reference: Ɔde saa asɛm yi too gua bere a ne nsa kaa amannebɔ firii mmea ne mmarima hɔ sɛ aduru a wɔde si nyinsɛn ano yɛ aduru bi a ɛho hia yiye paa.

input.mt: Ɔbaa ne ɔbarima bi de nkakrankakra maa no nkakrankakra, na wɔhyɛɛ no nkuran sɛ wɔmfa nyinsɛn ho aduru nyɛ nnuru a ɛho hia wɔ ayaresa mu.
input.src: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.

reference: Bere a ntɔkwa no to twaae bere a wɔde apirafo no kɔɔ ayaresabea, nneduafo no a wɔaka akyi no bɛyɛ 40 na wɔyɛɛ sɛ wɔnkɔ wɔn cells no mu bio,

input.mt: Bere a wɔde wɔn a wɔapirapira no kɔɔ ayaresabea no, bere a ɔko no gyaee no, nneduafo a aka no mu bɛyɛ 40 tenaa adiwo hɔ, na wɔampene so sɛ wɔbɛsan akɔ wɔn mpia mu.
input.src: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.

reference: Wɔn a wɔne afoforɔ kasa ma ntease yɛ adwuma no yɛɛ sɛ wɔbɛdi tebea no dwuma, nanso nea nneduafo no rehwehwɛ no mu nna hɔ.

input.mt: Adwumayɛfo no bɔɔ mmɔden sɛ wobesiesie tebea no, nanso nneduafo no ahiade nteɛ.
input.src: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.

reference: Ɛbɔɔ bɛyɛ anwummere 10:00-11:00 MDT, nneduafo no de ogya too beae hɔ.

input.mt: Efi anadwo nnɔn 10:00 kosi nnɔn 11:00 no, nneduafo no hyehyɛɛ ogya wɔ adiwo hɔ.
input.src: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.

reference: Ankyɛ koraa na adwumayɛfo a wɔakwdare wɔ sɛnea wɔsi basabasayɛ ano no wuraa yaade no mu na wɔde tear gas dii dwuma de dii nneduafo no so nkunim.

input.mt: Ankyɛ koraa na asraafo bi a wɔde basabasayɛ ho nneɛma hyɛɛ wɔn nsa bɛhyɛn dan no mu, na wɔde nusu guan hyɛɛ nneduafo no mu.
input.src: Soon, officers equipped with riot gear entered the yard and cornered the inmates with tear gas.

reference: Dumgyafo tumi dumm gya no bere a ɛbɔɔ anwummere 11:35.

input.mt: Awiei koraa no, asraafodɔm no kyekyeree ogya no anadwo 11:35.
input.src: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.

reference: Bere a wɔsii dam no afe 1963 no, nsuo a bere ano bere ano a ne sediment no ɛbɛtrɛ akɔ asubɔnten mu no gyae.

input.mt: Bere a wosii ɔtare no wɔ afe 1963 mu no, wogyaee nsu yiri a na ɛbɔ wɔ asubɔnten no mu no.
input.src: After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.

reference: Na sediments no hia na wɔatumi ayeyɛ sandbars ne beaches a na ɛyɛ bea a mmoa de yɛ wɔn atenae.

input.mt: Ná ɛho hia sɛ wɔhyehyɛ asau ne mpoano, na ɛno na ɛma mmoa tenaa hɔ.
input.src: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.

reference: Ne saa nti, mpataa abien na wɔn ho akɔ atwee, na abien nso na wɔn ase ahye a humpback chub ka ho.

input.mt: Ɛno nti, apataa ahorow abien afi hɔ, na ebi abien nso wɔ hɔ a asiane wom, a humpback chub ka ho.
input.src: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.

reference: Ɛwom so sɛ nsuo ba soro bere nsu ayire no de, mpanimfo gye di sɛ ɛbɛyɛ sɛ ɛma sandbars a ahohoro asi ne dada mu.

input.mt: Ɛwom sɛ nsu a ɛwɔ asase so no bɛsɔre wɔ nsuyiri no akyi bɛyɛ mita kakraa bi deɛ, nanso mpanyimfo no hwɛ kwan sɛ ɛbɛdɔɔso ama wɔatumi asan asiesie anwea a ɛwɔ nsu no mu no.
input.src: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.

reference: Wɔmɔɔ tsunami ho kɔkɔ biara, na sɛnea Jakarta geophysics asoɛ no kyerɛ no, wɔmmɔ tsunami biara ho kɔkɔ esiane sɛ asase woso no nnuru magnitude 6.5 ahwehwɛde no ho.

input.mt: Wɔamfa tsunami ho kɔkɔbɔ biara amma, na Jakarta asasewosow ho dwumadibea no kyerɛ sɛ, wɔremma tsunami ho kɔkɔbɔ biara mma efisɛ asasewosow no anyɛ kɛse a ɛboro 6.5.
input.src: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.

reference: Ɛmfa ho sɛ asaasewosow a esii wↄ po mu biara nni hɔ no, temanmufo no fii ase bɔɔ hu na wɔguan gyaa wɔn nnwuma na wɔfifii wɔn afie mu.

input.mt: Ɛwom sɛ na tsunami ho asiane biara nni hɔ de, nanso nnipa a wɔte hɔ no fii ase bɔɔ hu, na wofii ase gyaw wɔn nnwuma ne wɔn afie hɔ.
input.src: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.

reference: Ɛwom sɛ na Winfrey werɛ aho wɔ ne nkradi a etwa to no mu, ɔmaa n’akyitaa fo tee ase sɛ ɔbɛsan aba.

input.mt: Ɛwom sɛ Winfrey fii ase sui de, nanso ɔmaa emu daa hɔ pefee sɛ ɔbɛsan aba.
input.src: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.

reference: “ Wei ɛnkɔyɛ nkradie a ɛtwa to. Wei yɛ briri emu to na ebue biribi foforo nso kwan.”

input.mt: "Eyi renyɛ adepa. Eyi yɛ ti biako a etwa to ne ti foforo a etwa to".
input.src: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."

reference: Nsunsuanso a etwa to a efiri Namibia ɔmanpanin ne mmarahyɛbagua abato no kyerɛ sɛ ɔmanpanin a ɔte agua so no Hifikepunye Pohamba adi nkunim na mma ɔde dii nkunim no dɔɔso paa yiye.

input.mt: Namibia manpanyin ne ɔmanpanyin abatoɔ no awiei nsunsuanso no kyerɛ sɛ wɔasan apaw ɔmanpanyin a ɔda hɔ yi, Hifikepunye Pohamba, wɔ mmirika kɛse mu.
input.src: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.

reference: Amannyɔku a ɛredi tumi a ɛyɛ South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), tumi nyaa mmarahyɛbagua nkongua dodow no ara wɔ abato no mu.

input.mt: Ɔfã a wodi tumi a wɔfrɛ no South West Africa People's Organization (SWAPO) nso nyaa mmaransɛm no mu dodow no ara.
input.src: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.

reference: Coalition ne Afghan asraafo kɔ beae hɔ kɔgyee hɔ bɔɔ so na ɔsomaa coalition afoforo wimhyɛn sɛ ɛnkɔ hɔ nkɔ boa.

input.mt: Amanamanmufo ne Afghanistanfo asraafo kɔɔ mpɔtam hɔ sɛ wɔmmɛhwɛ saa beae no so, na wɔsomaa amanamanmufo wimhyɛn foforo sɛ wɔnkɔboa wɔn.
input.src: Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.

reference: Nkwanhyia no sii wɔ mmeae a na ɛhɔ yɛ mmepɔ mmepɔ, na wɔgye di ɛno na ɛkɔ faa gya hyehyeɛ no baae.

input.mt: Ná atoyerɛnkyɛm no asi wɔ mmepɔw so, na wogye di sɛ atamfo gya na efii mu bae.
input.src: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.

reference: Mmɔden wɔrebɔ sɛ wɔbɛhunu beae a nkwanhyia no sii no nyɛ yiye esiane wim tebea a ɛnyɛ papa nti.

input.mt: Bere a wɔrehwehwɛ baabi a atoyerɛnkyɛm no sii no, na wim tebea ne asase no yɛ den.
input.src: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.

reference: Medical charity Mangola no, Medecines Sans Frontieres ne Wiase Apomuden Ahyehyɛde no ka sɛ ɛyɛ biribi esen biara a asi wɔ ɔman no mu.

input.mt: Ayaresafo aboafo a wɔfrɛ wɔn Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres ne Wiase Nyinaa Akwahosan Ahyehyɛde no ka sɛ ɛno ne yare a ɛyɛ hu sen biara a wɔayɛ ho kyerɛwtohɔ wɔ ɔman no mu.
input.src: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.

reference: Kasamafo ma Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman kaa sɛ: “ Angola rekɔ baabi a ɛyɛ hu a na asɛm da so ara nnyɛ wɔ Angola,ɔno na ɔkae.

input.mt: Medecines Sans Frontiere ananmusifo Richard Veerman kae sɛ: "Angola rekɔ ne yare a ɛyɛ hu sen biara no mu, na tebea no da so ara yɛ bɔne wɔ Angola", ɔkae.
input.src: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.

reference: Akansi no fii ase anɔpa nnɔndu (10:00am) na wim yɛ kama pa agye nsu kakra a pete anɔpa tutuutu no. Na da no yɛ kama 7’s rugby.

input.mt: Ná agorɔ no fi ase anɔpa nnɔn du, na na ewim yɛ fɛ, na na osu a ɛretɔ anɔpa a ɛretɔ ntɛmntɛm no akyi no, na ɛyɛ da pa a ɛsɛ sɛ yedi rugby.
input.src: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.

reference: South Africa man no bɔɔ wɔ ho mmɔden mfitiase pɛɛ, ɛno nti ɛma wɔhyɛɛ aduonu asia (26) de dii nkonim a Zambia man no antumi ante ɛka no mu biako mpo.

input.mt: Afrika Anafo fam a wɔyɛ nkonimdifo wɔ nkonimdi no mu no fii ase wɔ ɔkwan a ɛfata so bere a wodii nkonimdi 26 - 00 wɔ Zambia a ɔyɛ nkonimdifo a ɔto so 5 no so.
input.src: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.

reference: Akansi no mu yɛ den wɔ South Africafo fam ne wɔ nuammanom a wɔwɔ anafo fam no bɔ wɔ ho mmɔden tu mpɔn bere a na akansi no kɔ anim no.

input.mt: Nanso bere a na South Africa ne wɔn nuanom mmea a wɔwɔ anafo fam no redi agorɔ no, na wɔn ani nnye ho koraa.
input.src: Looking decidedly rusty in the game against their southern sisters, South Africa however steadily improved as the tournament progressed.

reference: Ɔkwan a bɔɔlobɔfo fa so danedane bɔɔlo no, bɔ wɔn bea ho ban wɔ agoprama no so, sɛnea wɔn nnyinaa bɔɔmu yɛ adwuma wɔ agoprama no so no, na ɛyɛ sononko koraa ɛma no da adi sɛ wɔn na wɔbɛdi nkonim wɔ akansi no awie.

input.mt: Wɔn ahohyɛso a edi mũ, sɛnea wɔde bɔmm di dwuma, ne kuw mu adwuma a wɔyɛe no maa wɔn ho dwiriw wɔn, na na ɛda adi pefee sɛ kuw yi na ɛsɛ sɛ wɔko tia.
input.src: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.

reference: Mpaninfo a wɔwɔ Amsterdam ne Anne Frank misiɔm ka sɛ yare wɔ nnua no mu na ɛde yare brɛ ɔmanfo nyinaa na wɔka sɛ na ɛyɛ hu sɛ ɛbetu atese.

input.mt: Amsterdam kurow ne Anne Frank Ahorow Nhyiam Asa no mpanyimfo ka sɛ nnua no wɔ mmoawammoawa bi mu, na ɛde asiane ba ɔman apɔwmuden so, efisɛ wɔka sɛ asiane wom sɛ ɛbɛhwe ase.
input.src: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.

reference: Wɔayɛ nhyehyɛe sɛ wɔntwa wɔ Benada, nanso wɔtwe sensenn bere kɔɔto buae putupru mu.

input.mt: Ná wɔahyehyɛ sɛ wobekum no Dwoda, nanso wɔagye no nkwa bere a asɛnnibea no de asɛnnennen sii gyinae no.
input.src: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.

reference: Abodan no ano nyinaa, wɔtoo din " Nuammaanom Nson No", kɛseɛ yɛ mita 100 kɔsi 250 (fiit 328 kɔsi 820) wɔ trɛ mu.

input.mt: Wɔfrɛɛ amoa no mu biara sɛ "Anuanom Baason" na ne ntini bɛyɛ mita 100 kosi 250 (328 kosi 820).
input.src: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.

reference: Infrared imfoni kyerɛ sɛ tɛmperekya a ɛda nso firi anadwo ne adekyee no kyerɛ sɛ ɛbɛtumi ayɛ bodan.

input.mt: Anuanom a wɔwɔ asase so no ahu sɛ awia ne anadwo asorɔkye no nsesa, na ɛma yehu sɛ ɛbɛyɛ sɛ wɔyɛ amoa.
input.src: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.

reference: Ɛhɔ yɛ nwonu kyɛn beae hɔ wɔ adekyee na wim yɛ nwonu anadwo.

input.mt: "Wɔdwo sen asase a atwa wɔn ho ahyia awia ne anadwo.
input.src: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.

reference: Glen Cushing a ɔwɔ United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Kuo na ɛwɔ Northern Arizona Suapɔn mu wɔ l Flagstaff, Arizona kaa sɛ; “Wɔn thermal no su nsesa te abodan akɛse wɔ asase so a daa ne tɛmperekya no gyina faako, nanso ɛne no hyia wɔ ntokuro akɛse a ɛwɔ fam no” .

input.mt: Wɔn ho nyɛ den te sɛ amoa akɛse a ɛwɔ asase so a wɔtaa yɛ wɔn ho ahometew no, nanso ɛne sɛ wɔyɛ amoa a emu dɔ wɔ fam no hyia", sɛnea United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team ne Northern Arizona University a ɛwɔ Flagstaff, Arizona no muni Glen Cushing kae no.
input.src: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.

reference: Wɔ France, aba a wɔto wɔ tech-kwan so no wɔ fam: wɔn a wɔto aba no te wɔn ho wɔ booth no mu, de krataa wɔaprente a ɛkyerɛ deɛ wɔpɛ no de hyɛ envelope mu.

input.mt: Wɔ France no, amanne biara mu no, na nnipa a wɔpaw wɔn no nni nimdeɛ pii: Wɔn a wɔpaw wɔn no twe wɔn ho fi wɔn ho wɔ ɔdan bi mu, na wɔde krataa bi a wɔde akyerɛkyerɛ wɔn a wɔpɛ sɛ wɔpaw wɔn no gu nhoma mmobɔwee bi mu.
input.src: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.

reference: Sɛ mpaninfo no hunu atofo no nipa ko a, atofo de envelope no hyɛ abato adaka no na ɔde wɔn nsa hyɛ abato roll no ase.

input.mt: Bere a mpanyimfo no hu sɛ ɔpawfo no yɛ onipa bɛn no, ɔpawfo no de nkrataa no gu nkotoku no mu na ɔkyerɛw ne nsa gu nkrataa no so.
input.src: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.

reference: French abato mmara no wɔ nhyehyɛe ketee ɛfa proceedings ho.

input.mt: France mmaransɛm mmara de mmara a emu yɛ den di dwuma.
input.src: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.

reference: Ɛfiri 1988, na abato nnaka no ɛyɛ deɛ wohwɛ mu a wohunu deɛ ɛwom sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a bɛhwɛadefo bɛhunu sɛ envelope biara nnim ansa na wɔrefi aba to ase ne afei wɔamfa envelope biara anka ho gye deɛ wɔakenkan ne atofo a mmara ma kwan no.

input.mt: Efi afe 1988 reba no, ɛsɛ sɛ wɔde nhyiamu nnua no di dwuma wɔ ɔkwan bi so a ɛbɛma afifidefo ne ahwɛfo ahu sɛ nkotoku biara nni hɔ bere a wɔredi toto no, na wɔmmfa nkotoku biara nka ho, gye wɔn a wɔkan wɔn ho na wɔama wɔn tumi no nko ara.
input.src: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.

reference: Wɔan a wɔgyina maa wɔtoo wɔn so aba no bɛtumi ama ananmusifo abɛhwɛ deɛ ɛrekɔ so no nyinaa. Anwummere no, atuhoamafo kenken abato no bere a wɔhwɛ deɛ ɛrekɔ so no yiye bere a wɔredi akwankyerɛ pɔtee bi so.

input.mt: Wɔn a wɔpɛ sɛ wɔpaw wɔn ho no betumi asoma wɔn ananmusifo ma wɔahu nea ɛrekɔ so wɔ nhyiam no ase.
input.src: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.

reference: Ɛnkyɛɛe na ASUS Eee PC, daa world-wide ɛma cost-saving ne functionality faktɛs, bɛyɛɛ asɛmti kɛse paa wɔ 2007 Tapei IT Bosome.

input.mt: ASUS Eee PC, a wodii kan yii no adi wɔ wiase nyinaa de hwɛɛ sikasɛm ne dwumadi ho nneɛma no, bɛyɛɛ asɛmti kɛse wɔ 2007 Taipei IT Month mu.
input.src: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.

reference: Nanso consumer market a ɛwɔ laptop kɔmputa so no bɛda nso na asesa bere wɔbɔɔ ASUS no aba so wɔ 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award a ɛfiri Executive Yuan a ɛwɔ Republic of China.

input.mt: Nanso bere a ASUS nsa kaa Taiwan Sustainable Award a China Republic's Executive Yuan de mae wɔ afe 2007 mu no, kɔmputa a wɔde di dwuma wɔ kɔmputa so de, wɔbɛsesa koraa.
input.src: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.

reference: Siteehyin no wɛbsaet kyerɛkyerɛ dwumadi no mu sɛ “ sɛ old sukuu radio theater a geeky spin foforo a na ɛyɛ nwonwa.

input.mt: Intanɛt dwumadibea no Intanɛt dwumadibea no kyerɛkyerɛ dwumadi no mu sɛ "ɔ sukuu dedaw radio agodibea a wɔabɔ ho ban foforo a ɛyɛ nwonwa!"
input.src: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"

reference: Wɔ ne nna edi nkan mu no, dwumadi no kɔɔ so wɔ ntanɛte radio so bere tenten wɔ radio no site a ɛyɛ TogiNet Radio, site wɔn ani ku radio so kasa ho.

input.mt: Wɔ ne nna a edi kan mu no, na Intanɛt dwumadibea a agye din TogiNet Radio nkutoo na wɔde dwumadi no di dwuma.
input.src: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.

reference: 2015 awiee, TogiNet tee AstroNet Radio sɛ siteehyin no fa no bi.

input.mt: Wɔ afe 2015 awiei no, TogiNet de AstroNet Radio sii hɔ sɛ baa dwumadibea.
input.src: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.

reference: Dwumadi no de sini twafo a wɔde nne di dwuma na edii dwuma, a wɔn a wɔwɔ Texas Apuei fam nim

input.mt: Mfiase no, na wɔyɛ amateur voice actors wɔ East Texas.
input.src: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.

reference: Nneɛma wɔfom fa buu so anadwo fa yi, esiane sɛ na banbɔfo nni Bishkek sitiriit.

input.mt: Wobu akontaa sɛ adwotwa no kɔɔ so anadwo no nyinaa, esiane sɛ na mmarahyɛfo nni hɔ wɔ Bishkek mmɔnten so nti.
input.src: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.

reference: Bɛhwɛadrni biako bi ka sɛ na Bishkek reyɛ akɔyɛ sɛ baabi a “basabasayɛ rekɔ so”, bere nnipa too wɔn ho guu mmɔten so fomm nkrɔfo sotɔɔ mu nneɛma.

input.mt: Ɔhwɛfo bi kyerɛe sɛ Bishkek kɔ "ahokyere" mu, bere a nkurɔfo akuwakuw tu mmirika wɔ mmɔnten so na wɔresɛe nnwumakuw a wɔtɔn nneɛma wɔ hɔ no.
input.src: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.

reference: Wɔn a wɔtete Bishkek bɔɔ ayɛkyerɛfo a wɔfiri anafo wɔ basabasayɛ no ho.

input.mt: Bishkekfo pii kae sɛ mmara a ɛnteɛ no fa nnipa a wofi anafo fam no ho.
input.src: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.

reference: South Africa ahyɛ All Black (New Zealand) wɔ rugby union Tri Nations match wɔ Royal Bafokeng Stadium ɛwɔ Rustenburg, South Africa.

input.mt: South Africa adi All Blacks (New Zealand) so nkonim wɔ rugby union Tri Nations mu wɔ Royal Bafokeng Stadium wɔ Rustenburg, South Africa.
input.src: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.

reference: Sokɔɔ a etwa to yɛ pɔint-biako, 21 kɔ si 20, na ɛmaa All Black nkunim a wɔdi toatoaa so 15 ba awiee.

input.mt: Nsrahwɛ a etwa to no yɛ nkonimdi a wɔde pon biako na ewiee, 21 kosi 20, na All Blacks no dii nkonimdi mpɛn 15.
input.src: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.

reference: Ɛdema Springboks, ɛkɔ wiee match-nnum a wɔdi streak totoaa so.

input.mt: Wɔ Springboks no fam no, na wɔadi nkonimdi mpɛn anum.
input.src: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.

reference: Na ɛyɛ akansi a etwa to ma All Blacks na wɔadi kan adi nkunim nnawɔtwe abien a na atwam no.

input.mt: Ná ɛyɛ All Blacks a wonyaa nkonimbo no nnawɔtwe abien a atwam ni no nsa ano ko a etwa to.
input.src: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.

reference: Akansi a etwa to no bɛkɔ so wɔ Ellis Prama so wɔ nnawɔtwe a edi hɔ wɔ Johannesburg, bere a Springboks no ne Australi bɛsi akan.

input.mt: Nnawɔtwe a edi hɔ no, wobedi nkonimdi no wɔ Ellis Park wɔ Johannesburg, bere a Springboks ne Australia redi agorɔ no.
input.src: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.

reference: Asasewoso a ano nyɛ den maa Montana atɔefo ho dwirii wɔn wɔ Dwoada anwwumere 10:08.

input.mt: Asasewosow bi a ano yɛ den sɔree Montana atɔe fam wɔ Dwoda anɔpa 10:08.
input.src: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.

reference: United States Geological Survey (USGS) ne Ɔman mu Asasewosow Nsɛm ho Asoe nsa nkaa amannebɔ sɛ biribi asɛe.

input.mt: United States Geological Survey (USGS) ne ne National Earthquake Information Center anhu sɛ nneɛma asɛe ntɛm ara.
input.src: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.

reference: Na asasewoso no gyina 20 km (maale 15) wɔ Dillon atifi-atifiapue ne 65 km (maale 40) wɔ Butte anafo.

input.mt: Asasewosow no sii wɔ Dillon atifi apuei fam bɛyɛ kilomita 20 ne Butte anafo fam bɛyɛ kilomita 65.
input.src: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.

reference: Nkekae a ɛfi nnomaa kɔ nnipa mu no, H5N1, ada adi sɛ aka daabodaabo a wɔawuwu, wɔhunuu no Dwoada wɔ marshland a ɛbɛn Lyon wɔ France apue.

input.mt: Wɔahu sɛ nnomaa nsamanwaw a ɛkum nnipa a wɔfrɛ no H5N1 no afa wuram mmoadabi a wɔahu no Dwoda da a etwaam wɔ sare so baabi a ɛbɛn Lyon wɔ France apuei fam no mu.
input.src: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.

reference: France ne kuro a ɛtɔ so nson wɔ European Union a yaremmoawa no kaa wɔn; a edi Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece ne Italy so.

input.mt: France yɛ ɔman a ɛto so ason wɔ European Union a wonya yare yi; edi Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece ne Italy akyi.
input.src: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.

reference: wɔate sɛ H5N1 yare no abɛpue mu wɔ Croatia ne Denmark a wɔnsii pi.

input.mt: H5N1 ho nsɛm a wosusuw sɛ ɛrekɔ so wɔ Croatia ne Denmark no nnya mmae.
input.src: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.

reference: Chambers asaman Onyankopɔn wɔ “ awuwuawu, ɔsɛe ne awurukasɛm wɔ wɔn a wɔtete Asase so ɔpepem pii mu no.

input.mt: Ná Chambers abɔ Onyankopɔn sobo wɔ "asase so nnipa ɔpepem pii wu, sɛe, ne awudisɛm ho".
input.src: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."

reference: Chambers, ɛyɛ agnostic, ka sɛ nsaman no yɛ “nni nnyinaso” na “obiara tumi saman obi”.

input.mt: Chambers, a onnye nni sɛ Onyankopɔn wɔ hɔ no, ka sɛ n'asɛm no yɛ "abamammɔ" na "obiara betumi abɔ obiara sobo".
input.src: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."

reference: Asɛm no sɛnea French opera, Camille Saint-Saens,de too gua no, a”wɔde n’aseta nyinaa sii hɔ maa nnubɔne ne Japan.”

input.mt: Nsɛm a Camille Saint-Saens kyerɛw wɔ Franse opera no mu no fa obi a "ɔdɔ nnubɔne ne Japan na ɛma n'asetena yɛ papa" ho.
input.src: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."

reference: Wei nti, agofo no nom kanabisi wɔ prama so, na theatre no mpo hyɛ bɛhwɛadefo nkuran sɛ wɔmfa wɔn ho nhyɛ mu.

input.mt: Nea enti a wɔyɛ saa ne sɛ, nnwontofo no nom nnubɔne wɔ pon so, na sini no ankasa hyɛ nnipakuw no nkuran sɛ wɔnka ho.
input.src: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.

reference: Newt Gingrich a ɔyɛ Fie hɔ Kasamafo dada, Texas gɔvna Rick Perry ne congresswoman Michele Bachmann tɔɔ so nnan,nnum ne nsia.

input.mt: Newt Gingrich, Texas amrado Rick Perry, ne Congresswoman Michele Bachmann a na ɔsan yɛ Ɔmampanyin wɔ Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛnnibea Asɛn
input.src: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.

reference: Bere a nsunsuanso no bɛtɔɔ gua no Gingrichbɔɔ aba so Santorum, na ɔnhunu asɛm a ɔnka mfa Romney ho, a ɛnam so na wɔkekaa nsɛm a ɛnyɛ faa Gingrich ho wɔ ntoabɔ no mu.

input.mt: Bere a aba no bae no, Gingrich kamfoo Santorum, nanso ɔkaa Romney ho nsɛm a ɛyɛ den, efisɛ wɔmaa ɔsatu ho dawuru ahorow a ɛho ntew too gua wɔ Iowa tiaa Gingrich.
input.src: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.

reference: Perry kaa sɛ ɔbɛsane “ akɔ Texas abɛhwɛ mmuae anadwo yi caucus, we hinaam so sɛ mɛtumi akɔ m’anim wɔ saa akansie yi mu”, nanso ɔka sɛ ɔbɛtoa so agyinam asi akan wɔ Ɔpɛpɔn 21 wɔ South Carolina primary no mu.

input.mt: Perry kae sɛ "ɔbɛsan akɔ Texas akɔhwehwɛ nsrahwɛ a wɔyɛe anadwo yi, na wasusuw sɛ ɔkwan bi wɔ hɔ a mɛfa so adi nkonim wɔ mmirikatu yi mu anaa", nanso akyiri yi ɔkae sɛ ɔbɛkɔ so adi mmirika no na wakodi South Carolina mmirikatu no wɔ January 21 mu.
input.src: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.

reference: Bachmann a ɔdii nkunim wɔ Ames Straw Abato no mu wɔ Ɔsana asi gyinae sɛ ɔde ntoabɔ no bɛba awiee.

input.mt: Bachmann a odii nkonim wɔ Ames Straw Poll mu wɔ August mu no sii gyinae sɛ obegyae ne ɔsatu no.
input.src: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.

reference: Wɔde deɛ ɔtwa mfoni no kɔɔ Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, na ɛhɔ na ɔkɔ gyae mu.

input.mt: Wɔde mfoniniyɛfo no kɔɔ Ronald Reagan UCLA ayaresabea, na ɛhɔ na owui.
input.src: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.

reference: Wɔbɔ amanne sɛ ɔwui wɔ ne mfe 20 mu. Nsɛm a ɔde too gua no mu no, Mieber kaa sɛ “ Ɛwom sɛ m’ankasa nka saa akwanhyia yi ho tee de, me nsusui ne me mpaebɔ ka abusua wɔn dehyeɛ ho aka no.

input.mt: Wɔ amanneɛbɔ bi mu no, Bieber kae sɛ: "Ɛwom sɛ na minni hɔ, na na minni ho dwuma tẽẽ wɔ akwanhyia a emu yɛ awerɛhow yi mu de, nanso m'adwene ne me mpaebɔ ka ɔbaa no abusuafo ho".
input.src: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."

reference: TMZ wɛbsaet a ɛde agodi ho nsɛm to gua ka sɛ mfonitwafo no de ne kaa no sii Sepulveda Boulevard nkyɛn babi sɛ ɔretwi baabi polisi gyina no ,foni ansa na ɔretwa kwan no mu atoa so, ansa na California Highway Patrol polisi dwumayɛni no a ɔrehwɛ sɛ trafike gyina no so rehyɛ no sɛ, ɔnsan ntwa mu, mprɛnu.

input.mt: Anigyede ho nsɛm ho wɛbsaet TMZ te ase sɛ mfoniniyɛfo no gyinae ne kar wɔ Sepulveda Boulevard no fã foforo so na ɔbɔɔ mmɔden sɛ obetwa polisifo gyinabea no ho mfonini ansa na watwa kwan no na wakɔ so, ma enti California Highway Patrol polisifo a na wɔreyɛ akwantu gyinabea no hyɛɛ no sɛ ɔmfa no mmra, mprenu.
input.src: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.

reference: Apolisifo kyerɛ sɛ drɔbani a ɔde kaa bɔ mfonitwafo no anhwɛ ɔmmɔ ne kwaadu biara.

input.mt: Sɛnea polisifo kyerɛ no, ɛbɛyɛ den sɛ obi a ɔde kar no baa mfoniniyɛfo no so no renni fɔ.
input.src: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.

reference: Bere aka mɛdaas du nnwɔtwe na ɛhɔ hɔ da mu no nyinaa no, aman pii nsa nkaa mɛdaa podium biara.

input.mt: Esiane sɛ wɔdi agyiraehyɛde 18 pɛ da biara nti, aman pii ntumi nni agyiraehyɛde no so.
input.src: With only eighteen medals available a day, a number of countries have failed to make the medal podium.

reference: Wɔn a wɔka ho ne Netherlands,a Anna Jochemsen tɔɔ so nkron wɔ mmaa standing clas ɛwɔ Super-G nnora ɛne Finland ɛnna Katja Saarinen tɔɔ so du wɔ dwumadi korɔ no ara mu.

input.mt: Wɔn mu bi ne Netherlands, a Anna Jochemsen dii nkonimdi a edi kan wɔ mmea mu wɔ Super-G no mu, ne Finland a Katja Saarinen dii nkonimdi a ɛto so du wɔ ade koro no ara mu.
input.src: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.

reference: Australia Mitchell Gourleytɔɔ so du biako wɔ mmarimma standing Super-G no mu. Czech kansifo Oldrich Jelinek tɔɔ so du nsia wɔ mmarimma sitting Super-G no mu.

input.mt: Australiafo Mitchell Gourley dii dwuma a ɛto so du wɔ mmarimaa Super-G no mu. Czechfo Oldrich Jelinek dii dwuma a ɛto so dunsia wɔ mmarimaa Super-G no mu.
input.src: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.

reference: Arly Velasquez a ɔfiri Mexico tɔɔ so du nnum wɔ mmarimma sitting Super-G no mu. New Zealand's Adam Hal tɔɔ so nkron wɔ mmarimma standing Super-G no mu.

input.mt: Ná Arly Velasquez a ofi Mexico no di kan wɔ mmarima a wɔtete Super-G no mu. Ná Adam Hall a ofi New Zealand no di kan wɔ mmarima a wɔtete Super-G no mu.
input.src: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.

reference: Poland mmarimma skier a wɔn ani afira Maciej Krezel ne tenenee Anna Ogarzynska tɔɔ so du abiɛsa wɔ Super-G no mu. South Koreani Jong Seork tɔɔ so aduonu nnan wɔ mmarimma sitting Super-G no mu.

input.mt: Poland mmarima a wɔn ani afura Maciej Krezel ne animdefo Anna Ogarzynska dii Super-G no mu aduonu abiɛsa. South Korea Jong Seork Park dii aduonu anan wɔ mmarima a wɔtete Super-G no mu.
input.src: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.

reference: ℇde fa asɛm a wɔde kɔɔ asɛnnibea ne sɛ, efi a ɛfi UN nsraban a w’ankora so yiye nti na ɛmaa efi wura asubɔnten Artibonite a ɛyɛ Haiti asubɔnten akɛse no mu biako.

input.mt: Sɛnea asɛnnibea no kyerɛ no, wɔantotow nneɛma a efi Amanaman Nkabom no atenae no mu yiye, na ɛmaa mmoawammoawa kɔɔ Artibonite Asubɔnten a ɛsen biara wɔ Haiti no mu biako no mu.
input.src: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.

reference: Beaea ɛhwɛ atɛntrenne ne dodow amammui a ɛwɔ Haiti man no mu no ayɛ nhwehwɛmu bi a ɛkyerɛ sɛ Nepal UN banbɔfo no de yare no bɔ wura Haiti man no mu abre a wɔn ani nna.

input.mt: Haiti Asɛnnibea a Ɛhwɛ Atɛntrenee ne Demokrasia Ho Nsɛm So no de nhwehwɛmu a wɔyɛe a ɛkyerɛ sɛ Nepalfo a wɔwɔ Amanaman Nkabom no mu a wɔhwɛ ma asomdwoe ba no de yare no baa Haiti a na wɔnnim.
input.src: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.

reference: Danielle Langtagne, a ɔyɛ UN yare no mu ɔbenfo kae se, ɛda adi sɛ, banbɔfo no na ɛde yare no bae.

input.mt: Danielle Lantagne a ɔyɛ Amanaman Nkabom ho nimdefo a ɔhwɛ yare no so no kae sɛ ɛbɛyɛ sɛ asomdwoe asraafo na wɔde yare no bae.
input.src: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.

reference: Ɔyarefo no akɔ Nigeria, ɛyɛ beae a Ebola yare no bi apuepue hɔ.

input.mt: Ná ɔyarefo no akɔ Nigeria, baabi a Ebola mmoawa bi ato no.
input.src: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.

reference: Ayaresabea no adi nheyɛe a wɔde di nsayare ano si no so, a de wɔde ɔyarefo no firi nnipa afoforo mu na yare noasane wɔn no ɛka ho.

input.mt: Ayaresabea no adi nhyehyɛe a wɔde di atiridiinini ho dwuma no so, a emu bi ne sɛ wɔde ɔyarefo no tetew ne ho fi afoforo ho sɛnea ɛbɛyɛ a afoforo rentumi nnya atiridiinini.
input.src: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.

reference: Ɛwom sɛ ɔfirii show no mu 1993 de ɔkɔɔ so kuraa abodin executive producer no mu, na afe biara ne nsa ka dɔla ɔpepem pii sɛ ne mfasode ‘rɔyaatisi’.

input.mt: Ɛwom sɛ ogyaw dwumadi no wɔ afe 1993 mu de, nanso ɔkɔɔ so ara nyaa dɔla ɔpepem pii afe biara.
input.src: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.

reference: Nsɛm ho amannebɔ adwumako ɛde Xinhua dii kan de too gua sɛ wɔbɛfa wimhyɛn bi nnommum.

input.mt: Kan no, China atesɛm krataa Xinhua bɔɔ amanneɛ sɛ wɔafa wimhyɛn bi.
input.src: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.

reference: Akyi yi ɛbɛtɔɔ gua sɛ wɔde topae hunahunaa wɔn na ɛsane de n’ani kyerɛɛ mu wɔ Afghanistan na ɛkɔ sii Kandahar.

input.mt: Akyiri yi amanneɛbɔ bi kyerɛe sɛ wɔde bɔmb hunahunaa wimhyɛn no, na wɔsan de no kɔɔ Afghanistan, na wosii fam wɔ Kandahar.
input.src: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.

reference: NgoMvulo, uSara Danius, unobhala osisigxina weKomiti yeNobel yoNcwadi kwiSweden Academy, uxele esidlangalaleni ngexesha lenkqubo kanomathotholo kwiSveriges Radio eSweden ikomiti, engakwazanga ukumfumana ngqo uBob Dylan ngokuthe ngqo ngokuphumelela i-2016 Nobel Prize kuLwazi, iinzame zayo zokufikelela kuye.

input.mt: NgoMvulo, uSara Danius, unobhala osisigxina weKomiti yeNobel yeNcwadi kwiSweden Academy, wabhengeza esidlangalaleni ngexesha lenkqubo kanomathotholo kwiSveriges Radio eSweden ukuba ikomiti, ekungakwazi ukufikelela kuBob Dylan ngokuthe ngqo malunga nokufumana uMvuzo weNobel weNcwadi ka-2016, iyekile imizamo yayo yokufikelela kuye.
input.src: On Monday, Sara Danius, permanent secretary of the Nobel Committee for Literature at the Swedish Academy, publicly announced during a radio program on Sveriges Radio in Sweden the committee, unable to reach Bob Dylan directly about winning the 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, had abandoned its efforts to reach him.

reference: UDanius uthe, "Ngalo mzuzu asenzi nto. Ndinxebelelene ndathumela i-imeyile koyemtu ophangela kufuphi naye ndafumana iimpendulo ezinobuhlobo kakhulu. Okwangoku, oku kwanele."

input.mt: UDanius wathi, "Okwangoku asenzi nto. Ndifowunele ndaza ndathumela ii-imeyile kumncedisi wakhe osondeleyo ndaza ndafumana iimpendulo ezinobubele. Okwangoku, oko kwanele".
input.src: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."
