reference: Nínú àgbékalẹ̀ gbòógì àfihàn géèmù ilẹ̀ Tokyo tọjọ́ àlàmísì, ààrẹ ilẹ̀ Nintendo, Satoru Iwata se àfihàn ìsàkóso àwòrán fún iléẹṣẹ́ tuntun Nintendo Revolution.

input.mt: Ní ìsọfúnni pàtàkì tó wáyé ní Tokyo Game Show lọ́jọ́ Thursday, Satoru Iwata tó jẹ́ ààrẹ Nintendo ṣe ìfilọ̀ ìṣe àbójútó fún ìkànnì Nintendo Revolution tuntun ti ilé iṣẹ́ náà.
input.src: At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.

reference: Ó jọ ohun ìdarí ẹ̀rọ amóhùnmáwòrán, ohun tí ẹ ó fi tukọ̀ lo sẹ́ńsọ̀ méjì tí wọ́n gbé sí ẹ̀gbẹ́tẹ̀ifisàn ẹni tí ó ń lòó láti yígun ipo rẹ̀ ni ọnà mẹ́ta ọ̀tọ̀ọ̀tọ̀.

input.mt: Ẹ̀rọ tó ń darí orí tẹlifíṣọ̀n yìí dà bí ohun tó ń darí orí tẹlifíṣọ̀n, ó sì máa ń lo àwọn ohun ẹ̀rí méjì tó wà nítòsí tẹlifíṣọ̀n ẹni tó ń lò láti mọ ibi tó wà nínú ọ̀nà mẹ́ta.
input.src: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.

reference: Jiankalo Fisisela o lè ṣàkóso moto mọ́,ó dẹ̀ mú u kí èrè sísá náà parí lẹ́sẹ̀kẹsẹ̀ tí wọ́n bẹ̀rẹ̀.

input.mt: Giancarlo Fisichella pàdánù agbára tó ní lórí ọkọ̀ ayọ́kẹ́lẹ́ rẹ̀, kò sì pẹ́ tó fi parí eré náà.
input.src: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.

reference: Ọmọ egbẹ́ rẹ̀ Fenando Alonso ló darí fún púpọ̀ nínú ere ìdíjé, ṣùgbọ́n ó parí lẹ́yìn ìdádúro re, bóyá nítorí pé wọn ò fí ojúẹsẹ̀ṣ mọ́tò há dada.

input.mt: Fernando Alonso tó jẹ́ alábàákẹ́gbẹ́ rẹ̀ ló ṣáájú nínú ìdíje náà fún ọ̀pọ̀ ọdún, àmọ́ kò pẹ́ tó fi parí ìdíje náà, ó ṣeé ṣe kó jẹ́ nítorí pé àtẹ́lẹ́yìn ọ̀tún rẹ̀ kò dára.
input.src: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.

reference: “Ó lẹ́wà lọ́pọ́, ó tún kọrin dáradára,” ó sọ́ nípa àkọọ́lẹ̀ ìpàdé àwọn oníròyìn.

input.mt: Gẹ́gẹ́ bí àkọsílẹ̀ ìtòlẹ́sẹẹsẹ náà ṣe sọ, ó sọ pé: "Ó dùn-ún wò gan-an, ó sì máa ń kọrin dáadáa.
input.src: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.

reference: “Gbogbo ìgbà tí a bá se ìgbáradì lóri rẹ̀ ni ara mi ma ń dìde látinú ọkàn mi wá.”

input.mt: Inú mi dùn gan-an nígbàkigbà tá a bá ń ṣe ìdánilẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lórí ọ̀rọ̀ yìí".
input.src: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."

reference: Síbẹ̀síbẹ̀, kò sí ẹ̀ròngbà wípé wọn mú ìdibàjẹ́ bá agbẹ́rù náà.

input.mt: Àmọ́, wọn ò rò pé wọ́n ṣèpalára fún ọkọ̀ náà.
input.src: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.

reference: Ìṣẹ́jú márùn ún síwájú idán, ìjì bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí ni jà, bí ìṣẹ́jú kan si, ìjì náà dé orí àádọ́rin kìlómítà láàrín wákàtí kan…léyìn náà ni òjò bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí ni rọ̀ to bẹ́ẹ̀ ti dídún rẹ̀ lára dàbí abẹ́rẹ́, bẹ́ẹ̀ ni yìnyín ń bọ́ láti ojú ọ̀run, gbogbo ẹnìyàn bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí ní wá rìrì, wọ́n ń bẹ̀rù, wọ́n ń pariwo, wọ́n sì ń sá gba orí ara wọn.

input.mt: Láàárín ìṣẹ́jú márùn-ún, ẹ̀fúùfù kan bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí í jà, ní nǹkan bí ìṣẹ́jú kan lẹ́yìn náà, ẹ̀fúùfù náà ń gùn sí àádọ́rin kìlómítà ní wákàtí kan... nígbà náà, òjò náà bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí í rọ̀, àmọ́ ó lágbára gan-an, ó sì tóbi gan-an débi pé ó máa ń gbá awọ ara rẹ bí abẹ́rẹ́, nígbà náà, ìrì yìnyín kan bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí í ṣubú láti ọ̀run, àwọn èèyàn á bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí í jáyà, wọ́n á sì máa pariwo, wọ́n á sì máa sáré kọjá ara wọn.
input.src: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.

reference: NHK ròyìn pe Ilé ìgbìn agbára nukilia Kaṣiwasaki Kariwa ni Nigata kí ń ṣiṣẹ́ dédé tẹ̀lé.

input.mt: NHK tún ròyìn pé ilé iṣẹ́ iná mànàmáná Káshiwazaki Kariwa ní ìpínlẹ̀ Niigata ti ń ṣiṣẹ́ bó ṣe yẹ.
input.src: NHK also reported that the Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant in Niigata prefecture was operating normally.

reference: A gba pé àwọm ilé tó tó 9400 ní agbègbè náà wà láìsí omo àti pé àwọn tó tó 100 wà láìsí iná.

input.mt: Wọ́n sọ pé nǹkan bí ẹgbẹ̀rún mẹ́rìnlélọ́gọ́rùn-ún [9,400] ilé ni kò ní omi, nǹkan bí ọgọ́rùn-ún [100] sì kò ní iná mànàmáná.
input.src: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.

reference: Àwọn ọ̀nà kán ti bàjẹ́ wón to dá reluwé dúró níbi tó kàn Papa Ọkọ̀ Ofurufu Noto ní Iṣikawa wà ní títì.

input.mt: Àwọn òpópónà kan ti bà jẹ́, wọ́n ti dá iṣẹ́ ọkọ̀ ojú irin dúró ní àwọn àgbègbè tí àjálù náà ti ṣẹlẹ̀, wọ́n sì ti pa ọ̀nà òfuurufú Noto tó wà ní ìpínlẹ̀ Ishikawa mọ́.
input.src: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.

reference: Awon iroyin miin wipe bii eyan mejo lo ku, iroyin osise jeri pe o to 30 to sise; sugbon a o tii mo awon onka ipari.

input.mt: Àwọn ìròyìn kan sọ pé iye àwọn tó kú jẹ́ mẹ́jọ, àwọn ìròyìn ìjọba sì fi hàn pé ó fẹ́rẹ̀ẹ́ tó ọgbọ̀n èèyàn tí wọ́n fara pa; àmọ́ wọn ò tíì mọ iye tí wọ́n kú.
input.src: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.

reference: Àwọn ìsopọ̀ méjì náà siṣẹ́pọ̀ pẹ̀lú ara wọn láti di àwọn kìrísítà tí ó lè dí iṣẹ́ kídìnrín lọ́wọ́ gẹ́gẹ́ bí àwọn olùsàyẹ̀wò ilẹ́ẹ̀kọ́ fásitì ti wí.

input.mt: Àwọn olùṣèwádìí tó wà ní yunifásítì sọ pé àwọn èròjà méjèèjì yìí máa ń bá ara wọn ṣiṣẹ́ kí wọ́n lè dá ẹ̀dọ̀ sílẹ̀.
input.src: The two compounds react with one another to form crystals that may block kidney function, researchers at the university said.

reference: Àwọn oníiwàdí ri wíp wọ́n se kírísítà pẹ̀lú ìtọo olóńgbò pẹ̀lú àdàlù melamine àticyanuric acid.

input.mt: Àwọn olùṣèwádìí ṣàkíyèsí àwọn kírísítálì tí wọ́n dá sílẹ̀ nínú omi inú màlúù nígbà tí wọ́n fi melamine àti cyanuric acid kún un.
input.src: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.

reference: Bee kede re, mejo ninu idamewa awon oja wa ni o gba owo ori nipase tarifi ni ilu Amerika aarin, aa wo e san.

input.mt: Síbẹ̀, ìdá ọgọ́rin nínú ọgọ́rùn-ún àwọn ẹrù wa ni wọ́n ń san owó orí lórí àwọn orílẹ̀-èdè tó wà ní Àárín Gbùngbùn Amẹ́ríkà.
input.src: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.

reference: Ìyẹn ò ní ìtunmọ̀ sí mi; dájúdájú kò dára.

input.mt: Ó dà bíi pé kò bọ́gbọ́n mu fún mi láti ṣe bẹ́ẹ̀, kò sì ní bọ́gbọ́n mu rárá láti ṣe bẹ́ẹ̀.
input.src: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.

reference: Àwọn afòlókè mẹ́rin nínú ẹgbẹ́ àwọn obìnrin kùnà láti parí àwọn iṣẹ́ wọn, àti márùndínláàdọ́ta nínú mẹ́tàdínlọ́gọ́fà àwọn olùfò nínú ikọ̀ Giant Slalom ló kùnà láti rípò nínú ìdíje.

input.mt: Àwọn obìnrin mẹ́rin tí wọ́n ń sáré lórí òkè nínú ẹgbẹ́ àwọn obìnrin tí wọ́n ń jókòó síbẹ̀ kò lè parí eré ìje wọn, ó sì ṣeé ṣe fún àwọn obìnrin mẹ́ẹ̀ẹ́dọ́gbọ̀n nínú mẹ́tàdínlọ́gọ́fà tí wọ́n ń sáré lórí òkè nínú eré ìje náà láti jáwọ́ nínú eré ìje náà.
input.src: Four skiers in the women's sitting group failed to finish their runs, and 45 of the 117 total skiers in the Giant Slalom failed to rank in the race.

reference: Àwọn àkọọ́lẹ̀ gẹ́gẹ́ bí ó ti se jẹ jáde, ni ó ma tọ́ka sí ìfànfà ẹnubodè, léyìí tí ilẹ̀ Palestine fẹ́ níbàámun pẹ̀lú bí ibodè se wà sáájú oogun Mideast lọ́dún 1967.

input.mt: Ìwé náà, ní ìbámu pẹ̀lú ìsọfúnni náà, yóò tọ́ka sí awuyewuye ààlà, èyí tí Palẹ́sìnì fẹ́ ní ìbámu pẹ̀lú àwọn ààlà tó wà ṣáájú Ogun Àárín Gbùngbùn Ìlà Oòrùn ọdún 1967.
input.src: The document, according to the leak, will refer to the borders dispute, which Palestine wants based on the borders before the 1967 Mideast War.

reference: Ara awon akori ti eto naa dale lori ni oro ojo iwaju ile olominira ti Jerrusalemu ti o se koko si orile ede mejeeji ati ti oro petele Jordani.

input.mt: Àwọn ọ̀rọ̀ mìíràn tí wọ́n tún gbé yẹ̀ wò tún ní í ṣe pẹ̀lú ipò Jerúsálẹ́mù tó máa wà lọ́jọ́ iwájú tó jẹ́ mímọ́ fún àwọn orílẹ̀-èdè méjèèjì àti ọ̀ràn tó jẹ mọ́ Pẹ̀tẹ́lẹ̀ Jọ́dánì.
input.src: Other topics covered reportedly include the future state of Jerusalem which is sacred to both nations and the Jordan Valley issue.

reference: Ní oṣù tó kọjá, ìgbìmọ̀ àrẹ kan filọ̀ pe kí CEP tó wà nípò tẹ́lẹ̀, fi iṣẹ́ lẹ̀ gẹ́gẹ́ bí ara àwọn igbese láti mú kí ilu ṣe ìbò titun.

input.mt: Ní oṣù tó kọjá, ìgbìmọ̀ ààrẹ kan ṣètìlẹ́yìn fún ìyọ̀wẹ̀sí CEP tó wà ṣáájú rẹ̀ gẹ́gẹ́ bí apá kan ètò tí yóò mú kí orílẹ̀-èdè náà lọ sí àwọn ìdìbò tuntun.
input.src: Last month a presidential commission recommended the prior CEP's resignation as part of a package of measures to move the country towards new elections.

reference: Àì lè ṣe ìdìbò ló má ń fa àwọn ìfẹ̀hónú tó le hàn ní ọ̀pọ̀ ìgbà, àwọn kan ní 2011.

input.mt: Àwọn àríyànjiyàn tí wọ́n máa ń ṣe nígbà míì ló fà á tí wọn ò fi ṣe ìdìbò, àwọn kan wà tí wọ́n máa ń ṣe láti ọdún 2011.
input.src: The sometimes-violent protests were triggered by failure to hold elections, some due since 2011.

reference: Ọ́fìsì tó ń rísí ìsàkósó ìṣẹ̀lẹ̀ pàjáwìrì fún ẹkùn Northern Marianas ti sọ ọ́ di mímọ̀ wípé kò sí àkọsílẹ̀ ìbàjẹ́ kankan ní orílẹ̀èdè náà.

input.mt: Àjọ tó ń bójú tó àjálù ní Northern Marianas sọ pé kò sí ìyọnu àjálù kankan tí wọ́n ròyìn ní orílẹ̀-èdè náà.
input.src: The Northern Marianas emergency management office said that there were no damages reported in the nation.

reference: Ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ àwọn tí a mú ní ìdógó ni wọ́n ti gbà kalẹ̀, ṣùgbọ́n bíi mẹ́fà ni wọ́n sàfimúnlẹ̀ pé wọ́n ti kú.

input.mt: Wọ́n ti gba àwọn èèyàn bíi mélòó kan là, wọ́n sì ti rí i pé ó kéré tán mẹ́fà ló ti kú.
input.src: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.

reference: Xinhua sọ ọ́ di mímọ̀ wípé àwọn asèwádìí ìjọba ti gba àpótí dúdú àkọọ́lẹ̀ ogun méjì padà lọ́jọ́ọ̀rú.

input.mt: Xinhua ròyìn pé àwọn olùṣèwádìí ìjọba ṣàwárí àwọn ohun èlò tó ń kọ ìrìn òfuurufú méjì tí wọ́n ń pè ní "àpó dúdú" lọ́jọ́ Wednesday.
input.src: Xinhua reported that government investigators recovered two 'black box' flight recorders on Wednesday.

reference: Asiwaju oniwúra ti Olimpiki ló yẹ kó wẹ̀ ní eré 100m àti 200m igbasile àti eré ikọlẹ mẹ́ta ní Ìdíje Olimpiki, ṣùgbọ́n torípé ó fohùn lẹ̀ wọn ṣàríyanjiyàn bó ya ara rẹ̀ yá gá.

input.mt: Òun tó gba àmì ẹ̀yẹ wúrà ní ìdíje Òlíńpíìkì náà ní láti lúwẹ̀é nínú eré ìdárayá 100m àti 200m àti nínú eré ìdárayá mẹ́ta ní eré ìdárayá Commonwealth Games, ṣùgbọ́n nítorí ìkùnsínú rẹ̀, ó ti di ẹni tó ń ṣiyèméjì.
input.src: The Olympic gold medalist was due to swim in the 100m and 200m freestyle and in three relays at the Commonwealth Games, but due to his complaints his fitness has been in doubt.

reference: O ṣeéṣe kí kọ́mẹ́tì jọ́nà tí omí ma ń fi dé ilé ayé pẹ̀lù nkan ọ̀gáníkì tó ní protini nínú tó ṣì n gbe èémí lẹ́yìn.

input.mt: Ó ṣeé ṣe kó jẹ́ pé oríṣiríṣi òṣùpá ló máa ń mú omi wá sórí ilẹ̀ ayé, wọ́n sì máa ń mú èròjà aṣaralóore jáde, èyí sì máa ń jẹ́ kí ẹ̀mí máa wà láàyè.
input.src: Comets may possibly have been a source of water delivery to the earth along with organic matter that can form proteins and support life.

reference: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.

input.mt: Dr. Ehud, a professor of military science at Dalhousie College in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chairman of the department of medicine and neuroscience of the Canadian Citizens' Association, said the study was still relatively new.
input.src: Dókítà Ehud, akọ́ṣẹmọṣẹ́ ìmọ̀ ogun ní ilé ẹ̀kọ́ gíga Dalhousie ní Halifax, Nova Scotia àti alága ìpín ti ìṣègùn àti ìmọ̀ síẹ̀nsì ti Ẹgbé Ìtọ ṣúggà ti Ará Ìlú Canada sọ pé ìwádìí náà ṣì jẹ́ tuntun.

reference: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.

input.mt: Like officials, he doubted the cure for diabetes and knew that it was not beneficial for people with Type 1 diabetes.
input.src: Bí àwọn àkọ́ṣẹ́mọṣẹ́, ó ṣiyèméjì bóyá àrùn ìtọ ṣúgá lè ní ìwòsàn, tí ó sì mọ̀ pé kò wúlò fún àwọn tó bá ní àrùn ìtọ ṣúgá Type 1.

reference: On Monday, Sara Danius, permanent secretary of the Nobel Committee for Literature at the Swedish Academy, publicly announced during a radio program on Sveriges Radio in Sweden the committee, unable to reach Bob Dylan directly about winning the 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, had abandoned its efforts to reach him.

input.mt: On Monday, Sara Danius, secretary-general of the Swedish Nobel Prize for Fiction, announced in a radio program on Svergies radio in Sweden that organizations could not reach BobDylan by winning the 2016 Nobel Prize for Literature, they were tired of contacting him.
input.src: Ní ọjọ́ Ajé, Sara Danius, akọ̀wé àgbà ti ẹgbẹ́ Nobel fún ìtàn àròsọ ní ilé ẹ̀ka Swedin, tí wọ́n kéde ní ètò kan lóri rẹ́díò lóri rẹ́díò Svergies ní Sweden, àwọn ẹgbk kò lè dé ọ̀dọ̀ BobDylan nípa bíborí ní 2016 Nobel Prize Literature, ó ti rẹ̀ wọ́n láti kàn si.

reference: Previously, Ring's CEO, Jamie Siminoff, remarked the company started when his doorbell wasn't audible from his shop in his garage.

input.mt: Next, Ring's chief executive Jamie Siminoff said the company started operations when the doorbell didn't ring from the store to the garage.
input.src: Tẹ́lẹ̀rí, olùdarí àgbà iléeṣẹ́ Ring, Jamie Siminoff ní iléeṣẹ́ náà bẹ̀rẹ̀ iṣẹ́ nígbà tí aago ẹnu ọ̀nà òhun kò dún sókè látinú ṣọ́ọ̀bù dé inú gáràjì.

reference: Siminoff said sales boosted after his 2013 appearance in a Shark Tank episode where the show panel declined funding the startup.

input.mt: Siminoff said the market surged after his appearance in the 2013 game Shark Tank, where the game's executives were long out of print for the opening game.
input.src: Siminoff sọ pé ọjà lọ sókè lẹ́yìn tí òun hàn nínú eré Shark Tank lọ́dún 2013, ní ibi tí àwọn aláṣẹ eré ti ṣẹ́ pẹ̀ẹ́ lórí ìkówó lé eré ìbẹ̀rẹ̀.

reference: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.

input.mt: At the end of 2017, Siminoff appeared on the cover of QVC magazine.
input.src: Ni eba ipari odun 2017, Siminoff fi ara han lori itakun mohun maworan ti awon ontaja QVC.

reference: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.

input.mt: While the discovery of a cure has been shown to reduce malaria mortality, until now no specific drug has been shown to be effective in treating the underlying disease.
input.src: Nígbàtí àwárí òògùn kan fojú hàn láti dín ikú èbólà kù, títí di àsìkò yìí, kò tí i sí òògùn kan pàtó tí a sàfihàn pé ó lágbára láti tọ́jú ààrùn tó wà nílẹ̀.

reference: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.

input.mt: An insect patch, ZMapp, shows promise in the field, but previous studies have suggested that it has a small chance of preventing death.
input.src: Àmúlùmálà apakòkòrò kan, ZMapp, ṣàfihàn ìlérí ní pápá, ṣùgbọ́n àwọn ẹ̀kọ́ ti tẹ́lẹ́ tóka pé o ní àǹfàní tó kéré láti dènà ikú.

reference: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.

input.mt: In the PALM trial, ZMapp is, as a rule, a scientific comparison of three wars of attrition.
input.src: Ní ìtọ́wò PALM ZMapp jẹ́ gẹ́gẹ́ bí ìṣàkóso o túmọ̀ si wípé àwọn onímọ̀ sayensi fi ṣe gbendeke wọ́n dẹ̀ fi wé àwọn ogun mẹ́ta ìyóku.

reference: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.

input.mt: The U.S. Gymnastics Association has approved the letter of the Olympic Committee and accepted it as part of the National Olympic Committee's mission to ensure a safe environment for all of our athletes/racers.
input.src: Ẹgbẹ́ Ajìjàkadi ilẹ̀ Àmẹ́ríkà fọwọ́ sí lẹtà ìgbìmọ̀ Olympics, wọ́n sì gbà á wọlé pé Àpapọ̀-Ebi-Olympics nilò láti rí dájú pé wọ́n pèsè àyíká tí ó dára fún àwọn oníjàkadì/asáré-ìje wa gbogbo.

reference: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.

input.mt: We accept the USOC's statement that we respect the interests of our athletes and sports stadiums, and their sports if we continue with meaningful changes in our practice, rather than canceling the license.
input.src: A gba ọ̀rọ̀ USOC pé a lẹ̀ sin ànfàní àwọn eléré ìdárayá wa àti àwọn ẹgbe ìdárayá, àti eré ìdárayá wọn tí a bá tẹ̀síwájú pẹ̀lú ayipada tó ní túmọ̀ ní ilé ìṣe wa, ju yiyo ìwé aṣe kuro.

reference: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.

input.mt: U.S. Gymnastics supports an independent study that can shed light on the status quo of participants in the Larry Nassar earthquake, illustrated with effort. if it has not gone unnoticed for a long time and made the necessary adjustments.
input.src: Eréje Gymnastics ti ilẹ̀ USA sàtìlẹyìn fún ìwádìí olómìnira tí ó lè tan ìmọ́lẹ̀ lórí àsìlò ìpín ní àwọn tó móríye ìsẹ̀lẹ̀ Larry Nassar sàpéjúwe pẹ̀lú akitiyan. ní kò bá ti lọ láì rí fún ọjọ́ pípẹ́ àti gbígba àwọn àyípadà tó yẹ.

reference: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.

input.mt: The U.S. Olympic Committee and the USOC have a common goal  which is to ensure the safety and security of athletics for athletes so that they can pursue their dreams in a safe, safe and sustainable environment.
input.src: Àwọn Asángun ilẹ̀ USA ati USOC ní àfojúsùn kanáà — èyí tó mún kí ààbò eré ìdárayá ìsangun àtawọn míran wà fáwọn eléréje láti le ma siṣẹ́ tọ àlá wọn ní àyíká tó láàbò, tó dára tó sì seégbé.

reference: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.

input.mt: Throughout the 1960s Bresinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his architect, also working for the management of Lindoni B. Jonsin.
input.src: Ni gbogbo 1960S Bresinski sise fun Johannu F Kenedi gege bi onimoran re, o tun sise fun isakoso Lindoni B Jonsin.

reference: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.

input.mt: In the fall of 1976, he received Carter's foreign advisory, after which he served as national security adviser (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, replacing Henry Kissinger.
input.src: Lákòókò ìsàlẹ́ṣà ọdún 1976, ó gba Carter nímọ̀ràn lórí ilẹ̀ òkèrè, lẹ́yìn èyí ó jẹ́ olùdámọ̀ràn ààbò àpapọ̀ (NSA) láti ọdún 1977 sí 1981, ẹni tó gbapò Henry Kissinger.

reference: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.

input.mt: As the NSA, he helped Carter negotiate international agreements, such as the Camp David Accords of 1978; reforming U.S.-China relations in the late 1970s; the Iranian insurgency that led to the Iranian Revolution in 1979; and the Soviet invasion of Afghanistan in 1979.
input.src: Bi i NSA, ó ran Carter lọ́wọ́ ní yíyanjú Ètò Àgbáyé, bí i Camp David Accords ti ọdún 1978; mímú áyípadà bá àjọsepọ̀ ilẹ̀ US–China ní ọwọ ìparí 1970s; Ìjagbara àwọn ilẹ̀ Iran tí ó yorí sí rògbòdìyàn ìdógo àwọn Iran ní ọdún, 1979; àti yíyalu àwọn Soviet ní Afghanistan ní ọdún 1979.

reference: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.

input.mt: The film starring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone won all the nominations.
input.src: Fíìmú tó sàfihàn Ryan Gosling àti Emma Stone gba yíyàn nì gbogbo éka pàtàkì.

reference: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.

input.mt: Goslini and Rokta qualified for the Men's and Women's singles respectively.
input.src: Goslini àti Okuta yege fún ìbò Eléré Ọkùnrin àti Eléré Obinrin ní kọ̀kan wọn.

reference: The other nominations include Best Picture, Director, Cinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing and Original Screenplay.

input.mt: Other awards include Best Picture, Director, Screenplay, Editing, Filmmaking, Sound Editing, Sound Recording, and Writing.
input.src: Awọn ìsọ̀rí mìíràn ni, Àwòrán tó dára jù, Olùdarí, Àyàwòrán, Aṣaralóge, Asàtúntò-Fíìmù, Aṣàtúntò ohùn, Apohùnpọ̀, àti Akọ̀tà.

reference: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.

input.mt: Two songs from the tour, the auditions (Dreaming Fools) and the Star City were nominated for best original song. Lionsgate won 26 more nominations than any other studio.
input.src: Orin méjì látinú àgbéléwò, ìdánwò (Àwọn òmùgọ̀ tó ń lá àlá) àti ìlú àwọn ìràwọ̀ ni wọ́n mún fún orin ojúlówó tó dára jù. ilé ìsiṣẹ́ Lionsgate ló gba ìyànsípò mẹ́rìndínlọ́gbọ̀n — jú àwọn ilé ìsiṣẹ̀ mìíràn lọ.

reference: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.

input.mt: On the eve of his death, US President Donald Trump, in a press conference, announced the withdrawal of US troops from Syria.
input.src: Ní alẹ́ ọjọ́ àìkú, àrẹ oríll èdè Amẹ́ríkà Donald Trump, ní ọ̀rọ̀ rẹ̀ tí ó sọ nípasẹ̀ ọ̀gá oníròyìn, kéde pé àwọn ọmọ ogun US ma fi ìlú Syria sílẹ̀.

reference: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

input.mt: The announcement was made after Trump met President Toki Recip Tayipi Edogani on the cup.
input.src: Won se ikede naa leyin ti Trumpi ba Aare Toki Resep Tayipi Edogani lori ago.

reference: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.

input.mt: Evidence does not prove that dinosaurs have smaller wings, a widely used term, but it provides detailed descriptions of dinosaur bones such as the red and three-leafed spines.
input.src: Èyì kò ṣàrídájú pé ó kéré jù àwọn dinosaurs ní ìyẹ́,ọ̀rọ̀ tó dájú tí ó ti tànká, ṣùgbọ́n ó pèsè ẹ̀kúnrẹ́rẹ́ àlàyé egungun ẹranko dinosaurs bíi àwọ́ àti títò lanà mẹt.

reference: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.

input.mt: The appearance is also noteworthy for the abundance of feathers in birds.
input.src: Wíwá náà tún fúni lóyẹ sí ìtànkálè ti àwọn ìyé nínú ẹyẹ.

reference: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.

input.mt: Because the dandelion does not have a very long stem, called a rachis, but it does have other world genes  barbs and barbules  researchers suggest that rachis may be a long-lived breed of bird.
input.src: Nítorí ìyẹ́ dánísọ̀̀ kò ní ọpá tó gbó káká, tí wọ́n ń pè ní rachis, ṣùgbọ́n ó ní àwọn àbùdá ìyé mìíràn – barbs àti barbules – àwọn aṣèwádìí sọ ohun tó jọ́ wípé rachis ṣeéṣe kí o jẹ́ àbùdá ìyẹ́ tí ó ti wà tipẹ́ síwájú àwọn ìyók.

reference: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

input.mt: An eagle-like object is suggested not to be used in an airplane but for exercise or demonstration.Researchers suggest that even if this is a dinosaur's tail, the specimen is an adult demonstration.
input.src: Ohun tó dàbí ìyẹ dábàá pé kí wọ́n má lò nínu ọkọ̀ òfurufú ṣùgbọ́n fún títọ́ ara gbígbónà sọ́nà tàbí láti ṣàfihàn. Àwọn aṣèwádìí da lábàá pé, kódà èyí jẹ́ ìrù ọmọ dinosaur, àpẹrẹ rẹ ṣàfihàn ti àgbàlagbà.

reference: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

input.mt: Researchers have suggested that, if the tail is a dinosaur's tail, the specimen shows an adult's tail as a child's.
input.src: Àwọn aṣàwárí dalábàá pé, bí ètí bá jẹ́ ìrù ọmọ dinosaur, àpẹrẹ rẹ̀ ṣàfihàn ti àgbàlagbà kìn ṣe ti ọmọdé.

reference: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.

input.mt: An explosive device attached to the bus leading to the police station in Gaziantep, Turkey, killed two police officers and wounded at least 20.
input.src: Àdó olóró tí wọ́n so mọ ọkọ̀ tí wọ́n wa lọ sí àgọ́ àwọn ọlọ́pàá ní Gaziantep, lórílẹ̀èdèTurkey, láàárọ̀ àná pa ọlọ́pàá méjì, tí ó sì ṣe àwọn tó tó ogún léṣe.

reference: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.

input.mt: The Governor's Office said that 19 of those who committed suicide were police officers.
input.src: Ọfíìsì Gómínà sọ pé mọ́kàndínlógún nínú àwọn tí ó fi ara pa jẹ́ ọlọ́pàá.

reference: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.

input.mt: They found the same principle applied to the sun as to the stars: The activity of all stars is observed to be governed by their rotation and activity alone, not by anything else.
input.src: Wọn rí ìsàmúlò ìlànà kan náà lórí oòrùn bí i ti ìràwọ̀: Ìṣe gbogbo àwọn ìràwọ̀ ni a kíyèsí pé yíyí wọn àti ìse wọn nìkan ni ó ń darí wọn, kò sí nǹkan mìíràn.

reference: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.

input.mt: Luminosity and rotation are not used together to determine the cosmic rosbi number, which has to do with the elasticity of the s.
input.src: A máà n lo luminositi ati iyipo papọ̀ láti fi mọ onka rosbi irawo, ti o ní Ṣe pẹ̀lú bí olasma Ṣe wàn s.

reference: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.

input.mt: The smaller the Rossby number, the smaller the number of stars will be in reference to the retrograde retrograde.
input.src: Bí nọ́ḿbà Rossby bá se kéré tó, bẹ́ẹ̀ náà ni iye ìràwọ̀ kò se ní lágbára sí ní ìtọ́ka sí ìdápadà sẹ́yìn agbérin.

reference: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.

input.mt: During his journey, Iwasaki ran into trouble many times.
input.src: Nínú ìrìnàjò rẹ´, Iwasaki bọ sínú wàhálà ní ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ ìgbà.

reference: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.

input.mt: He was attacked by pirates, robbed in Tibet using a stray dog, and escaped from his whorehouse and was captured in India.
input.src: Àwọn ajalèlókun ló jàálólè, wọ́n jalè ní Tibet nípa lílo ajá elégbọn, ó sá kúrò nínu ìgbáyàwó rẹ wọ́n sì mu ní India.

reference: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.

input.mt: The 802.11n system works with the transmission system to transmit 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz.
input.src: Eto 802.11n sise pelu eto igbohun si afefe 2.4Ghz ati 5.0Ghz.

reference: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.

input.mt: 7211 speeds are the slowest with a top speed record of 3Mbit/s.
input.src: Ìyára méjìlélẹ̀gbẹrin ó lé mọ́kànlá ni wọ́n má ń yára jùlọ pẹ̀lú àkọsílẹ̀ tíọ́rì tó gajù jẹ́ ẹgbẹ̀taMbit/s.

reference: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.

input.mt: Dufaali, who is married with two children, and Mila, the protagonist of the story, are pleased.
input.src: Dufaali to ti Ṣe ìgbéyàwó pẹ̀lú Ọmọ méjì o fí bẹ́ẹ̀ dá Mila, ti ìtàn náà tan mó, lọ́rùn.

reference: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."

input.mt: When we asked for the introduction, Miller said, Mike talks too much about reading... I was worried that my son wouldn't understand what he said.
input.src: Nígbà tí a bèrè fún ìdásí, Miller sọ pé, “Mike ma ń sọ̀rọ̀ jù nípa kíkà... Mò ń gbáradìnítorínà mi kò gba ǹkan tí ó sọ.”

reference: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.

input.mt: We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions in terms of GDP at a predictable rate by 2020 from the 2005 period as stated by  Hu.
input.src: “A ó tiraka láti gé ohun tí ó ń jáde carbon dioxide lóní ìwọ̀n GDP pẹ̀lú àmì tó farahàn bí yíò bá fi di 2020 láti ìpele 2005 gẹ́gẹ́ bí” Hu se sọ.

reference: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."

input.mt: Hu urged developing countries to build an old environmentally friendly road before rebuilding it.
input.src: Hu gba àwọn orílẹ̀èdè tó sẹ̀sẹ̀ ń dàgbà níyànjú láti “kọ ọ̀nà àtijọ́ tí wọ́n má ń ba àyíká jẹ́ saájú kí wọ́n tó tún un se bóbá yá.”

reference: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."

input.mt: He added that they should not, however, are often told to go beyond the stage of development, responsibility and commitment.
input.src: O fikun pé “kí wọ́n máṣe, síbẹ̀síbẹ̀, wọ́n ma sọ fún láti pọndandan rẹ kọjá ìpele ìdàgbàsóké, ojúṣe àti agbár.”

reference: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.

input.mt: An Iraqi team of researchers conducted its probe at about 12:00 this afternoon.
input.src: Ẹgbẹ́ aṣèwádìí ilẹ̀ Iraq se àgbékalẹ̀ àbábọ̀ rẹ̀ ní nǹkan bí i aago méjìlá ọ̀sán òní.

reference: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.

input.mt: He warned that no one could deny that Iraq's current action would not stop the ongoing civil war.
input.src: Ó sèkìlọ̀ wípé kò sií ẹnikẹ́ni tó lè fọwọ́ sọ̀yà wípé ìgbésẹ̀kíìgbésẹ̀ tí ilẹ̀ Iraq bá gbé lásìkò yìí kò lè paná ìjà ẹgbẹ́jẹgbẹ́, làásìgbò tó ń peléke òun èyí tó lẹ̀ mórí lé rògbòdìyàn.

reference: The Report is highly critical of almost every aspect of the present policy of the Executive towards Iraq and it urges an immediate change of direction.

input.mt: The crackdown was a major blow to all the new Iraqi leaders' policies and called for a change of direction.
input.src: Ìjábọ̀ náà jẹ́ ǹkan tó le gan ní gbogbo ẹ̀yà ìlànà tuntun ti àwọn adarí sí ìlú Iraq ó sì sọ pé kí wọ́n yí ọ̀nà padà.

reference: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.

input.mt: One of the 78 criteria is that political action should be taken before the end of this year to cross the Iraqi border against hardship, and to establish closer ties with neighbors.
input.src: Ọ̀kan lára àwọn àlàkalẹ̀ méjìdínlọ́gọ́rin ni wípé wọ́n gbọ́dọ̀ gbé ìgbésẹ̀ ìlànà òsèlú kó tó di òpin odún yìí láti le gba ibodè Iraq tako ìdásí tó le, àti sísàtúngbékalẹ̀ àjọsepọ̀ tó dánmọ́rán pẹ̀láwọn alájọgbé.

reference: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.

input.mt: Senate President and First Lady Kristina Fenandesi de Kisna announced a call for a presidential election in the southern city of La Plata, 50 kilometers (31 miles) from Bwenos Aresi.
input.src: Senato to wa lori oye ati Aya Aare Arabirin Kristina Fenandesi de Kisna kede ipe ohun fe wo idije aare ni irole anaa ni La Plata, ilu ti o je 50 kilometers (31 miles) si Bwenos Aresi.

reference: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.

input.mt: Sister Kirchner announced her candidacy to run for president of the Argentine Theatre, the channel she used to campaign for parliamentary elections as a member of the Buenos Aires Provincial Assembly.
input.src: Arábìnrin Kirchner kéde èróngbà láti díje dunpò ààrẹ ilé ìseré ìtàgé Argentine, ibùdó kanáà tí ó lò fún ìpolongo rẹ̀ fún ìdìbò asòfin gẹ́gẹ́ bí ọmọ ẹgbẹ́ aṣojú ẹkùn Buenos Aires.

reference: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."

input.mt: The controversy began with a dispute over rent and home rebuilding during the Oricon period, mocked by the so-called Bush New Deal.
input.src: Ìjiyàn náà bẹ̀rẹ̀ láti àríyàn jiyàn lóri owó ìtura àtí àtúnkọ́ ilé ní ìgbà Ọrikénì, tí àwọn konsafetifu tí fi yẹ̀yẹ́ sọ lórúkọ “Ìṣòwò Olinsi Titun Buṣì”.

reference: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.

input.mt: A strong resistance to renewable energy that wants to impose a rebuilding effort on the citizens of Washington.
input.src: Ìbániwí tí kò le ti agbára àtúnkọ́lé tí fẹ́ gbé iṣẹ́ àtúnkọ́lé fún àwọn ọmọ ìlú Washington.

reference: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.

input.mt: More than four million people attended the funeral in Rome.
input.src: Ó kọjá èyan milionu mẹ́rin tó lọsí Romu fún ìsìnkú náà.

reference: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.

input.mt: The crowd was so large that it was not possible for the public to enter St. Peter's church for the funeral.
input.src: Iye àwọn ènìyàn tí ó péjọ pọ̀ tóbẹ́ẹ̀ gẹ́ tí ó fi jẹ́ pé kò ṣe é ṣe fún gbogbo ènìyàn láti rí àyè wọlé fún ìsìnkú ní ilé ìjọsìn St. Peter.

reference: Several large television screens were installed in various places in Rome to let the people watch the ceremony.

input.mt: A wide variety of large-scale phonographs were developed throughout the Roman empire to enable the public to watch the celebrations.
input.src: Ọnírúurú àwọn ẹ̀rọ amóhùnmáwòrán tójú wọn tóbi ní a sàfilọ́lẹ̀ káàkiri agbègbè ní ilẹ̀ Roomu láti lè jẹ́ kàwọn ènìyàn wo ayẹyẹ.

reference: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.

input.mt: In many other cities in Italy and in the rest of the world, the largest park in Poland, there is now a similar structure, which most people see.
input.src: Ni ọpọ awọn ilu omiran ni Italy ati ni iyoku agbaye, papa julọ ni Poland, iru agbekalẹ bayi wa, eyi ti opolopo eniyan ri.

reference: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.

input.mt: The conference began raising money for the obcenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and reported that the FBI had abandoned ten agents for adult films.
input.src: Àpérò bẹ̀rl sí ní kó owó sí obcenity initiative ní fiscal n\i ọdún 2005 ó sì so pé àwọn FBI nílái fi aṣojú mẹ́wàá sílẹ̀ fún fíìmù àgbàlagbà.

reference: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.

input.mt: Robin Uthappa came in with a top score of 70 with 21 balls by scoring 4 goals and 6 assists.
input.src: Robin Uthappa wọlé pẹ̀lú góòlù tó ga jùlọ bí i àádọ́rin pẹ̀lú bọ́ọ̀lù mọ́kànlélógì nípa gbígbá mẹ́rin mọ́kànlá àti mẹ́fà méjì.

reference: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.

input.mt: The middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and had a hundred matches.
input.src: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, ṣe dáadáa tí wọ́n sì ní ọgọ́rùn ún àjọsepọ̀.

reference: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.

input.mt: But after losing the captain's wicket India scored 36 runs and lost 7 wickets to finish.
input.src: Ṣùgban lẹ́yìn tí wọ́n sọ captain wicket nù India ṣe 36 runs tí wọ́n sì sọ wicket 7 nù láti parí rẹ̀.

reference: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.

input.mt: Former U.S. Secretary of State George W. Bush arrived in Singapore on Saturday, marking the beginning of an official Asian tour.
input.src: Olori oorilrede U.S to n je George W. Bush de si ilu Singapore ni aro ojo ikerindinlogun ninu osu kokanla, eyi to fi bere awoyika ilu Asia olose kan.

reference: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.

input.mt: Singapore Deputy Prime Minister Wongi Kani Sengi initiated negotiations on trade and diplomatic relations with Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loongi.
input.src: Igbákejì Olórí Singapo Wongi Kani Sengi ló kíi o dẹ̀ sọ̀rọ̀ ní ba isòwò àti ọ̀rọ̀ ìhàlẹ̀ pẹ̀lú Olórí Singapo Lee Hsien Loongi.

reference: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.

input.mt: After a week's negotiations in the midterm elections, Bush presented a collection of his speculations about the Asian pandemic.
input.src: Lẹ́yin àdánu ọ̀sẹ̀ kan nínú ètò ìdìbò ìdajì sáà, Bush sọ fún àkójọpọ̀ àwọn èro rẹ̀ nípa sísàmúngbòrò kátàkárà ní ilẹ̀ Asia.

reference: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.

input.mt: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to submit a government proposal on the Clean Air Act to the members' seats for review, to be read for the second time after a 25-minute victory day meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.
input.src: Adari ijọba Stephen Harper ti gba lati fi iwe erongba ijọba lori “Clean Air Act” ranṣẹ si ijoko awon ọmọ ẹgbẹ fun agbeyẹwo, ki oto di kika fun igba elekeji lọyin ipade ọjọ iṣẹgun oni iṣẹju mẹẹdọgbọn pẹlu adari NDP Jack Layton ni PMO.

reference: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.

input.mt: Laytoni requested changes to the environmental code of conduct during a meeting with the PM, requesting a revision of the party's environmental code of conduct.
input.src: Laytoni ti bèèrè fún àyípadà lórí òfin ìhùwàsí àyíká lákòókò ìpàdé pẹ̀lú PM, bèèrè pé kí wọ́n se àtúnkọ àbádòfin ìhùwà ẹgbẹ́ sí àyíká.

reference: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.

input.mt: Since the federal government took possession of the Mersey Hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the local government and federal parliamentary representatives have criticized the move as a response to the upcoming elections in November.
input.src: Láti ìgbà tí ìjọba àpapọ̀ ti gba ìsúná ilé ìwòsàn Mersey tí ó wà ní Devonport, ní Tasmania, ìjọba ìbílẹ̀ àti àwọn Aṣojú ìjọbá àpapọ̀ ti bu ẹnu àtẹ́ lu ìgbésẹ̀ yìí gẹ́gẹ́ bí ètè tí ó ní í ṣe pẹlú ètò ìdìbò tó ń bọ̀ ní oṣù kọkànlá.

reference: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.

input.mt: However, Prime Minister John Howard has said the proposal is for the replacement of the hospital facilities, with the Tasmanian government preventing them from entering, with a loss of 35 million dollars.
input.src: Ṣùgbọ́n Mínísítà àgbà, John Howard ti sọ wípé àbá náà wà fún àbò àwọn ohun èlò ilé ìwòsàn náà, kí ìjọba Tasmanian má ba à fi wọ́lẹ̀, ní gbigbé milíọ́nù márùndínlógójì dọ́là sílẹ̀.

reference: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.

input.mt: According to new reports, the flooding of the river has been blamed for causing the tsunami.Tsunamis have been recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.
input.src: Gẹ́gẹ́ bí ìròyìn tuntun ṣe wí, ìpelé odò takasí pé wọ́n fa tsunami ni. Àwọn iṣe tsunami ti wọ́n ṣàkọsílẹ̀ ní tòsí Pago Pago àti Niue.

reference: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.

input.mt: No major damage or damage was reported in Tonga, but a fire broke out for a while, preventing the Tonga authorities from seeing the tsunami warning issued by the PWC.
input.src: Wọn ò jésì ìpalára tàbí ìjàmba púpọ̀jù ní Tonga, ṣùgbọ́n iná ṣẹ́jú fún ìgbà kan, tó mú kí àwọn aláṣẹ Tonga má rí ìkilọ̀ ìjì súnámì tí PWC gbéjáde.

reference: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.

input.mt: Four schools in Hawaii on or off the coast have been closed during the day with no warnings lifted.
input.src: Àwọn ilé ìwé mẹ́rìnlà ní Hawaii tó wà ní tàbí tó wà ní ẹ̀gbẹ́ etí òkun ti jẹ́ títìpa ní ọjọ́rú pẹ̀lú bí wọ́n ṣe yọ ìkìlọ̀ kúrò.

reference: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.

input.mt: U.S. President George W. Bush accepted the invitation.
input.src: Ààrẹ orilé-ẹ̀dẹ̀ Améríkà George W. Bush gba ìkẹ́de náà wọlé.

reference: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."

input.mt: A spokesman for Bush Godoni Johanudro said North Korea's pledge to remove 20 nuclear weapons from the Korean peninsula was a major step forward.
input.src: Ẹni tó sọ̀rọ̀ fún Búsì Godoni Johanudro pé ilérí Koria Ariwa ní “ìgbésẹ̀ nlá sọ́na àlébá láti yọ irin ogún nukilia kúrò ní irekusu Koria.

reference: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.

input.mt: The tenth hurricane of the Atlantic hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, is set to hit the bottom of the Atlantic today.
input.src: Ìjì lílé kẹwàá ti sáà Atlantic Hurricane, Subtropical Storm Jerry, ni wọ́n sẹ̀dà ní ọ̀sà Atlantic lónìí.

reference: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.

input.mt: According to the National Hurricane Center (NHC), Jerry is currently unable to do anything on the ground.
input.src: Ibùdó Ìjì líli Orílẹ̀ èdè (NHC) sọ pé ní àsìkò yìí Jerry kò lè ṣe ǹkan kan ní orí ilẹ̀.

reference: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.

input.mt: The U.S. Army Corps of Engineers estimates that as little as six inches of rain will cover the previously damaged green hole.
input.src: Àwọn ẹgbẹ́ ológun ilẹ̀ Amẹ́ríkà tí ẹ̀ka onímọ̀ ẹ̀rọ, ṣe ìṣirò pé tí òjọ̀ bá rọ ìwọ̀n íǹṣì mẹ́fà péré, yóò dí ojú ihò ewé tó ti bàjẹ́ tẹ́lẹ.

reference: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.

input.mt: Water is flowing on one side of the levee at a height of 100 feet.
input.src: Omi ń sàn lórí levee ní apá kan níwọ̀n fífẹ̀ ẹsẹ̀ ọgọ́rùn ún.

reference: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.

input.mt: Governor-general Adam Cuerden has expressed his condolences over the latest developments during his Wikinews talk last month.
input.src: Alákòóso tó wọ́pọ̀ Adam Cuerden ti fi ìpinlẹẹ̀mí ọkàn hàn lórí àwọn ìparẹ́ tó wáyé lákòókò tó ń sọ̀rọ̀ ní Wikinews lóṣù tó kọjá.

reference: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."

input.mt: He [Wales] lied to us from the beginning, first by slowing down and breaking the law; second, by insisting that he listened to us until he finished his craft.
input.src: “Ó [Wales] parọ́ fún wa láti ìbẹ̀rẹ̀. Àkọ́kọ́ nípa síseré àfi bí èyí wà fú idí òfin. Ìkejì, nípa dídíbọ́n pé òun gbọ́ wa títí di bí ó se pa iṣẹ́ ọnà rẹ́.”

reference: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.

input.mt: The local animosity prompted the power to write down its sexual policy for the streets that attracted a million visitors to the media.
input.src: Ìkórira agbègbè náà fa agbára láti kọ ìlànà tó ní ṣe pẹ̀lú ìbálòpọ́ fún ojú òpó tó gba àlejò tó mílíọ́nù mídíà gbangba.

reference: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.

input.mt: Hurricane forces can affect the team's position between the black galaxy and the Milky Way.
input.src: Awon agbara iji omi lo le ko ipa ti egbe naa n wa laarin ohun dudu galaksi ati nkan dudu Ona Milik.

reference: Just like the moon exerts a pull on the earth, causing tides, so does the Milky Way exert a force on the Sagittarius galaxy.

input.mt: Just as the moon orbits the earth, so the Milky Way orbits the Sagittarius galaxy.
input.src: Gẹ́lẹ́ bí òṣùpá ṣe ń ṣe pẹlú ayé, tí yóò sì jẹ́ kí ó gún, bẹ́ẹ̀ ni Milky Way ṣe máa ń ṣe pẹ̀lú Sagittarius galaxy.

reference: The scientists were able to conclude that the dark matter affect other dark matter in the same way regular matter does.

input.mt: Scientists may argue that black matter affects black matter as well as matter.
input.src: O ṣeéṣe fún àwọn onímọ̀ sáyẹnsì latí pinu pé ohun dúdú ma ń ran ohun dúdú mín bí ohun désé ṣe ma n ràn án.

reference: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.

input.mt: This explanation suggests that the galaxy's halo is composed of dark objects in a circle of galaxies.
input.src: Àlàyé yìí sọ pé àwọn ǹkan dúdú tó wà ní àyíkà galaxy ló wà ní àyíká galaxy gẹ́gẹ́ bí halo, àwọn ǹkan kékèké ló gbedúró.

reference: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.

input.mt: Reports from the telescope show that smoke is coming out of our grass.
input.src: Iroyin lati ori amohunmaworan fihan pe efin n jade lati inu koriko wa.

reference: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.

input.mt: Local authorities have warned the unemployed in the industrial area to stay at home, turn off the power supply, and keep off the water supply.
input.src: Àwọn aláṣẹ abẹ́lé ti ń sèkìlọ̀ fáwọn òsìṣẹ́ lágbègbè iléeṣẹ́ láti dúró sílé, pa ẹ̀rọ amúnlétutù, kí wọ́n má sì mú omi ẹ̀rọ.

reference: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.

input.mt: According to the Japan Environmental Protection Agency, chemicals and iodine were found in the facility.
input.src: Ní ìbámu pẹ̀lú àjọ ohun àmúsagbàra ti Japan, kẹ́míkà tóní ìpalára àti iodine tí di àwárí ní ilé́ isẹ́ náà.

reference: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.

input.mt: Officials have suggested that this may be due to the presence of uranium-bearing minerals on the surface and is relatively rare.
input.src: Awon alase ma n daba pe eyi toka si pe awon kolo to n di epo uraniumu ni ni oju ibe le ti be ati pe o n jo.

reference: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.

input.mt: Dr. Tony Moll discovered Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in KwaZulu-Natal in South Africa.
input.src: Dr. Tony Moll sàwárí Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) ní KwaZulu-Natal lẹ́kùn South African.

reference: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."

input.mt: In one speculation, he said that the new virus is spreading too much and is causing divorce because the death rate that can cause it is high.
input.src: Ninu iforoworo kan, o wi pe irufe titun naa o n “danilamu pupo o de n fa ijaya nitoripe osuwon iku ti o le sokun fa, o ga.”

reference: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.

input.mt: Dr. Moli thought that some of the patients who had contracted the virus were in the hospital, and that two of them were hospital officials.
input.src: Dokita Moli ro wipe awon alaisan kan leti fara ko kokoro naa ni ile-iwosan,ati wipe meji lara won je osise eleto ile-iwosan naa.

reference: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.

input.mt: A year from now, a person with the disease can help 10 to 15 others who have a seizure.
input.src: Bí yíò bá fi di ọdún kan sí àkókò yìí, ènìyàn kan tó ní ààrùn lè kó o ran ẹni mẹ́wàá sí márùndínlógún mííràn tó bá ní ìfarakínra.

reference: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.

input.mt: Traditionally, the prevalence of XDR-TB in all cases of diabetes is low: 6,000 of the more than 2,310 people in South Africa had it at one time.
input.src: Àmọ́ṣa, ìda XDR-TB nínú gbogbo àwọn èèyà tó ní ikọ́ àwúgbẹ sì kéré níye: ẹgbẹ̀rún mẹ́fà nínú èèyàn ọ̀jì lé lọ́ọ̀dúnrún ó dín mẹ́wàá ni ó ní lákòókò kan nílẹ̀ South Africa.

reference: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.

input.mt: The satellite, two weighing more than 1000 pounds, travelled at 17,500 miles per hour, hitting 491 miles on the ground.
input.src: Sátẹ̀láìtì náà, méjèjì tó wọ́n ju 1000 pounds lọ,tí wọ́n s;i rin ìrìn àjò tó tó máàlì 17,500 ní wákàtí,kọlu máàlì 491 lórí ilẹ̀.

reference: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.

input.mt: Scientists say the explosion was massive.
input.src: Àwọn onímò Sayensi wípé búbúgbàmà ti ìkọlù náà jẹ títóbi gan.

reference: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.

input.mt: The extent of the disaster and its impact on the Earth are being examined.
input.src: Won si n sagbeyewo bii ijamba naa se tobi to ati ipa ti o ma ko lori Aye.

reference: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.

input.mt: Posting pornography on the Internet is a popular activity.
input.src: Èsì yíya àwòrán yíò jáde sórí ìtàkùn ayélujára o ní gbogbogbò.

reference: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.

input.mt: Ohio prosecutors say a doctor who worked at a children's hospital in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, will be charged with murder after his mother's body was found behind his slave car.
input.src: Àwọn agbófinro ni Ohio sọ pé, Oníṣègùn tó ṣiṣẹ́ ni ilé ìwòsàn àwọn ọmọdé tí ó wà ní Pittsburgh, ni Pennsylvania ni wọn yóò fi ẹ̀sùn ìpànìyàn kàn lẹ́yìn tí wọn bá òkú ìyá rẹ̀ lẹ́yìn ọkọ̀ rẹ̀ ní ọjọ́rú.

reference: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.

input.mt: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was reportedly found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a neighborhood about 15 miles north of Cincinnati, lying on the side of the road in a T-shirt and a blue shirt in a possession that exposed his drug use.
input.src: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, ẹni ọdún mọ́kàndínlọ́gbọ̀n ní wọ́n rí ní Blue Ash, Ohio, agbègbè tó dàbí máìlì márùndínlógún sí àríwá Cincinnati, tó sùn sí ẹ̀gbẹ́ ojú ọ̀nà nínú aṣọ T-shirt àti àwọ̀tẹ́lẹ̀ nípò tó sàfihàn pé ó ń lo òògùn.

reference: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.

input.mt: He directed the lawyers to his black car, which drove him five feet further.
input.src: Ó darí àwọn agbófinró sí ọkọ̀ dúdú rẹ̀ èyí tó wa bí i ìwọ̀n ẹsẹ̀ ẹ̀ẹ́dẹ́gbẹ̀ta sí i.

reference: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.

input.mt: There, they found a Saroja Balasubramanian, a metalworker, covered with bloodstains.
input.src: Níbè, wọn rí ará Saroja Balasubramanian, métàlẹ́làáadọ́ta, tí a bò pèlú àwọn aṣo ìbora ẹ̀jẹ.

reference: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.

input.mt: The police said it looked like the body had been there for a day.
input.src: Àwọn ọlọ́pàá sọ pé ó dàbí ẹni wípé ara náà ti wà níbẹ̀ fún bí i ọjọ́ kan.

reference: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.

input.mt: The disease was first detected at the end of the seventh month.
input.src: Ìgbà àkọ́kọ́ tí wọ́n ma rí àrùn náà ní àkókò yìí ni ní ìparí oṣù kéje.

reference: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.

input.mt: The disease is transmitted by mosquitoes and transmitted from mosquito to human.
input.src: Àwọn elede lo ma n gbé àrùn náà, a wá ti ara ẹ̀fọn fọ́nká sí ọmọ èyan.

reference: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.

input.mt: The pandemic has prompted the Indian government to take action to control pig farmers in the affected areas, distribute mosquito cotton and pesticides.
input.src: Àjàkálẹ̀ ti mún kí ìjọba ilẹ̀ India gbé ìgbésẹ̀ láti gbé ìgbésẹ̀ fi darí àwọn tó ń mún ẹlẹ́dẹ̀ láwọn agbègbè típalára wà, pín ẹgbẹ̀lẹ́gbẹ̀ kọ́tìnì ẹ̀fọn àti òògùn fínfín ẹ̀fọn.

reference: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.

input.mt: Governments have pledged more vaccines against encephalitis, which will help prepare health agencies for the coming year.
input.src: Àwọn ìjọba ti ṣe lérí pé ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ abẹ́rẹ́ àjẹsára encephalitis, èyí tó ma rànwálọ́wọ́ láti gbáradì fún àwọn àjọ ìlera fún ọdún tó ń bọ̀.

reference: Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.

input.mt: They restricted the supply of medical supplies to the affected areas due to lack of trade and a lack of importance in the fight against diseases.
input.src: Wọn dínwọ̀ ètò láti jíṣẹ́ ògùn maporo sí agbègbè tó kópa jù nítorí àìsowo àti pe wọn ò fiṣe nkan pàtàkì láàrín àwọn àrùn.

reference: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.

input.mt: In 1956, Slania moved to Sweden, where she began working for the Swedish Post Office three years later and became a principal illustrator.
input.src: Ní ọdún 1956, Slania kó lọ sí Sweden, níbití ó ti bẹ̀rẹ̀ iṣẹ́ fún ilé iṣẹ́ ìfìwéránṣẹ́ Sweden lẹ́yìn ọdún mẹ́ta tó sì di olórí ayàwòrán.

reference: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.

input.mt: He issued over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other cities.
input.src: O se staampi oye to ju 1,000 fun Swidini ati awon ilu 28 omiran.

reference: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.

input.mt: His work is well known and is one of the few surnames of philatelists.
input.src: Iṣẹ́ rẹ̀ ní gbajúmọ̀ àti tó jẹ́ pé ó wà lára àwọn “òrúkọ ìdílé” díẹ̀ lára àwọn filatelisti. Àwọn kan ma n ṣa iṣẹ́ rẹ̀ nìkan.

reference: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.

input.mt: His biggest hit was Great Deeds by Swedish Kings by David Klocker Ehrenstrahi in 2000, recorded in the Guinness Book of World Records.
input.src: Òǹtẹ̀ ọgọ́rùń rẹ̀ tóbi gan “Great Deeds by Swedish Kings” nípasẹ́ David Klocker Ehrenstrahi ní ọdún 2000, tí a kọ sílẹ̀ nínú ìwé Guiness of World Records.

reference: He was also engaged in engraving banknotes for many countries, recent examples of his work including the Prime Ministerial portraits on the front of the new Canadian $5 and $100 bills.

input.mt: He also contributed to the circulation of banknotes for many countries, his most recent work being the editor-in-chief's banknotes in front of the new Canadian $5.100 coin.
input.src: Ó tún lọ́wọ́ nínú yíya àwòrán owó fún ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ orílẹ̀èdè, àpẹrẹ iṣẹ́ rẹ̀ lọ́wọ́lọ́wọ́ ni àwòrán olóòtú àgbà níwájú owó Canada tuntun bíi dọ́là márùn ún àti ọgọ́rùn ún dọ́là.

reference: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.

input.mt: After the accident, Gibson was taken to the hospital but died shortly thereafter.
input.src: Lẹ́yìn tí ìjàǹbá náà ṣẹlẹ̀, wọ́n gbé Gibson lọ sí ilé ìwòsàn ṣùgbọn kò pẹ́ lẹ́yìn rẹ̀ ni ó kú.

reference: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.

input.mt: The vehicle was removed from the scene of the accident at about 1200 GMT on the same day.
input.src: Wọn yọ ọkọ naa gangan kuro loju ibi ti ijamba naa ti ṣẹlẹ ni bii ago 1200 GMT lọjọ na.

reference: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."

input.mt: A person is working at a shelter near the disaster site in Children are standing across the street and crying.
input.src: Èèyàn kan tò ń siṣẹ́ ní ibi ìgbọ́kọ̀sí tó súnmọ́ ibi tí ìjàm̀bá ti wáyé ní “Àwọn ọmọ́dé ń dúró láti ré kọjá ojú pópó àti pé wọ́n ń pariwo bẹ́ẹ̀sì ni wọ́n ń sọkún.”

reference: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.

input.mt: They all fled the scene.
input.src: Gbogbo wọn sá kúrò níbití ìjàmbá ti wáyé.

reference: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.

input.mt: The UN also hopes to complete the collection to help countries affected by global warming.
input.src: UN tún ní ìrètí láti parí ìkówójọ láti ran àwọn orílẹ̀ èdè tó ní ìkọlù global warming lọ́wọ́.

reference: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.

input.mt: Fluke didn't say that some attempts to intimidate women so they don't talk about women's disabilities I probably used to hide.
input.src: Fluke ko wipe igbiyanju awon kan lati teri awon obinrin ki won ma ba soro nipa ailera awon obinrin mo lo jasi pabo.

reference: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.

input.mt: Between 10:00 a.m. and 11:00 p.m. MDT, a fire broke out.
input.src: Laarin ago 10:00-11:00 ale MDT, awon elewon to wa ninu ogba bere ina kan.

reference: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.

input.mt: The fire was extinguished at 11:35 p.m.
input.src: Àwọn panápaná pàpà pa ìná ní 11:35 pm.

reference: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.

input.mt: Of the two fish species that have become extinct, two others are endangered, along with the smaller one.
input.src: Nítorínà ẹ̀yà ẹja méjì tí di ohun ìgbàgbé,bẹ́ẹ̀ àwọn méjì míràn wà nínú ewu, pẹ̀lú èyí tó suké.

reference: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.

input.mt: Although the level of the water was raised after the storm, officials hoped it would be enough to bring the drainage costs back into the water.
input.src: Biotilejepe ibi ti omi naa de a maa ga si leyin iji omi awon ofisa ni ireti pe o ma to lati da awon iyepe to ti ru sita pada si inu omi.

reference: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.

reference: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.

reference: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."

reference: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.

reference: Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.

reference: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.

input.mt: The matches started at 10 a.m. with an exceptionally good weather for the rainfall, which was a good day for 7's rugby.

reference: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.

reference: Looking decidedly rusty in the game against their southern sisters, South Africa however steadily improved as the tournament progressed.

reference: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.

reference: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.

reference: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.

reference: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.

reference: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.

reference: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.

input.mt: In France, the voting system has become less of an experience, with voters cramming their ballot papers into a briefcase.
input.src: Ní ilẹ̀ Faranse, ètò ìdìbò ti di ìrírí tó kéré, àwọn olùdìbò ma ń yara wan sọ́tọ̀ nínú akoto, fi ìwé tó ń sàfihàn olùdíje dunpò wọn sínú àpò ìwé.

reference: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.

input.mt: After the officials confirmed the ballot, the voter placed a ballot paper in the ballot box and signed the ballot.
input.src: Lẹ́yìn tí àwọn òṣìṣẹ́ ti ṣàrídájú olùdìbò, olùdìbò a fi ẹnfílópì sínú apoti ìbò a dẹ̀ fọwọ́ sí iwé ìbò.

reference: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.

input.mt: Since 1988, the ballot box has had to be checked so that voters and photographers can see that there were no ballot boxes in the box before the election began and that there were no extra ballot boxes other than those of the voters who voted.
input.src: Lati ọdun 1988, apoti idibo gbọdọ jẹ eyi ti o seeri fun awọn oludibo ati awọn oluworan lati ri wipe ko si apo iwe kankan ninu apoti ki idibo to bẹrẹ ati wipe ko si afikun apo iwe kankan yatọsi ti awọn oludibo ti a lu lonte.

reference: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.

input.mt: Participants can send representatives to approve the entire program. At night, the volunteers read the polls with strict scrutiny and follow specific guidelines.
input.src: Àwọn olùkópa lè fi aṣojú wọ́n ránṣẹ́ láti jẹ́rìsí gbogbo ètò náà. Ní alẹ́, àwọ́n tó fi ara wọ́n sílẹ̀ ka àwọn ìbò pẹ̀lú àbójútó tó le, tó sì tẹ̀lé àwọn ìlànà kan pàtó.

reference: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.

reference: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.

reference: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.

reference: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.

reference: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.

input.mt: The human bird flu pandemic, H5N1, has been confirmed to have spread from the earliest recorded bird flu cases in the marshland near Lyon in eastern France.

reference: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.

reference: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."

input.mt: Chambers has blamed God for the tragedy of death, destruction and oppression of many of his people.

reference: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."

input.mt: The arrogant Chambers argued that the charges were not immediate and that anyone could sue anyone.

reference: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."

reference: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.

reference: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.

reference: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.

input.mt: After the outcome failed, Girinigiši escaped Santorumu but was disciplined for Romini, who was convicted of running a bad campaign for Girinigiši in Iowa.

reference: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.

input.mt: Perry explained that he would return to Texas to review the outcome of the party's defeat tonight, determining if there was any interest in me in this race. But he later said that he was ahead of the race for the presidency in South Carolina's January 21 general election.
input.src: Perry ṣe àlàyé wípé òhun o ‘padà sí Texas láti ṣe ayèwò àbájáde ifikùnlukùn ẹgbẹ́ lálé òní, pinnu bóyá ìtẹ̀síwájù wà fún mi nínú ìdíje yìí.” Ṣùgbọ́n lẹ́yìn náà o sọ wípé òhun o tesíwájú nínú ìdíje láti figagbága nínú idibò abẹ́lẹ́ ọjọ́ kọkànlélógún oṣù kìíní tí gúúsù Carolina.

reference: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.

input.mt: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw election in the eighth round, is determined to finish his campaign.

reference: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.

reference: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."

input.mt: Shortly before his death in his early 20s, Birber said that  I was not there so the tragedy did not affect my eyes, my prayers were with the family of the deceased.
input.src: Wọ́n fi tó ni léti pé o kú ni nǹkan bí ọmọ ogún ọdún, Birber sọ pé “ mi ò sí ní ibẹ̀ bẹ́ẹ̀ ni ìṣẹ̀lẹ̀ ńla-ibi yìí kò ṣe ojú mi kòró, àdúrà mi ńbẹ pẹ̀lú àwọn ẹbí tí olóògbé fi sí ayé.

reference: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.

input.mt: Despite what law enforcement officials say, it is possible that the farmhouse that attacked the architect did not face the court.

reference: With only eighteen medals available a day, a number of countries have failed to make the medal podium.

input.mt: In addition to receiving 18 medals a day, many countries have failed to remain at the top of the medal table.
