reference: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.

input.mt: The Dutch were eliminated with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's super-G class yesterday and Katja Saarinen of Finland finishing tenth in the women's singles.
input.src: Wọ́n sàfimọ́ àwọn ará ilẹ̀ Netherlands pẹ̀lú Anna Jochemsen tó parí pẹ̀lú ipò kẹsàn án nínú àwọn obìnrin tó ń dúró ní kílàsì super-G lánàá àti Katja Saarinen ti ìlú Finland tó parí pẹ̀lú ipò kẹwàá nínú ètò kanáà.

reference: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.

input.mt: Mitchell Gourley of Australia finished 11th in the men's Super-G. Czech and Oldrich Jelinek finished 16th in the super-G.
input.src: Mitchell Gourley ti ilẹ̀ Australia parí pẹ̀lú ipò kọkànlá nínú àwọn ọkùnrin tó wà nínú ìdíje Super-G. Czech tí Oldrich Jelinek sì parí pẹ̀lú ipò kẹrìndínlógún ìdíje super-G.

reference: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.

input.mt: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished 15th in the men's Super-G. Adam Hall of New Zealand finished ninth in the men's Super-G.
input.src: Arly Velasquez ti ilẹ̀ Mexico parí nípò karùndínlógún ìjókòó àwọn ọkùnrin Super-G. Adam Hall ti ilẹ̀ New Zealand parí pẹ̀lú ipò kẹsàn án níjòòkó àwọn ọkùnrin Super-G.

reference: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.

input.mt: Polish blind climber Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished 13th in the Super-G. Jong Seork Park competition of South Korea finished 24th in the men's super-G.
input.src: Ọkùnrin afọ́jú a gùnkè ilẹ̀ Poland Maciej Krezel àti guide Anna Ogarzynska parí pẹ̀lú ipò kẹtàlá nínú ìdíje Super-G. Jong Seork Park ti ilẹ̀ South Korea parí pẹ̀lú ipò mẹ́rìnlélógún nígun àwọn ọkùnrin super-G.

reference: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.

input.mt: According to the document, UN waste collected in a controlled manner for health, caused the entry of bacteria into the Artbonite River camp, one of the largest in Haiti.
input.src: Gẹ́gẹ́ bí ìwé ìpéjọ́, ìdọ̀tí tí àjọ UN kó jáde ní ọ̀nà tí kó boójú mú fún ìlera, ṣe okùnfà àwọn kòkòrò àrùn tó wọ ibùdó odò Artbonite, ìkan lára èyí tó tóbi jù ní Haiti .

reference: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.

input.mt: Haiti's Ministry of Justice and Human Rights has referred to independent investigations that suggested Nepal's peacekeeping force at the UN unknowingly spread the virus to Haiti.
input.src: Ilẹ́-ẹ̀kọ́ fún òdodo àti ìjọba tiwantiwan ti Haiti ti tọ́ka sí àwọn ìwádìí olómìnira tí ó dá àbá pẹ́ ikọ́ ọmọ ogun ti Nepal fún àlàáfíà ní UN pẹ̀lú àìmọ̀ kó àrùn náà wọ Haiti.

reference: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.

input.mt: Danielle Lantagne, the UN's health adviser, said the pandemic was triggered by businesses.
input.src: Danielle Lantagne, tí oh jẹ́ ògbóntarìgì fún UN lórí àìsàn, sọ pé àwọn onílàjà ni ó ṣe e ṣe kí wọn fa àjàkálẹ̀ ná.

reference: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.

input.mt: The patient had traveled to Nigeria where an Ebola outbreak was reported.
input.src: Aláìsàn náà ti lọ sí ilẹ̀ Nigeria níbiti wọ́n ti ní àwọn ìṣẹ̀lẹ̀ kòkòrò Èbólà kan ti wáyé.

reference: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.

input.mt: The hospital has followed all procedures to prevent germs, isolating those infected so as not to help the injured.
input.src: Ile iwosan naa ti tẹle gbogbo ilana lati dena kokoro, wọn ya awọn ti wọn ni kokoro kuro lati ma ba ko ran awọn to ṣẹku.

reference: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.

input.mt: Although he retired from the sport in 1993, his reputation as a professional wrestler grew, and he earned a respectable $10 million in career earnings.
input.src: Pẹ̀lú pé ó kúrò nínú eré náà ni ọdún 1993 orúkọ rẹ̀ sí wà gẹ́gẹ́ bí onígbọ̀wọ́ àgbà, ó sìn ń gba mílíọ̀nù mẹ́wàá dọ́là ní sáà gbogbo nínú ọlạ́.

reference: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.

input.mt: Earlier, China's Xinhua news agency shot down an aircraft intended to be hijacked.
input.src: Sáájú, ilé-iṣẹ́ oníròyìn ilẹ̀ China, Xinhua jábọ̀ ọkọ̀ òfuurufú tí a fẹ́ fi ipá gbà.

reference: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.

input.mt: Reporters reported at the time that the airfield was bombed and returned to Afghanistan, arriving in Kandahar.
input.src: Awon iroyin to gbeyin nigba naa wipe oko oju ofurufu naa gba ihale bombu won de daa pada lo si Afganistani, o de si Kandaha.

reference: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.

input.mt: Morning reports said a plane was flown to Afghanistan after being hit at an emergency landing in Ürümqi.
input.src: Ìròyìn àárọ̀ ní wọ́n dá ọkọ̀ ojú òfúrufú lọ sí Afghanistan lẹ́yìn tí wọ́n dùn wọ́n ní ìbalẹ̀ pàjáwìrì ní Ürümqi.

reference: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.

input.mt: Air disasters are common in Iran, which has a long history of inadequate coverage for civilian and military use.
input.src: Ìjàm̀bá ojú òfúrufú ló wọ́pọ̀ ní ilẹ̀ Iran, èyí tó ní ìtàn pípẹ́ fún àìse àbòjútó tó péye fún ìlò ará ìlú àti ológun.

reference: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.

input.mt: Earlier this week, three people were killed and three wounded by a suicide bomber.
input.src: Níbẹ̀rẹ̀ ọsẹ̀ yìí, ọkọ̀ bàálù abàsíbi ó wùú àwọn ọlọ́pàá sekúpa èèyàn mẹ́ta , nígbàtí àwọn mẹ́tàa min farapa .

reference: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.

input.mt: Last month, Iran suffered the worst weather disaster of the year when a plane bound for Armenia crashed, killing all 68 people on board.
input.src: Lóṣù tó kọjá, ilẹ̀ Iran fojú winná àjálù ojú afẹ́fẹ́ tó burú jù lọ́dún nígbàtí ọkọ̀ ojú òfúrufú tó ń lọ sí ilẹ̀ Armenia já lulẹ̀, èyí tó sekúpa ènìyàn méjìdínláàdọ́sàn án tó wà nínú rẹ̀.

reference: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.

input.mt: In the same month, a minefield in Masaadi crashed into a wall, killing seventy-six people.
input.src: Ni osu kan naa oko ofurufu miin sa koja oju ona ni Masaadi o de kolu ogiri, awon eyan metadinlogun lo ku.

reference: Aerosmith have cancelled their remaining concerts on their tour.

input.mt: Aerosmith cancelled the rest of the tour.
input.src: Aerosmith ti fagilé ìpàdé orin tó kù ní ìrìn àjò.

reference: Murray lost the first set in a tie break after both men held each and every serve in the set.

input.mt: Mure lost the knockout match after the men were all out on the podium.
input.src: Mure pàdánù eré kiní ní eré ìdíje titiipa lẹ́yìn tí àwọn okùnrin náà di gbogbo sefi ní sẹ́ti náà.

reference: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.

input.mt: Lakkha Singh has also performed the chhappan bhog bhajan with singer Raju Khandelwal.
input.src: Lakkha Singh ti se ìfàkalẹ̀ chhappan bhog bhajan pẹ̀lú. Olórin Raju Khandelwal ló ń kọ́ọ̀wọ́rìn pẹ̀lú rẹ̀.

reference: At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.

input.mt: At the opening ceremony of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata held an image control exhibition for the new Nintendo Revolution company.
input.src: Nínú àgbékalẹ̀ gbòógì àfihàn géèmù ilẹ̀ Tokyo tọjọ́ àlàmísì, ààrẹ ilẹ̀ Nintendo, Satoru Iwata se àfihàn ìsàkóso àwòrán fún iléẹṣẹ́ tuntun Nintendo Revolution.

reference: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.

input.mt: It is similar to a camera controller, which uses two sensors mounted on the user's forearm to rotate its position in three different shapes.
input.src: Ó jọ ohun ìdarí ẹ̀rọ amóhùnmáwòrán, ohun tí ẹ ó fi tukọ̀ lo sẹ́ńsọ̀ méjì tí wọ́n gbé sí ẹ̀gbẹ́tẹ̀ifisàn ẹni tí ó ń lòó láti yígun ipo rẹ̀ ni ọnà mẹ́ta ọ̀tọ̀ọ̀tọ̀.

reference: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.

input.mt: Jiankalo Fisisela regained control of the motorcycle, slowing him down to finish the race as soon as they started.
input.src: Jiankalo Fisisela o lè ṣàkóso moto mọ́,ó dẹ̀ mú u kí èrè sísá náà parí lẹ́sẹ̀kẹsẹ̀ tí wọ́n bẹ̀rẹ̀.

reference: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.

input.mt: His younger brother Fenando Alonso was in charge of most of the game, but he finished after the race, probably because he was not hit by a car.
input.src: Ọmọ egbẹ́ rẹ̀ Fenando Alonso ló darí fún púpọ̀ nínú ere ìdíjé, ṣùgbọ́n ó parí lẹ́yìn ìdádúro re, bóyá nítorí pé wọn ò fí ojúẹsẹ̀ṣ mọ́tò há dada.

reference: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.

input.mt: She was very beautiful, she sang well, she spoke about the press conference.
input.src: “Ó lẹ́wà lọ́pọ́, ó tún kọrin dáradára,” ó sọ́ nípa àkọọ́lẹ̀ ìpàdé àwọn oníròyìn.

reference: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."

input.mt: Every time I'm proud of him, my body rises from my heart.
input.src: “Gbogbo ìgbà tí a bá se ìgbáradì lóri rẹ̀ ni ara mi ma ń dìde látinú ọkàn mi wá.”

reference: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.

input.mt: About three minutes later, a group of photographers in the car had uncovered a large amount of protective foam that had fallen from the repository.
input.src: Nígbàtí yíò fi tó ìṣẹ́jú mẹ́ta ìsàfilọ́lẹ̀, ọ̀kan lára èrò ayàwòrán tó wà nínú ọkọ̀ ti sàfihàn ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ ẹyọ fóòmù ìdáàbòòbò tó já kúrò lára ilé ìképosí.

reference: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.

input.mt: Nevertheless, there is no denying that they caused the panic.
input.src: Síbẹ̀síbẹ̀, kò sí ẹ̀ròngbà wípé wọn mú ìdibàjẹ́ bá agbẹ́rù náà.

reference: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.

input.mt: Five minutes before dusk, a storm began to strike, and in one minute, the storm reached 70 kilometers per hour...then it started raining so hard that snow fell from the sky, everyone began to tremble, fear, scream, and run over their heads.
input.src: Ìṣẹ́jú márùn ún síwájú idán, ìjì bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí ni jà, bí ìṣẹ́jú kan si, ìjì náà dé orí àádọ́rin kìlómítà láàrín wákàtí kan…léyìn náà ni òjò bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí ni rọ̀ to bẹ́ẹ̀ ti dídún rẹ̀ lára dàbí abẹ́rẹ́, bẹ́ẹ̀ ni yìnyín ń bọ́ láti ojú ọ̀run, gbogbo ẹnìyàn bẹ̀rẹ̀ sí ní wá rìrì, wọ́n ń bẹ̀rù, wọ́n ń pariwo, wọ́n sì ń sá gba orí ara wọn.

reference: NHK also reported that the Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant in Niigata prefecture was operating normally.

input.mt: NHK reported that Nigata was working at the Kaṣiwasaki Kariwa Nuclear Power Plant.
input.src: NHK ròyìn pe Ilé ìgbìn agbára nukilia Kaṣiwasaki Kariwa ni Nigata kí ń ṣiṣẹ́ dédé tẹ̀lé.

reference: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.

input.mt: It is estimated that about 9,400 homes in the area were without children and about 100 were without electricity.
input.src: A gba pé àwọm ilé tó tó 9400 ní agbègbè náà wà láìsí omo àti pé àwọn tó tó 100 wà láìsí iná.

reference: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.

input.mt: According to media reports, at least five civilians were killed, the official report said as many as 30 were injured; but the final figures have yet to be released.
input.src: Awon iroyin miin wipe bii eyan mejo lo ku, iroyin osise jeri pe o to 30 to sise; sugbon a o tii mo awon onka ipari.

reference: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.

input.mt: The protesters found that they were cooking christer with wool paste and melamine atticyanuric acid.
input.src: Àwọn oníiwàdí ri wíp wọ́n se kírísítà pẹ̀lú ìtọo olóńgbò pẹ̀lú àdàlù melamine àticyanuric acid.

reference: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.

input.mt: According to him, five out of ten markets in Central America are taxed and paid.
input.src: Bee kede re, mejo ninu idamewa awon oja wa ni o gba owo ori nipase tarifi ni ilu Amerika aarin, aa wo e san.

reference: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.

input.mt: That does not make sense to me; it is certainly not good.
input.src: Ìyẹn ò ní ìtunmọ̀ sí mi; dájúdájú kò dára.

reference: Four skiers in the women's sitting group failed to finish their runs, and 45 of the 117 total skiers in the Giant Slalom failed to rank in the race.

input.mt: Four top scorers in the women's team failed to finish their career, and 45 of the 67 goaltenders in the Giant Slalom squad failed to place in the competition.
input.src: Àwọn afòlókè mẹ́rin nínú ẹgbẹ́ àwọn obìnrin kùnà láti parí àwọn iṣẹ́ wọn, àti márùndínláàdọ́ta nínú mẹ́tàdínlọ́gọ́fà àwọn olùfò nínú ikọ̀ Giant Slalom ló kùnà láti rípò nínú ìdíje.

reference: Crown Office, which is in overall charge of prosecutions, has indicated to journalists that no further comment will be made at least until indictment.

input.mt: The Crown Office, the public prosecutor's office, has revealed to reporters that there will be no response until the verdict.
input.src: Crown Office, ọ́fíísì tó wà nídìí ìbániṣẹjọ́, ti ṣàfihàn rẹ̀ fún àwọn oníròyìn pé òhun kò ní fèsì kankan mọ títí dìgbà ìdájọ́.

reference: The document, according to the leak, will refer to the borders dispute, which Palestine wants based on the borders before the 1967 Mideast War.

input.mt: Records have emerged, often pointing to the explosion of the gate, which the Palestinians were trying to overcome with the 1967 Mideast invasion.
input.src: Àwọn àkọọ́lẹ̀ gẹ́gẹ́ bí ó ti se jẹ jáde, ni ó ma tọ́ka sí ìfànfà ẹnubodè, léyìí tí ilẹ̀ Palestine fẹ́ níbàámun pẹ̀lú bí ibodè se wà sáájú oogun Mideast lọ́dún 1967.

reference: Other topics covered reportedly include the future state of Jerusalem which is sacred to both nations and the Jordan Valley issue.

input.mt: Part of the program's themes focused on the future of Jerusalem's dual-language republic and Jordan's petroleum economy.
input.src: Ara awon akori ti eto naa dale lori ni oro ojo iwaju ile olominira ti Jerrusalemu ti o se koko si orile ede mejeeji ati ti oro petele Jordani.

reference: Last month a presidential commission recommended the prior CEP's resignation as part of a package of measures to move the country towards new elections.

input.mt: Last month, a local committee called for the former CEP to be suspended as part of measures to get the city to hold new elections.
input.src: Ní oṣù tó kọjá, ìgbìmọ̀ àrẹ kan filọ̀ pe kí CEP tó wà nípò tẹ́lẹ̀, fi iṣẹ́ lẹ̀ gẹ́gẹ́ bí ara àwọn igbese láti mú kí ilu ṣe ìbò titun.

reference: The sometimes-violent protests were triggered by failure to hold elections, some due since 2011.

input.mt: Failure to vote has often sparked violent protests, some in 2011.
input.src: Àì lè ṣe ìdìbò ló má ń fa àwọn ìfẹ̀hónú tó le hàn ní ọ̀pọ̀ ìgbà, àwọn kan ní 2011.

reference: The Northern Marianas emergency management office said that there were no damages reported in the nation.

input.mt: The Office of Emergency Management for the Northern Marianas has confirmed that there are no records of corruption in the country.
input.src: Ọ́fìsì tó ń rísí ìsàkósó ìṣẹ̀lẹ̀ pàjáwìrì fún ẹkùn Northern Marianas ti sọ ọ́ di mímọ̀ wípé kò sí àkọsílẹ̀ ìbàjẹ́ kankan ní orílẹ̀èdè náà.

reference: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.

input.mt: Many of those arrested were imprisoned, but about six were presumed dead.
input.src: Ọ̀pọ̀lọpọ̀ àwọn tí a mú ní ìdógó ni wọ́n ti gbà kalẹ̀, ṣùgbọ́n bíi mẹ́fà ni wọ́n sàfimúnlẹ̀ pé wọ́n ti kú.

reference: Xinhua reported that government investigators recovered two 'black box' flight recorders on Wednesday.

input.mt: Xinhua reported that government investigators had recovered two historical black boxes from the war earlier in the day.
input.src: Xinhua sọ ọ́ di mímọ̀ wípé àwọn asèwádìí ìjọba ti gba àpótí dúdú àkọọ́lẹ̀ ogun méjì padà lọ́jọ́ọ̀rú.

reference: The Olympic gold medalist was due to swim in the 100m and 200m freestyle and in three relays at the Commonwealth Games, but due to his complaints his fitness has been in doubt.

input.mt: The Olympic champion was supposed to swim in the 100m and 200m breaststroke and the triple jump at the Olympics, but because of her voice controversy, she became disillusioned.
input.src: Asiwaju oniwúra ti Olimpiki ló yẹ kó wẹ̀ ní eré 100m àti 200m igbasile àti eré ikọlẹ mẹ́ta ní Ìdíje Olimpiki, ṣùgbọ́n torípé ó fohùn lẹ̀ wọn ṣàríyanjiyàn bó ya ara rẹ̀ yá gá.
